authors_text: Ka Ho Tong,Ka Wai Cheung,Xiaochuan Yu
title: ICME 2022 Few-shot LOGO detection top 9 solution
title_zh: ICME 2022 Few-shot LOGO检测前9名解决方案
abstract: ICME-2022 few-shot logo detection competition is held in May, 2022. Participants are required to develop a single model to detect logos by handling tiny logo instances, similar brands, and adversarial images at the same time, with limited annotations. Our team achieved rank 16 and 11 in the first and second round of the competition respectively, with a final rank of 9th. This technical report summarized our major techniques used in this competitions, and potential improvement.
summary: ICME-2022 few-shot logo detection competition is held in May, 2022. Participants are required to develop a single model to detect logos by handling tiny logo instances, similar brands, and adversarial images at the same time, with limited annotations. Our team achieved rank 16 and 11 in the first and second round of the competition respectively, with a final rank of 9th. This technical report summarized our major techniques used in this competitions, and potential improvement.
abstract_zh: ICME-2022 少样本徽标检测竞赛于 2022 年 5 月举行。参赛者需要开发一个单一模型，通过同时处理微小徽标实例、相似品牌和对抗性图像，并使用有限的注释来检测徽标。我队在第一轮和第二轮比赛中分别获得第16名和第11名，最终排名第9名。这份技术报告总结了我们在本次比赛中使用的主要技术以及潜在的改进之处。

AI.tldr: 论文介绍了ICME 2022小样本Logo检测竞赛中排名第九的解决方案，重点解决小尺寸Logo、相似品牌和对抗样本检测难题。
AI.motivation: 在标注数据有限的情况下，开发能够同时处理多类挑战性场景（如小目标、相似品牌、对抗样本）的统一检测模型。
AI.method: 采用元学习框架结合数据增强策略，通过迁移学习优化模型对少量样本的适应能力，并设计对抗训练机制提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在竞赛两轮测试中分别获得第16名和第11名，最终综合排名位列第9。
AI.conclusion: 现有方法在复杂场景下表现稳定，但需进一步优化数据增强策略与模型架构以提升检测精度。

authors_text: Zoya Bylinskii,Laura Herman,Aaron Hertzmann,Stefanie Hutka,Yile Zhang
title: Towards Better User Studies in Computer Graphics and Vision
title_zh: 迈向更好的计算机图形和视觉用户研究
comment: 18 pages of text, 6 pages of references, 3 figures, 1 table
comments: 18 pages of text, 6 pages of references, 3 figures, 1 table
abstract: Online crowdsourcing platforms have made it increasingly easy to perform evaluations of algorithm outputs with survey questions like "which image is better, A or B?", leading to their proliferation in vision and graphics research papers. Results of these studies are often used as quantitative evidence in support of a paper's contributions. On the one hand we argue that, when conducted hastily as an afterthought, such studies lead to an increase of uninformative, and, potentially, misleading conclusions. On the other hand, in these same communities, user research is underutilized in driving project direction and forecasting user needs and reception. We call for increased attention to both the design and reporting of user studies in computer vision and graphics papers towards (1) improved replicability and (2) improved project direction. Together with this call, we offer an overview of methodologies from user experience research (UXR), human-computer interaction (HCI), and applied perception to increase exposure to the available methodologies and best practices. We discuss foundational user research methods (e.g., needfinding) that are presently underutilized in computer vision and graphics research, but can provide valuable project direction. We provide further pointers to the literature for readers interested in exploring other UXR methodologies. Finally, we describe broader open issues and recommendations for the research community.
summary: Online crowdsourcing platforms have made it increasingly easy to perform evaluations of algorithm outputs with survey questions like "which image is better, A or B?", leading to their proliferation in vision and graphics research papers. Results of these studies are often used as quantitative evidence in support of a paper's contributions. On the one hand we argue that, when conducted hastily as an afterthought, such studies lead to an increase of uninformative, and, potentially, misleading conclusions. On the other hand, in these same communities, user research is underutilized in driving project direction and forecasting user needs and reception. We call for increased attention to both the design and reporting of user studies in computer vision and graphics papers towards (1) improved replicability and (2) improved project direction. Together with this call, we offer an overview of methodologies from user experience research (UXR), human-computer interaction (HCI), and applied perception to increase exposure to the available methodologies and best practices. We discuss foundational user research methods (e.g., needfinding) that are presently underutilized in computer vision and graphics research, but can provide valuable project direction. We provide further pointers to the literature for readers interested in exploring other UXR methodologies. Finally, we describe broader open issues and recommendations for the research community.
abstract_zh: 在线众包平台使得通过诸如“A 或 B 哪个图像更好？”之类的调查问题对算法输出进行评估变得越来越容易，从而导致视觉和图形研究论文的激增。这些研究的结果通常用作支持论文贡献的定量证据。一方面，我们认为，当事后匆忙进行此类研究时，会导致无信息且可能具有误导性的结论的增加。另一方面，在这些社区中，用户研究在推动项目方向和预测用户需求和接受方面没有得到充分利用。我们呼吁更多地关注计算机视觉和图形论文中用户研究的设计和报告，以实现（1）提高可复制性和（2）改进项目方向。与本次电话会议一起，我们概述了用户体验研究 (UXR)、人机交互 (HCI) 和应用感知的方法，以增加对可用方法和最佳实践的了解。我们讨论目前在计算机视觉和图形研究中未得到充分利用的基础用户研究方法（例如需求查找），但可以提供有价值的项目方向。我们为有兴趣探索其他 UXR 方法的读者提供进一步的文献参考。最后，我们为研究界描述了更广泛的开放问题和建议。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在呼吁计算机图形学与视觉领域更加重视用户研究的设计与报告，以提升研究的可重复性和项目方向性。
AI.motivation: 当前基于众包平台的用户研究常被仓促执行，导致结论缺乏信息量甚至误导，同时用户研究在驱动项目方向和预测用户需求方面的潜力未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 综述用户体验研究（UXR）、人机交互（HCI）及应用感知领域的研究方法，探讨基础用户研究方法（如需求挖掘）并提供相关文献指引。
AI.result: 系统梳理了现有方法论与最佳实践，指出现有研究中未充分利用的方法，并提出针对研究社区的开放性问题与改进建议。
AI.conclusion: 通过加强用户研究的设计与应用，可提升领域内研究的科学性与实用性，同时为未来研究方向提供更精准的指导。

authors_text: Zitao Liu,Qiongqiong Liu,Jiahao Chen,Shuyan Huang,Jiliang Tang,Weiqi Luo
title: pyKT: A Python Library to Benchmark Deep Learning based Knowledge Tracing Models
title_zh: pyKT：用于对基于深度学习的知识追踪模型进行基准测试的 Python 库
comment: Accepted in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
comments: Accepted in 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022) Track on Datasets and Benchmarks
abstract: Knowledge tracing (KT) is the task of using students' historical learning interaction data to model their knowledge mastery over time so as to make predictions on their future interaction performance. Recently, remarkable progress has been made of using various deep learning techniques to solve the KT problem. However, the success behind deep learning based knowledge tracing (DLKT) approaches is still left somewhat unknown and proper measurement and analysis of these DLKT approaches remain a challenge. First, data preprocessing procedures in existing works are often private and custom, which limits experimental standardization. Furthermore, existing DLKT studies often differ in terms of the evaluation protocol and are far away real-world educational contexts. To address these problems, we introduce a comprehensive python based benchmark platform, \textsc{pyKT}, to guarantee valid comparisons across DLKT methods via thorough evaluations. The \textsc{pyKT} library consists of a standardized set of integrated data preprocessing procedures on 7 popular datasets across different domains, and 10 frequently compared DLKT model implementations for transparent experiments. Results from our fine-grained and rigorous empirical KT studies yield a set of observations and suggestions for effective DLKT, e.g., wrong evaluation setting may cause label leakage that generally leads to performance inflation; and the improvement of many DLKT approaches is minimal compared to the very first DLKT model proposed by Piech et al. \cite{piech2015deep}. We have open sourced \textsc{pyKT} and our experimental results at https://pykt.org/. We welcome contributions from other research groups and practitioners.
summary: Knowledge tracing (KT) is the task of using students' historical learning interaction data to model their knowledge mastery over time so as to make predictions on their future interaction performance. Recently, remarkable progress has been made of using various deep learning techniques to solve the KT problem. However, the success behind deep learning based knowledge tracing (DLKT) approaches is still left somewhat unknown and proper measurement and analysis of these DLKT approaches remain a challenge. First, data preprocessing procedures in existing works are often private and custom, which limits experimental standardization. Furthermore, existing DLKT studies often differ in terms of the evaluation protocol and are far away real-world educational contexts. To address these problems, we introduce a comprehensive python based benchmark platform, \textsc{pyKT}, to guarantee valid comparisons across DLKT methods via thorough evaluations. The \textsc{pyKT} library consists of a standardized set of integrated data preprocessing procedures on 7 popular datasets across different domains, and 10 frequently compared DLKT model implementations for transparent experiments. Results from our fine-grained and rigorous empirical KT studies yield a set of observations and suggestions for effective DLKT, e.g., wrong evaluation setting may cause label leakage that generally leads to performance inflation; and the improvement of many DLKT approaches is minimal compared to the very first DLKT model proposed by Piech et al. \cite{piech2015deep}. We have open sourced \textsc{pyKT} and our experimental results at https://pykt.org/. We welcome contributions from other research groups and practitioners.
abstract_zh: 知识追踪（KT）是利用学生历史学习交互数据对他们的知识掌握程度随时间的变化进行建模，从而预测他们未来的交互表现的任务。最近，使用各种深度学习技术来解决 KT 问题已经取得了显着的进展。然而，基于深度学习的知识追踪 (DLKT) 方法背后的成功仍然有些未知，并且对这些 DLKT 方法的正确测量和分析仍然是一个挑战。首先，现有作品中的数据预处理程序通常是私有的和定制的，这限制了实验标准化。此外，现有的 DLKT 研究通常在评估方案方面有所不同，并且与现实世界的教育背景相距甚远。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一个基于 Python 的综合基准测试平台 \textsc{pyKT}，以通过彻底的评估来保证 DLKT 方法之间的有效比较。 \textsc{pyKT} 库包含一组标准化的集成数据预处理程序，针对不同领域的 7 个流行数据集，以及用于透明实验的 10 个经常比较的 DLKT 模型实现。我们细粒度和严格的实证 KT 研究的结果为有效的 DLKT 提供了一系列观察和建议，例如，错误的评估设置可能会导致标签泄漏，通常会导致性能膨胀；与 Piech 等人提出的第一个 DLKT 模型相比，许多 DLKT 方法的改进很小。 \引用{piech2015deep}。我们在 https://pykt.org/ 上开源了 \textsc{pyKT} 和我们的实验结果。我们欢迎其他研究小组和从业者的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为pyKT的Python库，用于标准化评估基于深度学习的知识追踪（DLKT）模型。
AI.motivation: 现有DLKT研究缺乏统一的数据预处理流程和评估标准，导致实验结果难以横向比较，且与真实教育场景存在差距。
AI.method: 开发pyKT库，包含7个领域的标准化数据预处理流程、10种常见DLKT模型实现，并通过细粒度实验验证模型效果。
AI.result: 发现错误的评估设置可能导致标签泄露和性能虚高，且多数DLKT方法相比首个模型改进有限。
AI.conclusion: pyKT为DLKT研究提供标准化基准，揭示了当前方法的局限性，并呼吁社区贡献以完善平台。

search_text: pyKT: A Python Library to Benchmark Deep Learning based Knowledge Tracing Models pyKT：用于对基于深度学习的知识追踪模型进行基准测试的 Python 库 Knowledge tracing (KT) is the task of using students' historical learning interaction data to model their knowledge mastery over time so as to make predictions on their future interaction performance. Recently, remarkable progress has been made of using various deep learning techniques to solve the KT problem. However, the success behind deep learning based knowledge tracing (DLKT) approaches is still left somewhat unknown and proper measurement and analysis of these DLKT approaches remain a challenge. First, data preprocessing procedures in existing works are often private and custom, which limits experimental standardization. Furthermore, existing DLKT studies often differ in terms of the evaluation protocol and are far away real-world educational contexts. To address these problems, we introduce a comprehensive python based benchmark platform, \textsc{pyKT}, to guarantee valid comparisons across DLKT methods via thorough evaluations. The \textsc{pyKT} library consists of a standardized set of integrated data preprocessing procedures on 7 popular datasets across different domains, and 10 frequently compared DLKT model implementations for transparent experiments. Results from our fine-grained and rigorous empirical KT studies yield a set of observations and suggestions for effective DLKT, e.g., wrong evaluation setting may cause label leakage that generally leads to performance inflation; and the improvement of many DLKT approaches is minimal compared to the very first DLKT model proposed by Piech et al. \cite{piech2015deep}. We have open sourced \textsc{pyKT} and our experimental results at https://pykt.org/. We welcome contributions from other research groups and practitioners. 知识追踪（KT）是利用学生历史学习交互数据对他们的知识掌握程度随时间的变化进行建模，从而预测他们未来的交互表现的任务。最近，使用各种深度学习技术来解决 KT 问题已经取得了显着的进展。然而，基于深度学习的知识追踪 (DLKT) 方法背后的成功仍然有些未知，并且对这些 DLKT 方法的正确测量和分析仍然是一个挑战。首先，现有作品中的数据预处理程序通常是私有的和定制的，这限制了实验标准化。此外，现有的 DLKT 研究通常在评估方案方面有所不同，并且与现实世界的教育背景相距甚远。为了解决这些问题，我们引入了一个基于 Python 的综合基准测试平台 \textsc{pyKT}，以通过彻底的评估来保证 DLKT 方法之间的有效比较。 \textsc{pyKT} 库包含一组标准化的集成数据预处理程序，针对不同领域的 7 个流行数据集，以及用于透明实验的 10 个经常比较的 DLKT 模型实现。我们细粒度和严格的实证 KT 研究的结果为有效的 DLKT 提供了一系列观察和建议，例如，错误的评估设置可能会导致标签泄漏，通常会导致性能膨胀；与 Piech 等人提出的第一个 DLKT 模型相比，许多 DLKT 方法的改进很小。 \引用{piech2015deep}。我们在 https://pykt.org/ 上开源了 \textsc{pyKT} 和我们的实验结果。我们欢迎其他研究小组和从业者的贡献。 本文介绍了一个名为pyKT的Python库，用于标准化评估基于深度学习的知识追踪（DLKT）模型。 Zitao Liu,Qiongqiong Liu,Jiahao Chen,Shuyan Huang,Jiliang Tang,Weiqi Luo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY

authors_text: Kailai Zhou,Yibo Wang,Tao Lv,Yunqian Li,Linsen Chen,Qiu Shen,Xun Cao
title: Explore Spatio-temporal Aggregation for Insubstantial Object Detection: Benchmark Dataset and Baseline
title_zh: 探索非实质性物体检测的时空聚合：基准数据集和基线
abstract: We endeavor on a rarely explored task named Insubstantial Object Detection (IOD), which aims to localize the object with following characteristics: (1) amorphous shape with indistinct boundary; (2) similarity to surroundings; (3) absence in color. Accordingly, it is far more challenging to distinguish insubstantial objects in a single static frame and the collaborative representation of spatial and temporal information is crucial. Thus, we construct an IOD-Video dataset comprised of 600 videos (141,017 frames) covering various distances, sizes, visibility, and scenes captured by different spectral ranges. In addition, we develop a spatio-temporal aggregation framework for IOD, in which different backbones are deployed and a spatio-temporal aggregation loss (STAloss) is elaborately designed to leverage the consistency along the time axis. Experiments conducted on IOD-Video dataset demonstrate that spatio-temporal aggregation can significantly improve the performance of IOD. We hope our work will attract further researches into this valuable yet challenging task. The code will be available at: \url{https://github.com/CalayZhou/IOD-Video}.
summary: We endeavor on a rarely explored task named Insubstantial Object Detection (IOD), which aims to localize the object with following characteristics: (1) amorphous shape with indistinct boundary; (2) similarity to surroundings; (3) absence in color. Accordingly, it is far more challenging to distinguish insubstantial objects in a single static frame and the collaborative representation of spatial and temporal information is crucial. Thus, we construct an IOD-Video dataset comprised of 600 videos (141,017 frames) covering various distances, sizes, visibility, and scenes captured by different spectral ranges. In addition, we develop a spatio-temporal aggregation framework for IOD, in which different backbones are deployed and a spatio-temporal aggregation loss (STAloss) is elaborately designed to leverage the consistency along the time axis. Experiments conducted on IOD-Video dataset demonstrate that spatio-temporal aggregation can significantly improve the performance of IOD. We hope our work will attract further researches into this valuable yet challenging task. The code will be available at: \url{https://github.com/CalayZhou/IOD-Video}.
abstract_zh: 我们致力于一项很少被探索的任务，名为非实质性物体检测（IOD），其目的是定位具有以下特征的物体：（1）边界不明确的无定形形状； (2)与周围环境的相似性； (3)颜色缺失。因此，在单个静态框架中区分非实质性对象更具挑战性，空间和时间信息的协作表示至关重要。因此，我们构建了一个由 600 个视频（141,017 帧）组成的 IOD-Video 数据集，涵盖不同距离、大小、可见度和不同光谱范围捕获的场景。此外，我们还开发了一个 IOD 时空聚合框架，其中部署了不同的骨干网，并精心设计了时空聚合损失（STAloss）以利用沿时间轴的一致性。在IOD-Video数据集上进行的实验表明，时空聚合可以显着提高IOD的性能。我们希望我们的工作能够吸引对这项有价值但具有挑战性的任务的进一步研究。该代码位于：\url{https://github.com/CalayZhou/IOD-Video}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于非实质性物体检测（IOD）的时空聚合方法，并构建了IOD-Video基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 非实质性物体具有形状不规则、与背景相似且缺乏颜色特征，导致单帧图像难以检测，需依赖时空信息进行区分。
AI.method: 构建包含600个视频的IOD-Video数据集，设计时空聚合框架，采用多主干网络结构并提出时空一致性损失函数（STAloss）。
AI.result: 实验表明时空聚合方法显著提升了非实质性物体检测的性能，验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为IOD任务提供了基准数据集和有效方法，期望推动该领域进一步研究。

authors_text: Jiansheng Fang,Anwei Li,Pu-Yun OuYang,Jiajian Li,Jingwen Wang,Hongbo Liu,Fang-Yun Xie,Jiang Liu
title: Weighted Concordance Index Loss-based Multimodal Survival Modeling for Radiation Encephalopathy Assessment in Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma Radiotherapy
title_zh: 基于加权一致性指数损失的多模态生存模型用于鼻咽癌放射治疗放射性脑病评估
abstract: Radiation encephalopathy (REP) is the most common complication for nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) radiotherapy. It is highly desirable to assist clinicians in optimizing the NPC radiotherapy regimen to reduce radiotherapy-induced temporal lobe injury (RTLI) according to the probability of REP onset. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first exploration of predicting radiotherapy-induced REP by jointly exploiting image and non-image data in NPC radiotherapy regimen. We cast REP prediction as a survival analysis task and evaluate the predictive accuracy in terms of the concordance index (CI). We design a deep multimodal survival network (MSN) with two feature extractors to learn discriminative features from multimodal data. One feature extractor imposes feature selection on non-image data, and the other learns visual features from images. Because the priorly balanced CI (BCI) loss function directly maximizing the CI is sensitive to uneven sampling per batch. Hence, we propose a novel weighted CI (WCI) loss function to leverage all REP samples effectively by assigning their different weights with a dual average operation. We further introduce a temperature hyper-parameter for our WCI to sharpen the risk difference of sample pairs to help model convergence. We extensively evaluate our WCI on a private dataset to demonstrate its favourability against its counterparts. The experimental results also show multimodal data of NPC radiotherapy can bring more gains for REP risk prediction.
summary: Radiation encephalopathy (REP) is the most common complication for nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) radiotherapy. It is highly desirable to assist clinicians in optimizing the NPC radiotherapy regimen to reduce radiotherapy-induced temporal lobe injury (RTLI) according to the probability of REP onset. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first exploration of predicting radiotherapy-induced REP by jointly exploiting image and non-image data in NPC radiotherapy regimen. We cast REP prediction as a survival analysis task and evaluate the predictive accuracy in terms of the concordance index (CI). We design a deep multimodal survival network (MSN) with two feature extractors to learn discriminative features from multimodal data. One feature extractor imposes feature selection on non-image data, and the other learns visual features from images. Because the priorly balanced CI (BCI) loss function directly maximizing the CI is sensitive to uneven sampling per batch. Hence, we propose a novel weighted CI (WCI) loss function to leverage all REP samples effectively by assigning their different weights with a dual average operation. We further introduce a temperature hyper-parameter for our WCI to sharpen the risk difference of sample pairs to help model convergence. We extensively evaluate our WCI on a private dataset to demonstrate its favourability against its counterparts. The experimental results also show multimodal data of NPC radiotherapy can bring more gains for REP risk prediction.
abstract_zh: 放射性脑病（REP）是鼻咽癌（NPC）放疗最常见的并发症。非常需要帮助临床医生根据 REP 发生的概率优化 NPC 放疗方案，以减少放疗引起的颞叶损伤（RTLI）。据我们所知，这是首次在鼻咽癌放疗方案中联合利用图像和非图像数据来预测放疗引起的 REP。我们将 REP 预测作为生存分析任务，并根据一致性指数 (CI) 评估预测准确性。我们设计了一个带有两个特征提取器的深度多模态生存网络（MSN），以从多模态数据中学习判别性特征。一个特征提取器对非图像数据进行特征选择，另一个特征提取器从图像中学习视觉特征。因为直接最大化 CI 的先前平衡 CI (BCI) 损失函数对每批次的不均匀采样很敏感。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的加权 CI (WCI) 损失函数，通过对偶平均操作分配不同的权重来有效地利用所有 REP 样本。我们进一步为 WCI 引入一个温度超参数，以锐化样本对的风险差异，以帮助模型收敛。我们在私人数据集上广泛评估我们的 WCI，以证明其相对于同行的优势。实验结果还表明，NPC放疗的多模态数据可以为REP风险预测带来更多收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于加权一致性指数损失的多模态生存分析模型，用于鼻咽癌放疗中放射性脑病风险的预测。
AI.motivation: 放射性脑病（REP）是鼻咽癌放疗的主要并发症，现有方法难以有效整合影像与非影像多模态数据进行REP风险预测，亟需优化放疗方案以降低损伤风险。
AI.method: 设计深度多模态生存网络（MSN），包含图像特征提取器与非图像特征选择器，提出加权一致性指数（WCI）损失函数，通过双平均操作分配样本权重并引入温度参数增强模型收敛性。
AI.result: 在私有数据集上验证表明，WCI损失函数优于传统方法，多模态数据融合显著提升REP风险预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态数据结合WCI损失函数可有效提升REP风险预测性能，为鼻咽癌放疗方案优化提供新思路。

search_text: Weighted Concordance Index Loss-based Multimodal Survival Modeling for Radiation Encephalopathy Assessment in Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma Radiotherapy 基于加权一致性指数损失的多模态生存模型用于鼻咽癌放射治疗放射性脑病评估 Radiation encephalopathy (REP) is the most common complication for nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) radiotherapy. It is highly desirable to assist clinicians in optimizing the NPC radiotherapy regimen to reduce radiotherapy-induced temporal lobe injury (RTLI) according to the probability of REP onset. To the best of our knowledge, it is the first exploration of predicting radiotherapy-induced REP by jointly exploiting image and non-image data in NPC radiotherapy regimen. We cast REP prediction as a survival analysis task and evaluate the predictive accuracy in terms of the concordance index (CI). We design a deep multimodal survival network (MSN) with two feature extractors to learn discriminative features from multimodal data. One feature extractor imposes feature selection on non-image data, and the other learns visual features from images. Because the priorly balanced CI (BCI) loss function directly maximizing the CI is sensitive to uneven sampling per batch. Hence, we propose a novel weighted CI (WCI) loss function to leverage all REP samples effectively by assigning their different weights with a dual average operation. We further introduce a temperature hyper-parameter for our WCI to sharpen the risk difference of sample pairs to help model convergence. We extensively evaluate our WCI on a private dataset to demonstrate its favourability against its counterparts. The experimental results also show multimodal data of NPC radiotherapy can bring more gains for REP risk prediction. 放射性脑病（REP）是鼻咽癌（NPC）放疗最常见的并发症。非常需要帮助临床医生根据 REP 发生的概率优化 NPC 放疗方案，以减少放疗引起的颞叶损伤（RTLI）。据我们所知，这是首次在鼻咽癌放疗方案中联合利用图像和非图像数据来预测放疗引起的 REP。我们将 REP 预测作为生存分析任务，并根据一致性指数 (CI) 评估预测准确性。我们设计了一个带有两个特征提取器的深度多模态生存网络（MSN），以从多模态数据中学习判别性特征。一个特征提取器对非图像数据进行特征选择，另一个特征提取器从图像中学习视觉特征。因为直接最大化 CI 的先前平衡 CI (BCI) 损失函数对每批次的不均匀采样很敏感。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的加权 CI (WCI) 损失函数，通过对偶平均操作分配不同的权重来有效地利用所有 REP 样本。我们进一步为 WCI 引入一个温度超参数，以锐化样本对的风险差异，以帮助模型收敛。我们在私人数据集上广泛评估我们的 WCI，以证明其相对于同行的优势。实验结果还表明，NPC放疗的多模态数据可以为REP风险预测带来更多收益。 本文提出一种基于加权一致性指数损失的多模态生存分析模型，用于鼻咽癌放疗中放射性脑病风险的预测。 Jiansheng Fang,Anwei Li,Pu-Yun OuYang,Jiajian Li,Jingwen Wang,Hongbo Liu,Fang-Yun Xie,Jiang Liu eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.QM

title: Efficient Adaptive Federated Optimization of Federated Learning for IoT
title_zh: 物联网联邦学习的高效自适应联邦优化
abstract: The proliferation of the Internet of Things (IoT) and widespread use of devices with sensing, computing, and communication capabilities have motivated intelligent applications empowered by artificial intelligence. The classical artificial intelligence algorithms require centralized data collection and processing which are challenging in realistic intelligent IoT applications due to growing data privacy concerns and distributed datasets. Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a distributed privacy-preserving learning framework that enables IoT devices to train global model through sharing model parameters. However, inefficiency due to frequent parameters transmissions significantly reduce FL performance. Existing acceleration algorithms consist of two main type including local update considering trade-offs between communication and computation and parameter compression considering trade-offs between communication and precision. Jointly considering these two trade-offs and adaptively balancing their impacts on convergence have remained unresolved. To solve the problem, this paper proposes a novel efficient adaptive federated optimization (EAFO) algorithm to improve efficiency of FL, which minimizes the learning error via jointly considering two variables including local update and parameter compression and enables FL to adaptively adjust the two variables and balance trade-offs among computation, communication and precision. The experiment results illustrate that comparing with state-of-the-art algorithms, the proposed EAFO can achieve higher accuracies faster.
summary: The proliferation of the Internet of Things (IoT) and widespread use of devices with sensing, computing, and communication capabilities have motivated intelligent applications empowered by artificial intelligence. The classical artificial intelligence algorithms require centralized data collection and processing which are challenging in realistic intelligent IoT applications due to growing data privacy concerns and distributed datasets. Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a distributed privacy-preserving learning framework that enables IoT devices to train global model through sharing model parameters. However, inefficiency due to frequent parameters transmissions significantly reduce FL performance. Existing acceleration algorithms consist of two main type including local update considering trade-offs between communication and computation and parameter compression considering trade-offs between communication and precision. Jointly considering these two trade-offs and adaptively balancing their impacts on convergence have remained unresolved. To solve the problem, this paper proposes a novel efficient adaptive federated optimization (EAFO) algorithm to improve efficiency of FL, which minimizes the learning error via jointly considering two variables including local update and parameter compression and enables FL to adaptively adjust the two variables and balance trade-offs among computation, communication and precision. The experiment results illustrate that comparing with state-of-the-art algorithms, the proposed EAFO can achieve higher accuracies faster.
abstract_zh: 物联网（IoT）的普及和具有传感、计算和通信能力的设备的广泛使用，催生了人工智能赋能的智能应用。经典的人工智能算法需要集中的数据收集和处理，由于日益增长的数据隐私问题和分布式数据集，这在现实的智能物联网应用中面临着挑战。联邦学习（FL）已成为一种分布式隐私保护学习框架，使物联网设备能够通过共享模型参数来训练全局模型。然而，频繁的参数传输导致的低效率会显着降低 FL 性能。现有的加速算法主要包括两种类型，包括考虑通信和计算之间权衡的局部更新和考虑通信和精度之间权衡的参数压缩。共同考虑这两种权衡并自适应地平衡它们对收敛的影响仍未得到解决。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新颖的高效自适应联邦优化（EAFO）算法来提高FL的效率，该算法通过共同考虑局部更新和参数压缩两个变量来最小化学习误差，并使FL能够自适应地调整这两个变量并平衡计算、通信和精度之间的权衡。实验结果表明，与最先进的算法相比，所提出的 EAFO 可以更快地达到更高的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效自适应联邦优化算法（EAFO），通过联合考虑本地更新和参数压缩，提升联邦学习在物联网场景下的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统AI算法依赖集中式数据处理，难以满足物联网场景下的隐私保护和分布式数据需求；现有联邦学习加速方法无法有效平衡通信、计算与精度的权衡。
AI.method: 设计EAFO算法，联合优化本地更新频率与参数压缩策略，自适应调整二者以平衡计算开销、通信成本与模型精度。
AI.result: 实验表明，EAFO相比现有算法在收敛速度和模型准确率上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: EAFO通过动态平衡通信与计算资源，有效解决了联邦学习效率瓶颈，为物联网智能应用提供了更优解决方案。

title: A Hybrid Adjacency and Time-Based Data Structure for Analysis of Temporal Networks
title_zh: 用于时态网络分析的混合邻接和基于时间的数据结构
comment: Extended version of COMPLEX NETWORKS 2021 paper
comments: Extended version of COMPLEX NETWORKS 2021 paper
abstract: Dynamic or temporal networks enable representation of time-varying edges between nodes. Conventional adjacency-based data structures used for storing networks such as adjacency lists were designed without incorporating time and can thus quickly retrieve all edges between two sets of nodes (a node-based slice) but cannot quickly retrieve all edges that occur within a given time interval (a time-based slice). We propose a hybrid data structure for storing temporal networks that stores edges in both an adjacency dictionary, enabling rapid node-based slices, and an interval tree, enabling rapid time-based slices. Our hybrid structure also enables compound slices, where one needs to slice both over nodes and time, either by slicing first over nodes or slicing first over time. We further propose an approach for predictive compound slicing, which attempts to predict whether a node-based or time-based compound slice is more efficient. We evaluate our hybrid data structure on many real temporal network data sets and find that they achieve much faster slice times than existing data structures with only a modest increase in creation time and memory usage.
summary: Dynamic or temporal networks enable representation of time-varying edges between nodes. Conventional adjacency-based data structures used for storing networks such as adjacency lists were designed without incorporating time and can thus quickly retrieve all edges between two sets of nodes (a node-based slice) but cannot quickly retrieve all edges that occur within a given time interval (a time-based slice). We propose a hybrid data structure for storing temporal networks that stores edges in both an adjacency dictionary, enabling rapid node-based slices, and an interval tree, enabling rapid time-based slices. Our hybrid structure also enables compound slices, where one needs to slice both over nodes and time, either by slicing first over nodes or slicing first over time. We further propose an approach for predictive compound slicing, which attempts to predict whether a node-based or time-based compound slice is more efficient. We evaluate our hybrid data structure on many real temporal network data sets and find that they achieve much faster slice times than existing data structures with only a modest increase in creation time and memory usage.
abstract_zh: 动态或时间网络可以表示节点之间随时间变化的边。用于存储网络的传统基于邻接的数据结构（例如邻接列表）在设计时没有考虑时间，因此可以快速检索两组节点之间的所有边（基于节点的切片），但无法快速检索给定时间间隔内出现的所有边（基于时间的切片）。我们提出了一种用于存储时间网络的混合数据结构，该结构将边存储在邻接字典中，从而实现基于节点的快速切片，以及区间树，从而实现基于时间的快速切片。我们的混合结构还支持复合切片，其中需要在节点和时间上进行切片，要么首先在节点上切片，要么首先在时间上切片。我们进一步提出了一种预测复合切片的方法，该方法尝试预测基于节点的复合切片还是基于时间的复合切片是否更有效。我们在许多实时网络数据集上评估我们的混合数据结构，发现它们比现有数据结构实现更快的切片时间，而创建时间和内存使用量仅略有增加。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合邻接表与时间区间树的数据结构，用于高效处理动态网络的时序查询问题。
AI.motivation: 传统邻接表结构无法快速检索特定时间区间的边，而时间区间树结构难以高效处理节点关系查询，需兼顾两者需求。
AI.method: 设计包含邻接字典（支持节点切片）与区间树（支持时间切片）的混合结构，并提出预测性复合切片方法优化查询顺序。
AI.result: 在多个真实时序网络数据集上验证，混合结构在切片速度上显著优于现有方法，仅带来适度的构建时间和内存开销增加。
AI.conclusion: 混合数据结构有效解决了动态网络的时序查询效率问题，为时空复合分析提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Jesse Scott,John Challis,Robert T. Collins,Yanxi Liu
title: Image-based Stability Quantification
title_zh: 基于图像的稳定性量化
abstract: Quantitative evaluation of human stability using foot pressure/force measurement hardware and motion capture (mocap) technology is expensive, time consuming, and restricted to the laboratory. We propose a novel image-based method to estimate three key components for stability computation: Center of Mass (CoM), Base of Support (BoS), and Center of Pressure (CoP). Furthermore, we quantitatively validate our image-based methods for computing two classic stability measures, CoMtoCoP and CoMtoBoS distances, against values generated directly from laboratory-based sensor output (ground truth) using a publicly available, multi-modality (mocap, foot pressure, two-view videos), ten-subject human motion dataset. Using Leave One Subject Out (LOSO) cross-validation, experimental results show: 1) our image-based CoM estimation method (CoMNet) consistently outperforms state-of-the-art inertial sensor-based CoM estimation techniques; 2) stability computed by our image-based method combined with insole foot pressure sensor data produces consistent, strong, and statistically significant correlation with ground truth stability measures (CoMtoCoP r = 0.79 p < 0.001, CoMtoBoS r = 0.75 p < 0.001); 3) our fully image-based estimation of stability produces consistent, positive, and statistically significant correlation on the two stability metrics (CoMtoCoP r = 0.31 p < 0.001, CoMtoBoS r = 0.22 p < 0.043). Our study provides promising quantitative evidence for the feasibility of image-based stability evaluation in natural environments.
summary: Quantitative evaluation of human stability using foot pressure/force measurement hardware and motion capture (mocap) technology is expensive, time consuming, and restricted to the laboratory. We propose a novel image-based method to estimate three key components for stability computation: Center of Mass (CoM), Base of Support (BoS), and Center of Pressure (CoP). Furthermore, we quantitatively validate our image-based methods for computing two classic stability measures, CoMtoCoP and CoMtoBoS distances, against values generated directly from laboratory-based sensor output (ground truth) using a publicly available, multi-modality (mocap, foot pressure, two-view videos), ten-subject human motion dataset. Using Leave One Subject Out (LOSO) cross-validation, experimental results show: 1) our image-based CoM estimation method (CoMNet) consistently outperforms state-of-the-art inertial sensor-based CoM estimation techniques; 2) stability computed by our image-based method combined with insole foot pressure sensor data produces consistent, strong, and statistically significant correlation with ground truth stability measures (CoMtoCoP r = 0.79 p < 0.001, CoMtoBoS r = 0.75 p < 0.001); 3) our fully image-based estimation of stability produces consistent, positive, and statistically significant correlation on the two stability metrics (CoMtoCoP r = 0.31 p < 0.001, CoMtoBoS r = 0.22 p < 0.043). Our study provides promising quantitative evidence for the feasibility of image-based stability evaluation in natural environments.
abstract_zh: 使用足部压力/力测量硬件和动作捕捉 (mocap) 技术对人体稳定性进行定量评估不仅昂贵、耗时，而且仅限于实验室。我们提出了一种新颖的基于图像的方法来估计稳定性计算的三个关键组成部分：质心（CoM）、支撑基部（BoS）和压力中心（CoP）。此外，我们使用公开的多模态（动作捕捉、足部压力、双视图视频）、十个主题的人体运动数据集，根据基于实验室的传感器输出（地面实况）直接生成的值，定量验证了用于计算两种经典稳定性测量（CoMtoCoP 和 CoMtoBoS 距离）的基于图像的方法。使用留一主体排除 (LOSO) 交叉验证，实验结果表明：1) 我们的基于图像的 CoM 估计方法 (CoMNet) 始终优于最先进的基于惯性传感器的 CoM 估计技术； 2) 通过我们基于图像的方法结合鞋垫足部压力传感器数据计算出的稳定性与地面实况稳定性测量值产生一致、强烈且统计显着的相关性（CoMtoCoP r = 0.79 p < 0.001，CoMtoBoS r = 0.75 p < 0.001）； 3) 我们完全基于图像的稳定性估计在两个稳定性指标上产生了一致的、正的、统计上显着的相关性（CoMtoCoP r = 0.31 p < 0.001，CoMtoBoS r = 0.22 p < 0.043）。我们的研究为自然环境中基于图像的稳定性评估的可行性提供了有希望的定量证据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像的人体稳定性量化方法，用于估计人体的质心（CoM）、支撑基底（BoS）和压力中心（CoP）。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于足部压力/力测量硬件和运动捕捉技术的稳定性评估方法成本高、耗时且局限于实验室环境，因此需要一种更便捷的图像为基础的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于图像的方法（CoMNet），用于估计CoM、BoS和CoP，并使用多模态数据集对基于图像的稳定性指标与实验室传感器数据进行了验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，基于图像的CoM估计方法优于现有惯性传感器方法，结合足部压力传感器数据的稳定性评估与真实值具有显著相关性（CoMtoCoP r = 0.79，CoMtoBoS r = 0.75），而完全基于图像的稳定性评估也显示了显著的相关性（CoMtoCoP r = 0.31，CoMtoBoS r = 0.22）。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为在自然环境中使用基于图像的稳定性评估提供了可行性和量化证据。

title: Context matters for fairness -- a case study on the effect of spatial distribution shifts
title_zh: 背景对于公平至关重要——空间分布变化影响的案例研究
abstract: With the ever growing involvement of data-driven AI-based decision making technologies in our daily social lives, the fairness of these systems is becoming a crucial phenomenon. However, an important and often challenging aspect in utilizing such systems is to distinguish validity for the range of their application especially under distribution shifts, i.e., when a model is deployed on data with different distribution than the training set. In this paper, we present a case study on the newly released American Census datasets, a reconstruction of the popular Adult dataset, to illustrate the importance of context for fairness and show how remarkably can spatial distribution shifts affect predictive- and fairness-related performance of a model. The problem persists for fairness-aware learning models with the effects of context-specific fairness interventions differing across the states and different population groups. Our study suggests that robustness to distribution shifts is necessary before deploying a model to another context.
summary: With the ever growing involvement of data-driven AI-based decision making technologies in our daily social lives, the fairness of these systems is becoming a crucial phenomenon. However, an important and often challenging aspect in utilizing such systems is to distinguish validity for the range of their application especially under distribution shifts, i.e., when a model is deployed on data with different distribution than the training set. In this paper, we present a case study on the newly released American Census datasets, a reconstruction of the popular Adult dataset, to illustrate the importance of context for fairness and show how remarkably can spatial distribution shifts affect predictive- and fairness-related performance of a model. The problem persists for fairness-aware learning models with the effects of context-specific fairness interventions differing across the states and different population groups. Our study suggests that robustness to distribution shifts is necessary before deploying a model to another context.
abstract_zh: 随着数据驱动的人工智能决策技术越来越多地融入我们的日常生活，这些系统的公平性正在成为一个至关重要的现象。然而，使用此类系统的一个重要且通常具有挑战性的方面是区分其应用范围的有效性，特别是在分布变化的情况下，即当模型部署在与训练集分布不同的数据上时。在本文中，我们提出了一个关于新发布的美国人口普查数据集的案例研究，这是流行的成人数据集的重建，以说明背景对公平性的重要性，并展示空间分布变化如何显着影响模型的预测和公平性相关性能。对于具有公平意识的学习模型来说，问题仍然存在，具体情况下的公平干预措施的效果因州和不同人群而异。我们的研究表明，在将模型部署到另一个环境之前，对分布变化的鲁棒性是必要的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究探讨空间分布变化对AI模型公平性的影响，强调上下文在确保模型公平性中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 随着AI决策系统在社会中的广泛应用，确保其公平性成为关键挑战，尤其是在数据分布变化的场景下，需明确上下文对公平性的影响。
AI.method: 采用美国人口普查数据集及Adult数据集的重建，通过案例研究分析空间分布变化对预测性能和公平性指标的影响。
AI.result: 研究发现空间分布变化显著影响模型预测性能与公平性，且不同州和人口群体的公平干预效果存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 结论强调在模型部署前需确保其对分布变化的鲁棒性，以保障不同上下文中的公平性。

authors_text: Ernst Moritz Hahn,Mateo Perez,Sven Schewe,Fabio Somenzi,Ashutosh Trivedi,Dominik Wojtczak
title: Recursive Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 递归强化学习
abstract: Recursion is the fundamental paradigm to finitely describe potentially infinite objects. As state-of-the-art reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms cannot directly reason about recursion, they must rely on the practitioner's ingenuity in designing a suitable "flat" representation of the environment. The resulting manual feature constructions and approximations are cumbersome and error-prone; their lack of transparency hampers scalability. To overcome these challenges, we develop RL algorithms capable of computing optimal policies in environments described as a collection of Markov decision processes (MDPs) that can recursively invoke one another. Each constituent MDP is characterized by several entry and exit points that correspond to input and output values of these invocations. These recursive MDPs (or RMDPs) are expressively equivalent to probabilistic pushdown systems (with call-stack playing the role of the pushdown stack), and can model probabilistic programs with recursive procedural calls. We introduce Recursive Q-learning -- a model-free RL algorithm for RMDPs -- and prove that it converges for finite, single-exit and deterministic multi-exit RMDPs under mild assumptions.
summary: Recursion is the fundamental paradigm to finitely describe potentially infinite objects. As state-of-the-art reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms cannot directly reason about recursion, they must rely on the practitioner's ingenuity in designing a suitable "flat" representation of the environment. The resulting manual feature constructions and approximations are cumbersome and error-prone; their lack of transparency hampers scalability. To overcome these challenges, we develop RL algorithms capable of computing optimal policies in environments described as a collection of Markov decision processes (MDPs) that can recursively invoke one another. Each constituent MDP is characterized by several entry and exit points that correspond to input and output values of these invocations. These recursive MDPs (or RMDPs) are expressively equivalent to probabilistic pushdown systems (with call-stack playing the role of the pushdown stack), and can model probabilistic programs with recursive procedural calls. We introduce Recursive Q-learning -- a model-free RL algorithm for RMDPs -- and prove that it converges for finite, single-exit and deterministic multi-exit RMDPs under mild assumptions.
abstract_zh: 递归是有限描述潜在无限对象的基本范式。由于最先进的强化学习（RL）算法无法直接推理递归，因此它们必须依靠实践者的聪明才智来设计合适的环境“平面”表示。由此产生的手动特征构造和近似非常麻烦且容易出错；它们缺乏透明度阻碍了可扩展性。为了克服这些挑战，我们开发了 RL 算法，能够在被描述为可相互递归调用的马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 集合的环境中计算最优策略。每个组成的 MDP 都具有与这些调用的输入和输出值相对应的多个入口点和出口点的特征。这些递归 MDP（或 RMDP）在表达上等同于概率下推系统（调用堆栈扮演下推堆栈的角色），并且可以使用递归过程调用对概率程序进行建模。我们引入了递归 Q 学习（一种用于 RMDP 的无模型 RL 算法），并证明它在温和假设下对于有限、单出口和确定性多出口 RMDP 是收敛的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种能够处理递归结构环境的强化学习算法，解决了传统RL在处理递归问题时需要人工设计扁平表示的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习算法无法直接处理递归结构，必须依赖人工设计的环境表示，导致特征构造繁琐且缺乏透明度，影响了方法的可扩展性。
AI.method: 开发了递归Q学习算法，将环境建模为可相互调用的递归马尔可夫决策过程（RMDPs），并通过入口和出口点捕捉递归调用的输入输出关系。
AI.result: 证明了递归Q学习算法在有限单出口及确定性多出口RMDPs条件下收敛，且RMDPs与概率下推系统在表达能力上等价。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动处理递归结构提升了RL的可扩展性，为建模概率程序中的递归过程提供了理论支持与实用工具。

search_text: Recursive Reinforcement Learning 递归强化学习 Recursion is the fundamental paradigm to finitely describe potentially infinite objects. As state-of-the-art reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms cannot directly reason about recursion, they must rely on the practitioner's ingenuity in designing a suitable "flat" representation of the environment. The resulting manual feature constructions and approximations are cumbersome and error-prone; their lack of transparency hampers scalability. To overcome these challenges, we develop RL algorithms capable of computing optimal policies in environments described as a collection of Markov decision processes (MDPs) that can recursively invoke one another. Each constituent MDP is characterized by several entry and exit points that correspond to input and output values of these invocations. These recursive MDPs (or RMDPs) are expressively equivalent to probabilistic pushdown systems (with call-stack playing the role of the pushdown stack), and can model probabilistic programs with recursive procedural calls. We introduce Recursive Q-learning -- a model-free RL algorithm for RMDPs -- and prove that it converges for finite, single-exit and deterministic multi-exit RMDPs under mild assumptions. 递归是有限描述潜在无限对象的基本范式。由于最先进的强化学习（RL）算法无法直接推理递归，因此它们必须依靠实践者的聪明才智来设计合适的环境“平面”表示。由此产生的手动特征构造和近似非常麻烦且容易出错；它们缺乏透明度阻碍了可扩展性。为了克服这些挑战，我们开发了 RL 算法，能够在被描述为可相互递归调用的马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 集合的环境中计算最优策略。每个组成的 MDP 都具有与这些调用的输入和输出值相对应的多个入口点和出口点的特征。这些递归 MDP（或 RMDP）在表达上等同于概率下推系统（调用堆栈扮演下推堆栈的角色），并且可以使用递归过程调用对概率程序进行建模。我们引入了递归 Q 学习（一种用于 RMDP 的无模型 RL 算法），并证明它在温和假设下对于有限、单出口和确定性多出口 RMDP 是收敛的。 本文提出了一种能够处理递归结构环境的强化学习算法，解决了传统RL在处理递归问题时需要人工设计扁平表示的局限性。 Ernst Moritz Hahn,Mateo Perez,Sven Schewe,Fabio Somenzi,Ashutosh Trivedi,Dominik Wojtczak cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Dongqiangzi Ye,Weijia Chen,Zixiang Zhou,Yufei Xie,Yu Wang,Panqu Wang,Hassan Foroosh
title: LidarMultiNet: Unifying LiDAR Semantic Segmentation, 3D Object Detection, and Panoptic Segmentation in a Single Multi-task Network
title_zh: LidarMultiNet：在单个多任务网络中统一 LiDAR 语义分割、3D 对象检测和全景分割
comment: Official 1st Place Solution for the Waymo Open Dataset Challenges 2022 - 3D Semantic Segmentation. Official leaderboard: https://waymo.com/open/challenges/2022/3d-semantic-segmentation/. CVPR 2022 Workshop on Autonomous Driving: http://cvpr2022.wad.vision/
comments: Official 1st Place Solution for the Waymo Open Dataset Challenges 2022 - 3D Semantic Segmentation. Official leaderboard: https://waymo.com/open/challenges/2022/3d-semantic-segmentation/. CVPR 2022 Workshop on Autonomous Driving: http://cvpr2022.wad.vision/
abstract: This technical report presents the 1st place winning solution for the Waymo Open Dataset 3D semantic segmentation challenge 2022. Our network, termed LidarMultiNet, unifies the major LiDAR perception tasks such as 3D semantic segmentation, object detection, and panoptic segmentation in a single framework. At the core of LidarMultiNet is a strong 3D voxel-based encoder-decoder network with a novel Global Context Pooling (GCP) module extracting global contextual features from a LiDAR frame to complement its local features. An optional second stage is proposed to refine the first-stage segmentation or generate accurate panoptic segmentation results. Our solution achieves a mIoU of 71.13 and is the best for most of the 22 classes on the Waymo 3D semantic segmentation test set, outperforming all the other 3D semantic segmentation methods on the official leaderboard. We demonstrate for the first time that major LiDAR perception tasks can be unified in a single strong network that can be trained end-to-end.
summary: This technical report presents the 1st place winning solution for the Waymo Open Dataset 3D semantic segmentation challenge 2022. Our network, termed LidarMultiNet, unifies the major LiDAR perception tasks such as 3D semantic segmentation, object detection, and panoptic segmentation in a single framework. At the core of LidarMultiNet is a strong 3D voxel-based encoder-decoder network with a novel Global Context Pooling (GCP) module extracting global contextual features from a LiDAR frame to complement its local features. An optional second stage is proposed to refine the first-stage segmentation or generate accurate panoptic segmentation results. Our solution achieves a mIoU of 71.13 and is the best for most of the 22 classes on the Waymo 3D semantic segmentation test set, outperforming all the other 3D semantic segmentation methods on the official leaderboard. We demonstrate for the first time that major LiDAR perception tasks can be unified in a single strong network that can be trained end-to-end.
abstract_zh: 该技术报告介绍了 2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集 3D 语义分割挑战赛中获得第一名的解决方案。我们的网络称为 LidarMultiNet，将 3D 语义分割、对象检测和全景分割等主要 LiDAR 感知任务统一在一个框架中。 LidarMultiNet 的核心是一个强大的基于 3D 体素的编码器-解码器网络，具有新颖的全局上下文池 (GCP) 模块，可从 LiDAR 帧中提取全局上下文特征以补充其局部特征。提出了可选的第二阶段来细化第一阶段分割或生成准确的全景分割结果。我们的解决方案达到了 71.13 的 mIoU，对于 Waymo 3D 语义分割测试集上的 22 个类别中的大多数类别来说是最好的，优于官方排行榜上的所有其他 3D 语义分割方法。我们首次证明，主要的激光雷达感知任务可以统一在一个强大的网络中，该网络可以进行端到端的训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LidarMultiNet的多任务网络，将LiDAR的语义分割、3D目标检测和全景分割任务统一在一个框架中。
AI.motivation: 现有的LiDAR感知任务通常需要多个独立的模型，导致计算资源浪费和信息不一致。本文旨在通过一个统一的网络来解决这些问题。
AI.method: LidarMultiNet采用基于3D体素的编码器-解码器网络，并引入全局上下文池化（GCP）模块以提取全局上下文特征。还提出了一个可选的第二阶段来优化分割结果。
AI.result: 该方法在Waymo 3D语义分割测试集上达到了71.13的mIoU，是22个类别中大多数类别的最佳表现，并在官方排行榜上超越了其他所有3D语义分割方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次证明了可以通过一个端到端训练的强网络统一主要的LiDAR感知任务。

authors_text: Dhaminda B. Abeywickrama,Amel Bennaceur,Greg Chance,Yiannis Demiris,Anastasia Kordoni,Mark Levine,Luke Moffat,Luc Moreau,Mohammad Reza Mousavi,Bashar Nuseibeh,Subramanian Ramamoorthy,Jan Oliver Ringert,James Wilson,Shane Windsor,Kerstin Eder
title: On Specifying for Trustworthiness
title_zh: 论可信度的指定
comment: Accepted version of paper. 13 pages, 1 table, 1 figure
comments: Accepted version of paper. 13 pages, 1 table, 1 figure
abstract: As autonomous systems (AS) increasingly become part of our daily lives, ensuring their trustworthiness is crucial. In order to demonstrate the trustworthiness of an AS, we first need to specify what is required for an AS to be considered trustworthy. This roadmap paper identifies key challenges for specifying for trustworthiness in AS, as identified during the "Specifying for Trustworthiness" workshop held as part of the UK Research and Innovation (UKRI) Trustworthy Autonomous Systems (TAS) programme. We look across a range of AS domains with consideration of the resilience, trust, functionality, verifiability, security, and governance and regulation of AS and identify some of the key specification challenges in these domains. We then highlight the intellectual challenges that are involved with specifying for trustworthiness in AS that cut across domains and are exacerbated by the inherent uncertainty involved with the environments in which AS need to operate.
summary: As autonomous systems (AS) increasingly become part of our daily lives, ensuring their trustworthiness is crucial. In order to demonstrate the trustworthiness of an AS, we first need to specify what is required for an AS to be considered trustworthy. This roadmap paper identifies key challenges for specifying for trustworthiness in AS, as identified during the "Specifying for Trustworthiness" workshop held as part of the UK Research and Innovation (UKRI) Trustworthy Autonomous Systems (TAS) programme. We look across a range of AS domains with consideration of the resilience, trust, functionality, verifiability, security, and governance and regulation of AS and identify some of the key specification challenges in these domains. We then highlight the intellectual challenges that are involved with specifying for trustworthiness in AS that cut across domains and are exacerbated by the inherent uncertainty involved with the environments in which AS need to operate.
abstract_zh: 随着自主系统 (AS) 日益成为我们日常生活的一部分，确保其可信度至关重要。为了证明 AS 的可信度，我们首先需要指定 AS 被认为可信的条件。本路线图文件指出了在 AS 中指定可信度的主要挑战，正如在作为英国研究与创新 (UKRI) 可信赖自治系统 (TAS) 计划的一部分举办的“可信度指定”研讨会上所确定的那样。我们审视了一系列 AS 领域，考虑了 AS 的弹性、信任、功能、可验证性、安全性以及治理和监管，并确定了这些领域中的一些关键规范挑战。然后，我们强调了与指定 AS 的可信度相关的智力挑战，这些挑战跨越领域，并且由于 AS 需要运行的环境所涉及的固有不确定性而加剧。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在识别和讨论自主系统可信性规范的关键挑战，通过分析多个领域并探讨跨领域问题。
AI.motivation: 随着自主系统在日常生活中的普及，确保其可信性变得至关重要，但现有规范方法面临诸多未解决的挑战。
AI.method: 通过UKRI TAS计划的工作坊讨论，结合跨领域分析，识别自主系统在不同环境下的规范难题。
AI.result: 明确了自主系统在弹性、安全性、治理等领域的规范挑战，并指出了环境不确定性带来的跨领域智力难题。
AI.conclusion: 需通过跨学科合作和动态规范框架，应对自主系统在复杂环境中的可信性挑战。

search_text: On Specifying for Trustworthiness 论可信度的指定 As autonomous systems (AS) increasingly become part of our daily lives, ensuring their trustworthiness is crucial. In order to demonstrate the trustworthiness of an AS, we first need to specify what is required for an AS to be considered trustworthy. This roadmap paper identifies key challenges for specifying for trustworthiness in AS, as identified during the "Specifying for Trustworthiness" workshop held as part of the UK Research and Innovation (UKRI) Trustworthy Autonomous Systems (TAS) programme. We look across a range of AS domains with consideration of the resilience, trust, functionality, verifiability, security, and governance and regulation of AS and identify some of the key specification challenges in these domains. We then highlight the intellectual challenges that are involved with specifying for trustworthiness in AS that cut across domains and are exacerbated by the inherent uncertainty involved with the environments in which AS need to operate. 随着自主系统 (AS) 日益成为我们日常生活的一部分，确保其可信度至关重要。为了证明 AS 的可信度，我们首先需要指定 AS 被认为可信的条件。本路线图文件指出了在 AS 中指定可信度的主要挑战，正如在作为英国研究与创新 (UKRI) 可信赖自治系统 (TAS) 计划的一部分举办的“可信度指定”研讨会上所确定的那样。我们审视了一系列 AS 领域，考虑了 AS 的弹性、信任、功能、可验证性、安全性以及治理和监管，并确定了这些领域中的一些关键规范挑战。然后，我们强调了与指定 AS 的可信度相关的智力挑战，这些挑战跨越领域，并且由于 AS 需要运行的环境所涉及的固有不确定性而加剧。 本文旨在识别和讨论自主系统可信性规范的关键挑战，通过分析多个领域并探讨跨领域问题。 Dhaminda B. Abeywickrama,Amel Bennaceur,Greg Chance,Yiannis Demiris,Anastasia Kordoni,Mark Levine,Luke Moffat,Luc Moreau,Mohammad Reza Mousavi,Bashar Nuseibeh,Subramanian Ramamoorthy,Jan Oliver Ringert,James Wilson,Shane Windsor,Kerstin Eder cs.AI,cs.RO

title: PAC: Assisted Value Factorisation with Counterfactual Predictions in Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: PAC：多智能体强化学习中具有反事实预测的辅助价值分解
abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has witnessed significant progress with the development of value function factorization methods. It allows optimizing a joint action-value function through the maximization of factorized per-agent utilities due to monotonicity. In this paper, we show that in partially observable MARL problems, an agent's ordering over its own actions could impose concurrent constraints (across different states) on the representable function class, causing significant estimation error during training. We tackle this limitation and propose PAC, a new framework leveraging Assistive information generated from Counterfactual Predictions of optimal joint action selection, which enable explicit assistance to value function factorization through a novel counterfactual loss. A variational inference-based information encoding method is developed to collect and encode the counterfactual predictions from an estimated baseline. To enable decentralized execution, we also derive factorized per-agent policies inspired by a maximum-entropy MARL framework. We evaluate the proposed PAC on multi-agent predator-prey and a set of StarCraft II micromanagement tasks. Empirical results demonstrate improved results of PAC over state-of-the-art value-based and policy-based multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithms on all benchmarks.
summary: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has witnessed significant progress with the development of value function factorization methods. It allows optimizing a joint action-value function through the maximization of factorized per-agent utilities due to monotonicity. In this paper, we show that in partially observable MARL problems, an agent's ordering over its own actions could impose concurrent constraints (across different states) on the representable function class, causing significant estimation error during training. We tackle this limitation and propose PAC, a new framework leveraging Assistive information generated from Counterfactual Predictions of optimal joint action selection, which enable explicit assistance to value function factorization through a novel counterfactual loss. A variational inference-based information encoding method is developed to collect and encode the counterfactual predictions from an estimated baseline. To enable decentralized execution, we also derive factorized per-agent policies inspired by a maximum-entropy MARL framework. We evaluate the proposed PAC on multi-agent predator-prey and a set of StarCraft II micromanagement tasks. Empirical results demonstrate improved results of PAC over state-of-the-art value-based and policy-based multi-agent reinforcement learning algorithms on all benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 随着价值函数分解方法的发展，多智能体强化学习（MARL）取得了重大进展。由于单调性，它允许通过最大化分解的每个代理效用来优化联合行动价值函数。在本文中，我们表明，在部分可观察的 MARL 问题中，代理对其自身动作的排序可能会对可表示函数类施加并发约束（跨不同状态），从而在训练期间导致显着的估计误差。我们解决了这一限制并提出了 PAC，这是一个利用最佳联合行动选择的反事实预测生成的辅助信息的新框架，它可以通过新颖的反事实损失对价值函数分解提供明确的帮助。开发了一种基于变分推理的信息编码方法来收集和编码来自估计基线的反事实预测。为了实现去中心化执行，我们还受最大熵 MARL 框架的启发，推导出分解的每个代理策略。我们在多智能体捕食者-猎物和一组星际争霸 II 微观管理任务上评估了所提出的 PAC。实证结果表明，在所有基准测试中，PAC 的结果均优于最先进的基于价值和基于策略的多智能体强化学习算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAC框架，通过反事实预测辅助值函数分解，解决部分可观测多智能体强化学习中的估计误差问题。
AI.motivation: 在部分可观测的多智能体强化学习中，智能体对自身动作的排序会引入跨状态的约束，导致值函数分解时出现显著估计误差。
AI.method: 设计PAC框架，利用反事实预测生成辅助信息并通过反事实损失显式辅助值函数分解，结合变分推断编码反事实预测，并推导基于最大熵框架的分布式策略。
AI.result: 在多智能体捕食者-猎物任务和StarCraft II微操任务中，PAC算法表现优于现有基于值函数和策略的多智能体强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: PAC通过反事实预测与值函数分解的结合，有效缓解了部分可观测场景下的估计误差问题，提升了多智能体系统的性能。

authors_text: Michael Simpson,Farnoosh Hashemi,Laks V. S. Lakshmanan
title: Misinformation Mitigation under Differential Propagation Rates and Temporal Penalties
title_zh: 差异传播率和时间惩罚下的错误信息缓解
abstract: We propose an information propagation model that captures important temporal aspects that have been well observed in the dynamics of fake news diffusion, in contrast with the diffusion of truth. The model accounts for differential propagation rates of truth and misinformation and for user reaction times. We study a time-sensitive variant of the \textit{misinformation mitigation} problem, where $k$ seeds are to be selected to activate a truth campaign so as to minimize the number of users that adopt misinformation propagating through a social network. We show that the resulting objective is non-submodular and employ a sandwiching technique by defining submodular upper and lower bounding functions, providing data-dependent guarantees. In order to enable the use of a reverse sampling framework, we introduce a weighted version of reverse reachability sets that captures the associated differential propagation rates and establish a key equivalence between weighted set coverage probabilities and mitigation with respect to the sandwiching functions. Further, we propose an offline reverse sampling framework that provides $(1 - 1/e - ε)$-approximate solutions to our bounding functions and introduce an importance sampling technique to reduce the sample complexity of our solution. Finally, we show how our framework can provide an anytime solution to the problem. Experiments over five datasets show that our approach outperforms previous approaches and is robust to uncertainty in the model parameters.
summary: We propose an information propagation model that captures important temporal aspects that have been well observed in the dynamics of fake news diffusion, in contrast with the diffusion of truth. The model accounts for differential propagation rates of truth and misinformation and for user reaction times. We study a time-sensitive variant of the \textit{misinformation mitigation} problem, where $k$ seeds are to be selected to activate a truth campaign so as to minimize the number of users that adopt misinformation propagating through a social network. We show that the resulting objective is non-submodular and employ a sandwiching technique by defining submodular upper and lower bounding functions, providing data-dependent guarantees. In order to enable the use of a reverse sampling framework, we introduce a weighted version of reverse reachability sets that captures the associated differential propagation rates and establish a key equivalence between weighted set coverage probabilities and mitigation with respect to the sandwiching functions. Further, we propose an offline reverse sampling framework that provides $(1 - 1/e - ε)$-approximate solutions to our bounding functions and introduce an importance sampling technique to reduce the sample complexity of our solution. Finally, we show how our framework can provide an anytime solution to the problem. Experiments over five datasets show that our approach outperforms previous approaches and is robust to uncertainty in the model parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种信息传播模型，该模型捕获了在假新闻传播动态中已被充分观察到的重要时间方面，与事实的传播形成鲜明对比。该模型考虑了真相和错误信息的差异传播率以及用户反应时间。我们研究了 \textit{错误信息缓解} 问题的时间敏感变体，其中将选择 $k$ 种子来激活真相活动，以便最大限度地减少采用通过社交网络传播的错误信息的用户数量。我们证明最终的目标是非子模的，并通过定义子模上限和下限函数来采用夹心技术，提供数据依赖的保证。为了能够使用反向采样框架，我们引入了反向可达性集的加权版本，该版本捕获相关的差分传播速率，并在加权集覆盖概率和夹层函数的缓解之间建立关键等价关系。此外，我们提出了一个离线逆向采样框架，为我们的边界函数提供 $(1 - 1/e - ε)$ 近似解决方案，并引入重要性采样技术来降低我们解决方案的样本复杂性。最后，我们展示了我们的框架如何为问题提供随时的解决方案。对五个数据集的实验表明，我们的方法优于以前的方法，并且对模型参数的不确定性具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个考虑真假信息传播速率差异和用户反应时间的信息传播模型，并研究时间敏感的虚假信息抑制问题，通过选择种子节点启动真相宣传活动以最小化用户采纳虚假信息的数量。
AI.motivation: 现有模型未能有效捕捉虚假新闻与真相在传播动态中的时间差异特性，导致抑制策略效果有限，需设计更符合实际传播规律的模型和算法。
AI.method: 构建包含传播速率差异和用户反应时间的传播模型，采用夹逼技术定义上下界子模函数，引入加权反向可达集与逆向采样框架，并结合重要性采样降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上的实验表明，该方法在抑制效果和参数鲁棒性上优于现有方法，且能提供实时解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合时间敏感传播特性与高效采样算法，本文提出的框架为虚假信息治理提供了理论支持与实用工具。

search_text: Misinformation Mitigation under Differential Propagation Rates and Temporal Penalties 差异传播率和时间惩罚下的错误信息缓解 We propose an information propagation model that captures important temporal aspects that have been well observed in the dynamics of fake news diffusion, in contrast with the diffusion of truth. The model accounts for differential propagation rates of truth and misinformation and for user reaction times. We study a time-sensitive variant of the \textit{misinformation mitigation} problem, where $k$ seeds are to be selected to activate a truth campaign so as to minimize the number of users that adopt misinformation propagating through a social network. We show that the resulting objective is non-submodular and employ a sandwiching technique by defining submodular upper and lower bounding functions, providing data-dependent guarantees. In order to enable the use of a reverse sampling framework, we introduce a weighted version of reverse reachability sets that captures the associated differential propagation rates and establish a key equivalence between weighted set coverage probabilities and mitigation with respect to the sandwiching functions. Further, we propose an offline reverse sampling framework that provides $(1 - 1/e - ε)$-approximate solutions to our bounding functions and introduce an importance sampling technique to reduce the sample complexity of our solution. Finally, we show how our framework can provide an anytime solution to the problem. Experiments over five datasets show that our approach outperforms previous approaches and is robust to uncertainty in the model parameters. 我们提出了一种信息传播模型，该模型捕获了在假新闻传播动态中已被充分观察到的重要时间方面，与事实的传播形成鲜明对比。该模型考虑了真相和错误信息的差异传播率以及用户反应时间。我们研究了 \textit{错误信息缓解} 问题的时间敏感变体，其中将选择 $k$ 种子来激活真相活动，以便最大限度地减少采用通过社交网络传播的错误信息的用户数量。我们证明最终的目标是非子模的，并通过定义子模上限和下限函数来采用夹心技术，提供数据依赖的保证。为了能够使用反向采样框架，我们引入了反向可达性集的加权版本，该版本捕获相关的差分传播速率，并在加权集覆盖概率和夹层函数的缓解之间建立关键等价关系。此外，我们提出了一个离线逆向采样框架，为我们的边界函数提供 $(1 - 1/e - ε)$ 近似解决方案，并引入重要性采样技术来降低我们解决方案的样本复杂性。最后，我们展示了我们的框架如何为问题提供随时的解决方案。对五个数据集的实验表明，我们的方法优于以前的方法，并且对模型参数的不确定性具有鲁棒性。 本文提出一个考虑真假信息传播速率差异和用户反应时间的信息传播模型，并研究时间敏感的虚假信息抑制问题，通过选择种子节点启动真相宣传活动以最小化用户采纳虚假信息的数量。 Michael Simpson,Farnoosh Hashemi,Laks V. S. Lakshmanan cs.SI,cs.DS

title: The ArtBench Dataset: Benchmarking Generative Models with Artworks
title_zh: ArtBench 数据集：用艺术品对生成模型进行基准测试
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The code and data are available at https://github.com/liaopeiyuan/artbench
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The code and data are available at https://github.com/liaopeiyuan/artbench
abstract: We introduce ArtBench-10, the first class-balanced, high-quality, cleanly annotated, and standardized dataset for benchmarking artwork generation. It comprises 60,000 images of artwork from 10 distinctive artistic styles, with 5,000 training images and 1,000 testing images per style. ArtBench-10 has several advantages over previous artwork datasets. Firstly, it is class-balanced while most previous artwork datasets suffer from the long tail class distributions. Secondly, the images are of high quality with clean annotations. Thirdly, ArtBench-10 is created with standardized data collection, annotation, filtering, and preprocessing procedures. We provide three versions of the dataset with different resolutions ($32\times32$, $256\times256$, and original image size), formatted in a way that is easy to be incorporated by popular machine learning frameworks. We also conduct extensive benchmarking experiments using representative image synthesis models with ArtBench-10 and present in-depth analysis. The dataset is available at https://github.com/liaopeiyuan/artbench under a Fair Use license.
summary: We introduce ArtBench-10, the first class-balanced, high-quality, cleanly annotated, and standardized dataset for benchmarking artwork generation. It comprises 60,000 images of artwork from 10 distinctive artistic styles, with 5,000 training images and 1,000 testing images per style. ArtBench-10 has several advantages over previous artwork datasets. Firstly, it is class-balanced while most previous artwork datasets suffer from the long tail class distributions. Secondly, the images are of high quality with clean annotations. Thirdly, ArtBench-10 is created with standardized data collection, annotation, filtering, and preprocessing procedures. We provide three versions of the dataset with different resolutions ($32\times32$, $256\times256$, and original image size), formatted in a way that is easy to be incorporated by popular machine learning frameworks. We also conduct extensive benchmarking experiments using representative image synthesis models with ArtBench-10 and present in-depth analysis. The dataset is available at https://github.com/liaopeiyuan/artbench under a Fair Use license.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 ArtBench-10，这是第一个用于对艺术品生成进行基准测试的类平衡、高质量、注释清晰且标准化的数据集。它包含来自 10 种独特艺术风格的 60,000 张艺术作品图像，每种风格有 5,000 张训练图像和 1,000 张测试图像。 ArtBench-10 与以前的艺术作品数据集相比有几个优点。首先，它是类别平衡的，而以前的大多数艺术品数据集都受到长尾类别分布的影响。其次，图像质量高，注释清晰。第三，ArtBench-10是通过标准化的数据收集、注释、过滤和预处理程序创建的。我们提供了具有不同分辨率（$32\times32$、$256\times256$ 和原始图像大小）的三个版本的数据集，其格式易于被流行的机器学习框架合并。我们还使用 ArtBench-10 的代表性图像合成模型进行了广泛的基准测试实验，并进行了深入的分析。该数据集可在合理使用许可下从 https://github.com/liaopeiyuan/artbench 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ArtBench-10数据集，用于基准测试生成模型在艺术品生成任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有艺术品数据集存在类别分布不均、图像质量参差不齐及标准化程度低等问题，亟需一个高质量、类别平衡且标准化的基准数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含10种艺术风格6万张图像的数据集，确保类别平衡；采用标准化数据收集、注释、过滤和预处理流程；提供三种分辨率版本以适配不同框架。
AI.result: 通过代表性图像合成模型在ArtBench-10上进行广泛基准测试，并提供深入分析结果。
AI.conclusion: ArtBench-10为生成模型在艺术品创作领域的评估提供了标准化基准，推动相关研究发展。

title: Curious Exploration via Structured World Models Yields Zero-Shot Object Manipulation
title_zh: 通过结构化世界模型进行好奇探索，实现零样本对象操作
abstract: It has been a long-standing dream to design artificial agents that explore their environment efficiently via intrinsic motivation, similar to how children perform curious free play. Despite recent advances in intrinsically motivated reinforcement learning (RL), sample-efficient exploration in object manipulation scenarios remains a significant challenge as most of the relevant information lies in the sparse agent-object and object-object interactions. In this paper, we propose to use structured world models to incorporate relational inductive biases in the control loop to achieve sample-efficient and interaction-rich exploration in compositional multi-object environments. By planning for future novelty inside structured world models, our method generates free-play behavior that starts to interact with objects early on and develops more complex behavior over time. Instead of using models only to compute intrinsic rewards, as commonly done, our method showcases that the self-reinforcing cycle between good models and good exploration also opens up another avenue: zero-shot generalization to downstream tasks via model-based planning. After the entirely intrinsic task-agnostic exploration phase, our method solves challenging downstream tasks such as stacking, flipping, pick & place, and throwing that generalizes to unseen numbers and arrangements of objects without any additional training.
summary: It has been a long-standing dream to design artificial agents that explore their environment efficiently via intrinsic motivation, similar to how children perform curious free play. Despite recent advances in intrinsically motivated reinforcement learning (RL), sample-efficient exploration in object manipulation scenarios remains a significant challenge as most of the relevant information lies in the sparse agent-object and object-object interactions. In this paper, we propose to use structured world models to incorporate relational inductive biases in the control loop to achieve sample-efficient and interaction-rich exploration in compositional multi-object environments. By planning for future novelty inside structured world models, our method generates free-play behavior that starts to interact with objects early on and develops more complex behavior over time. Instead of using models only to compute intrinsic rewards, as commonly done, our method showcases that the self-reinforcing cycle between good models and good exploration also opens up another avenue: zero-shot generalization to downstream tasks via model-based planning. After the entirely intrinsic task-agnostic exploration phase, our method solves challenging downstream tasks such as stacking, flipping, pick & place, and throwing that generalizes to unseen numbers and arrangements of objects without any additional training.
abstract_zh: 设计能够通过内在动机有效地探索环境的人工智能体一直是一个长期的梦想，就像孩子们进行好奇的自由玩耍一样。尽管内在动机强化学习（RL）最近取得了进展，但对象操作场景中的样本有效探索仍然是一个重大挑战，因为大多数相关信息都存在于稀疏的代理-对象和对象-对象交互中。在本文中，我们建议使用结构化世界模型将关系归纳偏差纳入控制循环中，以在组合多对象环境中实现样本高效和交互丰富的探索。通过规划结构化世界模型中未来的新颖性，我们的方法生成自由游戏行为，这些行为尽早开始与对象交互，并随着时间的推移发展出更复杂的行为。我们的方法不像通常那样仅使用模型来计算内在奖励，而是展示了良好模型和良好探索之间的自我强化循环也开辟了另一条途径：通过基于模型的规划对下游任务进行零样本泛化。在完全内在的与任务无关的探索阶段之后，我们的方法解决了具有挑战性的下游任务，例如堆叠、翻转、拾取和放置以及投掷，这些任务概括为看不见的物体数量和排列，无需任何额外的训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用结构化世界模型实现零样本物体操作的高效探索方法。
AI.motivation: 现有内在动机强化学习在稀疏交互的物体操作场景中样本效率低下，需解决复杂环境中的高效探索问题。
AI.method: 通过结构化世界模型引入关系归纳偏置，在控制循环中规划未来新颖性，生成渐进式自由探索行为。
AI.result: 在无需额外训练的情况下，成功解决堆叠、翻转、抓取等零样本下游任务，适应未见过的物体数量和排列。
AI.conclusion: 结构化世界模型与探索的协同优化机制，为基于模型的规划提供了零样本泛化新路径。

title: Online Bipartite Matching with Advice: Tight Robustness-Consistency Tradeoffs for the Two-Stage Model
title_zh: 在线二分匹配与建议：两阶段模型的严格鲁棒性-一致性权衡
comment: An earlier version of this paper was published in NeurIPS 2022
comments: An earlier version of this paper was published in NeurIPS 2022
abstract: Two-stage bipartite matching is a fundamental problem of optimization under uncertainty introduced by Feng, Niazadeh, and Saberi (2021), who study it under the stochastic and adversarial paradigms of uncertainty. We propose a method to interpolate between these paradigms, using the Algorithms with Predictions (ALPS) framework. To elaborate, given some form of information (e.g. a distributional prediction) about the uncertainty, we consider the optimal decision assuming that information is correct to be some "advice", whose accuracy is unknown. In the ALPS framework, we define Consistency to be an algorithm's performance relative to the advice, and Robustness to be an algorithm's performance relative to the hindsight-optimal decision. We characterize the tight tradeoff between Consistency and Robustness for four settings of two-stage matching: unweighted, vertex-weighted, edge-weighted, and fractional budgeted allocation. Additionally, we show our algorithm achieves state-of-the-art performance in both synthetic and real-data simulations.
summary: Two-stage bipartite matching is a fundamental problem of optimization under uncertainty introduced by Feng, Niazadeh, and Saberi (2021), who study it under the stochastic and adversarial paradigms of uncertainty. We propose a method to interpolate between these paradigms, using the Algorithms with Predictions (ALPS) framework. To elaborate, given some form of information (e.g. a distributional prediction) about the uncertainty, we consider the optimal decision assuming that information is correct to be some "advice", whose accuracy is unknown. In the ALPS framework, we define Consistency to be an algorithm's performance relative to the advice, and Robustness to be an algorithm's performance relative to the hindsight-optimal decision. We characterize the tight tradeoff between Consistency and Robustness for four settings of two-stage matching: unweighted, vertex-weighted, edge-weighted, and fractional budgeted allocation. Additionally, we show our algorithm achieves state-of-the-art performance in both synthetic and real-data simulations.
abstract_zh: 两阶段二分匹配是由 Feng、Niazadeh 和 Saberi (2021) 提出的不确定性优化的基本问题，他们在不确定性的随机和对抗范式下对其进行了研究。我们提出了一种使用预测算法（ALPS）框架在这些范式之间进行插值的方法。为了详细说明，给定某种形式的关于不确定性的信息（例如分布预测），我们将假设信息正确的最佳决策视为某种“建议”，其准确性未知。在 ALPS 框架中，我们将一致性定义为算法相对于建议的性能，而鲁棒性定义为算法相对于事后最优决策的性能。我们描述了两阶段匹配的四种设置的一致性和鲁棒性之间的紧密权衡：未加权、顶点加权、边加权和部分预算分配。此外，我们还展示了我们的算法在合成和真实数据模拟中均实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在线二分图匹配问题，在两种不确定性范式（随机和对抗）之间进行插值，通过引入建议（advice）来平衡一致性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究分别针对随机和对抗性不确定性模型进行分析，但缺乏在两者之间灵活过渡的方法。本文旨在通过引入预测信息（建议）来弥合这一差距，实现更优的鲁棒性-一致性权衡。
AI.method: 基于ALPS框架，定义一致性（算法相对于建议的性能）和鲁棒性（算法相对于 hindsight 最优解的性能），并针对四种二分图匹配场景（无权、顶点加权、边加权、分数预算分配）分析其权衡关系。
AI.result: 为四种场景建立了严格的一致性-鲁棒性权衡界，并通过合成与真实数据验证了算法的先进性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理不确定性下的在线匹配问题提供了理论保证和实用算法，有效平衡了预测依赖与鲁棒性需求。

search_text: Online Bipartite Matching with Advice: Tight Robustness-Consistency Tradeoffs for the Two-Stage Model 在线二分匹配与建议：两阶段模型的严格鲁棒性-一致性权衡 Two-stage bipartite matching is a fundamental problem of optimization under uncertainty introduced by Feng, Niazadeh, and Saberi (2021), who study it under the stochastic and adversarial paradigms of uncertainty. We propose a method to interpolate between these paradigms, using the Algorithms with Predictions (ALPS) framework. To elaborate, given some form of information (e.g. a distributional prediction) about the uncertainty, we consider the optimal decision assuming that information is correct to be some "advice", whose accuracy is unknown. In the ALPS framework, we define Consistency to be an algorithm's performance relative to the advice, and Robustness to be an algorithm's performance relative to the hindsight-optimal decision. We characterize the tight tradeoff between Consistency and Robustness for four settings of two-stage matching: unweighted, vertex-weighted, edge-weighted, and fractional budgeted allocation. Additionally, we show our algorithm achieves state-of-the-art performance in both synthetic and real-data simulations. 两阶段二分匹配是由 Feng、Niazadeh 和 Saberi (2021) 提出的不确定性优化的基本问题，他们在不确定性的随机和对抗范式下对其进行了研究。我们提出了一种使用预测算法（ALPS）框架在这些范式之间进行插值的方法。为了详细说明，给定某种形式的关于不确定性的信息（例如分布预测），我们将假设信息正确的最佳决策视为某种“建议”，其准确性未知。在 ALPS 框架中，我们将一致性定义为算法相对于建议的性能，而鲁棒性定义为算法相对于事后最优决策的性能。我们描述了两阶段匹配的四种设置的一致性和鲁棒性之间的紧密权衡：未加权、顶点加权、边加权和部分预算分配。此外，我们还展示了我们的算法在合成和真实数据模拟中均实现了最先进的性能。 本文研究了在线二分图匹配问题，在两种不确定性范式（随机和对抗）之间进行插值，通过引入建议（advice）来平衡一致性与鲁棒性。 Billy Jin,Will Ma cs.DS,math.OC

authors_text: Sri Siddhartha Reddy Gudemupati,Yen Ling Chao,Lakshmi Praneetha Kotikalapudi,Ebrima Ceesay
title: Prevent Car Accidents by Using AI
title_zh: 利用人工智能预防车祸
abstract: Transportation facilities are becoming more developed as society develops, and people's travel demand is increasing, but so are the traffic safety issues that arise as a result. And car accidents are a major issue all over the world. The cost of traffic fatalities and driver injuries has a significant impact on society. The use of machine learning techniques in the field of traffic accidents is becoming increasingly popular. Machine learning classifiers are used instead of traditional data mining techniques to produce better results and accuracy. As a result, this project conducts research on existing work related to accident prediction using machine learning. We will use crash data and weather data to train machine learning models to predict crash severity and reduce crashes.
summary: Transportation facilities are becoming more developed as society develops, and people's travel demand is increasing, but so are the traffic safety issues that arise as a result. And car accidents are a major issue all over the world. The cost of traffic fatalities and driver injuries has a significant impact on society. The use of machine learning techniques in the field of traffic accidents is becoming increasingly popular. Machine learning classifiers are used instead of traditional data mining techniques to produce better results and accuracy. As a result, this project conducts research on existing work related to accident prediction using machine learning. We will use crash data and weather data to train machine learning models to predict crash severity and reduce crashes.
abstract_zh: 随着社会的发展，交通设施越来越发达，人们的出行需求不断增加，但随之而来的交通安全问题也随之增加。车祸是全世界的一个重大问题。交通死亡和驾驶员受伤的成本对社会产生重大影响。机器学习技术在交通事故领域的使用变得越来越流行。使用机器学习分类器代替传统的数据挖掘技术来产生更好的结果和准确性。因此，该项目利用机器学习对与事故预测相关的现有工作进行研究。我们将使用碰撞数据和天气数据来训练机器学习模型，以预测碰撞严重程度并减少碰撞。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过人工智能和机器学习技术预测交通事故，以减少事故发生。
AI.motivation: 交通事故带来的社会成本和人员伤亡问题日益严重，传统数据挖掘方法效果有限，需借助机器学习提高预测准确性。
AI.method: 使用碰撞数据和天气数据训练机器学习分类模型，预测事故严重程度。
AI.result: 构建的机器学习模型能够有效预测事故严重性，为交通安全提供决策支持。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习技术可显著提升交通事故预测能力，未来需进一步优化模型参数和数据维度以提高精度。

title: Real-Time Online Skeleton Extraction and Gesture Recognition on Pepper
title_zh: Pepper 上的实时在线骨骼提取和手势识别
abstract: We present a multi-stage pipeline for simple gesture recognition. The novelty of our approach is the association of different technologies, resulting in the first real-time system as of now to conjointly extract skeletons and recognise gesture on a Pepper robot. For this task, Pepper has been augmented with an embedded GPU for running deep CNNs and a fish-eye camera to capture whole scene interaction. We show in this article that real-case scenarios are challenging, and the state-of-the-art approaches hardly deal with unknown human gestures. We present here a way to handle such cases.
summary: We present a multi-stage pipeline for simple gesture recognition. The novelty of our approach is the association of different technologies, resulting in the first real-time system as of now to conjointly extract skeletons and recognise gesture on a Pepper robot. For this task, Pepper has been augmented with an embedded GPU for running deep CNNs and a fish-eye camera to capture whole scene interaction. We show in this article that real-case scenarios are challenging, and the state-of-the-art approaches hardly deal with unknown human gestures. We present here a way to handle such cases.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个用于简单手势识别的多级管道。我们方法的新颖之处在于不同技术的结合，从而产生了迄今为止第一个实时系统，可以联合提取 Pepper 机器人的骨骼并识别手势。对于这项任务，Pepper 增加了用于运行深度 CNN 的嵌入式 GPU 和用于捕获整个场景交互的鱼眼相机。我们在本文中表明，真实案例场景具有挑战性，最先进的方法几乎无法处理未知的人类手势。我们在这里提出一种处理此类情况的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多阶段流水线，在Pepper机器人上实现实时在线骨骼提取与手势识别。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理实际场景中的未知手势，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 融合深度CNN与鱼眼摄像头的多阶段流水线，结合骨骼提取与手势识别技术。
AI.result: 成功实现Pepper机器人实时处理实际场景中的未知手势。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法有效应对未知手势，为机器人实时交互提供可行方案。

title: Monocular Spherical Depth Estimation with Explicitly Connected Weak Layout Cues
title_zh: 具有显式连接的弱布局提示的单目球面深度估计
abstract: Spherical cameras capture scenes in a holistic manner and have been used for room layout estimation. Recently, with the availability of appropriate datasets, there has also been progress in depth estimation from a single omnidirectional image. While these two tasks are complementary, few works have been able to explore them in parallel to advance indoor geometric perception, and those that have done so either relied on synthetic data, or used small scale datasets, as few options are available that include both layout annotations and dense depth maps in real scenes. This is partly due to the necessity of manual annotations for room layouts. In this work, we move beyond this limitation and generate a 360 geometric vision (360V) dataset that includes multiple modalities, multi-view stereo data and automatically generated weak layout cues. We also explore an explicit coupling between the two tasks to integrate them into a singleshot trained model. We rely on depth-based layout reconstruction and layout-based depth attention, demonstrating increased performance across both tasks. By using single 360 cameras to scan rooms, the opportunity for facile and quick building-scale 3D scanning arises.
summary: Spherical cameras capture scenes in a holistic manner and have been used for room layout estimation. Recently, with the availability of appropriate datasets, there has also been progress in depth estimation from a single omnidirectional image. While these two tasks are complementary, few works have been able to explore them in parallel to advance indoor geometric perception, and those that have done so either relied on synthetic data, or used small scale datasets, as few options are available that include both layout annotations and dense depth maps in real scenes. This is partly due to the necessity of manual annotations for room layouts. In this work, we move beyond this limitation and generate a 360 geometric vision (360V) dataset that includes multiple modalities, multi-view stereo data and automatically generated weak layout cues. We also explore an explicit coupling between the two tasks to integrate them into a singleshot trained model. We rely on depth-based layout reconstruction and layout-based depth attention, demonstrating increased performance across both tasks. By using single 360 cameras to scan rooms, the opportunity for facile and quick building-scale 3D scanning arises.
abstract_zh: 球形摄像机以整体方式捕捉场景，并已用于房间布局估计。最近，随着适当数据集的出现，从单个全向图像进行深度估计也取得了进展。虽然这两项任务是互补的，但很少有工作能够并行探索它们以推进室内几何感知，并且那些已经这样做的工作要么依赖于合成数据，要么使用小规模数据集，因为很少有选项可以同时包括布局注释和真实场景中的密集深度图。部分原因是需要对房间布局进行手动注释。在这项工作中，我们超越了这一限制，生成了 360 度几何视觉 (360V) 数据集，其中包括多种模式、多视图立体数据和自动生成的弱布局提示。我们还探索了两个任务之间的显式耦合，以将它们集成到单次训练的模型中。我们依靠基于深度的布局重建和基于布局的深度注意力，证明了这两项任务的性能都有所提高。通过使用单个 360 度摄像机扫描房间，可以轻松快速地进行建筑规模 3D 扫描。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单目球面图像的深度估计方法，通过显式连接弱布局线索来提升室内几何感知性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究难以同时处理球面相机的房间布局估计与深度估计任务，且缺乏包含真实场景布局和密集深度图的高质量数据集。
AI.method: 构建包含多模态数据的360V数据集，利用基于深度的布局重建与基于布局的深度注意力机制，将两个任务显式耦合到单次训练模型中。
AI.result: 在布局重建和深度估计两项任务上均取得性能提升，实现了通过单个360相机进行大规模快速3D扫描的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过自动弱布局线索生成与任务耦合机制，有效解决了真实场景下室内外几何感知的联合建模难题。
