search_text: Monocular Spherical Depth Estimation with Explicitly Connected Weak Layout Cues 具有显式连接的弱布局提示的单目球面深度估计 Spherical cameras capture scenes in a holistic manner and have been used for room layout estimation. Recently, with the availability of appropriate datasets, there has also been progress in depth estimation from a single omnidirectional image. While these two tasks are complementary, few works have been able to explore them in parallel to advance indoor geometric perception, and those that have done so either relied on synthetic data, or used small scale datasets, as few options are available that include both layout annotations and dense depth maps in real scenes. This is partly due to the necessity of manual annotations for room layouts. In this work, we move beyond this limitation and generate a 360 geometric vision (360V) dataset that includes multiple modalities, multi-view stereo data and automatically generated weak layout cues. We also explore an explicit coupling between the two tasks to integrate them into a singleshot trained model. We rely on depth-based layout reconstruction and layout-based depth attention, demonstrating increased performance across both tasks. By using single 360 cameras to scan rooms, the opportunity for facile and quick building-scale 3D scanning arises. 球形摄像机以整体方式捕捉场景，并已用于房间布局估计。最近，随着适当数据集的出现，从单个全向图像进行深度估计也取得了进展。虽然这两项任务是互补的，但很少有工作能够并行探索它们以推进室内几何感知，并且那些已经这样做的工作要么依赖于合成数据，要么使用小规模数据集，因为很少有选项可以同时包括布局注释和真实场景中的密集深度图。部分原因是需要对房间布局进行手动注释。在这项工作中，我们超越了这一限制，生成了 360 度几何视觉 (360V) 数据集，其中包括多种模式、多视图立体数据和自动生成的弱布局提示。我们还探索了两个任务之间的显式耦合，以将它们集成到单次训练的模型中。我们依靠基于深度的布局重建和基于布局的深度注意力，证明了这两项任务的性能都有所提高。通过使用单个 360 度摄像机扫描房间，可以轻松快速地进行建筑规模 3D 扫描。 本文提出了一种基于单目球面图像的深度估计方法，通过显式连接弱布局线索来提升室内几何感知性能。 Nikolaos Zioulis,Federico Alvarez,Dimitrios Zarpalas,Petros Daras cs.CV

title: Continual Learning for Affective Robotics: A Proof of Concept for Wellbeing
title_zh: 情感机器人的持续学习：幸福概念的证明
comment: Accepted at the 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction Workshops and Demos (ACIIW). 12 pages, 7 figures
comments: Accepted at the 10th International Conference on Affective Computing and Intelligent Interaction Workshops and Demos (ACIIW). 12 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Sustaining real-world human-robot interactions requires robots to be sensitive to human behavioural idiosyncrasies and adapt their perception and behaviour models to cater to these individual preferences. For affective robots, this entails learning to adapt to individual affective behaviour to offer a personalised interaction experience to each individual. Continual Learning (CL) has been shown to enable real-time adaptation in agents, allowing them to learn with incrementally acquired data while preserving past knowledge. In this work, we present a novel framework for real-world application of CL for modelling personalised human-robot interactions using a CL-based affect perception mechanism. To evaluate the proposed framework, we undertake a proof-of-concept user study with 20 participants interacting with the Pepper robot using three variants of interaction behaviour: static and scripted, using affect-based adaptation without personalisation, and using affect-based adaptation with continual personalisation. Our results demonstrate a clear preference in the participants for CL-based continual personalisation with significant improvements observed in the robot's anthropomorphism, animacy and likeability ratings as well as the interactions being rated significantly higher for warmth and comfort as the robot is rated as significantly better at understanding how the participants feel.
summary: Sustaining real-world human-robot interactions requires robots to be sensitive to human behavioural idiosyncrasies and adapt their perception and behaviour models to cater to these individual preferences. For affective robots, this entails learning to adapt to individual affective behaviour to offer a personalised interaction experience to each individual. Continual Learning (CL) has been shown to enable real-time adaptation in agents, allowing them to learn with incrementally acquired data while preserving past knowledge. In this work, we present a novel framework for real-world application of CL for modelling personalised human-robot interactions using a CL-based affect perception mechanism. To evaluate the proposed framework, we undertake a proof-of-concept user study with 20 participants interacting with the Pepper robot using three variants of interaction behaviour: static and scripted, using affect-based adaptation without personalisation, and using affect-based adaptation with continual personalisation. Our results demonstrate a clear preference in the participants for CL-based continual personalisation with significant improvements observed in the robot's anthropomorphism, animacy and likeability ratings as well as the interactions being rated significantly higher for warmth and comfort as the robot is rated as significantly better at understanding how the participants feel.
abstract_zh: 维持现实世界中的人机交互需要机器人对人类的行为特质敏感，并调整其感知和行为模型来迎合这些个人偏好。对于情感机器人来说，这需要学习适应个体情感行为，为每个人提供个性化的交互体验。持续学习（CL）已被证明可以实现智能体的实时适应，使它们能够利用增量获取的数据进行学习，同时保留过去的知识。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 CL 现实世界应用的新颖框架，用于使用基于 CL 的情感感知机制来建模个性化人机交互。为了评估所提出的框架，我们进行了一项概念验证用户研究，20 名参与者使用三种交互行为与 Pepper 机器人进行交互：静态和脚本化、使用基于情感的适应（不带个性化）以及使用基于情感的适应和持续个性化。我们的结果表明，参与者明显偏爱基于 CL 的持续个性化，在机器人的拟人性、动画性和可爱性评级方面观察到显着改善，并且由于机器人在理解参与者感受方面明显更好，因此在温暖和舒适度方面的互动评分明显更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于持续学习（CL）的框架，用于实现情感机器人在真实场景中对个性化人类-机器人交互的建模，并通过用户研究验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现实中的机器人需适应人类个体的情感行为差异以提供个性化交互体验，而传统方法难以在持续交互中兼顾新旧知识，因此需要CL技术实现动态适应。
AI.method: 开发基于CL的情感感知机制，通过Pepper机器人进行用户实验，对比三种交互模式：静态脚本、基于情感的非个性化适应、基于CL的持续个性化适应，评估指标包括拟人化、生动性、可接受度及交互舒适度。
AI.result: 实验表明，参与者显著偏好CL持续个性化模式，机器人拟人化、生动性及可接受度评分提升，交互温暖度和舒适度显著提高，且机器人被评价为更擅长理解用户情绪。
AI.conclusion: CL框架能有效提升情感机器人个性化交互能力，增强用户感知与体验，为真实场景下的情感机器人应用提供了可行方案。

title: Doubly Reparameterized Importance Weighted Structure Learning for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: 用于场景图生成的双重重新参数化重要性加权结构学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.07017
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2205.07017
abstract: As a structured prediction task, scene graph generation, given an input image, aims to explicitly model objects and their relationships by constructing a visually-grounded scene graph. In the current literature, such task is universally solved via a message passing neural network based mean field variational Bayesian methodology. The classical loose evidence lower bound is generally chosen as the variational inference objective, which could induce oversimplified variational approximation and thus underestimate the underlying complex posterior. In this paper, we propose a novel doubly reparameterized importance weighted structure learning method, which employs a tighter importance weighted lower bound as the variational inference objective. It is computed from multiple samples drawn from a reparameterizable Gumbel-Softmax sampler and the resulting constrained variational inference task is solved by a generic entropic mirror descent algorithm. The resulting doubly reparameterized gradient estimator reduces the variance of the corresponding derivatives with a beneficial impact on learning. The proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on various popular scene graph generation benchmarks.
summary: As a structured prediction task, scene graph generation, given an input image, aims to explicitly model objects and their relationships by constructing a visually-grounded scene graph. In the current literature, such task is universally solved via a message passing neural network based mean field variational Bayesian methodology. The classical loose evidence lower bound is generally chosen as the variational inference objective, which could induce oversimplified variational approximation and thus underestimate the underlying complex posterior. In this paper, we propose a novel doubly reparameterized importance weighted structure learning method, which employs a tighter importance weighted lower bound as the variational inference objective. It is computed from multiple samples drawn from a reparameterizable Gumbel-Softmax sampler and the resulting constrained variational inference task is solved by a generic entropic mirror descent algorithm. The resulting doubly reparameterized gradient estimator reduces the variance of the corresponding derivatives with a beneficial impact on learning. The proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on various popular scene graph generation benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 作为一种结构化预测任务，场景图生成在给定输入图像的情况下，旨在通过构建基于视觉的场景图来显式地建模对象及其关系。在当前文献中，此类任务普遍通过基于消息传递神经网络的平均场变分贝叶斯方法来解决。通常选择经典的松散证据下界作为变分推理目标，这可能会导致过度简化的变分近似，从而低估潜在的复杂后验。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双重重新参数化重要性加权结构学习方法，该方法采用更严格的重要性加权下界作为变分推理目标。它是根据从可重新参数化的 Gumbel-Softmax 采样器中抽取的多个样本计算得出的，所得的约束变分推理任务通过通用熵镜下降算法来解决。由此产生的双重重新参数化梯度估计器减少了相应导数的方差，对学习产生有益的影响。所提出的方法在各种流行的场景图生成基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双重重参数化重要性加权结构学习方法，用于场景图生成任务，以改进现有变分推理方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有方法普遍采用宽松的证据下界（ELBO）作为变分推断目标，导致变分近似过于简化，无法准确估计复杂后验分布。
AI.method: 通过引入重要性加权下界作为目标函数，结合可重参数化Gumbel-Softmax采样器和熵镜像下降算法，实现双重重参数化梯度估计以降低方差。
AI.result: 该方法在多个场景图生成基准数据集上达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 双重重参数化方法有效提升了变分推断的准确性，为场景图生成提供了更优的结构学习框架。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种双重重参数化重要性加权结构学习方法，用于场景图生成任务，以改进现有变分推理方法的不足。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法普遍采用宽松的证据下界（ELBO）作为变分推断目标，导致变分近似过于简化，无法准确估计复杂后验分布。
ai_content.method: 通过引入重要性加权下界作为目标函数，结合可重参数化Gumbel-Softmax采样器和熵镜像下降算法，实现双重重参数化梯度估计以降低方差。
ai_content.result: 该方法在多个场景图生成基准数据集上达到最先进性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 双重重参数化方法有效提升了变分推断的准确性，为场景图生成提供了更优的结构学习框架。

search_text: Doubly Reparameterized Importance Weighted Structure Learning for Scene Graph Generation 用于场景图生成的双重重新参数化重要性加权结构学习 As a structured prediction task, scene graph generation, given an input image, aims to explicitly model objects and their relationships by constructing a visually-grounded scene graph. In the current literature, such task is universally solved via a message passing neural network based mean field variational Bayesian methodology. The classical loose evidence lower bound is generally chosen as the variational inference objective, which could induce oversimplified variational approximation and thus underestimate the underlying complex posterior. In this paper, we propose a novel doubly reparameterized importance weighted structure learning method, which employs a tighter importance weighted lower bound as the variational inference objective. It is computed from multiple samples drawn from a reparameterizable Gumbel-Softmax sampler and the resulting constrained variational inference task is solved by a generic entropic mirror descent algorithm. The resulting doubly reparameterized gradient estimator reduces the variance of the corresponding derivatives with a beneficial impact on learning. The proposed method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on various popular scene graph generation benchmarks. 作为一种结构化预测任务，场景图生成在给定输入图像的情况下，旨在通过构建基于视觉的场景图来显式地建模对象及其关系。在当前文献中，此类任务普遍通过基于消息传递神经网络的平均场变分贝叶斯方法来解决。通常选择经典的松散证据下界作为变分推理目标，这可能会导致过度简化的变分近似，从而低估潜在的复杂后验。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的双重重新参数化重要性加权结构学习方法，该方法采用更严格的重要性加权下界作为变分推理目标。它是根据从可重新参数化的 Gumbel-Softmax 采样器中抽取的多个样本计算得出的，所得的约束变分推理任务通过通用熵镜下降算法来解决。由此产生的双重重新参数化梯度估计器减少了相应导数的方差，对学习产生有益的影响。所提出的方法在各种流行的场景图生成基准上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种双重重参数化重要性加权结构学习方法，用于场景图生成任务，以改进现有变分推理方法的不足。 Daqi Liu,Miroslaw Bober,Josef Kittler cs.CV

title: Vision- and tactile-based continuous multimodal intention and attention recognition for safer physical human-robot interaction
title_zh: 基于视觉和触觉的连续多模式意图和注意力识别，实现更安全的人机交互
abstract: Employing skin-like tactile sensors on robots enhances both the safety and usability of collaborative robots by adding the capability to detect human contact. Unfortunately, simple binary tactile sensors alone cannot determine the context of the human contact -- whether it is a deliberate interaction or an unintended collision that requires safety manoeuvres. Many published methods classify discrete interactions using more advanced tactile sensors or by analysing joint torques. Instead, we propose to augment the intention recognition capabilities of simple binary tactile sensors by adding a robot-mounted camera for human posture analysis. Different interaction characteristics, including touch location, human pose, and gaze direction, are used to train a supervised machine learning algorithm to classify whether a touch is intentional or not with an F1-score of 86%. We demonstrate that multimodal intention recognition is significantly more accurate than monomodal analyses with the collaborative robot Baxter. Furthermore, our method can also continuously monitor interactions that fluidly change between intentional or unintentional by gauging the user's attention through gaze. If a user stops paying attention mid-task, the proposed intention and attention recognition algorithm can activate safety features to prevent unsafe interactions. We also employ a feature reduction technique that reduces the number of inputs to five to achieve a more generalized low-dimensional classifier. This simplification both reduces the amount of training data required and improves real-world classification accuracy. It also renders the method potentially agnostic to the robot and touch sensor architectures while achieving a high degree of task adaptability.
summary: Employing skin-like tactile sensors on robots enhances both the safety and usability of collaborative robots by adding the capability to detect human contact. Unfortunately, simple binary tactile sensors alone cannot determine the context of the human contact -- whether it is a deliberate interaction or an unintended collision that requires safety manoeuvres. Many published methods classify discrete interactions using more advanced tactile sensors or by analysing joint torques. Instead, we propose to augment the intention recognition capabilities of simple binary tactile sensors by adding a robot-mounted camera for human posture analysis. Different interaction characteristics, including touch location, human pose, and gaze direction, are used to train a supervised machine learning algorithm to classify whether a touch is intentional or not with an F1-score of 86%. We demonstrate that multimodal intention recognition is significantly more accurate than monomodal analyses with the collaborative robot Baxter. Furthermore, our method can also continuously monitor interactions that fluidly change between intentional or unintentional by gauging the user's attention through gaze. If a user stops paying attention mid-task, the proposed intention and attention recognition algorithm can activate safety features to prevent unsafe interactions. We also employ a feature reduction technique that reduces the number of inputs to five to achieve a more generalized low-dimensional classifier. This simplification both reduces the amount of training data required and improves real-world classification accuracy. It also renders the method potentially agnostic to the robot and touch sensor architectures while achieving a high degree of task adaptability.
abstract_zh: 在机器人上使用类皮肤触觉传感器，通过增加检测人类接触的能力，增强了协作机器人的安全性和可用性。不幸的是，简单的二进制触觉传感器本身无法确定人类接触的背景——无论是有意的交互还是需要安全操作的意外碰撞。许多已发表的方法使用更先进的触觉传感器或通过分析关节扭矩来对离散交互进行分类。相反，我们建议通过添加用于人体姿势分析的机器人安装摄像头来增强简单二进制触觉传感器的意图识别能力。使用不同的交互特征（包括触摸位置、人体姿势和注视方向）来训练监督机器学习算法，以分类触摸是否是有意的，F1 分数为 86%。我们证明，使用协作机器人 Baxter 进行多模态意图识别比单模态分析要准确得多。此外，我们的方法还可以通过凝视来衡量用户的注意力，持续监控有意或无意之间流畅变化的交互。如果用户在任务中停止注意力，所提出的意图和注意力识别算法可以激活安全功能以防止不安全的交互。我们还采用了一种特征缩减技术，将输入数量减少到五个，以实现更通用的低维分类器。这种简化既减少了所需的训练数据量，又提高了现实世界的分类准确性。它还使得该方法对机器人和触摸传感器架构具有潜在的不可知性，同时实现高度的任务适应性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种结合视觉与触觉的多模态系统，用于实时识别人类与协作机器人交互中的意图及注意力变化，以提升人机交互安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统二值触觉传感器无法区分有意接触与意外碰撞，而现有方法依赖复杂传感器或关节扭矩分析，难以实现连续动态识别且泛化性不足。
AI.method: 融合机器人摄像头获取的人体姿态、触觉传感器的接触信息及注视方向，通过监督学习训练分类模型，并采用特征降维技术将输入简化为5个关键特征。
AI.result: 在Baxter机器人上实现意图识别F1分数86%，多模态方法显著优于单模态；系统可实时监测注意力变化并触发安全机制，且具备跨机器人架构的适应性。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合与特征简化策略有效提升了意图识别精度与实用性，为安全人机交互提供了低复杂度、高适应性的解决方案。

title: Prompt Injection: Parameterization of Fixed Inputs
title_zh: 即时注入：固定输入的参数化
comment: PING results in Table 2 updated (bug fixed)
comments: PING results in Table 2 updated (bug fixed)
abstract: Recent works have shown that attaching prompts to the input is effective at conditioning Language Models (LM) to perform specific tasks. However, prompts are always included in the input text during inference, thus incurring substantial computational and memory overhead. Also, there is currently no straightforward method of utilizing prompts that are longer than the maximum input length of the LMs without incurring additional costs during inference. We propose Prompt Injection (PI), a novel formulation of injecting the prompt into the parameters of an LM to be an efficient alternative to attaching fixed prompts to the input. We show that in scenarios with long fixed prompts, PI can be up to 280 times more efficient in terms of total FLOPs than previous approaches. We further explore methodologies for PI and show promising results in persona-dependent conversation, semantic parsing, and zero-shot learning with task instructions. Through these explorations, we show that PI can be a promising direction for conditioning language models, especially in scenarios with long and fixed prompts.
summary: Recent works have shown that attaching prompts to the input is effective at conditioning Language Models (LM) to perform specific tasks. However, prompts are always included in the input text during inference, thus incurring substantial computational and memory overhead. Also, there is currently no straightforward method of utilizing prompts that are longer than the maximum input length of the LMs without incurring additional costs during inference. We propose Prompt Injection (PI), a novel formulation of injecting the prompt into the parameters of an LM to be an efficient alternative to attaching fixed prompts to the input. We show that in scenarios with long fixed prompts, PI can be up to 280 times more efficient in terms of total FLOPs than previous approaches. We further explore methodologies for PI and show promising results in persona-dependent conversation, semantic parsing, and zero-shot learning with task instructions. Through these explorations, we show that PI can be a promising direction for conditioning language models, especially in scenarios with long and fixed prompts.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，在输入中附加提示对于调节语言模型 (LM) 执行特定任务非常有效。然而，在推理过程中，提示总是包含在输入文本中，从而产生大量的计算和内存开销。此外，目前还没有一种简单的方法可以利用长于 LM 最大输入长度的提示，而不会在推理过程中产生额外成本。我们提出了提示注入（PI），这是一种将提示注入到 LM 参数中的新颖表述，作为将固定提示附加到输入的有效替代方案。我们表明，在具有较长固定提示的场景中，就总 FLOP 而言，PI 的效率比以前的方法高出 280 倍。我们进一步探索 PI 的方法，并在依赖角色的对话、语义解析和任务指令的零样本学习中显示出有希望的结果。通过这些探索，我们表明 PI 可以成为调节语言模型的一个有前途的方向，特别是在具有长且固定提示的场景中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Prompt Injection（PI）的新方法，通过将固定提示参数化并注入语言模型参数中，替代传统输入附加提示的方式，以提高处理长固定提示任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在输入中附加固定提示会导致显著的计算和内存开销，且无法处理超出模型最大输入长度的长提示，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 将固定提示转化为模型参数的一部分（参数化），通过注入到语言模型参数中实现条件控制，避免在推理时将提示直接附加到输入文本。
AI.result: 在长固定提示场景下，PI方法的计算效率（总FLOPs）比现有方法高280倍，并在角色依赖对话、语义解析和零样本学习等任务中取得良好效果。
AI.conclusion: PI为条件语言模型提供了一种高效替代方案，尤其适用于需要长固定提示的场景，具有广泛的应用前景。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Prompt Injection（PI）的新方法，通过将固定提示参数化并注入语言模型参数中，替代传统输入附加提示的方式，以提高处理长固定提示任务的效率。
motivation: 传统方法在输入中附加固定提示会导致显著的计算和内存开销，且无法处理超出模型最大输入长度的长提示，亟需更高效的解决方案。
method: 将固定提示转化为模型参数的一部分（参数化），通过注入到语言模型参数中实现条件控制，避免在推理时将提示直接附加到输入文本。
result: 在长固定提示场景下，PI方法的计算效率（总FLOPs）比现有方法高280倍，并在角色依赖对话、语义解析和零样本学习等任务中取得良好效果。
conclusion: PI为条件语言模型提供了一种高效替代方案，尤其适用于需要长固定提示的场景，具有广泛的应用前景。
search_text: Prompt Injection: Parameterization of Fixed Inputs 即时注入：固定输入的参数化 Recent works have shown that attaching prompts to the input is effective at conditioning Language Models (LM) to perform specific tasks. However, prompts are always included in the input text during inference, thus incurring substantial computational and memory overhead. Also, there is currently no straightforward method of utilizing prompts that are longer than the maximum input length of the LMs without incurring additional costs during inference. We propose Prompt Injection (PI), a novel formulation of injecting the prompt into the parameters of an LM to be an efficient alternative to attaching fixed prompts to the input. We show that in scenarios with long fixed prompts, PI can be up to 280 times more efficient in terms of total FLOPs than previous approaches. We further explore methodologies for PI and show promising results in persona-dependent conversation, semantic parsing, and zero-shot learning with task instructions. Through these explorations, we show that PI can be a promising direction for conditioning language models, especially in scenarios with long and fixed prompts. 最近的研究表明，在输入中附加提示对于调节语言模型 (LM) 执行特定任务非常有效。然而，在推理过程中，提示总是包含在输入文本中，从而产生大量的计算和内存开销。此外，目前还没有一种简单的方法可以利用长于 LM 最大输入长度的提示，而不会在推理过程中产生额外成本。我们提出了提示注入（PI），这是一种将提示注入到 LM 参数中的新颖表述，作为将固定提示附加到输入的有效替代方案。我们表明，在具有较长固定提示的场景中，就总 FLOP 而言，PI 的效率比以前的方法高出 280 倍。我们进一步探索 PI 的方法，并在依赖角色的对话、语义解析和任务指令的零样本学习中显示出有希望的结果。通过这些探索，我们表明 PI 可以成为调节语言模型的一个有前途的方向，特别是在具有长且固定提示的场景中。 本文提出了一种名为Prompt Injection（PI）的新方法，通过将固定提示参数化并注入语言模型参数中，替代传统输入附加提示的方式，以提高处理长固定提示任务的效率。 Eunbi Choi,Yongrae Jo,Joel Jang,Minjoon Seo cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

title: Dispersing Obnoxious Facilities on Graphs by Rounding Distances
title_zh: 通过舍入距离分散图上的令人讨厌的设施
abstract: We continue the study of $δ$-dispersion, a continuous facility location problem on a graph where all edges have unit length and where the facilities may also be positioned in the interior of the edges. The goal is to position as many facilities as possible subject to the condition that every two facilities have distance at least $δ$ from each other. Our main technical contribution is an efficient procedure to `round-up' distance $δ$. It transforms a $δ$-dispersed set $S$ into a $δ^\star$-dispersed set $S^\star$ of same size where distance $δ^\star$ is a slightly larger rational $\tfrac{a}{b}$ with a numerator $a$ upper bounded by the longest (not-induced) path in the input graph. Based on this rounding procedure and connections to the distance-$d$ independent set problem we derive a number of algorithmic results. When parameterized by treewidth, the problem is in XP. When parameterized by treedepth the problem is FPT and has a matching lower bound on its time complexity under ETH. Moreover, we can also settle the parameterized complexity with the solution size as parameter using our rounding technique: $δ$-\dispersion is FPT for every $δ\leq 2$ and W[1]-hard for every $δ> 2$. Further, we show that $δ$-dispersion is NP-complete for every fixed irrational distance $δ$, which was left open in a previous work.
summary: We continue the study of $δ$-dispersion, a continuous facility location problem on a graph where all edges have unit length and where the facilities may also be positioned in the interior of the edges. The goal is to position as many facilities as possible subject to the condition that every two facilities have distance at least $δ$ from each other. Our main technical contribution is an efficient procedure to `round-up' distance $δ$. It transforms a $δ$-dispersed set $S$ into a $δ^\star$-dispersed set $S^\star$ of same size where distance $δ^\star$ is a slightly larger rational $\tfrac{a}{b}$ with a numerator $a$ upper bounded by the longest (not-induced) path in the input graph. Based on this rounding procedure and connections to the distance-$d$ independent set problem we derive a number of algorithmic results. When parameterized by treewidth, the problem is in XP. When parameterized by treedepth the problem is FPT and has a matching lower bound on its time complexity under ETH. Moreover, we can also settle the parameterized complexity with the solution size as parameter using our rounding technique: $δ$-\dispersion is FPT for every $δ\leq 2$ and W[1]-hard for every $δ> 2$. Further, we show that $δ$-dispersion is NP-complete for every fixed irrational distance $δ$, which was left open in a previous work.
abstract_zh: 我们继续研究 $δ$ 分散，这是一个图上的连续设施位置问题，其中所有边都具有单位长度，并且设施也可能位于边的内部。目标是放置尽可能多的设施，条件是每两个设施彼此之间的距离至少为 $δ$。我们的主要技术贡献是“向上舍入”距离 $δ$ 的有效程序。它将 $δ$ 分散集 $S$ 转换为相同大小的 $δ^\star$ 分散集 $S^\star$，其中距离 $δ^\star$ 是稍大的有理数 $\tfrac{a}{b}$，分子 $a$ 上限以输入图中最长（非诱导）路径为界。基于这种舍入过程以及与距离$d$独立集问题的联系，我们得出了许多算法结果。当用树宽度参数化时，问题出在 XP 中。当通过树深度参数化时，问题是 FPT，并且在 ETH 下其时间复杂度具有匹配的下限。此外，我们还可以使用我们的舍入技术以解决方案大小作为参数来解决参数化复杂度：对于每个 $δ\leq 2$，$δ$-\离散度是 FPT，对于每个 $δ> 2$，$δ$-\分散度是 FPT，对于每个 $δ> 2$，W[1]-hard。此外，我们证明对于每个固定的无理距离 $δ$，$δ$ 色散是 NP 完全的，这在之前的工作中是开放的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图上δ-分散问题，即在单位长度边的图中放置尽可能多的设施，使得任意两设施间距离不小于δ，并提出了一种距离上取整方法。
AI.motivation: 设施定位问题在现实中有广泛应用，尤其当设施具有负面效应时需确保安全距离。现有研究对δ为有理数的情况复杂度尚不明确，需进一步探索参数化算法。
AI.method: 提出一种将δ-分散集转换为δ*-分散集的上取整方法，其中δ*为稍大的有理数，并结合距离-d独立集问题，设计参数化算法。
AI.result: 证明问题在树宽参数下属于XP类，在树深度参数下为FPT且有ETH下界；δ≤2时为FPT，δ>2时为W[1]-难；对任意固定无理数δ，问题为NP难。
AI.conclusion: 通过距离上取整技术解决了δ-分散问题的参数化复杂度，明确了不同参数下的算法边界，并填补了无理数δ情况的复杂度空白。

authors_text: Lucas N. Alegre,Ana L. C. Bazzan,Bruno C. da Silva
title: Optimistic Linear Support and Successor Features as a Basis for Optimal Policy Transfer
title_zh: 乐观线性支持和后继特征作为最优政策转移的基础
comment: Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML'22)
comments: Proceedings of the 39th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML'22)
abstract: In many real-world applications, reinforcement learning (RL) agents might have to solve multiple tasks, each one typically modeled via a reward function. If reward functions are expressed linearly, and the agent has previously learned a set of policies for different tasks, successor features (SFs) can be exploited to combine such policies and identify reasonable solutions for new problems. However, the identified solutions are not guaranteed to be optimal. We introduce a novel algorithm that addresses this limitation. It allows RL agents to combine existing policies and directly identify optimal policies for arbitrary new problems, without requiring any further interactions with the environment. We first show (under mild assumptions) that the transfer learning problem tackled by SFs is equivalent to the problem of learning to optimize multiple objectives in RL. We then introduce an SF-based extension of the Optimistic Linear Support algorithm to learn a set of policies whose SFs form a convex coverage set. We prove that policies in this set can be combined via generalized policy improvement to construct optimal behaviors for any new linearly-expressible tasks, without requiring any additional training samples. We empirically show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art competing algorithms both in discrete and continuous domains under value function approximation.
summary: In many real-world applications, reinforcement learning (RL) agents might have to solve multiple tasks, each one typically modeled via a reward function. If reward functions are expressed linearly, and the agent has previously learned a set of policies for different tasks, successor features (SFs) can be exploited to combine such policies and identify reasonable solutions for new problems. However, the identified solutions are not guaranteed to be optimal. We introduce a novel algorithm that addresses this limitation. It allows RL agents to combine existing policies and directly identify optimal policies for arbitrary new problems, without requiring any further interactions with the environment. We first show (under mild assumptions) that the transfer learning problem tackled by SFs is equivalent to the problem of learning to optimize multiple objectives in RL. We then introduce an SF-based extension of the Optimistic Linear Support algorithm to learn a set of policies whose SFs form a convex coverage set. We prove that policies in this set can be combined via generalized policy improvement to construct optimal behaviors for any new linearly-expressible tasks, without requiring any additional training samples. We empirically show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art competing algorithms both in discrete and continuous domains under value function approximation.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实应用中，强化学习（RL）代理可能必须解决多项任务，每一项任务通常通过奖励函数建模。如果奖励函数是线性表达的，并且代理之前已经学习了一组针对不同任务的策略，则可以利用后继特征（SF）来组合这些策略并为新问题识别合理的解决方案。然而，所确定的解决方案并不能保证是最佳的。我们引入了一种新颖的算法来解决这个限制。它允许 RL 代理结合现有策略并直接识别任意新问题的最佳策略，而不需要与环境进行任何进一步的交互。我们首先表明（在温和的假设下）SF 解决的迁移学习问题相当于学习优化 RL 中的多个目标的问题。然后，我们引入乐观线性支持算法的基于 SF 的扩展，以学习一组策略，其 SF 形成凸覆盖集。我们证明，这组策略可以通过广义策略改进进行组合，为任何新的线性可表达任务构建最佳行为，而不需要任何额外的训练样本。我们凭经验表明，在价值函数近似下，我们的方法在离散和连续域中都优于最先进的竞争算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于继承者特征（SF）的算法，用于在强化学习中直接识别任意新任务的最优策略，无需额外环境交互。
AI.motivation: 现有继承者特征方法组合策略时无法保证解的最优性，且需依赖价值函数近似。
AI.method: 将继承者特征与乐观线性支撑算法结合，构建凸覆盖策略集，通过广义策略改进直接生成新任务的最优策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在离散和连续控制领域均优于现有最先进算法，且无需额外训练样本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过理论证明和实验验证，实现了无需环境交互的最优策略迁移，解决了多任务强化学习中的关键问题。

We then introduce an SF-based extension of the Optimistic Linear Support algorithm to learn a set of policies whose SFs form a convex coverage set. We prove that policies in this set can be combined via generalized policy improvement to construct optimal behaviors for any new linearly-expressible tasks, without requiring any additional training samples. We empirically show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art competing algorithms both in discrete and continuous domains under value function approximation. 在许多现实应用中，强化学习（RL）代理可能必须解决多项任务，每一项任务通常通过奖励函数建模。如果奖励函数是线性表达的，并且代理之前已经学习了一组针对不同任务的策略，则可以利用后继特征（SF）来组合这些策略并为新问题识别合理的解决方案。然而，所确定的解决方案并不能保证是最佳的。我们引入了一种新颖的算法来解决这个限制。它允许 RL 代理结合现有策略并直接识别任意新问题的最佳策略，而不需要与环境进行任何进一步的交互。我们首先表明（在温和的假设下）SF 解决的迁移学习问题相当于学习优化 RL 中的多个目标的问题。然后，我们引入乐观线性支持算法的基于 SF 的扩展，以学习一组策略，其 SF 形成凸覆盖集。我们证明，这组策略可以通过广义策略改进进行组合，为任何新的线性可表达任务构建最佳行为，而不需要任何额外的训练样本。我们凭经验表明，在价值函数近似下，我们的方法在离散和连续域中都优于最先进的竞争算法。 本文提出一种基于继承者特征（SF）的算法，用于在强化学习中直接识别任意新任务的最优策略，无需额外环境交互。 Lucas N. Alegre,Ana L. C. Bazzan,Bruno C. da Silva cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Graph-Based Multi-Robot Path Finding and Planning
title_zh: 基于图的多机器人路径查找与规划
comment: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Current Robotics Reports, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s43154-022-00083-8
comments: This preprint has not undergone peer review (when applicable) or any post-submission improvements or corrections. The Version of Record of this article is published in Current Robotics Reports, and is available online at https://doi.org/10.1007/s43154-022-00083-8
abstract: Purpose of Review Planning collision-free paths for multiple robots is important for real-world multi-robot systems and has been studied as an optimization problem on graphs, called Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF). This review surveys different categories of classic and state-of-the-art MAPF algorithms and different research attempts to tackle the challenges of generalizing MAPF techniques to real-world scenarios. Recent Findings Solving MAPF problems optimally is computationally challenging. Recent advances have resulted in MAPF algorithms that can compute collision-free paths for hundreds of robots and thousands of navigation tasks in seconds of runtime. Many variants of MAPF have been formalized to adapt MAPF techniques to different real-world requirements, such as considerations of robot kinematics, online optimization for real-time systems, and the integration of task assignment and path planning. Summary Algorithmic techniques for MAPF problems have addressed important aspects of several multi-robot applications, including automated warehouse fulfillment and sortation, automated train scheduling, and navigation of non-holonomic robots and quadcopters. This showcases their potential for real-world applications of large-scale multi-robot systems.
summary: Purpose of Review Planning collision-free paths for multiple robots is important for real-world multi-robot systems and has been studied as an optimization problem on graphs, called Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF). This review surveys different categories of classic and state-of-the-art MAPF algorithms and different research attempts to tackle the challenges of generalizing MAPF techniques to real-world scenarios. Recent Findings Solving MAPF problems optimally is computationally challenging. Recent advances have resulted in MAPF algorithms that can compute collision-free paths for hundreds of robots and thousands of navigation tasks in seconds of runtime. Many variants of MAPF have been formalized to adapt MAPF techniques to different real-world requirements, such as considerations of robot kinematics, online optimization for real-time systems, and the integration of task assignment and path planning. Summary Algorithmic techniques for MAPF problems have addressed important aspects of several multi-robot applications, including automated warehouse fulfillment and sortation, automated train scheduling, and navigation of non-holonomic robots and quadcopters. This showcases their potential for real-world applications of large-scale multi-robot systems.
abstract_zh: 审查目的规划多个机器人的无碰撞路径对于现实世界的多机器人系统非常重要，并且已作为图上的优化问题进行研究，称为多代理路径查找（MAPF）。本综述调查了不同类别的经典和最先进的 MAPF 算法，以及解决将 MAPF 技术推广到现实场景的挑战的不同研究尝试。最新发现 以最佳方式解决 MAPF 问题在计算上具有挑战性。最近的进展使得 MAPF 算法可以在几秒钟的运行时间内计算数百个机器人和数千个导航任务的无碰撞路径。 MAPF 的许多变体已经被形式化，以使 MAPF 技术适应不同的现实需求，例如机器人运动学的考虑、实时系统的在线优化以及任务分配和路径规划的集成。总结 MAPF 问题的算法技术已经解决了多个多机器人应用的重要方面，包括自动化仓库履行和分拣、自动化列车调度以及非完整机器人和四轴飞行器的导航。这展示了它们在大规模多机器人系统的实际应用中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于图的多机器人路径规划算法及其在现实场景中的应用挑战。
AI.motivation: 多机器人系统在现实应用中需要高效避障路径规划，但传统MAPF算法面临计算复杂度和场景适应性难题。
AI.method: 系统梳理经典与前沿MAPF算法分类，分析其在机器人运动学建模、在线优化及任务分配等现实需求中的改进方案。
AI.result: 最新算法可在数秒内处理数百机器人规模，且通过多种变体适配非完整约束、实时系统等实际场景需求。
AI.conclusion: MAPF算法在仓储物流、轨道交通等大规模多机器人系统中展现出重要应用价值。

title: Latent Policies for Adversarial Imitation Learning
title_zh: 对抗性模仿学习的潜在策略
abstract: This paper considers learning robot locomotion and manipulation tasks from expert demonstrations. Generative adversarial imitation learning (GAIL) trains a discriminator that distinguishes expert from agent transitions, and in turn use a reward defined by the discriminator output to optimize a policy generator for the agent. This generative adversarial training approach is very powerful but depends on a delicate balance between the discriminator and the generator training. In high-dimensional problems, the discriminator training may easily overfit or exploit associations with task-irrelevant features for transition classification. A key insight of this work is that performing imitation learning in a suitable latent task space makes the training process stable, even in challenging high-dimensional problems. We use an action encoder-decoder model to obtain a low-dimensional latent action space and train a LAtent Policy using Adversarial imitation Learning (LAPAL). The encoder-decoder model can be trained offline from state-action pairs to obtain a task-agnostic latent action representation or online, simultaneously with the discriminator and generator training, to obtain a task-aware latent action representation. We demonstrate that LAPAL training is stable, with near-monotonic performance improvement, and achieves expert performance in most locomotion and manipulation tasks, while a GAIL baseline converges slower and does not achieve expert performance in high-dimensional environments.
summary: This paper considers learning robot locomotion and manipulation tasks from expert demonstrations. Generative adversarial imitation learning (GAIL) trains a discriminator that distinguishes expert from agent transitions, and in turn use a reward defined by the discriminator output to optimize a policy generator for the agent. This generative adversarial training approach is very powerful but depends on a delicate balance between the discriminator and the generator training. In high-dimensional problems, the discriminator training may easily overfit or exploit associations with task-irrelevant features for transition classification. A key insight of this work is that performing imitation learning in a suitable latent task space makes the training process stable, even in challenging high-dimensional problems. We use an action encoder-decoder model to obtain a low-dimensional latent action space and train a LAtent Policy using Adversarial imitation Learning (LAPAL). The encoder-decoder model can be trained offline from state-action pairs to obtain a task-agnostic latent action representation or online, simultaneously with the discriminator and generator training, to obtain a task-aware latent action representation. We demonstrate that LAPAL training is stable, with near-monotonic performance improvement, and achieves expert performance in most locomotion and manipulation tasks, while a GAIL baseline converges slower and does not achieve expert performance in high-dimensional environments.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑从专家演示中学习机器人运动和操纵任务。生成对抗性模仿学习（GAIL）训练区分专家和代理转换的判别器，然后使用判别器输出定义的奖励来优化代理的策略生成器。这种生成对抗训练方法非常强大，但取决于判别器和生成器训练之间的微妙平衡。在高维问题中，鉴别器训练可能很容易过度拟合或利用与任务无关特征的关联来进行转换分类。这项工作的一个关键见解是，即使在具有挑战性的高维问题中，在合适的潜在任务空间中执行模仿学习也可以使训练过程保持稳定。我们使用动作编码器-解码器模型来获取低维潜在动作空间，并使用对抗模仿学习（LAPAL）训练 LAtent 策略。编码器-解码器模型可以从状态-动作对进行离线训练，以获得与任务无关的潜在动作表示，或者与判别器和生成器训练同时进行在线训练，以获得任务感知的潜在动作表示。我们证明了 LAPAL 训练是稳定的，具有近乎单调的性能提升，并且在大多数运动和操作任务中实现了专家性能，而 GAIL 基线收敛速度较慢，并且在高维环境中无法实现专家性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于潜在动作空间的对抗性模仿学习方法LAPAL，用于解决高维机器人任务中生成对抗网络（GAIL）训练不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统GAIL方法在高维问题中易出现判别器过拟合或利用任务无关特征导致训练不稳定，亟需更稳健的模仿学习框架。
AI.method: 通过动作编码器-解码器模型构建低维潜在动作空间，结合在线/离线训练模式，提出LAtent Policy via Adversarial imitative Learning (LAPAL)框架。
AI.result: LAPAL在多数运动与操作任务中达到专家水平，训练过程稳定且性能单调提升，显著优于传统GAIL基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 潜在动作空间能有效提升对抗模仿学习的稳定性，LAPAL方法在高维复杂任务中展现出优于GAIL的性能与收敛性。

The encoder-decoder model can be trained offline from state-action pairs to obtain a task-agnostic latent action representation or online, simultaneously with the discriminator and generator training, to obtain a task-aware latent action representation. title: On Fuzzy Cardinal Semantic Transformations
title_zh: 论模糊基数语义变换
abstract: The concept of fuzzy cardinal semantic transformation as a basis for creating fuzzy semantic numeration systems is introduced in this work. Both fuzziness of the initial data - cardinals of abstract entities - and fuzziness of the parameters of the cardinal semantic operators are considered. We also expressed cardinal semantic transformations for discrete fuzzy numbers and for continuous triangular fuzzy numbers. The principle of formation of the fuzzy common carry in the cardinal semantic operators with multiple inputs is formed.
summary: The concept of fuzzy cardinal semantic transformation as a basis for creating fuzzy semantic numeration systems is introduced in this work. Both fuzziness of the initial data - cardinals of abstract entities - and fuzziness of the parameters of the cardinal semantic operators are considered. We also expressed cardinal semantic transformations for discrete fuzzy numbers and for continuous triangular fuzzy numbers. The principle of formation of the fuzzy common carry in the cardinal semantic operators with multiple inputs is formed.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了模糊基数语义变换的概念，作为创建模糊语义计数系统的基础。考虑了初始数据（抽象实体的基数）的模糊性和基数语义运算符的参数的模糊性。我们还表达了离散模糊数和连续三角模糊数的基数语义变换。给出了多输入基数语义算子中模糊共进位的形成原理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出模糊基数语义变换概念，构建模糊语义计数系统，处理初始数据及运算参数的模糊性。
AI.motivation: 传统计数系统难以处理抽象实体基数的模糊性及运算参数的不确定性，需建立新型语义变换方法。
AI.method: 定义离散模糊数与连续三角模糊数的基数语义变换，建立多输入运算符的模糊进位形成原理。
AI.result: 实现模糊基数语义变换的数学表达，提出多输入场景下的模糊进位生成机制。
AI.conclusion: 为模糊语义计数系统提供理论基础，扩展了模糊数运算的适用范围与表达能力。

search_text: On Fuzzy Cardinal Semantic Transformations 论模糊基数语义变换 The concept of fuzzy cardinal semantic transformation as a basis for creating fuzzy semantic numeration systems is introduced in this work. Both fuzziness of the initial data - cardinals of abstract entities - and fuzziness of the parameters of the cardinal semantic operators are considered. We also expressed cardinal semantic transformations for discrete fuzzy numbers and for continuous triangular fuzzy numbers. The principle of formation of the fuzzy common carry in the cardinal semantic operators with multiple inputs is formed. 本文介绍了模糊基数语义变换的概念，作为创建模糊语义计数系统的基础。考虑了初始数据（抽象实体的基数）的模糊性和基数语义运算符的参数的模糊性。我们还表达了离散模糊数和连续三角模糊数的基数语义变换。给出了多输入基数语义算子中模糊共进位的形成原理。 本文提出模糊基数语义变换概念，构建模糊语义计数系统，处理初始数据及运算参数的模糊性。 Alexander Chunikhin,Vadym Zhytniuk cs.AI,cs.LO

title: Few-shot Long-Tailed Bird Audio Recognition
title_zh: 少镜头长尾鸟音频识别
abstract: It is easier to hear birds than see them. However, they still play an essential role in nature and are excellent indicators of deteriorating environmental quality and pollution. Recent advances in Deep Neural Networks allow us to process audio data to detect and classify birds. This technology can assist researchers in monitoring bird populations and biodiversity. We propose a sound detection and classification pipeline to analyze complex soundscape recordings and identify birdcalls in the background. Our method learns from weak labels and few data and acoustically recognizes the bird species. Our solution achieved 18th place of 807 teams at the BirdCLEF 2022 Challenge hosted on Kaggle.
summary: It is easier to hear birds than see them. However, they still play an essential role in nature and are excellent indicators of deteriorating environmental quality and pollution. Recent advances in Deep Neural Networks allow us to process audio data to detect and classify birds. This technology can assist researchers in monitoring bird populations and biodiversity. We propose a sound detection and classification pipeline to analyze complex soundscape recordings and identify birdcalls in the background. Our method learns from weak labels and few data and acoustically recognizes the bird species. Our solution achieved 18th place of 807 teams at the BirdCLEF 2022 Challenge hosted on Kaggle.
abstract_zh: 听到鸟儿的声音比看到它们更容易。然而，它们在自然界中仍然发挥着重要作用，并且是环境质量和污染恶化的极好指标。深度神经网络的最新进展使我们能够处理音频数据来检测和分类鸟类。该技术可以帮助研究人员监测鸟类种群和生物多样性。我们提出了一种声音检测和分类管道来分析复杂的音景录音并识别背景中的鸟叫声。我们的方法从弱标签和少量数据中学习，并通过声音识别鸟类物种。我们的解决方案在 Kaggle 举办的 BirdCLEF 2022 挑战赛中在 807 支团队中获得第 18 名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于少量样本和弱标签的鸟类音频识别方法，用于处理复杂声景中的鸟鸣检测与分类任务。
AI.motivation: 鸟类作为环境质量的重要指示物种，其音频监测对生态研究至关重要，但现有数据存在样本不平衡和标注不足的问题。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合弱监督学习和小样本学习的音频处理流水线，通过深度神经网络识别复杂背景中的鸟鸣声。
AI.result: 该方法在BirdCLEF 2022竞赛中获得807支队伍中的第18名，验证了其在长尾分布数据集上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的解决方案为小样本和长尾分布的鸟类音频识别提供了可行的技术路径，有助于提升生态监测效率。

authors_text: Shangchen Zhou,Kelvin C. K. Chan,Chongyi Li,Chen Change Loy
title: Towards Robust Blind Face Restoration with Codebook Lookup Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Codebook Lookup Transformer 实现鲁棒盲人脸恢复
abstract: Blind face restoration is a highly ill-posed problem that often requires auxiliary guidance to 1) improve the mapping from degraded inputs to desired outputs, or 2) complement high-quality details lost in the inputs. In this paper, we demonstrate that a learned discrete codebook prior in a small proxy space largely reduces the uncertainty and ambiguity of restoration mapping by casting blind face restoration as a code prediction task, while providing rich visual atoms for generating high-quality faces. Under this paradigm, we propose a Transformer-based prediction network, named CodeFormer, to model the global composition and context of the low-quality faces for code prediction, enabling the discovery of natural faces that closely approximate the target faces even when the inputs are severely degraded. To enhance the adaptiveness for different degradation, we also propose a controllable feature transformation module that allows a flexible trade-off between fidelity and quality. Thanks to the expressive codebook prior and global modeling, CodeFormer outperforms the state of the arts in both quality and fidelity, showing superior robustness to degradation. Extensive experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets verify the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Blind face restoration is a highly ill-posed problem that often requires auxiliary guidance to 1) improve the mapping from degraded inputs to desired outputs, or 2) complement high-quality details lost in the inputs. In this paper, we demonstrate that a learned discrete codebook prior in a small proxy space largely reduces the uncertainty and ambiguity of restoration mapping by casting blind face restoration as a code prediction task, while providing rich visual atoms for generating high-quality faces. Under this paradigm, we propose a Transformer-based prediction network, named CodeFormer, to model the global composition and context of the low-quality faces for code prediction, enabling the discovery of natural faces that closely approximate the target faces even when the inputs are severely degraded. To enhance the adaptiveness for different degradation, we also propose a controllable feature transformation module that allows a flexible trade-off between fidelity and quality. Thanks to the expressive codebook prior and global modeling, CodeFormer outperforms the state of the arts in both quality and fidelity, showing superior robustness to degradation. Extensive experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets verify the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 盲脸恢复是一个高度不适定的问题，通常需要辅助指导来 1）改进从降级输入到所需输出的映射，或 2）补充输入中丢失的高质量细节。在本文中，我们证明了在小代理空间中学习的离散码本通过将盲人脸恢复作为代码预测任务，很大程度上减少了恢复映射的不确定性和模糊性，同时提供丰富的视觉原子来生成高质量的人脸。在这种范式下，我们提出了一个基于 Transformer 的预测网络，名为 CodeFormer，对低质量人脸的全局组成和上下文进行建模以进行代码预测，即使输入严重退化，也能够发现与目标人脸非常接近的自然人脸。为了增强对不同退化的适应性，我们还提出了一种可控特征转换模块，允许在保真度和质量之间进行灵活的权衡。得益于富有表现力的码本先验和全局建模，CodeFormer 在质量和保真度方面均优于最先进的技术，表现出卓越的抗退化鲁棒性。对合成数据集和真实数据集的大量实验结果验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于代码簿查找的Transformer模型CodeFormer，用于解决盲脸修复问题，通过离散代码先验减少修复映射的不确定性。
AI.motivation: 盲脸修复因输入退化严重导致映射模糊，传统方法依赖辅助信息或难以保留细节，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计CodeFormer网络，将修复任务转化为代码预测，结合全局建模与可控特征变换模块，平衡保真度与质量。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有方法，展现对退化的强鲁棒性，生成高质量人脸。
AI.conclusion: 代码簿先验与全局建模有效提升盲脸修复性能，为复杂退化场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Nur Muhammad Mahi Shafiullah,Zichen Jeff Cui,Ariuntuya Altanzaya,Lerrel Pinto
title: Behavior Transformers: Cloning $k$ modes with one stone
title_zh: 行为变形金刚：用一颗石头克隆 $k$ 模式
comment: Code and data available at https://github.com/notmahi/bet
comments: Code and data available at https://github.com/notmahi/bet
abstract: While behavior learning has made impressive progress in recent times, it lags behind computer vision and natural language processing due to its inability to leverage large, human-generated datasets. Human behaviors have wide variance, multiple modes, and human demonstrations typically do not come with reward labels. These properties limit the applicability of current methods in Offline RL and Behavioral Cloning to learn from large, pre-collected datasets. In this work, we present Behavior Transformer (BeT), a new technique to model unlabeled demonstration data with multiple modes. BeT retrofits standard transformer architectures with action discretization coupled with a multi-task action correction inspired by offset prediction in object detection. This allows us to leverage the multi-modal modeling ability of modern transformers to predict multi-modal continuous actions. We experimentally evaluate BeT on a variety of robotic manipulation and self-driving behavior datasets. We show that BeT significantly improves over prior state-of-the-art work on solving demonstrated tasks while capturing the major modes present in the pre-collected datasets. Finally, through an extensive ablation study, we analyze the importance of every crucial component in BeT. Videos of behavior generated by BeT are available at https://notmahi.github.io/bet

This allows us to leverage the multi-modal modeling ability of modern transformers to predict multi-modal continuous actions. We experimentally evaluate BeT on a variety of robotic manipulation and self-driving behavior datasets. We show that BeT significantly improves over prior state-of-the-art work on solving demonstrated tasks while capturing the major modes present in the pre-collected datasets. Finally, through an extensive ablation study, we analyze the importance of every crucial component in BeT. Videos of behavior generated by BeT are available at https://notmahi.github.io/bet
abstract_zh: 虽然行为学习近年来取得了令人瞩目的进展，但由于无法利用大型的、人类生成的数据集，它落后于计算机视觉和自然语言处理。人类行为有很大的差异、多种模式，并且人类的示范通常不带有奖励标签。这些属性限制了离线强化学习和行为克隆中当前方法从大型预收集数据集中学习的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了行为转换器（BeT），这是一种用多种模式对未标记的演示数据进行建模的新技术。 BeT 通过动作离散化和受对象检测中偏移预测启发的多任务动作校正来改造标准变压器架构。这使我们能够利用现代变压器的多模态建模能力来预测多模态连续动作。我们在各种机器人操作和自动驾驶行为数据集上对 BeT 进行了实验评估。我们表明，BeT 在解决演示任务方面比之前最先进的工作有了显着改进，同时捕获了预先收集的数据集中存在的主要模式。最后，通过广泛的消融研究，我们分析了 BeT 中每个关键组成部分的重要性。 BeT 生成的行为视频可在 https://notmahi.github.io/bet 上找到

AI.conclusion: BeT通过利用现代Transformer的多模式建模能力，有效解决了行为学习中多模式数据建模的问题，并通过消融实验验证了其关键组件的重要性。

search_text: Behavior Transformers: Cloning $k$ modes with one stone 行为变形金刚：用一颗石头克隆 $k$ 模式 While behavior learning has made impressive progress in recent times, it lags behind computer vision and natural language processing due to its inability to leverage large, human-generated datasets. Human behaviors have wide variance, multiple modes, and human demonstrations typically do not come with reward labels. These properties limit the applicability of current methods in Offline RL and Behavioral Cloning to learn from large, pre-collected datasets. In this work, we present Behavior Transformer (BeT), a new technique to model unlabeled demonstration data with multiple modes. BeT retrofits standard transformer architectures with action discretization coupled with a multi-task action correction inspired by offset prediction in object detection. This allows us to leverage the multi-modal modeling ability of modern transformers to predict multi-modal continuous actions. We experimentally evaluate BeT on a variety of robotic manipulation and self-driving behavior datasets. We show that BeT significantly improves over prior state-of-the-art work on solving demonstrated tasks while capturing the major modes present in the pre-collected datasets. Finally, through an extensive ablation study, we analyze the importance of every crucial component in BeT. Videos of behavior generated by BeT are available at https://notmahi.github.io/bet 虽然行为学习近年来取得了令人瞩目的进展，但由于无法利用大型的、人类生成的数据集，它落后于计算机视觉和自然语言处理。人类行为有很大的差异、多种模式，并且人类的示范通常不带有奖励标签。这些属性限制了离线强化学习和行为克隆中当前方法从大型预收集数据集中学习的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了行为转换器（BeT），这是一种用多种模式对未标记的演示数据进行建模的新技术。 BeT 通过动作离散化和受对象检测中偏移预测启发的多任务动作校正来改造标准变压器架构。这使我们能够利用现代变压器的多模态建模能力来预测多模态连续动作。我们在各种机器人操作和自动驾驶行为数据集上对 BeT 进行了实验评估。我们表明，BeT 在解决演示任务方面比之前最先进的工作有了显着改进，同时捕获了预先收集的数据集中存在的主要模式。最后，通过广泛的消融研究，我们分析了 BeT 中每个关键组成部分的重要性。 BeT 生成的行为视频可在 https://notmahi.github.io/bet 上找到 本文提出了一种名为Behavior Transformer (BeT)的新方法，用于从无标签的多模式演示数据中学习行为。 Nur Muhammad Mahi Shafiullah,Zichen Jeff Cui,Ariuntuya Altanzaya,Lerrel Pinto cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Jiaying Lin,Yuen-Hei Yeung,Shuquan Ye,Rynson W. H. Lau
title: Leveraging RGB-D Data with Cross-Modal Context Mining for Glass Surface Detection
title_zh: 利用 RGB-D 数据和跨模态上下文挖掘进行玻璃表面检测
comment: Accepted to AAAI 2025. Project Page: https://jiaying.link/AAAI25-RGBDGlass/
comments: Accepted to AAAI 2025. Project Page: https://jiaying.link/AAAI25-RGBDGlass/
abstract: Glass surfaces are becoming increasingly ubiquitous as modern buildings tend to use a lot of glass panels. This, however, poses substantial challenges to the operations of autonomous systems such as robots, self-driving cars, and drones, as these glass panels can become transparent obstacles to navigation. Existing works attempt to exploit various cues, including glass boundary context or reflections, as priors. However, they are all based on input RGB images. We observe that the transmission of 3D depth sensor light through glass surfaces often produces blank regions in the depth maps, which can offer additional insights to complement the RGB image features for glass surface detection. In this work, we first propose a large-scale RGB-D glass surface detection dataset, \textit{RGB-D GSD}, for rigorous experiments and future research. It contains 3,009 images, paired with precise annotations, offering a wide range of real-world RGB-D glass surface categories. We then propose a novel glass surface detection framework combining RGB and depth information, with two novel modules: a cross-modal context mining (CCM) module to adaptively learn individual and mutual context features from RGB and depth information, and a depth-missing aware attention (DAA) module to explicitly exploit spatial locations where missing depths occur to help detect the presence of glass surfaces. Experimental results show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Glass surfaces are becoming increasingly ubiquitous as modern buildings tend to use a lot of glass panels. This, however, poses substantial challenges to the operations of autonomous systems such as robots, self-driving cars, and drones, as these glass panels can become transparent obstacles to navigation. Existing works attempt to exploit various cues, including glass boundary context or reflections, as priors. However, they are all based on input RGB images. We observe that the transmission of 3D depth sensor light through glass surfaces often produces blank regions in the depth maps, which can offer additional insights to complement the RGB image features for glass surface detection. In this work, we first propose a large-scale RGB-D glass surface detection dataset, \textit{RGB-D GSD}, for rigorous experiments and future research. It contains 3,009 images, paired with precise annotations, offering a wide range of real-world RGB-D glass surface categories. We then propose a novel glass surface detection framework combining RGB and depth information, with two novel modules: a cross-modal context mining (CCM) module to adaptively learn individual and mutual context features from RGB and depth information, and a depth-missing aware attention (DAA) module to explicitly exploit spatial locations where missing depths occur to help detect the presence of glass surfaces. Experimental results show that our proposed model outperforms state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 随着现代建筑倾向于使用大量玻璃面板，玻璃表面变得越来越普遍。然而，这给机器人、自动驾驶汽车和无人机等自主系统的运行带来了巨大的挑战，因为这些玻璃面板可能成为透明的导航障碍。现有的作品试图利用各种线索，包括玻璃边界背景或反射，作为先验。然而，它们都是基于输入的 RGB 图像。我们观察到，3D 深度传感器光穿过玻璃表面的传输通常会在深度图中产生空白区域，这可以提供额外的见解来补充玻璃表面检测的 RGB 图像特征。在这项工作中，我们首先提出了一个大规模 RGB-D 玻璃表面检测数据集 \textit{RGB-D GSD}，用于严格的实验和未来的研究。它包含 3,009 张图像，并配有精确的注释，提供广泛的真实世界 RGB-D 玻璃表面类别。然后，我们提出了一种结合 RGB 和深度信息的新型玻璃表面检测框架，具有两个新颖的模块：跨模式上下文挖掘（CCM）模块，用于从 RGB 和深度信息中自适应学习个体和相互上下文特征；以及深度缺失感知注意（DAA）模块，用于显式地利用发生缺失深度的空间位置，以帮助检测玻璃表面的存在。实验结果表明，我们提出的模型优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合RGB和深度信息的玻璃表面检测框架，通过跨模态上下文挖掘和深度缺失感知注意力模块提升检测性能，并构建了大规模RGB-D玻璃表面检测数据集RGB-D GSD。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖RGB图像进行玻璃表面检测，未能有效利用深度传感器在玻璃表面产生的空白区域信息，导致检测性能受限。
AI.method: 提出包含3,009张配对图像的RGB-D GSD数据集，设计跨模态上下文挖掘模块（CCM）学习RGB与深度的个体及交互特征，并引入深度缺失感知注意力模块（DAA）利用深度缺失区域辅助玻璃检测。
AI.result: 实验表明所提模型在玻璃表面检测任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 融合RGB与深度信息的跨模态特征学习能有效提升玻璃表面检测性能，构建的RGB-D GSD数据集为后续研究提供重要基准。

search_text: Leveraging RGB-D Data with Cross-Modal Context Mining for Glass Surface Detection 利用 RGB-D 数据和跨模态上下文挖掘进行玻璃表面检测 Glass surfaces are becoming increasingly ubiquitous as modern buildings tend to use a lot of glass panels. authors_text: Sebastian Gehrmann,Abhik Bhattacharjee,Abinaya Mahendiran,Alex Wang,Alexandros Papangelis,Aman Madaan,Angelina McMillan-Major,Anna Shvets,Ashish Upadhyay,Bingsheng Yao,Bryan Wilie,Chandra Bhagavatula,Chaobin You,Craig Thomson,Cristina Garbacea,Dakuo Wang,Daniel Deutsch,Deyi Xiong,Di Jin,Dimitra Gkatzia,Dragomir Radev,Elizabeth Clark,Esin Durmus,Faisal Ladhak,Filip Ginter, et al. (52 additional authors not shown)
title: GEMv2: Multilingual NLG Benchmarking in a Single Line of Code
title_zh: GEMv2：单行代码中的多语言 NLG 基准测试
abstract: Evaluation in machine learning is usually informed by past choices, for example which datasets or metrics to use. This standardization enables the comparison on equal footing using leaderboards, but the evaluation choices become sub-optimal as better alternatives arise. This problem is especially pertinent in natural language generation which requires ever-improving suites of datasets, metrics, and human evaluation to make definitive claims. To make following best model evaluation practices easier, we introduce GEMv2. The new version of the Generation, Evaluation, and Metrics Benchmark introduces a modular infrastructure for dataset, model, and metric developers to benefit from each others work. GEMv2 supports 40 documented datasets in 51 languages. Models for all datasets can be evaluated online and our interactive data card creation and rendering tools make it easier to add new datasets to the living benchmark.
summary: Evaluation in machine learning is usually informed by past choices, for example which datasets or metrics to use. This standardization enables the comparison on equal footing using leaderboards, but the evaluation choices become sub-optimal as better alternatives arise. This problem is especially pertinent in natural language generation which requires ever-improving suites of datasets, metrics, and human evaluation to make definitive claims. To make following best model evaluation practices easier, we introduce GEMv2. The new version of the Generation, Evaluation, and Metrics Benchmark introduces a modular infrastructure for dataset, model, and metric developers to benefit from each others work. GEMv2 supports 40 documented datasets in 51 languages. Models for all datasets can be evaluated online and our interactive data card creation and rendering tools make it easier to add new datasets to the living benchmark.
abstract_zh: 机器学习中的评估通常取决于过去的选择，例如使用哪些数据集或指标。这种标准化可以使用排行榜进行平等比较，但随着更好的替代方案出现，评估选择变得次优。这个问题在自然语言生成中尤其重要，它需要不断改进的数据集、指标和人工评估套件才能做出明确的主张。为了使遵循最佳模型评估实践变得更容易，我们引入了 GEMv2。新版本的生成、评估和指标基准引入了一个模块化基础设施，供数据集、模型和指标开发人员从彼此的工作中受益。 GEMv2 支持 51 种语言的 40 个记录数据集。所有数据集的模型都可以在线评估，我们的交互式数据卡创建和渲染工具可以更轻松地将新数据集添加到实时基准中。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍GEMv2，一个支持多语言自然语言生成（NLG）的模块化基准测试框架，提供40个数据集、51种语言的在线评估及交互式工具。
AI.motivation: 传统NLG评估依赖固定数据集和指标，难以适应新兴方法，需更灵活的标准化框架以促进模型、数据集和评估指标的协同优化。
AI.method: 构建模块化基础设施，集成40个文档化数据集与51种语言支持，提供在线模型评估功能及交互式数据卡工具，降低新数据集接入门槛。
AI.result: 实现跨语言NLG任务的统一评估基准，支持社区贡献数据集，通过在线平台简化模型测评流程，提升多语言生成研究的可复现性与扩展性。
AI.conclusion: GEMv2通过模块化设计和多语言覆盖解决了传统评估的局限性，为NLG领域提供了动态演进的标准化评测体系，推动技术发展与社区协作。

search_text: GEMv2: Multilingual NLG Benchmarking in a Single Line of Code GEMv2：单行代码中的多语言 NLG 基准测试 Evaluation in machine learning is usually informed by past choices, for example which datasets or metrics to use. This standardization enables the comparison on equal footing using leaderboards, but the evaluation choices become sub-optimal as better alternatives arise. This problem is especially pertinent in natural language generation which requires ever-improving suites of datasets, metrics, and human evaluation to make definitive claims. To make following best model evaluation practices easier, we introduce GEMv2. The new version of the Generation, Evaluation, and Metrics Benchmark introduces a modular infrastructure for dataset, model, and metric developers to benefit from each others work. GEMv2 supports 40 documented datasets in 51 languages. Models for all datasets can be evaluated online and our interactive data card creation and rendering tools make it easier to add new datasets to the living benchmark. 机器学习中的评估通常取决于过去的选择，例如使用哪些数据集或指标。这种标准化可以使用排行榜进行平等比较，但随着更好的替代方案出现，评估选择变得次优。这个问题在自然语言生成中尤其重要，它需要不断改进的数据集、指标和人工评估套件才能做出明确的主张。为了使遵循最佳模型评估实践变得更容易，我们引入了 GEMv2。新版本的生成、评估和指标基准引入了一个模块化基础设施，供数据集、模型和指标开发人员从彼此的工作中受益。 GEMv2 支持 51 种语言的 40 个记录数据集。所有数据集的模型都可以在线评估，我们的交互式数据卡创建和渲染工具可以更轻松地将新数据集添加到实时基准中。 本文介绍GEMv2，一个支持多语言自然语言生成（NLG）的模块化基准测试框架，提供40个数据集、51种语言的在线评估及交互式工具。 Sebastian Gehrmann,Abhik Bhattacharjee,Abinaya Mahendiran,Alex Wang,Alexandros Papangelis,Aman Madaan,Angelina McMillan-Major,Anna Shvets,Ashish Upadhyay,Bingsheng Yao,Bryan Wilie,Chandra Bhagavatula,Chaobin You,Craig Thomson,Cristina Garbacea,Dakuo Wang,Daniel Deutsch,Deyi Xiong,Di Jin,Dimitra Gkatzia,Dragomir Radev,Elizabeth Clark,Esin Durmus,Faisal Ladhak,Filip Ginter, et al. authors_text: Parisa Moridian,Navid Ghassemi,Mahboobeh Jafari,Salam Salloum-Asfar,Delaram Sadeghi,Marjane Khodatars,Afshin Shoeibi,Abbas Khosravi,Sai Ho Ling,Abdulhamit Subasi,Roohallah Alizadehsani,Juan M. Gorriz,Sara A Abdulla,U. Rajendra Acharya
title: Automatic autism spectrum disorder detection using artificial intelligence methods with MRI neuroimaging: A review
title_zh: 使用人工智能方法和 MRI 神经影像进行自动自闭症谱系障碍检测：综述
comment: ef:Moridian, et. al., Automatic autism spectrum disorder detection using artificial intelligence methods with MRI neuroimaging: A review, Frontiers in Molecular Neuroscience, Volume 15, 2022
comments: ef:Moridian, et. al., Automatic autism spectrum disorder detection using artificial intelligence methods with MRI neuroimaging: A review, Frontiers in Molecular Neuroscience, Volume 15, 2022
abstract: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a brain condition characterized by diverse signs and symptoms that appear in early childhood. ASD is also associated with communication deficits and repetitive behavior in affected individuals. Various ASD detection methods have been developed, including neuroimaging modalities and psychological tests. Among these methods, magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) imaging modalities are of paramount importance to physicians. Clinicians rely on MRI modalities to diagnose ASD accurately. The MRI modalities are non-invasive methods that include functional (fMRI) and structural (sMRI) neuroimaging methods. However, diagnosing ASD with fMRI and sMRI for specialists is often laborious and time-consuming; therefore, several computer-aided design systems (CADS) based on artificial intelligence (AI) have been developed to assist specialist physicians. Conventional machine learning (ML) and deep learning (DL) are the most popular schemes of AI used for diagnosing ASD. This study aims to review the automated detection of ASD using AI. We review several CADS that have been developed using ML techniques for the automated diagnosis of ASD using MRI modalities. There has been very limited work on the use of DL techniques to develop automated diagnostic models for ASD. A summary of the studies developed using DL is provided in the Supplementary Appendix. Then, the challenges encountered during the automated diagnosis of ASD using MRI and AI techniques are described in detail. Additionally, a graphical comparison of studies using ML and DL to diagnose ASD automatically is discussed. We suggest future approaches to detecting ASDs using AI techniques and MRI neuroimaging.

Additionally, a graphical comparison of studies using ML and DL to diagnose ASD automatically is discussed. We suggest future approaches to detecting ASDs using AI techniques and MRI neuroimaging.
abstract_zh: 自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 是一种大脑疾病，其特征是在幼儿期出现多种体征和症状。自闭症谱系障碍还与受影响个体的沟通缺陷和重复行为有关。各种自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）检测方法已经被开发出来，包括神经影像学方法和心理测试。在这些方法中，磁共振成像 (MRI) 成像方式对医生来说至关重要。临床医生依靠 MRI 模式来准确诊断 ASD。 MRI 模式是非侵入性方法，包括功能性 (fMRI) 和结构性 (sMRI) 神经影像方法。然而，专家使用 fMRI 和 sMRI 诊断 ASD 通常既费力又费时。因此，已经开发了几种基于人工智能（AI）的计算机辅助设计系统（CADS）来协助专科医生。传统的机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）是用于诊断 ASD 的最流行的人工智能方案。本研究旨在回顾使用人工智能自动检测 ASD。我们回顾了几种使用 ML 技术开发的 CADS，用于使用 MRI 模式自动诊断 ASD。使用深度学习技术开发 ASD 自动诊断模型的工作非常有限。补充附录中提供了使用深度学习开展的研究的摘要。然后，详细描述了利用 MRI 和 AI 技术自动诊断 ASD 过程中遇到的挑战。此外，还讨论了使用 ML 和 DL 自动诊断 ASD 的研究的图形比较。我们建议未来使用人工智能技术和 MRI 神经影像来检测 ASD 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用人工智能方法结合MRI神经影像技术实现自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）自动检测的研究进展。
AI.motivation: ASD诊断依赖MRI等神经影像技术，但人工分析耗时且主观性强，需借助AI提升效率与准确性。
AI.method: 系统回顾基于传统机器学习（ML）和深度学习（DL）的计算机辅助诊断系统（CADS），对比分析其在ASD自动检测中的应用，并总结技术挑战。
AI.result: 发现ML方法在ASD检测中应用广泛，DL研究较少；现有技术面临数据异质性、模型可解释性等挑战，需进一步优化。
AI.conclusion: 未来需加强DL模型研发、推动多中心数据共享，并探索融合多模态影像的AI诊断框架以提升ASD检测性能。

title: Business Document Information Extraction: Towards Practical Benchmarks
title_zh: 商业文档信息提取：迈向实用基准
abstract: Information extraction from semi-structured documents is crucial for frictionless business-to-business (B2B) communication. While machine learning problems related to Document Information Extraction (IE) have been studied for decades, many common problem definitions and benchmarks do not reflect domain-specific aspects and practical needs for automating B2B document communication. We review the landscape of Document IE problems, datasets and benchmarks. We highlight the practical aspects missing in the common definitions and define the Key Information Localization and Extraction (KILE) and Line Item Recognition (LIR) problems. There is a lack of relevant datasets and benchmarks for Document IE on semi-structured business documents as their content is typically legally protected or sensitive. We discuss potential sources of available documents including synthetic data.
summary: Information extraction from semi-structured documents is crucial for frictionless business-to-business (B2B) communication. While machine learning problems related to Document Information Extraction (IE) have been studied for decades, many common problem definitions and benchmarks do not reflect domain-specific aspects and practical needs for automating B2B document communication. We review the landscape of Document IE problems, datasets and benchmarks. We highlight the practical aspects missing in the common definitions and define the Key Information Localization and Extraction (KILE) and Line Item Recognition (LIR) problems. There is a lack of relevant datasets and benchmarks for Document IE on semi-structured business documents as their content is typically legally protected or sensitive. We discuss potential sources of available documents including synthetic data.
abstract_zh: 从半结构化文档中提取信息对于无摩擦的企业对企业 (B2B) 通信至关重要。虽然与文档信息提取 (IE) 相关的机器学习问题已经研究了数十年，但许多常见问题定义和基准并没有反映特定领域的方面和自动化 B2B 文档通信的实际需求。我们回顾了文档 IE 问题、数据集和基准的概况。我们强调了通用定义中缺少的实际方面，并定义了关键信息本地化和提取（KILE）和行项目识别（LIR）问题。由于半结构化业务文档的内容通常受到法律保护或敏感，因此缺乏相关的 Document IE 数据集和基准。我们讨论可用文档的潜在来源，包括合成数据。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为半结构化商业文档的信息提取建立更实用的基准，提出关键信息定位与提取（KILE）和明细项识别（LIR）问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文档信息提取的基准和问题定义未能反映B2B场景下的实际需求，且缺乏敏感商业文档的公开数据集。
AI.method: 回顾文档信息提取研究现状，定义KILE和LIR问题，分析数据集获取的挑战并探讨合成数据等潜在解决方案。
AI.result: 揭示当前基准的不足，明确实际应用中亟需解决的KILE和LIR问题，指出数据获取的困难及可能方向。
AI.conclusion: 需构建更贴近实际业务场景的基准体系，推动半结构化商业文档信息提取技术的实用化发展。

search_text: Business Document Information Extraction: Towards Practical Benchmarks 商业文档信息提取：迈向实用基准 Information extraction from semi-structured documents is crucial for frictionless business-to-business (B2B) communication. While machine learning problems related to Document Information Extraction (IE) have been studied for decades, many common problem definitions and benchmarks do not reflect domain-specific aspects and practical needs for automating B2B document communication. We review the landscape of Document IE problems, datasets and benchmarks. We highlight the practical aspects missing in the common definitions and define the Key Information Localization and Extraction (KILE) and Line Item Recognition (LIR) problems. There is a lack of relevant datasets and benchmarks for Document IE on semi-structured business documents as their content is typically legally protected or sensitive. We discuss potential sources of available documents including synthetic data. 从半结构化文档中提取信息对于无摩擦的企业对企业 (B2B) 通信至关重要。虽然与文档信息提取 (IE) 相关的机器学习问题已经研究了数十年，但许多常见问题定义和基准并没有反映特定领域的方面和自动化 B2B 文档通信的实际需求。我们回顾了文档 IE 问题、数据集和基准的概况。我们强调了通用定义中缺少的实际方面，并定义了关键信息本地化和提取（KILE）和行项目识别（LIR）问题。由于半结构化业务文档的内容通常受到法律保护或敏感，因此缺乏相关的 Document IE 数据集和基准。我们讨论可用文档的潜在来源，包括合成数据。 本文旨在为半结构化商业文档的信息提取建立更实用的基准，提出关键信息定位与提取（KILE）和明细项识别（LIR）问题。 Matyáš Skalický,Štěpán Šimsa,Michal Uřičář,Milan Šulc cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Joseph Stember,Danielle Stember,Luca Pasquini,Jenabi Merhnaz,Andrei Holodny,Hrithwik Shalu
title: Deep reinforcement learning for fMRI prediction of Autism Spectrum Disorder
title_zh: 用于自闭症谱系障碍功能磁共振成像预测的深度强化学习
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.09812
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.09812
abstract: Purpose : Because functional MRI (fMRI) data sets are in general small, we sought a data efficient approach to resting state fMRI classification of autism spectrum disorder (ASD) versus neurotypical (NT) controls. We hypothesized that a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) classifier could learn effectively on a small fMRI training set. Methods : We trained a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) classifier on 100 graph-label pairs from the Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange (ABIDE) database. For comparison, we trained a Supervised Deep Learning (SDL) classifier on the same training set. Results : DRL significantly outperformed SDL, with a p-value of 2.4 x 10^(-7). DRL achieved superior results for a variety of classifier performance metrics, including an F1 score of 76, versus 67 for SDL. Whereas SDL quickly overfit the training data, DRL learned in a progressive manner that generalised to the separate testing set. Conclusion : DRL can learn to classify ASD versus NT in a data efficient manner, doing so for a small training set. Future work will involve optimizing the neural network for data efficiency and applying the approach to other fMRI data sets, namely for brain cancer patients.

Methods : We trained a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) classifier on 100 graph-label pairs from the Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange (ABIDE) database. For comparison, we trained a Supervised Deep Learning (SDL) classifier on the same training set. Results : DRL significantly outperformed SDL, with a p-value of 2.4 x 10^(-7). DRL achieved superior results for a variety of classifier performance metrics, including an F1 score of 76, versus 67 for SDL. Future work will involve optimizing the neural network for data efficiency and applying the approach to other fMRI data sets, namely for brain cancer patients.
abstract_zh: 目的：由于功能 MRI (fMRI) 数据集通常较小，因此我们寻求一种数据有效的方法来对自闭症谱系障碍 (ASD) 与神经典型 (NT) 对照进行静息态 fMRI 分类。我们假设深度强化学习 (DRL) 分类器可以在小型功能磁共振成像训练集上有效学习。方法：我们使用来自自闭症脑成像数据交换 (ABIDE) 数据库的 100 个图标签对训练深度强化学习 (DRL) 分类器。为了进行比较，我们在同一训练集上训练了监督深度学习 (SDL) 分类器。结果：DRL 显着优于 SDL，p 值为 2.4 x 10^(-7)。 DRL 在各种分类器性能指标上取得了优异的结果，其中 F1 得分为 76，而 SDL 为 67。 SDL 很快就会过度拟合训练数据，而 DRL 则以渐进的方式学习，并推广到单独的测试集。结论：DRL 可以学习以数据有效的方式对 ASD 与 NT 进行分类，并针对小型训练集进行分类。未来的工作将包括优化神经网络以提高数据效率，并将该方法应用于其他功能磁共振成像数据集，即脑癌患者的数据集。

AI.tldr: 使用深度强化学习（DRL）对自闭症谱系障碍（ASD）与正常对照组进行静息态fMRI分类
AI.motivation: 由于fMRI数据集通常较小，需要一种数据高效的方法进行分类，传统监督学习可能因过拟合而效果不佳
AI.method: 在ABIDE数据库的100个图-标签对上训练DRL和监督深度学习（SDL）分类器进行比较
AI.result: DRL在F1分数（76 vs 67）等指标上显著优于SDL，且未出现过拟合，泛化能力更强
AI.conclusion: DRL能以数据高效方式分类ASD与正常对照，未来将优化模型并扩展到其他fMRI数据集如脑癌患者

title: VRChain: A Blockchain-Enabled Framework for Visual Homing and Navigation Robots
title_zh: VRChain：用于视觉导航和导航机器人的区块链框架
abstract: Visual homing is a lightweight approach to robot visual navigation. Based upon stored visual information of a home location, the navigation back to this location can be accomplished from any other location in which this location is visible by comparing home to the current image. However, a key challenge of visual homing is that the target home location must be within the robot's field of view (FOV) to start homing. Therefore, this work addresses such a challenge by integrating blockchain technology into the visual homing navigation system. Based on the decentralized feature of blockchain, the proposed solution enables visual homing robots to share their visual homing information and synchronously access the stored data (visual homing information) in the decentralized ledger to establish the navigation path. The navigation path represents a per-robot sequence of views stored in the ledger. If the home location is not in the FOV, the proposed solution permits a robot to find another robot that can see the home location and travel towards that desired location. The evaluation results demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed framework in terms of end-to-end latency, throughput, and scalability.
summary: Visual homing is a lightweight approach to robot visual navigation. Based upon stored visual information of a home location, the navigation back to this location can be accomplished from any other location in which this location is visible by comparing home to the current image. However, a key challenge of visual homing is that the target home location must be within the robot's field of view (FOV) to start homing. Therefore, this work addresses such a challenge by integrating blockchain technology into the visual homing navigation system. Based on the decentralized feature of blockchain, the proposed solution enables visual homing robots to share their visual homing information and synchronously access the stored data (visual homing information) in the decentralized ledger to establish the navigation path. The navigation path represents a per-robot sequence of views stored in the ledger. If the home location is not in the FOV, the proposed solution permits a robot to find another robot that can see the home location and travel towards that desired location. The evaluation results demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed framework in terms of end-to-end latency, throughput, and scalability.
abstract_zh: 视觉归航是一种轻量级的机器人视觉导航方法。基于所存储的家乡位置的视觉信息，可以通过将家乡与当前图像进行比较，从该位置可见的任何其他位置完成导航回到该位置。然而，视觉归航的一个关键挑战是目标归航位置必须位于机器人的视野 (FOV) 内才能开始归航。因此，这项工作通过将区块链技术集成到视觉导航系统中来解决这一挑战。基于区块链的去中心化特性，所提出的解决方案使视觉归航机器人能够共享其视觉归航信息，并同步访问去中心化账本中存储的数据（视觉归航信息）以建立导航路径。导航路径代表存储在账本中的每个机器人的视图序列。如果家庭位置不在视场内，所提出的解决方案允许机器人找到另一个可以看到家庭位置的机器人并向该所需位置行驶。评估结果证明了所提出的框架在端到端延迟、吞吐量和可扩展性方面的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VRChain框架，通过区块链技术解决视觉归巢机器人视野限制问题，实现去中心化的视觉导航路径建立。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉归巢需目标位置在机器人视野内才能启动导航，存在场景限制，需通过区块链实现跨机器人视觉信息共享与协同导航。
AI.method: 基于区块链的去中心化特性，构建分布式账本存储视觉归巢信息，机器人通过共享视觉数据并同步访问账本建立导航路径，当目标位置超出视野时可协同其他可见目标的机器人完成导航。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在端到端延迟、吞吐量和可扩展性方面表现优异，有效提升了视觉归巢系统的导航效率。
AI.conclusion: 区块链技术为视觉归巢机器人提供了去中心化的协同导航方案，通过跨机器人视觉信息共享解决了视野限制问题，验证了框架在实际场景中的有效性。

The navigation path represents a per-robot sequence of views stored in the ledger. The evaluation results demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed framework in terms of end-to-end latency, throughput, and scalability. 视觉归航是一种轻量级的机器人视觉导航方法。基于所存储的家乡位置的视觉信息，可以通过将家乡与当前图像进行比较，从该位置可见的任何其他位置完成导航回到该位置。然而，视觉归航的一个关键挑战是目标归航位置必须位于机器人的视野 (FOV) 内才能开始归航。因此，这项工作通过将区块链技术集成到视觉导航系统中来解决这一挑战。基于区块链的去中心化特性，所提出的解决方案使视觉归航机器人能够共享其视觉归航信息，并同步访问去中心化账本中存储的数据（视觉归航信息）以建立导航路径。导航路径代表存储在账本中的每个机器人的视图序列。如果家庭位置不在视场内，所提出的解决方案允许机器人找到另一个可以看到家庭位置的机器人并向该所需位置行驶。评估结果证明了所提出的框架在端到端延迟、吞吐量和可扩展性方面的效率。 本文提出VRChain框架，通过区块链技术解决视觉归巢机器人视野限制问题，实现去中心化的视觉导航路径建立。 Mohamed Rahouti,Damian Lyons,Lesther Santana cs.RO

title: Reservoir Computing in robotics: a review
title_zh: 机器人技术中的储层计算：综述
abstract: Reservoir Computing is a relatively new framework created to allow the usage of powerful but complex systems as computational mediums. The basic approach consists in training only a readout layer, exploiting the innate separation and transformation provided by the previous, untrained system. This approach has shown to possess great computational capabilities and is successfully used to achieve many tasks. This review aims to represent the current 'state-of-the-art' of the usage of Reservoir Computing techniques in the robotic field. An introductory description of the framework and its implementations is initially given. Subsequently, a summary of interesting applications, approaches, and solutions is presented and discussed. Considerations, ideas and possible future developments are proposed in the explanation.
summary: Reservoir Computing is a relatively new framework created to allow the usage of powerful but complex systems as computational mediums. The basic approach consists in training only a readout layer, exploiting the innate separation and transformation provided by the previous, untrained system. This approach has shown to possess great computational capabilities and is successfully used to achieve many tasks. This review aims to represent the current 'state-of-the-art' of the usage of Reservoir Computing techniques in the robotic field. An introductory description of the framework and its implementations is initially given. Subsequently, a summary of interesting applications, approaches, and solutions is presented and discussed. Considerations, ideas and possible future developments are proposed in the explanation.
abstract_zh: 储层计算是一个相对较新的框架，旨在允许使用强大但复杂的系统作为计算介质。基本方法包括仅训练读出层，利用先前未经训练的系统提供的固有分离和转换。这种方法已被证明具有强大的计算能力，并成功用于完成许多任务。本次综述旨在代表当前机器人领域中储层计算技术使用的“最先进”水平。首先给出了框架及其实现的介绍性描述。随后，介绍并讨论了有趣的应用、方法和解决方案的摘要。解释中提出了考虑因素、想法和未来可能的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Reservoir Computing在机器人领域的最新研究进展与应用现状。
AI.motivation: Reservoir Computing因其高效计算能力在机器人领域应用广泛，但缺乏系统性总结与分析。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，介绍框架原理，总结典型应用案例，分析技术特点并提出未来研究方向。
AI.result: 梳理了Reservoir Computing在机器人控制、感知、学习等任务中的关键应用，指出现有技术挑战与改进方向。
AI.conclusion: Reservoir Computing为机器人智能化提供了新思路，但需在动态环境适应性、计算效率等方面进一步突破。

title: Certifiable 3D Object Pose Estimation: Foundations, Learning Models, and Self-Training
title_zh: 可认证的 3D 物体姿态估计：基础、学习模型和自我训练
abstract: We consider a certifiable object pose estimation problem, where -- given a partial point cloud of an object -- the goal is to not only estimate the object pose, but also to provide a certificate of correctness for the resulting estimate. Our first contribution is a general theory of certification for end-to-end perception models. In particular, we introduce the notion of $ζ$-correctness, which bounds the distance between an estimate and the ground truth. We show that $ζ$-correctness can be assessed by implementing two certificates: (i) a certificate of observable correctness, that asserts if the model output is consistent with the input data and prior information, (ii) a certificate of non-degeneracy, that asserts whether the input data is sufficient to compute a unique estimate. Our second contribution is to apply this theory and design a new learning-based certifiable pose estimator. We propose C-3PO, a semantic-keypoint-based pose estimation model, augmented with the two certificates, to solve the certifiable pose estimation problem. C-3PO also includes a keypoint corrector, implemented as a differentiable optimization layer, that can correct large detection errors (e.g. due to the sim-to-real gap). Our third contribution is a novel self-supervised training approach that uses our certificate of observable correctness to provide the supervisory signal to C-3PO during training. In it, the model trains only on the observably correct input-output pairs, in each training iteration. As training progresses, we see that the observably correct input-output pairs grow, eventually reaching near 100% in many cases. Our experiments show that (i) standard semantic-keypoint-based methods outperform more recent alternatives, (ii) C-3PO further improves performance and significantly outperforms all the baselines, and (iii) C-3PO's certificates are able to discern correct pose estimates.
