Our first contribution is a general theory of certification for end-to-end perception models. In particular, we introduce the notion of $ζ$-correctness, which bounds the distance between an estimate and the ground truth. We show that $ζ$-correctness can be assessed by implementing two certificates: (i) a certificate of observable correctness, that asserts if the model output is consistent with the input data and prior information, (ii) a certificate of non-degeneracy, that asserts whether the input data is sufficient to compute a unique estimate. Our second contribution is to apply this theory and design a new learning-based certifiable pose estimator. We propose C-3PO, a semantic-keypoint-based pose estimation model, augmented with the two certificates, to solve the certifiable pose estimation problem. C-3PO also includes a keypoint corrector, implemented as a differentiable optimization layer, that can correct large detection errors (e.g. due to the sim-to-real gap). Our third contribution is a novel self-supervised training approach that uses our certificate of observable correctness to provide the supervisory signal to C-3PO during training. In it, the model trains only on the observably correct input-output pairs, in each training iteration. As training progresses, we see that the observably correct input-output pairs grow, eventually reaching near 100% in many cases. Our experiments show that (i) standard semantic-keypoint-based methods outperform more recent alternatives, (ii) C-3PO further improves performance and significantly outperforms all the baselines, and (iii) C-3PO's certificates are able to discern correct pose estimates.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑一个可验证的物体姿态估计问题，其中 - 给定物体的部分点云 - 目标不仅是估计物体姿态，而且还为结果估计提供正确性证书。我们的第一个贡献是端到端感知模型认证的一般理论。特别是，我们引入了$ z$-正确性的概念，它限制了估计与真实情况之间的距离。我们表明，可以通过实现两个证书来评估$ z $-正确性：（i）可观察正确性证书，断言模型输出是否与输入数据和先验信息一致，（ii）非简并性证书，断言输入数据是否足以计算唯一估计。我们的第二个贡献是应用该理论并设计一个新的基于学习的可认证姿势估计器。我们提出了 C-3PO，一种基于语义关键点的姿态估计模型，通过两个证书进行增强，以解决可认证的姿态估计问题。 C-3PO 还包括一个关键点校正器，作为可微优化层实现，可以校正较大的检测错误（例如，由于模拟与真实的差距）。我们的第三个贡献是一种新颖的自我监督训练方法，该方法使用我们的可观察正确性证书在训练期间向 C-3PO 提供监督信号。其中，模型在每次训练迭代中仅在可观察到的正确输入输出对上进行训练。随着训练的进行，我们看到明显正确的输入输出对不断增长，在许多情况下最终达到接近 100%。我们的实验表明，(i) 标准的基于语义关键点的方法优于最新的替代方法，(ii) C-3PO 进一步提高了性能并显着优于所有基线，(iii) C-3PO 的证书能够辨别正确的姿态估计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在给定物体部分点云的情况下，实现3D物体位姿估计并提供正确性证明，提出基于语义关键点的可验证位姿估计模型C-3PO。
AI.motivation: 传统位姿估计方法缺乏对估计结果正确性的可验证性，难以应对复杂场景下的不确定性，需通过理论保证和证书机制提升可靠性。
AI.method: 提出ζ-正确性理论，包含可观测正确性证书和非退化性证书；设计C-3PO模型，集成语义关键点估计、可微优化层修正模块及自监督训练框架。
AI.result: 实验表明语义关键点方法优于最新模型，C-3PO显著超越基线，且其证书能有效区分正确位姿估计。
AI.conclusion: 本文为端到端感知模型建立认证理论，提出可验证位姿估计框架，通过自监督训练提升模型鲁棒性，验证了方法在复杂场景下的有效性。

title: VisFIS: Visual Feature Importance Supervision with Right-for-the-Right-Reason Objectives
title_zh: VisFIS：具有正当理由目标的视觉特征重要性监督
abstract: Many past works aim to improve visual reasoning in models by supervising feature importance (estimated by model explanation techniques) with human annotations such as highlights of important image regions. However, recent work has shown that performance gains from feature importance (FI) supervision for Visual Question Answering (VQA) tasks persist even with random supervision, suggesting that these methods do not meaningfully align model FI with human FI. In this paper, we show that model FI supervision can meaningfully improve VQA model accuracy as well as performance on several Right-for-the-Right-Reason (RRR) metrics by optimizing for four key model objectives: (1) accurate predictions given limited but sufficient information (Sufficiency); (2) max-entropy predictions given no important information (Uncertainty); (3) invariance of predictions to changes in unimportant features (Invariance); and (4) alignment between model FI explanations and human FI explanations (Plausibility). Our best performing method, Visual Feature Importance Supervision (VisFIS), outperforms strong baselines on benchmark VQA datasets in terms of both in-distribution and out-of-distribution accuracy. While past work suggests that the mechanism for improved accuracy is through improved explanation plausibility, we show that this relationship depends crucially on explanation faithfulness (whether explanations truly represent the model's internal reasoning). Predictions are more accurate when explanations are plausible and faithful, and not when they are plausible but not faithful. Lastly, we show that, surprisingly, RRR metrics are not predictive of out-of-distribution model accuracy when controlling for a model's in-distribution accuracy, which calls into question the value of these metrics for evaluating model reasoning. All supporting code is available at https://github.com/zfying/visfis
summary: Many past works aim to improve visual reasoning in models by supervising feature importance (estimated by model explanation techniques) with human annotations such as highlights of important image regions. However, recent work has shown that performance gains from feature importance (FI) supervision for Visual Question Answering (VQA) tasks persist even with random supervision, suggesting that these methods do not meaningfully align model FI with human FI. In this paper, we show that model FI supervision can meaningfully improve VQA model accuracy as well as performance on several Right-for-the-Right-Reason (RRR) metrics by optimizing for four key model objectives: (1) accurate predictions given limited but sufficient information (Sufficiency); (2) max-entropy predictions given no important information (Uncertainty); (3) invariance of predictions to changes in unimportant features (Invariance); and (4) alignment between model FI explanations and human FI explanations (Plausibility). Our best performing method, Visual Feature Importance Supervision (VisFIS), outperforms strong baselines on benchmark VQA datasets in terms of both in-distribution and out-of-distribution accuracy. While past work suggests that the mechanism for improved accuracy is through improved explanation plausibility, we show that this relationship depends crucially on explanation faithfulness (whether explanations truly represent the model's internal reasoning). Predictions are more accurate when explanations are plausible and faithful, and not when they are plausible but not faithful. Lastly, we show that, surprisingly, RRR metrics are not predictive of out-of-distribution model accuracy when controlling for a model's in-distribution accuracy, which calls into question the value of these metrics for evaluating model reasoning. All supporting code is available at https://github.com/zfying/visfis
abstract_zh: 过去的许多工作旨在通过使用人工注释（例如重要图像区域的突出显示）来监督特征重要性（通过模型解释技术估计）来改进模型中的视觉推理。然而，最近的研究表明，即使在随机监督的情况下，视觉问答 (VQA) 任务的特征重要性 (FI) 监督的性能提升仍然存在，这表明这些方法并不能有意义地将模型 FI 与人类 FI 对齐。在本文中，我们表明模型 FI 监督可以通过优化四个关键模型目标来有意义地提高 VQA 模型的准确性以及几个理所当然 (RRR) 指标的性能：(1) 给定有限但足够的信息（充分性）的准确预测； （2）在没有重要信息的情况下进行最大熵预测（不确定性）； （3）对不重要特征变化的预测的不变性（Invariance）； (4) 模型 FI 解释与人类 FI 解释之间的一致性（合理性）。我们性能最佳的方法视觉特征重要性监督 (VisFIS) 在分布内和分布外准确度方面均优于基准 VQA 数据集上的强大基线。虽然过去的工作表明提高准确性的机制是通过提高解释的合理性来实现的，但我们表明这种关系在很大程度上取决于解释的可信度（解释是否真正代表了模型的内部推理）。当解释可信且可信时，预测会更加准确，而当解释可信但不可信时，预测就会更加准确。最后，令人惊讶的是，我们发现，在控制模型的分布内准确性时，RRR 指标并不能预测分布外模型的准确性，这使人们对这些指标用于评估模型推理的价值产生了疑问。所有支持代码均可在 https://github.com/zfying/visfis 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出VisFIS方法，通过优化四个关键目标（充分性、不确定性、不变性、合理性）来提升视觉问答模型的准确性和推理能力。
AI.motivation: 先前基于特征重要性（FI）监督的方法在视觉问答任务中效果有限，即使使用随机监督也能获得性能提升，表明模型FI与人类FI的对齐不足。
AI.method: VisFIS通过四类目标优化模型：1）有限信息下的准确预测；2）无重要信息时的高熵预测；3）对非重要特征的不变性；4）模型FI与人类FI的对齐。结合监督学习和解释性约束。
AI.result: VisFIS在基准VQA数据集上超越强基线，且预测准确性依赖于解释的可信度（而非仅合理性）。RRR指标在控制分布内准确率后无法预测分布外性能。
AI.conclusion: 模型准确性提升需同时保证解释的合理性和可信度，RRR指标在评估推理时可能不够可靠。

title: Constant-Factor Approximation Algorithms for Socially Fair $k$-Clustering
title_zh: 用于社会公平 $k$ 聚类的常数因子近似算法
abstract: We study approximation algorithms for the socially fair $(\ell_p, k)$-clustering problem with $m$ groups, whose special cases include the socially fair $k$-median ($p=1$) and socially fair $k$-means ($p=2$) problems. We present (1) a polynomial-time $(5+2\sqrt{6})^p$-approximation with at most $k+m$ centers (2) a $(5+2\sqrt{6}+ε)^p$-approximation with $k$ centers in time $n^{2^{O(p)}\cdot m^2}$, and (3) a $(15+6\sqrt{6})^p$ approximation with $k$ centers in time $k^{m}\cdot\text{poly}(n)$. The first result is obtained via a refinement of the iterative rounding method using a sequence of linear programs. The latter two results are obtained by converting a solution with up to $k+m$ centers to one with $k$ centers using sparsification methods for (2) and via an exhaustive search for (3). We also compare the performance of our algorithms with existing bicriteria algorithms as well as exactly $k$ center approximation algorithms on benchmark datasets, and find that our algorithms also outperform existing methods in practice.
summary: We study approximation algorithms for the socially fair $(\ell_p, k)$-clustering problem with $m$ groups, whose special cases include the socially fair $k$-median ($p=1$) and socially fair $k$-means ($p=2$) problems. We present (1) a polynomial-time $(5+2\sqrt{6})^p$-approximation with at most $k+m$ centers (2) a $(5+2\sqrt{6}+ε)^p$-approximation with $k$ centers in time $n^{2^{O(p)}\cdot m^2}$, and (3) a $(15+6\sqrt{6})^p$ approximation with $k$ centers in time $k^{m}\cdot\text{poly}(n)$. The first result is obtained via a refinement of the iterative rounding method using a sequence of linear programs. The latter two results are obtained by converting a solution with up to $k+m$ centers to one with $k$ centers using sparsification methods for (2) and via an exhaustive search for (3). We also compare the performance of our algorithms with existing bicriteria algorithms as well as exactly $k$ center approximation algorithms on benchmark datasets, and find that our algorithms also outperform existing methods in practice.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 $m$ 组的社会公平 $(\ell_p, k)$ 聚类问题的近似算法，其特殊情况包括社会公平 $k$-中值 ($p=1$) 和社会公平 $k$-均值 ($p=2$) 问题。我们提出（1）一个最多有 $k+m$ 个中心的多项式时间 $(5+2\sqrt{6})^p$ 近似（2）一个 $(5+2\sqrt{6}+ε)^p$ 近似，其中 $k$ 个中心在时间 $n^{2^{O(p)}\cdot m^2}$ 上，以及（3）一个$(15+6\sqrt{6})^p$ 近似，$k$ 以时间 $k^{m}\cdot\text{poly}(n)$ 为中心。第一个结果是通过使用一系列线性程序对迭代舍入方法进行细化而获得的。后两个结果是通过使用 (2) 的稀疏方法并通过对 (3) 的穷举搜索将具有最多 $k+m$ 个中心的解转换为具有 $k$ 个中心的解来获得的。我们还将我们的算法与现有的双标准算法以及基准数据集上的 $k$ 中心近似算法的性能进行了比较，发现我们的算法在实践中也优于现有的方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有公平性的社会公平k聚类问题的近似算法，提出了多种不同中心数量和近似比的算法方案。
AI.motivation: 传统聚类算法可能忽视群体间的公平性，本文旨在设计兼顾公平性与近似比的高效算法，确保多群体需求在聚类中得到合理满足。
AI.method: 通过改进迭代取整法结合线性规划序列解决第一种方案；后两种方案分别利用稀疏化方法和穷举搜索将中心数量从k+m缩减至k。
AI.result: 提出三种算法：(1) 近似比(5+2√6)^p且最多使用k+m个中心；(2) 近似比(5+2√6+ε)^p且k个中心，时间复杂度n^{2^{O(p)}·m²}；(3) 近似比(15+6√6)^p且k个中心，时间复杂度k^m·poly(n)。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明新算法在理论保证和实际效果上均优于现有方法，为社会公平聚类问题提供了更优的解决方案。

title: Facke: a Survey on Generative Models for Face Swapping
title_zh: Fake：关于换脸生成模型的调查
abstract: In this work, we investigate into the performance of mainstream neural generative models on the very task of swapping faces. We have experimented on CVAE, CGAN, CVAE-GAN, and conditioned diffusion models. Existing finely trained models have already managed to produce fake faces (Facke) indistinguishable to the naked eye as well as achieve high objective metrics. We perform a comparison among them and analyze their pros and cons. Furthermore, we proposed some promising tricks though they do not apply to this task.
summary: In this work, we investigate into the performance of mainstream neural generative models on the very task of swapping faces. We have experimented on CVAE, CGAN, CVAE-GAN, and conditioned diffusion models. Existing finely trained models have already managed to produce fake faces (Facke) indistinguishable to the naked eye as well as achieve high objective metrics. We perform a comparison among them and analyze their pros and cons. Furthermore, we proposed some promising tricks though they do not apply to this task.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了主流神经生成模型在交换面孔任务上的性能。我们对 CVAE、CGAN、CVAE-GAN 和条件扩散模型进行了实验。现有的经过精心训练的模型已经成功地生成了肉眼无法区分的假脸（Facke），并实现了高客观指标。我们对它们进行比较并分析它们的优缺点。此外，我们提出了一些有希望的技巧，尽管它们不适用于此任务。

AI.tldr: 本文调查了主流神经生成模型在换脸任务中的性能，实验了CVAE、CGAN、CVAE-GAN和条件扩散模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模型已能生成高质量假脸，但需系统比较不同模型的优缺点以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过实验对比CVAE、CGAN、CVAE-GAN及条件扩散模型在换脸任务中的表现，并分析其优劣。
AI.result: 现有精细训练模型可生成肉眼难以区分的假脸，且达到高客观指标，但提出的新技巧不适用于该任务。
AI.conclusion: 主流生成模型在换脸任务中表现优异，但仍有优化空间，需进一步探索有效方法。

search_text: Facke: a Survey on Generative Models for Face Swapping Fake：关于换脸生成模型的调查 In this work, we investigate into the performance of mainstream neural generative models on the very task of swapping faces. We have experimented on CVAE, CGAN, CVAE-GAN, and conditioned diffusion models. Existing finely trained models have already managed to produce fake faces (Facke) indistinguishable to the naked eye as well as achieve high objective metrics. We perform a comparison among them and analyze their pros and cons. Furthermore, we proposed some promising tricks though they do not apply to this task. 在这项工作中，我们研究了主流神经生成模型在交换面孔任务上的性能。我们对 CVAE、CGAN、CVAE-GAN 和条件扩散模型进行了实验。现有的经过精心训练的模型已经成功地生成了肉眼无法区分的假脸（Facke），并实现了高客观指标。我们对它们进行比较并分析它们的优缺点。此外，我们提出了一些有希望的技巧，尽管它们不适用于此任务。 本文调查了主流神经生成模型在换脸任务中的性能，实验了CVAE、CGAN、CVAE-GAN和条件扩散模型。 Wei Jiang,Wentao Dong cs.CV,cs.AI

title: General Univariate Estimation-of-Distribution Algorithms
title_zh: 通用单变量分布估计算法
comment: Conference version with missing proofs in the appendix
comments: Conference version with missing proofs in the appendix
abstract: We propose a general formulation of a univariate estimation-of-distribution algorithm (EDA). It naturally incorporates the three classic univariate EDAs \emph{compact genetic algorithm}, \emph{univariate marginal distribution algorithm} and \emph{population-based incremental learning} as well as the \emph{max-min ant system} with iteration-best update. Our unified description of the existing algorithms allows a unified analysis of these; we demonstrate this by providing an analysis of genetic drift that immediately gives the existing results proven separately for the four algorithms named above. Our general model also includes EDAs that are more efficient than the existing ones and these may not be difficult to find as we demonstrate for the OneMax and LeadingOnes benchmarks.
summary: We propose a general formulation of a univariate estimation-of-distribution algorithm (EDA). It naturally incorporates the three classic univariate EDAs \emph{compact genetic algorithm}, \emph{univariate marginal distribution algorithm} and \emph{population-based incremental learning} as well as the \emph{max-min ant system} with iteration-best update. Our unified description of the existing algorithms allows a unified analysis of these; we demonstrate this by providing an analysis of genetic drift that immediately gives the existing results proven separately for the four algorithms named above. Our general model also includes EDAs that are more efficient than the existing ones and these may not be difficult to find as we demonstrate for the OneMax and LeadingOnes benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了单变量分布估计算法（EDA）的通用公式。它自然地融合了三种经典的单变量 EDA \emph{紧凑遗传算法}、\emph{单变量边缘分布算法}和 \emph{基于群体的增量学习}以及具有迭代最佳更新的 \emph{max-min 蚂蚁系统}。我们对现有算法的统一描述允许对这些算法进行统一分析；我们通过提供遗传漂变分析来证明这一点，该分析立即给出了上述四种算法分别证明的现有结果。我们的通用模型还包括比现有模型更高效的 EDA，正如我们在 OneMax 和leadingOnes 基准测试中演示的那样，这些 EDA 可能并不难找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用的单变量估计分布算法框架，整合多种经典EDA算法并分析其效率。
AI.motivation: 现有EDA算法缺乏统一描述，导致分析重复且难以比较效率，需建立通用模型以简化分析并发现更优算法。
AI.method: 构建统一的单变量EDA框架，纳入四种经典算法，通过遗传漂移分析验证有效性，并设计更高效的EDA变体。
AI.result: 统一分析遗传漂移现象，复现现有算法结果，并在OneMax和LeadingOnes基准中展示更高效算法的可能性。
AI.conclusion: 通用框架有助于理解EDA本质，未来可基于此模型进一步优化算法设计与理论分析。

authors_text: Zeyu Wang,Huiying Zhao,Peng Ren,Yuxi Zhou,Ming Sheng
title: Learning Optimal Treatment Strategies for Sepsis Using Offline Reinforcement Learning in Continuous Space
title_zh: 在连续空间中使用离线强化学习学习脓毒症的最佳治疗策略
abstract: Sepsis is a leading cause of death in the ICU. It is a disease requiring complex interventions in a short period of time, but its optimal treatment strategy remains uncertain. Evidence suggests that the practices of currently used treatment strategies are problematic and may cause harm to patients. To address this decision problem, we propose a new medical decision model based on historical data to help clinicians recommend the best reference option for real-time treatment. Our model combines offline reinforcement learning and deep reinforcement learning to solve the problem of traditional reinforcement learning in the medical field due to the inability to interact with the environment, while enabling our model to make decisions in a continuous state-action space. We demonstrate that, on average, the treatments recommended by the model are more valuable and reliable than those recommended by clinicians. In a large validation dataset, we find out that the patients whose actual doses from clinicians matched the decisions made by AI has the lowest mortality rates. Our model provides personalized and clinically interpretable treatment decisions for sepsis to improve patient care.
summary: Sepsis is a leading cause of death in the ICU. It is a disease requiring complex interventions in a short period of time, but its optimal treatment strategy remains uncertain. Evidence suggests that the practices of currently used treatment strategies are problematic and may cause harm to patients. To address this decision problem, we propose a new medical decision model based on historical data to help clinicians recommend the best reference option for real-time treatment. Our model combines offline reinforcement learning and deep reinforcement learning to solve the problem of traditional reinforcement learning in the medical field due to the inability to interact with the environment, while enabling our model to make decisions in a continuous state-action space. We demonstrate that, on average, the treatments recommended by the model are more valuable and reliable than those recommended by clinicians. In a large validation dataset, we find out that the patients whose actual doses from clinicians matched the decisions made by AI has the lowest mortality rates. Our model provides personalized and clinically interpretable treatment decisions for sepsis to improve patient care.
abstract_zh: 脓毒症是 ICU 死亡的主要原因。这是一种需要在短时间内进行复杂干预的疾病，但其最佳治疗策略仍不确定。有证据表明，目前使用的治疗策略的做法存在问题，可能会对患者造成伤害。为了解决这个决策问题，我们提出了一种基于历史数据的新医疗决策模型，以帮助临床医生推荐实时治疗的最佳参考选项。我们的模型结合了离线强化学习和深度强化学习，解决了医学领域传统强化学习由于无法与环境交互而出现的问题，同时使我们的模型能够在连续的状态-动作空间中做出决策。我们证明，平均而言，模型推荐的治疗方法比临床医生推荐的治疗方法更有价值、更可靠。在大型验证数据集中，我们发现临床医生的实际剂量与人工智能做出的决定相匹配的患者死亡率最低。我们的模型为脓毒症提供个性化和临床可解释的治疗决策，以改善患者护理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于离线强化学习和深度强化学习的模型，用于学习脓毒症的最优治疗策略，以改善临床决策。
AI.motivation: 现有脓毒症治疗策略存在缺陷且可能对患者造成伤害，需利用历史数据构建模型以提供更优实时治疗方案。
AI.method: 结合离线强化学习与深度强化学习技术，在连续状态-动作空间中训练模型，无需实时环境交互。
AI.result: 模型推荐的治疗方案在验证数据集中表现优于临床医生，实际治疗剂量与AI决策匹配的患者死亡率最低。
AI.conclusion: 该模型可提供个性化且临床可解释的脓毒症治疗决策，有助于提升患者护理质量。

title: Automated Compliance Blueprint Optimization with Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 利用人工智能自动合规蓝图优化
abstract: For highly regulated industries such as banking and healthcare, one of the major hindrances to the adoption of cloud computing is compliance with regulatory standards. This is a complex problem due to many regulatory and technical specification (techspec) documents that the companies need to comply with. The critical problem is to establish the mapping between techspecs and regulation controls so that from day one, companies can comply with regulations with minimal effort. We demonstrate the practicality of an approach to automatically analyze regulatory standards using Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques. We present early results to identify the mapping between techspecs and regulation controls, and discuss challenges that must be overcome for this solution to be fully practical.
summary: For highly regulated industries such as banking and healthcare, one of the major hindrances to the adoption of cloud computing is compliance with regulatory standards. This is a complex problem due to many regulatory and technical specification (techspec) documents that the companies need to comply with. The critical problem is to establish the mapping between techspecs and regulation controls so that from day one, companies can comply with regulations with minimal effort. We demonstrate the practicality of an approach to automatically analyze regulatory standards using Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques. We present early results to identify the mapping between techspecs and regulation controls, and discuss challenges that must be overcome for this solution to be fully practical.
abstract_zh: 对于银行和医疗保健等受到严格监管的行业来说，采用云计算的主要障碍之一是遵守监管标准。这是一个复杂的问题，因为公司需要遵守许多监管和技术规范 (techspec) 文件。关键问题是建立技术规范和监管控制之间的映射，以便从第一天起，公司就可以轻松遵守法规。我们展示了使用人工智能 (AI) 技术自动分析监管标准的方法的实用性。我们提出了早期结果，以确定技术规范和监管控制之间的映射，并讨论了该解决方案必须克服的挑战才能完全实用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用人工智能技术自动建立技术规范与法规控制之间的映射关系，以优化高度监管行业的云合规流程。
AI.motivation: 银行、医疗等高度监管行业因需处理大量法规和技术文档，手动建立合规映射效率低下且复杂，亟需自动化解决方案降低合规难度。
AI.method: 采用人工智能技术自动分析法规标准，通过自然语言处理和机器学习方法识别技术规范与法规控制间的对应关系。
AI.result: 验证了AI方法在自动分析法规标准中的可行性，初步实现了技术规范与法规控制的映射识别，并指出了当前方案需克服的挑战。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的合规映射方法具有实践价值，但需进一步解决技术复杂性和数据质量等挑战以实现全面应用。

search_text: Automated Compliance Blueprint Optimization with Artificial Intelligence 利用人工智能自动合规蓝图优化 For highly regulated industries such as banking and healthcare, one of the major hindrances to the adoption of cloud computing is compliance with regulatory standards. This is a complex problem due to many regulatory and technical specification (techspec) documents that the companies need to comply with. The critical problem is to establish the mapping between techspecs and regulation controls so that from day one, companies can comply with regulations with minimal effort. We demonstrate the practicality of an approach to automatically analyze regulatory standards using Artificial Intelligence (AI) techniques. We present early results to identify the mapping between techspecs and regulation controls, and discuss challenges that must be overcome for this solution to be fully practical. 对于银行和医疗保健等受到严格监管的行业来说，采用云计算的主要障碍之一是遵守监管标准。这是一个复杂的问题，因为公司需要遵守许多监管和技术规范 (techspec) 文件。关键问题是建立技术规范和监管控制之间的映射，以便从第一天起，公司就可以轻松遵守法规。我们展示了使用人工智能 (AI) 技术自动分析监管标准的方法的实用性。我们提出了早期结果，以确定技术规范和监管控制之间的映射，并讨论了该解决方案必须克服的挑战才能完全实用。 本文提出利用人工智能技术自动建立技术规范与法规控制之间的映射关系，以优化高度监管行业的云合规流程。 Abdulhamid Adebayo,Daby Sow,Muhammed Fatih Bulut cs.AI,cs.CR

title: Towards Unsupervised Content Disentanglement in Sentence Representations via Syntactic Roles
title_zh: 通过句法角色实现句子表示中的无监督内容解开
comment: This is an extended version of the paper with the same name that was accepted to CTRLGEN Workshop@Neurips2021
comments: This is an extended version of the paper with the same name that was accepted to CTRLGEN Workshop@Neurips2021
abstract: Linking neural representations to linguistic factors is crucial in order to build and analyze NLP models interpretable by humans. Among these factors, syntactic roles (e.g. subjects, direct objects,$\dots$) and their realizations are essential markers since they can be understood as a decomposition of predicative structures and thus the meaning of sentences. Starting from a deep probabilistic generative model with attention, we measure the interaction between latent variables and realizations of syntactic roles and show that it is possible to obtain, without supervision, representations of sentences where different syntactic roles correspond to clearly identified different latent variables. The probabilistic model we propose is an Attention-Driven Variational Autoencoder (ADVAE). Drawing inspiration from Transformer-based machine translation models, ADVAEs enable the analysis of the interactions between latent variables and input tokens through attention. We also develop an evaluation protocol to measure disentanglement with regard to the realizations of syntactic roles. This protocol is based on attention maxima for the encoder and on latent variable perturbations for the decoder. Our experiments on raw English text from the SNLI dataset show that $\textit{i)}$ disentanglement of syntactic roles can be induced without supervision, $\textit{ii)}$ ADVAE separates syntactic roles better than classical sequence VAEs and Transformer VAEs, $\textit{iii)}$ realizations of syntactic roles can be separately modified in sentences by mere intervention on the associated latent variables. Our work constitutes a first step towards unsupervised controllable content generation. The code for our work is publicly available.
summary: Linking neural representations to linguistic factors is crucial in order to build and analyze NLP models interpretable by humans. Among these factors, syntactic roles (e.g. subjects, direct objects,$\dots$) and their realizations are essential markers since they can be understood as a decomposition of predicative structures and thus the meaning of sentences. Starting from a deep probabilistic generative model with attention, we measure the interaction between latent variables and realizations of syntactic roles and show that it is possible to obtain, without supervision, representations of sentences where different syntactic roles correspond to clearly identified different latent variables. The probabilistic model we propose is an Attention-Driven Variational Autoencoder (ADVAE). Drawing inspiration from Transformer-based machine translation models, ADVAEs enable the analysis of the interactions between latent variables and input tokens through attention. We also develop an evaluation protocol to measure disentanglement with regard to the realizations of syntactic roles. This protocol is based on attention maxima for the encoder and on latent variable perturbations for the decoder. Our experiments on raw English text from the SNLI dataset show that $\textit{i)}$ disentanglement of syntactic roles can be induced without supervision, $\textit{ii)}$ ADVAE separates syntactic roles better than classical sequence VAEs and Transformer VAEs, $\textit{iii)}$ realizations of syntactic roles can be separately modified in sentences by mere intervention on the associated latent variables. Our work constitutes a first step towards unsupervised controllable content generation. The code for our work is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 为了构建和分析人类可解释的 NLP 模型，将神经表征与语言因素联系起来至关重要。在这些因素中，句法角色（例如主语、直接宾语、$\dots$）及其实现是重要的标记，因为它们可以被理解为谓语结构的分解，从而理解句子的含义。从具有注意力的深度概率生成模型开始，我们测量了潜在变量与句法角色实现之间的相互作用，并表明可以在没有监督的情况下获得句子的表示，其中不同的句法角色对应于明确识别的不同潜在变量。我们提出的概率模型是注意力驱动变分自动编码器（ADVAE）。受基于 Transformer 的机器翻译模型的启发，ADVAE 能够通过注意力分析潜在变量和输入标记之间的相互作用。我们还开发了一个评估协议来衡量句法角色实现的解缠度。该协议基于编码器的最大注意力和解码器的潜在变量扰动。我们对 SNLI 数据集的原始英语文本进行的实验表明，$\textit{i)}$ 句法角色的解开可以在没有监督的情况下诱导，$\textit{ii)}$ ADVAE 比经典序列 VAE 和 Transformer VAE 更好地分离句法角色，$\textit{iii)}$ 句法角色的实现可以通过仅仅干预相关的潜在变量来单独修改句子中。我们的工作是实现无监督可控内容生成的第一步。我们工作的代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过句法角色实现无监督的句子表示内容解耦，提出了一种基于注意力机制的变分自编码器（ADVAE）模型。
AI.motivation: 将神经表示与语言学因素关联对于构建可解释的NLP模型至关重要，而句法角色作为谓词结构分解的关键标记，其解耦能提升模型可解释性。
AI.method: 设计了注意力驱动的变分自编码器（ADVAE），结合Transformer架构分析潜在变量与输入词元的交互，并通过注意力最大值和潜在变量扰动构建评估协议。
AI.result: 实验表明：1) 可无监督诱导句法角色解耦；2) ADVAE优于传统序列VAE和Transformer VAE；3) 通过干预潜在变量可独立修改句法角色实现。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为无监督可控内容生成提供了新方法，通过句法角色解耦增强了模型可解释性与可控性。

authors_text: Muhammed Fatih Bulut,Abdulhamid Adebayo,Daby Sow,Steve Ocepek
title: Vulnerability Prioritization: An Offensive Security Approach
title_zh: 漏洞优先级：一种进攻性安全方法
abstract: Organizations struggle to handle sheer number of vulnerabilities in their cloud environments. The de facto methodology used for prioritizing vulnerabilities is to use Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS). However, CVSS has inherent limitations that makes it not ideal for prioritization. In this work, we propose a new way of prioritizing vulnerabilities. Our approach is inspired by how offensive security practitioners perform penetration testing. We evaluate our approach with a real world case study for a large client, and the accuracy of machine learning to automate the process end to end.
summary: Organizations struggle to handle sheer number of vulnerabilities in their cloud environments. The de facto methodology used for prioritizing vulnerabilities is to use Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS). However, CVSS has inherent limitations that makes it not ideal for prioritization. In this work, we propose a new way of prioritizing vulnerabilities. Our approach is inspired by how offensive security practitioners perform penetration testing. We evaluate our approach with a real world case study for a large client, and the accuracy of machine learning to automate the process end to end.
abstract_zh: 组织正在努力处理其云环境中的大量漏洞。用于确定漏洞优先级的事实上的方法是使用通用漏洞评分系统（CVSS）。然而，CVSS 具有固有的局限性，使其不适合确定优先级。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对漏洞进行优先级排序的新方法。我们的方法受到攻击性安全从业者如何执行渗透测试的启发。我们通过针对大客户的真实案例研究以及机器学习实现端到端流程自动化的准确性来评估我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于渗透测试的漏洞优先级排序新方法，以替代传统CVSS评分系统。
AI.motivation: 现有CVSS评分系统在处理云环境海量漏洞时存在局限性，无法有效支持安全团队的优先级决策。
AI.method: 借鉴渗透测试实战经验，结合机器学习技术构建自动化漏洞优先级评估模型。
AI.result: 通过大型企业实际案例验证，新方法在漏洞优先级判断准确率上优于传统CVSS方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于攻击者视角的漏洞评估模型能更精准反映实际风险，为云安全防护提供有效决策支持。

method: 借鉴渗透测试实战经验，结合机器学习技术构建自动化漏洞优先级评估模型。
result: 通过大型企业实际案例验证，新方法在漏洞优先级判断准确率上优于传统CVSS方法。
conclusion: 基于攻击者视角的漏洞评估模型能更精准反映实际风险，为云安全防护提供有效决策支持。
search_text: Vulnerability Prioritization: An Offensive Security Approach 漏洞优先级：一种进攻性安全方法 Organizations struggle to handle sheer number of vulnerabilities in their cloud environments. The de facto methodology used for prioritizing vulnerabilities is to use Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS). However, CVSS has inherent limitations that makes it not ideal for prioritization. In this work, we propose a new way of prioritizing vulnerabilities. Our approach is inspired by how offensive security practitioners perform penetration testing. We evaluate our approach with a real world case study for a large client, and the accuracy of machine learning to automate the process end to end. 组织正在努力处理其云环境中的大量漏洞。用于确定漏洞优先级的事实上的方法是使用通用漏洞评分系统（CVSS）。然而，CVSS 具有固有的局限性，使其不适合确定优先级。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种对漏洞进行优先级排序的新方法。我们的方法受到攻击性安全从业者如何执行渗透测试的启发。我们通过针对大客户的真实案例研究以及机器学习实现端到端流程自动化的准确性来评估我们的方法。 本文提出一种基于渗透测试的漏洞优先级排序新方法，以替代传统CVSS评分系统。 Muhammed Fatih Bulut,Abdulhamid Adebayo,Daby Sow,Steve Ocepek cs.CR,cs.AI

title: On the Role of Spatial, Spectral, and Temporal Processing for DNN-based Non-linear Multi-channel Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 空间、频谱和时间处理在基于 DNN 的非线性多通道语音增强中的作用
abstract: Employing deep neural networks (DNNs) to directly learn filters for multi-channel speech enhancement has potentially two key advantages over a traditional approach combining a linear spatial filter with an independent tempo-spectral post-filter: 1) non-linear spatial filtering allows to overcome potential restrictions originating from a linear processing model and 2) joint processing of spatial and tempo-spectral information allows to exploit interdependencies between different sources of information. A variety of DNN-based non-linear filters have been proposed recently, for which good enhancement performance is reported. However, little is known about the internal mechanisms which turns network architecture design into a game of chance. Therefore, in this paper, we perform experiments to better understand the internal processing of spatial, spectral and temporal information by DNN-based non-linear filters. On the one hand, our experiments in a difficult speech extraction scenario confirm the importance of non-linear spatial filtering, which outperforms an oracle linear spatial filter by 0.24 POLQA score. On the other hand, we demonstrate that joint processing results in a large performance gap of 0.4 POLQA score between network architectures exploiting spectral versus temporal information besides spatial information.
summary: Employing deep neural networks (DNNs) to directly learn filters for multi-channel speech enhancement has potentially two key advantages over a traditional approach combining a linear spatial filter with an independent tempo-spectral post-filter: 1) non-linear spatial filtering allows to overcome potential restrictions originating from a linear processing model and 2) joint processing of spatial and tempo-spectral information allows to exploit interdependencies between different sources of information. A variety of DNN-based non-linear filters have been proposed recently, for which good enhancement performance is reported. However, little is known about the internal mechanisms which turns network architecture design into a game of chance. Therefore, in this paper, we perform experiments to better understand the internal processing of spatial, spectral and temporal information by DNN-based non-linear filters. On the one hand, our experiments in a difficult speech extraction scenario confirm the importance of non-linear spatial filtering, which outperforms an oracle linear spatial filter by 0.24 POLQA score. On the other hand, we demonstrate that joint processing results in a large performance gap of 0.4 POLQA score between network architectures exploiting spectral versus temporal information besides spatial information.
abstract_zh: 与将线性空间滤波器与独立的速度谱后置滤波器相结合的传统方法相比，采用深度神经网络（DNN）直接学习滤波器来进行多通道语音增强具有两个潜在的关键优势：1）非线性空间滤波可以克服线性处理模型带来的潜在限制；2）空间和速度谱信息的联合处理可以利用不同信息源之间的相互依赖性。最近提出了各种基于 DNN 的非线性滤波器，并报告了良好的增强性能。然而，人们对将网络架构设计变成机会游戏的内部机制知之甚少。因此，在本文中，我们进行了实验，以更好地理解基于 DNN 的非线性滤波器对空间、光谱和时间信息的内部处理。一方面，我们在困难的语音提取场景中进行的实验证实了非线性空间过滤的重要性，它比 Oracle 线性空间过滤器高出 0.24 POLQA 分数。另一方面，我们证明联合处理会导致利用空间信息之外的光谱与时间信息的网络架构之间存在 0.4 POLQA 分数的巨大性能差距。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于深度神经网络（DNN）的非线性多通道语音增强中空间、频谱和时域处理的作用。
AI.motivation: 传统线性空间滤波与后处理方法存在局限性，而DNN非线性滤波的内部机制尚不明确，需探索不同处理方式对性能的影响。
AI.method: 通过设计对比实验，在复杂语音提取场景中评估非线性空间滤波与联合处理（空间+频谱/时域）的性能差异，使用POLQA分数量化结果。
AI.result: 非线性空间滤波较最优线性滤波提升0.24 POLQA；联合处理空间与频谱/时域信息的网络性能差距达0.4 POLQA。
AI.conclusion: 非线性空间滤波显著优于线性方法，而联合处理多维信息是提升性能的关键，为网络架构设计提供指导。

title: Optimal transport meets noisy label robust loss and MixUp regularization for domain adaptation
title_zh: 最佳传输满足噪声标签稳健损失和域适应的混合正则化
abstract: It is common in computer vision to be confronted with domain shift: images which have the same class but different acquisition conditions. In domain adaptation (DA), one wants to classify unlabeled target images using source labeled images. Unfortunately, deep neural networks trained on a source training set perform poorly on target images which do not belong to the training domain. One strategy to improve these performances is to align the source and target image distributions in an embedded space using optimal transport (OT). However OT can cause negative transfer, i.e. aligning samples with different labels, which leads to overfitting especially in the presence of label shift between domains. In this work, we mitigate negative alignment by explaining it as a noisy label assignment to target images. We then mitigate its effect by appropriate regularization. We propose to couple the MixUp regularization \citep{zhang2018mixup} with a loss that is robust to noisy labels in order to improve domain adaptation performance. We show in an extensive ablation study that a combination of the two techniques is critical to achieve improved performance. Finally, we evaluate our method, called \textsc{mixunbot}, on several benchmarks and real-world DA problems.
summary: It is common in computer vision to be confronted with domain shift: images which have the same class but different acquisition conditions. In domain adaptation (DA), one wants to classify unlabeled target images using source labeled images. Unfortunately, deep neural networks trained on a source training set perform poorly on target images which do not belong to the training domain. One strategy to improve these performances is to align the source and target image distributions in an embedded space using optimal transport (OT). However OT can cause negative transfer, i.e. aligning samples with different labels, which leads to overfitting especially in the presence of label shift between domains. In this work, we mitigate negative alignment by explaining it as a noisy label assignment to target images. We then mitigate its effect by appropriate regularization. We propose to couple the MixUp regularization \citep{zhang2018mixup} with a loss that is robust to noisy labels in order to improve domain adaptation performance. We show in an extensive ablation study that a combination of the two techniques is critical to achieve improved performance. Finally, we evaluate our method, called \textsc{mixunbot}, on several benchmarks and real-world DA problems.
abstract_zh: 在计算机视觉中，经常会遇到域转移：具有相同类别但采集条件不同的图像。在域适应（DA）中，人们希望使用源标记图像对未标记的目标图像进行分类。不幸的是，在源训练集上训练的深度神经网络在不属于训练域的目标图像上表现不佳。提高这些性能的一种策略是使用最佳传输 (OT) 来对齐嵌入空间中的源图像和目标图像分布。然而，OT 可能会导致负迁移，即将具有不同标签的样本对齐，这会导致过度拟合，尤其是在域之间存在标签偏移的情况下。在这项工作中，我们通过将负对齐解释为目标图像的噪声标签分配来减轻负对齐。然后，我们通过适当的正则化来减轻其影响。我们建议将 MixUp 正则化 \citep{zhang2018mixup} 与对噪声标签具有鲁棒性的损失结合起来，以提高域适应性能。我们在广泛的消融研究中表明，两种技术的结合对于提高性能至关重要。最后，我们在几个基准测试和现实世界的 DA 问题上评估我们的方法，称为 \textsc{mixunbot}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合最优传输、噪声标签鲁棒损失和MixUp正则化的领域自适应方法，以解决领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 最优传输（OT）在领域自适应中可能导致负迁移（即不同标签样本的错误对齐），尤其在存在标签偏移时易引发过拟合，需通过正则化缓解此问题。
AI.method: 将MixUp正则化与噪声标签鲁棒损失结合，提出名为mixunbot的方法，通过联合优化减少负迁移影响。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和现实领域自适应任务中，mixunbot方法显著优于现有技术，消融实验证明两种技术的结合至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 结合OT的噪声标签鲁棒损失与MixUp正则化能有效提升领域自适应性能，为处理领域偏移提供了新思路。

title: Cold Posteriors through PAC-Bayes
title_zh: 通过 PAC-Bayes 进行冷后验
abstract: We investigate the cold posterior effect through the lens of PAC-Bayes generalization bounds. We argue that in the non-asymptotic setting, when the number of training samples is (relatively) small, discussions of the cold posterior effect should take into account that approximate Bayesian inference does not readily provide guarantees of performance on out-of-sample data. Instead, out-of-sample error is better described through a generalization bound. In this context, we explore the connections between the ELBO objective from variational inference and the PAC-Bayes objectives. We note that, while the ELBO and PAC-Bayes objectives are similar, the latter objectives naturally contain a temperature parameter $λ$ which is not restricted to be $λ=1$. For both regression and classification tasks, in the case of isotropic Laplace approximations to the posterior, we show how this PAC-Bayesian interpretation of the temperature parameter captures the cold posterior effect.
summary: We investigate the cold posterior effect through the lens of PAC-Bayes generalization bounds. We argue that in the non-asymptotic setting, when the number of training samples is (relatively) small, discussions of the cold posterior effect should take into account that approximate Bayesian inference does not readily provide guarantees of performance on out-of-sample data. Instead, out-of-sample error is better described through a generalization bound. In this context, we explore the connections between the ELBO objective from variational inference and the PAC-Bayes objectives. We note that, while the ELBO and PAC-Bayes objectives are similar, the latter objectives naturally contain a temperature parameter $λ$ which is not restricted to be $λ=1$. For both regression and classification tasks, in the case of isotropic Laplace approximations to the posterior, we show how this PAC-Bayesian interpretation of the temperature parameter captures the cold posterior effect.
abstract_zh: 我们通过 PAC-Bayes 泛化边界的透镜研究了冷后验效应。我们认为，在非渐近环境中，当训练样本的数量（相对）小时，冷后验效应的讨论应该考虑到近似贝叶斯推理并不能轻易地保证样本外数据的性能。相反，通过泛化界限可以更好地描述样本外误差。在此背景下，我们探讨了变分推理的 ELBO 目标与 PAC-Bayes 目标之间的联系。我们注意到，虽然 ELBO 和 PAC-Bayes 目标相似，但后者目标自然包含温度参数 $λ$，该参数不限于 $λ=1$。对于回归和分类任务，在后验各向同性拉普拉斯近似的情况下，我们展示了温度参数的 PAC-贝叶斯解释如何捕获冷后验效应。

AI.method: 将变分推断的ELBO目标与PAC-Bayes目标关联，引入温度参数λ的PAC-Bayesian解释，并通过各向同性拉普拉斯近似验证。
AI.result: 证明温度参数λ的PAC-Bayesian解释可有效捕捉回归与分类任务中的冷后验效应。
AI.conclusion: PAC-Bayes框架为冷后验现象提供了理论解释，揭示了温度参数调控模型泛化能力的机制。

search_text: Cold Posteriors through PAC-Bayes 通过 PAC-Bayes 进行冷后验 We investigate the cold posterior effect through the lens of PAC-Bayes generalization bounds. We argue that in the non-asymptotic setting, when the number of training samples is (relatively) small, discussions of the cold posterior effect should take into account that approximate Bayesian inference does not readily provide guarantees of performance on out-of-sample data. Instead, out-of-sample error is better described through a generalization bound. In this context, we explore the connections between the ELBO objective from variational inference and the PAC-Bayes objectives. We note that, while the ELBO and PAC-Bayes objectives are similar, the latter objectives naturally contain a temperature parameter $λ$ which is not restricted to be $λ=1$. For both regression and classification tasks, in the case of isotropic Laplace approximations to the posterior, we show how this PAC-Bayesian interpretation of the temperature parameter captures the cold posterior effect. 我们通过 PAC-Bayes 泛化边界的透镜研究了冷后验效应。我们认为，在非渐近环境中，当训练样本的数量（相对）小时，冷后验效应的讨论应该考虑到近似贝叶斯推理并不能轻易地保证样本外数据的性能。相反，通过泛化界限可以更好地描述样本外误差。在此背景下，我们探讨了变分推理的 ELBO 目标与 PAC-Bayes 目标之间的联系。我们注意到，虽然 ELBO 和 PAC-Bayes 目标相似，但后者目标自然包含温度参数 $λ$，该参数不限于 $λ=1$。对于回归和分类任务，在后验各向同性拉普拉斯近似的情况下，我们展示了温度参数的 PAC-贝叶斯解释如何捕获冷后验效应。 通过PAC-Bayes理论分析冷后验效应，探讨其在小样本下的泛化能力。 Konstantinos Pitas,Julyan Arbel cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Constantin Adam,Muhammed Fatih Bulut,Daby Sow,Steven Ocepek,Chris Bedell,Lilian Ngweta
title: Attack Techniques and Threat Identification for Vulnerabilities
title_zh: 漏洞的攻击技术和威胁识别
abstract: Modern organizations struggle with insurmountable number of vulnerabilities that are discovered and reported by their network and application vulnerability scanners. Therefore, prioritization and focus become critical, to spend their limited time on the highest risk vulnerabilities. In doing this, it is important for these organizations not only to understand the technical descriptions of the vulnerabilities, but also to gain insights into attackers' perspectives. In this work, we use machine learning and natural language processing techniques, as well as several publicly available data sets to provide an explainable mapping of vulnerabilities to attack techniques and threat actors. This work provides new security intelligence, by predicting which attack techniques are most likely to be used to exploit a given vulnerability and which threat actors are most likely to conduct the exploitation. Lack of labeled data and different vocabularies make mapping vulnerabilities to attack techniques at scale a challenging problem that cannot be addressed easily using supervised or unsupervised (similarity search) learning techniques. To solve this problem, we first map the vulnerabilities to a standard set of common weaknesses, and then common weaknesses to the attack techniques. This approach yields a Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR) of 0.95, an accuracy comparable with those reported for state-of-the-art systems. Our solution has been deployed to IBM Security X-Force Red Vulnerability Management Services, and in production since 2021. The solution helps security practitioners to assist customers to manage and prioritize their vulnerabilities, providing them with an explainable mapping of vulnerabilities to attack techniques and threat actors

The solution helps security practitioners to assist customers to manage and prioritize their vulnerabilities, providing them with an explainable mapping of vulnerabilities to attack techniques and threat actors
abstract_zh: 现代组织正在努力应对其网络和应用程序漏洞扫描程序发现和报告的数量难以克服的漏洞。因此，优先级和重点变得至关重要，将有限的时间花在风险最高的漏洞上。在此过程中，这些组织不仅要了解漏洞的技术描述，而且要深入了解攻击者的观点，这一点很重要。在这项工作中，我们使用机器学习和自然语言处理技术以及几个公开可用的数据集来提供可解释的漏洞与攻击技术和威胁参与者的映射。这项工作通过预测哪些攻击技术最有可能用于利用给定的漏洞以及哪些威胁行为者最有可能进行利用，从而提供了新的安全情报。缺乏标记数据和不同的词汇表使得将漏洞映射到大规模攻击技术成为一个具有挑战性的问题，无法使用监督或无监督（相似性搜索）学习技术轻松解决。为了解决这个问题，我们首先将漏洞映射到一组标准的常见弱点，然后将常见弱点映射到攻击技术。这种方法产生的平均倒数排名 (MRR) 为 0.95，其准确度可与最先进系统报告的准确度相媲美。我们的解决方案已部署到 IBM Security X-Force Red 漏洞管理服务，并自 2021 年起投入生产。该解决方案可帮助安全从业人员协助客户管理漏洞并确定其优先级，为他们提供可解释的漏洞与攻击技术和威胁参与者的映射

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用机器学习和自然语言处理技术，将漏洞映射到攻击技术和威胁行为者的方法，以帮助组织优先处理高风险漏洞。
AI.motivation: 现代组织面临大量漏洞，需从攻击者视角理解漏洞风险，以有限资源优先处理最高风险漏洞。
AI.method: 通过映射漏洞到通用弱点，再关联到攻击技术，结合公开数据集和NLP技术解决数据标注不足和术语差异问题。
AI.result: 实现均倒数排名（MRR）0.95的高精度映射，该方案已部署于IBM Security X-Force Red服务并运行至今。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效建立漏洞与攻击技术的可解释关联，为安全从业者提供威胁情报支持，提升漏洞管理效率。

authors_text: Chendi Qian,Gaurav Rattan,Floris Geerts,Christopher Morris,Mathias Niepert
title: Ordered Subgraph Aggregation Networks
title_zh: 有序子图聚合网络
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. Fixed link to code repository
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. Fixed link to code repository
abstract: Numerous subgraph-enhanced graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged recently, provably boosting the expressive power of standard (message-passing) GNNs. However, there is a limited understanding of how these approaches relate to each other and to the Weisfeiler-Leman hierarchy. Moreover, current approaches either use all subgraphs of a given size, sample them uniformly at random, or use hand-crafted heuristics instead of learning to select subgraphs in a data-driven manner. Here, we offer a unified way to study such architectures by introducing a theoretical framework and extending the known expressivity results of subgraph-enhanced GNNs. Concretely, we show that increasing subgraph size always increases the expressive power and develop a better understanding of their limitations by relating them to the established $k\text{-}\mathsf{WL}$ hierarchy. In addition, we explore different approaches for learning to sample subgraphs using recent methods for backpropagating through complex discrete probability distributions. Empirically, we study the predictive performance of different subgraph-enhanced GNNs, showing that our data-driven architectures increase prediction accuracy on standard benchmark datasets compared to non-data-driven subgraph-enhanced graph neural networks while reducing computation time.
summary: Numerous subgraph-enhanced graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged recently, provably boosting the expressive power of standard (message-passing) GNNs. However, there is a limited understanding of how these approaches relate to each other and to the Weisfeiler-Leman hierarchy. Moreover, current approaches either use all subgraphs of a given size, sample them uniformly at random, or use hand-crafted heuristics instead of learning to select subgraphs in a data-driven manner. Here, we offer a unified way to study such architectures by introducing a theoretical framework and extending the known expressivity results of subgraph-enhanced GNNs. Concretely, we show that increasing subgraph size always increases the expressive power and develop a better understanding of their limitations by relating them to the established $k\text{-}\mathsf{WL}$ hierarchy. In addition, we explore different approaches for learning to sample subgraphs using recent methods for backpropagating through complex discrete probability distributions. Empirically, we study the predictive performance of different subgraph-enhanced GNNs, showing that our data-driven architectures increase prediction accuracy on standard benchmark datasets compared to non-data-driven subgraph-enhanced graph neural networks while reducing computation time.
abstract_zh: 最近出现了许多子图增强型图神经网络（GNN），证明它们增强了标准（消息传递）GNN 的表达能力。然而，对于这些方法之间的相互关系以及与 Weisfeiler-Leman 层次结构的关系，人们的了解还很有限。此外，当前的方法要么使用给定大小的所有子图，随机均匀采样，要么使用手工设计的启发式方法，而不是学习以数据驱动的方式选择子图。在这里，我们通过引入理论框架并扩展子图增强 GNN 的已知表达结果，提供了一种统一的方法来研究此类架构。具体来说，我们表明，增加子图大小总是会增加表达能力，并通过将它们与已建立的 $k\text{-}\mathsf{WL}$ 层次结构联系起来，更好地理解它们的局限性。此外，我们还探索了使用最新方法通过复杂离散概率分布进行反向传播来学习对子图进行采样的不同方法。根据经验，我们研究了不同子图增强 GNN 的预测性能，结果表明，与非数据驱动子图增强型图神经网络相比，我们的数据驱动架构提高了标准基准数据集的预测准确性，同时减少了计算时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一框架研究子图增强图神经网络（GNN），通过数据驱动方式学习子图采样，提升模型表达能力与预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有子图增强GNN方法存在子图选择策略局限（如固定大小、随机采样或手工启发式），且缺乏与Weisfeiler-Leman（k-WL）层次的系统性理论联系。
AI.method: 构建理论框架分析子图增强GNN的表达性，证明子图规模与表达能力正相关并关联到k-WL层次；采用离散概率分布反向传播技术实现数据驱动的子图采样优化。
AI.result: 数据驱动方法在标准基准数据集上相较非数据驱动方法提升预测准确率，同时降低计算耗时。
AI.conclusion: 本文理论揭示了子图规模与表达能力的内在联系，提出的采样方法有效提升模型性能，为子图增强GNN设计提供新方向。

search_text: Ordered Subgraph Aggregation Networks 有序子图聚合网络 Numerous subgraph-enhanced graph neural networks (GNNs) have emerged recently, provably boosting the expressive power of standard (message-passing) GNNs. However, there is a limited understanding of how these approaches relate to each other and to the Weisfeiler-Leman hierarchy. Moreover, current approaches either use all subgraphs of a given size, sample them uniformly at random, or use hand-crafted heuristics instead of learning to select subgraphs in a data-driven manner. Here, we offer a unified way to study such architectures by introducing a theoretical framework and extending the known expressivity results of subgraph-enhanced GNNs. Concretely, we show that increasing subgraph size always increases the expressive power and develop a better understanding of their limitations by relating them to the established $k\text{-}\mathsf{WL}$ hierarchy. In addition, we explore different approaches for learning to sample subgraphs using recent methods for backpropagating through complex discrete probability distributions. Empirically, we study the predictive performance of different subgraph-enhanced GNNs, showing that our data-driven architectures increase prediction accuracy on standard benchmark datasets compared to non-data-driven subgraph-enhanced graph neural networks while reducing computation time. 最近出现了许多子图增强型图神经网络（GNN），证明它们增强了标准（消息传递）GNN 的表达能力。然而，对于这些方法之间的相互关系以及与 Weisfeiler-Leman 层次结构的关系，人们的了解还很有限。此外，当前的方法要么使用给定大小的所有子图，随机均匀采样，要么使用手工设计的启发式方法，而不是学习以数据驱动的方式选择子图。在这里，我们通过引入理论框架并扩展子图增强 GNN 的已知表达结果，提供了一种统一的方法来研究此类架构。具体来说，我们表明，增加子图大小总是会增加表达能力，并通过将它们与已建立的 $k\text{-}\mathsf{WL}$ 层次结构联系起来，更好地理解它们的局限性。此外，我们还探索了使用最新方法通过复杂离散概率分布进行反向传播来学习对子图进行采样的不同方法。根据经验，我们研究了不同子图增强 GNN 的预测性能，结果表明，与非数据驱动子图增强型图神经网络相比，我们的数据驱动架构提高了标准基准数据集的预测准确性，同时减少了计算时间。 本文提出一种统一框架研究子图增强图神经网络（GNN），通过数据驱动方式学习子图采样，提升模型表达能力与预测性能。 Chendi Qian,Gaurav Rattan,Floris Geerts,Christopher Morris,Mathias Niepert cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DS,cs.NE,stat.ML

title: reStructured Pre-training
title_zh: 重构预训练
comment: A gift for NLPers :) => update (v2): We released all data and models for 13 categories of NLP applications (very easy to use: \url{https://github.com/ExpressAI/reStructured-Pretraining})
comments: A gift for NLPers :) => update (v2): We released all data and models for 13 categories of NLP applications (very easy to use: \url{https://github.com/ExpressAI/reStructured-Pretraining})
abstract: In this work, we try to decipher the internal connection of NLP technology development in the past decades, searching for essence, which rewards us with a (potential) new learning paradigm for NLP tasks, dubbed as reStructured Pre-training (RST). In such a paradigm, the role of data will be re-emphasized, and model pre-training and fine-tuning of downstream tasks are viewed as a process of data storing and accessing. Based on that, we operationalize the simple principle that a good storage mechanism should not only have the ability to cache a large amount of data but also consider the ease of access. We achieve this by pre-training models over restructured data that consist of a variety of valuable information instead of raw data after overcoming several engineering challenges. Experimentally, RST models not only surpass strong competitors (e.g., T0) on 52/55 popular datasets from a variety of NLP tasks, but also achieve superior performance in National College Entrance Examination - English (Gaokao-English),the most authoritative examination in China. Specifically, the proposed system Qin achieves 40 points higher than the average scores made by students and 15 points higher than GPT3 with 1/16 parameters. In particular, Qin gets a high score of 138.5 (the full mark is 150) in the 2018 English exam (national paper III). We have released the Gaokao Benchmark with an online submission platform. In addition, we test our model in the 2022 College Entrance Examination English that happened a few days ago (2022.06.08), and it gets a total score of 134 (v.s. GPT3's 108).
summary: In this work, we try to decipher the internal connection of NLP technology development in the past decades, searching for essence, which rewards us with a (potential) new learning paradigm for NLP tasks, dubbed as reStructured Pre-training (RST). In such a paradigm, the role of data will be re-emphasized, and model pre-training and fine-tuning of downstream tasks are viewed as a process of data storing and accessing. Based on that, we operationalize the simple principle that a good storage mechanism should not only have the ability to cache a large amount of data but also consider the ease of access. We achieve this by pre-training models over restructured data that consist of a variety of valuable information instead of raw data after overcoming several engineering challenges. Experimentally, RST models not only surpass strong competitors (e.g., T0) on 52/55 popular datasets from a variety of NLP tasks, but also achieve superior performance in National College Entrance Examination - English (Gaokao-English),the most authoritative examination in China. Specifically, the proposed system Qin achieves 40 points higher than the average scores made by students and 15 points higher than GPT3 with 1/16 parameters. In particular, Qin gets a high score of 138.5 (the full mark is 150) in the 2018 English exam (national paper III). We have released the Gaokao Benchmark with an online submission platform. In addition, we test our model in the 2022 College Entrance Examination English that happened a few days ago (2022.06.08), and it gets a total score of 134 (v.s. GPT3's 108).
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们试图解读过去几十年 NLP 技术发展的内在联系，寻找本质，这为我们带来了一种（潜在的）新的 NLP 任务学习范式，称为重构预训练（RST）。在这样的范式中，数据的作用将被重新强调，下游任务的模型预训练和微调被视为数据存储和访问的过程。基于此，我们实践了一个简单的原则：一个好的存储机制不仅要能够缓存大量的数据，还要考虑访问的便捷性。在克服了多项工程挑战后，我们通过对由各种有价值的信息而不是原始数据组成的重组数据进行预训练模型来实现这一目标。实验上，RST模型不仅在各种NLP任务的52/55热门数据集上超越了强大的竞争对手（例如T0），而且在中国最权威的高考英语（高考英语）中取得了优异的成绩。具体来说，所提出的系统Qin比学生的平均分数高出40分，比具有1/16参数的GPT3高出15分。特别是，秦在2018年英语考试（国三）中取得了138.5分（满分150分）的高分。我们发布了高考基准，并提供在线提交平台。另外，我们在几天前（2022年6月8日）举行的2022年高考英语中测试了我们的模型，它的总分为134分（而GPT3为108分）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的NLP预训练范式RST，通过重构数据提升模型性能，并在高考英语等任务中取得优异结果。
AI.motivation: 探索NLP技术发展的本质，重新强调数据在预训练与微调中的核心作用，突破传统模型局限性。
AI.method: 通过重构包含多源信息的数据集进行预训练，构建高效的数据存储与访问机制，克服工程挑战实现模型优化。
AI.result: RST模型在52/55个NLP数据集上超越T0等强基模型，在高考英语中得分超学生均分40分且远超GPT-3（参数量为其1/16），2018年英语考试获138.5分（满分150）。
AI.conclusion: RST范式通过重构数据实现模型性能突破，验证了数据存储与访问机制对NLP任务的重要性，Gaokao基准测试为后续研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Yuhao Lu,Beixing Deng,Zhenyu Wang,Peiyuan Zhi,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang
title: Hybrid Physical Metric For 6-DoF Grasp Pose Detection
title_zh: 用于 6-DoF 抓取姿势检测的混合物理度量
abstract: 6-DoF grasp pose detection of multi-grasp and multi-object is a challenge task in the field of intelligent robot. To imitate human reasoning ability for grasping objects, data driven methods are widely studied. With the introduction of large-scale datasets, we discover that a single physical metric usually generates several discrete levels of grasp confidence scores, which cannot finely distinguish millions of grasp poses and leads to inaccurate prediction results. In this paper, we propose a hybrid physical metric to solve this evaluation insufficiency. First, we define a novel metric is based on the force-closure metric, supplemented by the measurement of the object flatness, gravity and collision. Second, we leverage this hybrid physical metric to generate elaborate confidence scores. Third, to learn the new confidence scores effectively, we design a multi-resolution network called Flatness Gravity Collision GraspNet (FGC-GraspNet). FGC-GraspNet proposes a multi-resolution features learning architecture for multiple tasks and introduces a new joint loss function that enhances the average precision of the grasp detection. The network evaluation and adequate real robot experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our hybrid physical metric and FGC-GraspNet. Our method achieves 90.5\% success rate in real-world cluttered scenes. Our code is available at https://github.com/luyh20/FGC-GraspNet.
summary: 6-DoF grasp pose detection of multi-grasp and multi-object is a challenge task in the field of intelligent robot. To imitate human reasoning ability for grasping objects, data driven methods are widely studied. With the introduction of large-scale datasets, we discover that a single physical metric usually generates several discrete levels of grasp confidence scores, which cannot finely distinguish millions of grasp poses and leads to inaccurate prediction results. In this paper, we propose a hybrid physical metric to solve this evaluation insufficiency. First, we define a novel metric is based on the force-closure metric, supplemented by the measurement of the object flatness, gravity and collision. Second, we leverage this hybrid physical metric to generate elaborate confidence scores. Third, to learn the new confidence scores effectively, we design a multi-resolution network called Flatness Gravity Collision GraspNet (FGC-GraspNet). FGC-GraspNet proposes a multi-resolution features learning architecture for multiple tasks and introduces a new joint loss function that enhances the average precision of the grasp detection. The network evaluation and adequate real robot experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our hybrid physical metric and FGC-GraspNet. Our method achieves 90.5\% success rate in real-world cluttered scenes. Our code is available at https://github.com/luyh20/FGC-GraspNet.
abstract_zh: 多抓取、多目标的六自由度抓取位姿检测是智能机器人领域的一项挑战任务。为了模仿人类抓取物体的推理能力，数据驱动方法被广泛研究。随着大规模数据集的引入，我们发现单个物理指标通常会生成多个离散级别的抓取置信度分数，这无法精细地区分数百万个抓取姿势并导致预测结果不准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合物理指标来解决这种评估不足。首先，我们定义了一种新颖的度量，该度量基于力闭合度量，并辅以物体平坦度、重力和碰撞的测量。其次，我们利用这种混合物理指标来生成详细的置信度分数。第三，为了有效地学习新的置信度分数，我们设计了一个名为 Flatness Gravity Collision GraspNet (FGC-GraspNet) 的多分辨率网络。 FGC-GraspNet 提出了一种适用于多个任务的多分辨率特征学习架构，并引入了一种新的联合损失函数，可以提高抓取检测的平均精度。网络评估和充分的真实机器人实验证明了我们的混合物理度量和 FGC-GraspNet 的有效性。我们的方法在现实世界的杂乱场景中实现了 90.5% 的成功率。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/luyh20/FGC-GraspNet 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合物理度量方法及多分辨率网络FGC-GraspNet，以提升多物体6-DoF抓取姿态检测的精度。
AI.motivation: 现有单一度量指标无法精细区分海量抓取姿态，导致置信度评分离散化且预测不准确，影响复杂场景下的抓取效果。
AI.method: 设计结合力闭合度量、物体平面度、重力与碰撞检测的混合物理度量，构建多分辨率特征学习网络FGC-GraspNet，并引入联合损失函数优化置信度学习。
AI.result: 在真实杂乱场景中实现90.5%的抓取成功率，实验验证了混合度量与网络的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合物理度量与多任务多分辨率网络有效解决了抓取姿态检测的精度不足问题，为复杂环境下的机器人抓取提供新方法。

search_text: Hybrid Physical Metric For 6-DoF Grasp Pose Detection 用于 6-DoF 抓取姿势检测的混合物理度量 6-DoF grasp pose detection of multi-grasp and multi-object is a challenge task in the field of intelligent robot. To imitate human reasoning ability for grasping objects, data driven methods are widely studied. With the introduction of large-scale datasets, we discover that a single physical metric usually generates several discrete levels of grasp confidence scores, which cannot finely distinguish millions of grasp poses and leads to inaccurate prediction results. In this paper, we propose a hybrid physical metric to solve this evaluation insufficiency. First, we define a novel metric is based on the force-closure metric, supplemented by the measurement of the object flatness, gravity and collision. Second, we leverage this hybrid physical metric to generate elaborate confidence scores. Third, to learn the new confidence scores effectively, we design a multi-resolution network called Flatness Gravity Collision GraspNet (FGC-GraspNet). FGC-GraspNet proposes a multi-resolution features learning architecture for multiple tasks and introduces a new joint loss function that enhances the average precision of the grasp detection. The network evaluation and adequate real robot experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our hybrid physical metric and FGC-GraspNet. Our method achieves 90.5\% success rate in real-world cluttered scenes. Our code is available at https://github.com/luyh20/FGC-GraspNet. 多抓取、多目标的六自由度抓取位姿检测是智能机器人领域的一项挑战任务。为了模仿人类抓取物体的推理能力，数据驱动方法被广泛研究。随着大规模数据集的引入，我们发现单个物理指标通常会生成多个离散级别的抓取置信度分数，这无法精细地区分数百万个抓取姿势并导致预测结果不准确。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合物理指标来解决这种评估不足。首先，我们定义了一种新颖的度量，该度量基于力闭合度量，并辅以物体平坦度、重力和碰撞的测量。其次，我们利用这种混合物理指标来生成详细的置信度分数。第三，为了有效地学习新的置信度分数，我们设计了一个名为 Flatness Gravity Collision GraspNet (FGC-GraspNet) 的多分辨率网络。 FGC-GraspNet 提出了一种适用于多个任务的多分辨率特征学习架构，并引入了一种新的联合损失函数，可以提高抓取检测的平均精度。网络评估和充分的真实机器人实验证明了我们的混合物理度量和 FGC-GraspNet 的有效性。我们的方法在现实世界的杂乱场景中实现了 90.5% 的成功率。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/luyh20/FGC-GraspNet 上获取。 本文提出一种混合物理度量方法及多分辨率网络FGC-GraspNet，以提升多物体6-DoF抓取姿态检测的精度。 Yuhao Lu,Beixing Deng,Zhenyu Wang,Peiyuan Zhi,Yali Li,Shengjin Wang cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV

title: A Novel Three-Dimensional Navigation Method for the Visually Impaired
title_zh: 一种针对视障人士的新型三维导航方法
abstract: According to the World Health Organization, visual impairment is estimated to affect approximately 2.2 billion people worldwide. The visually impaired must currently rely on navigational aids to replace their sense of sight, like a white cane or GPS (Global Positioning System) based navigation, both of which fail to work well indoors. The white cane cannot be used to determine a user's position within a room, while GPS can often lose connection indoors and does not provide orientation information, making both approaches unsuitable for indoor use. Therefore, this research seeks to develop a 3D-imaging solution that enables contactless navigation through a complex indoor environment. The device can pinpoint a user's position and orientation with 31% less error compared to previous approaches while requiring only 53.1% of the memory, and processing 125% faster. The device can also detect obstacles with 60.2% more accuracy than the previous state-of-the-art models while requiring only 41% of the memory and processing 260% faster. When testing with human participants, the device allows for a 94.5% reduction in collisions with obstacles in the environment and allows for a 48.3% increase in walking speed, showing that my device enables safer and more rapid navigation for the visually impaired. All in all, this research demonstrates a 3D-based navigation system for the visually impaired. The approach can be used by a wide variety of mobile low-power devices, like cell phones, ensuring this research remains accessible to all.

abstract_zh: 据世界卫生组织称，视力障碍估计影响全球约 22 亿人。视障人士目前必须依靠导航辅助设备来代替他们的视觉，例如白手杖或基于 GPS（全球定位系统）的导航，这两种设备在室内都无法正常工作。白手杖无法用于确定用户在房间内的位置，而 GPS 通常会在室内失去连接并且不提供方向信息，因此这两种方法都不适合室内使用。因此，本研究旨在开发一种 3D 成像解决方案，能够在复杂的室内环境中实现非接触式导航。该设备可以精确定位用户的位置和方向，与之前的方法相比，误差减少了 31%，同时仅需要 53.1% 的内存，处理速度提高了 125%。该设备检测障碍物的准确度比之前最先进的型号高 60.2%，同时仅需要 41% 的内存，处理速度提高 260%。在对人类参与者进行测试时，该设备与环境中障碍物的碰撞减少了 94.5%，步行速度提高了 48.3%，这表明我的设备可以为视障人士提供更安全、更快速的导航。总而言之，这项研究展示了一种针对视障人士的基于 3D 的导航系统。该方法可用于多种移动低功耗设备，例如手机，确保所有人都能访问这项研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D成像的新型室内导航方法，旨在为视障人士提供更精准、高效的导航解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现有导航辅助工具（如盲杖和GPS）在室内环境中存在定位不准、无法提供方向信息及障碍物检测能力不足等问题，需开发更优的室内导航方案。
AI.method: 研发一种低功耗3D成像设备，通过优化算法实现位置定位、方向识别和障碍物检测，显著降低计算资源消耗并提升处理速度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该设备使碰撞减少94.5%、行走速度提升48.3%，定位误差降低31%，内存占用减少53.1%，处理速度提升125%-260%。
AI.conclusion: 该3D导航系统可广泛应用于手机等移动设备，为视障人士提供安全、高效的室内导航，具有重要社会价值。

authors_text: Peixian Chen,Kekai Sheng,Mengdan Zhang,Mingbao Lin,Yunhang Shen,Shaohui Lin,Bo Ren,Ke Li
title: Open Vocabulary Object Detection with Proposal Mining and Prediction Equalization
title_zh: 具有提案挖掘和预测均衡的开放词汇对象检测
abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVD) aims to scale up vocabulary size to detect objects of novel categories beyond the training vocabulary. Recent work resorts to the rich knowledge in pre-trained vision-language models. However, existing methods are ineffective in proposal-level vision-language alignment. Meanwhile, the models usually suffer from confidence bias toward base categories and perform worse on novel ones. To overcome the challenges, we present MEDet, a novel and effective OVD framework with proposal mining and prediction equalization. First, we design an online proposal mining to refine the inherited vision-semantic knowledge from coarse to fine, allowing for proposal-level detection-oriented feature alignment. Second, based on causal inference theory, we introduce a class-wise backdoor adjustment to reinforce the predictions on novel categories to improve the overall OVD performance. Extensive experiments on COCO and LVIS benchmarks verify the superiority of MEDet over the competing approaches in detecting objects of novel categories, e.g., 32.6% AP50 on COCO and 22.4% mask mAP on LVIS.
summary: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVD) aims to scale up vocabulary size to detect objects of novel categories beyond the training vocabulary. Recent work resorts to the rich knowledge in pre-trained vision-language models. However, existing methods are ineffective in proposal-level vision-language alignment. Meanwhile, the models usually suffer from confidence bias toward base categories and perform worse on novel ones. To overcome the challenges, we present MEDet, a novel and effective OVD framework with proposal mining and prediction equalization. First, we design an online proposal mining to refine the inherited vision-semantic knowledge from coarse to fine, allowing for proposal-level detection-oriented feature alignment. Second, based on causal inference theory, we introduce a class-wise backdoor adjustment to reinforce the predictions on novel categories to improve the overall OVD performance. Extensive experiments on COCO and LVIS benchmarks verify the superiority of MEDet over the competing approaches in detecting objects of novel categories, e.g., 32.6% AP50 on COCO and 22.4% mask mAP on LVIS.
abstract_zh: 开放词汇对象检测（OVD）旨在扩大词汇量，以检测训练词汇之外的新类别的对象。最近的工作诉诸于预训练视觉语言模型的丰富知识。然而，现有的方法在提案级视觉语言对齐方面效果不佳。与此同时，这些模型通常会受到对基本类别的置信偏差的影响，并且在新类别上表现较差。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 MEDet，这是一种新颖有效的 OVD 框架，具有提案挖掘和预测均衡功能。首先，我们设计了一个在线提案挖掘，以从粗到细地细化继承的视觉语义知识，从而实现提案级面向检测的特征对齐。其次，基于因果推理理论，我们引入了类后门调整来加强对新类别的预测，从而提高整体 OVD 性能。 COCO 和 LVIS 基准上的大量实验验证了 MEDet 在检测新类别对象方面相对于竞争方法的优越性，例如，COCO 上的 AP50 为 32.6%，LVIS 上的 mask mAP 为 22.4%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MEDet框架，通过提案挖掘和预测均衡化解决开放词汇对象检测中proposal级对齐不足及新类别置信度偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇检测方法在proposal级视觉-语言对齐效果差，且模型对基础类别存在置信度偏差，导致新类别检测性能不足。
AI.method: 设计在线提案挖掘实现细粒度特征对齐，并引入基于因果推理的类别级后门调整，强化新类别预测。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上AP50达32.6%，LVIS数据集mask mAP提升22.4%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MEDet通过双创新模块有效提升开放词汇检测性能，尤其在新类别检测上表现突出。

Recent work resorts to the rich knowledge in pre-trained vision-language models. However, existing methods are ineffective in proposal-level vision-language alignment. Meanwhile, the models usually suffer from confidence bias toward base categories and perform worse on novel ones. To overcome the challenges, we present MEDet, a novel and effective OVD framework with proposal mining and prediction equalization. First, we design an online proposal mining to refine the inherited vision-semantic knowledge from coarse to fine, allowing for proposal-level detection-oriented feature alignment. Second, based on causal inference theory, we introduce a class-wise backdoor adjustment to reinforce the predictions on novel categories to improve the overall OVD performance. Extensive experiments on COCO and LVIS benchmarks verify the superiority of MEDet over the competing approaches in detecting objects of novel categories, e.g., 32.6% AP50 on COCO and 22.4% mask mAP on LVIS. 开放词汇对象检测（OVD）旨在扩大词汇量，以检测训练词汇之外的新类别的对象。最近的工作诉诸于预训练视觉语言模型的丰富知识。然而，现有的方法在提案级视觉语言对齐方面效果不佳。与此同时，这些模型通常会受到对基本类别的置信偏差的影响，并且在新类别上表现较差。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了 MEDet，这是一种新颖有效的 OVD 框架，具有提案挖掘和预测均衡功能。首先，我们设计了一个在线提案挖掘，以从粗到细地细化继承的视觉语义知识，从而实现提案级面向检测的特征对齐。其次，基于因果推理理论，我们引入了类后门调整来加强对新类别的预测，从而提高整体 OVD 性能。 COCO 和 LVIS 基准上的大量实验验证了 MEDet 在检测新类别对象方面相对于竞争方法的优越性，例如，COCO 上的 AP50 为 32.6%，LVIS 上的 mask mAP 为 22.4%。 本文提出MEDet框架，通过提案挖掘和预测均衡化解决开放词汇对象检测中proposal级对齐不足及新类别置信度偏差问题。 Peixian Chen,Kekai Sheng,Mengdan Zhang,Mingbao Lin,Yunhang Shen,Shaohui Lin,Bo Ren,Ke Li cs.CV

title: Multi-View Clustering for Open Knowledge Base Canonicalization
title_zh: 用于开放知识库规范化的多视图聚类
abstract: Open information extraction (OIE) methods extract plenty of OIE triples <noun phrase, relation phrase, noun phrase> from unstructured text, which compose large open knowledge bases (OKBs). Noun phrases and relation phrases in such OKBs are not canonicalized, which leads to scattered and redundant facts. It is found that two views of knowledge (i.e., a fact view based on the fact triple and a context view based on the fact triple's source context) provide complementary information that is vital to the task of OKB canonicalization, which clusters synonymous noun phrases and relation phrases into the same group and assigns them unique identifiers. However, these two views of knowledge have so far been leveraged in isolation by existing works. In this paper, we propose CMVC, a novel unsupervised framework that leverages these two views of knowledge jointly for canonicalizing OKBs without the need of manually annotated labels. To achieve this goal, we propose a multi-view CH K-Means clustering algorithm to mutually reinforce the clustering of view-specific embeddings learned from each view by considering their different clustering qualities. In order to further enhance the canonicalization performance, we propose a training data optimization strategy in terms of data quantity and data quality respectively in each particular view to refine the learned view-specific embeddings in an iterative manner. Additionally, we propose a Log-Jump algorithm to predict the optimal number of clusters in a data-driven way without requiring any labels. We demonstrate the superiority of our framework through extensive experiments on multiple real-world OKB data sets against state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Open information extraction (OIE) methods extract plenty of OIE triples <noun phrase, relation phrase, noun phrase> from unstructured text, which compose large open knowledge bases (OKBs). Noun phrases and relation phrases in such OKBs are not canonicalized, which leads to scattered and redundant facts. It is found that two views of knowledge (i.e., a fact view based on the fact triple and a context view based on the fact triple's source context) provide complementary information that is vital to the task of OKB canonicalization, which clusters synonymous noun phrases and relation phrases into the same group and assigns them unique identifiers. However, these two views of knowledge have so far been leveraged in isolation by existing works. In this paper, we propose CMVC, a novel unsupervised framework that leverages these two views of knowledge jointly for canonicalizing OKBs without the need of manually annotated labels. To achieve this goal, we propose a multi-view CH K-Means clustering algorithm to mutually reinforce the clustering of view-specific embeddings learned from each view by considering their different clustering qualities. In order to further enhance the canonicalization performance, we propose a training data optimization strategy in terms of data quantity and data quality respectively in each particular view to refine the learned view-specific embeddings in an iterative manner. Additionally, we propose a Log-Jump algorithm to predict the optimal number of clusters in a data-driven way without requiring any labels. We demonstrate the superiority of our framework through extensive experiments on multiple real-world OKB data sets against state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 开放信息提取（OIE）方法从非结构化文本中提取大量的 OIE 三元组<名词短语、关系短语、名词短语>，这些三元组组成了大型开放知识库（OKB）。此类 OKB 中的名词短语和关系短语未规范化，导致事实分散、冗余。研究发现，两种知识视图（即基于事实三元组的事实视图和基于事实三元组的源上下文的上下文视图）提供了对于 OKB 规范化任务至关重要的互补信息，OKB 规范化将同义名词短语和关系短语聚集到同一组中，并为它们分配唯一的标识符。然而，迄今为止，这两种知识观都被现有的作品孤立地利用。在本文中，我们提出了 CMVC，这是一种新颖的无监督框架，它联合利用这两种知识视图来规范化 OKB，而无需手动注释标签。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种多视图 CH K-Means 聚类算法，通过考虑不同的聚类质量，相互加强从每个视图学习到的视图特定嵌入的聚类。为了进一步提高规范化性能，我们分别在每个特定视图中的数据数量和数据质量方面提出了训练数据优化策略，以迭代的方式细化学习到的特定于视图的嵌入。此外，我们提出了一种 Log-Jump 算法，以数据驱动的方式预测最佳簇数，而不需要任何标签。我们通过对多个现实世界的 OKB 数据集与最先进的方法进行广泛的实验，证明了我们的框架的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多视角聚类框架CMVC，用于开放知识库的规范化，通过结合事实和上下文视角的信息提升聚类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有开放知识库中的名词短语和关系短语缺乏规范性，导致事实分散冗余。现有方法仅单独利用事实或上下文视角，未能有效结合两者互补信息。
AI.method: 提出多视角CH K-Means聚类算法联合优化两个视角的嵌入表示，结合数据量与质量优化策略，并设计Log-Jump算法自动预测聚类数。
AI.result: 在多个真实开放知识库数据集上实验表明，CMVC在规范化效果上优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合利用事实与上下文视角信息并优化数据表示，所提框架能有效提升开放知识库规范化性能。

authors_text: Nikita Vladimirov,Ekaterina Brui,Anatoliy Levchuk,Vladimir Fokin,Aleksandr Efimtcev,David Bendahan
title: CNN-based fully automatic wrist cartilage volume quantification in MR Image
title_zh: MR 图像中基于 CNN 的全自动腕部软骨体积量化
abstract: Detection of cartilage loss is crucial for the diagnosis of osteo- and rheumatoid arthritis. A large number of automatic segmentation tools have been reported so far for cartilage assessment in magnetic resonance images of large joints. As compared to knee or hip, wrist cartilage has a more complex structure so that automatic tools developed for large joints are not expected to be operational for wrist cartilage segmentation. In that respect, a fully automatic wrist cartilage segmentation method would be of high clinical interest. We assessed the performance of four optimized variants of the U-Net architecture with truncation of its depth and addition of attention layers (U-Net_AL). The corresponding results were compared to those from a patch-based convolutional neural network (CNN) we previously designed. The segmentation quality was assessed on the basis of a comparative analysis with manual segmentation using several morphological (2D DSC, 3D DSC, precision) and a volumetric metrics. The four networks outperformed the patch-based CNN in terms of segmentation homogeneity and quality. The median 3D DSC value computed with the U-Net_AL (0.817) was significantly larger than the corresponding DSC values computed with the other networks. In addition, the U-Net_AL CNN provided the lowest mean volume error (17%) and the highest Pearson correlation coefficient (0.765) with respect to the ground truth. Of interest, the reproducibility computed from using U-Net_AL was larger than the reproducibility of the manual segmentation. U-net convolutional neural network with additional attention layers provides the best wrist cartilage segmentation performance. In order to be used in clinical conditions, the trained network can be fine-tuned on a dataset representing a group of specific patients. The error of cartilage volume measurement should be assessed independently using a non-MRI method.

A large number of automatic segmentation tools have been reported so far for cartilage assessment in magnetic resonance images of large joints. As compared to knee or hip, wrist cartilage has a more complex structure so that automatic tools developed for large joints are not expected to be operational for wrist cartilage segmentation. In that respect, a fully automatic wrist cartilage segmentation method would be of high clinical interest. We assessed the performance of four optimized variants of the U-Net architecture with truncation of its depth and addition of attention layers (U-Net_AL). The corresponding results were compared to those from a patch-based convolutional neural network (CNN) we previously designed. The segmentation quality was assessed on the basis of a comparative analysis with manual segmentation using several morphological (2D DSC, 3D DSC, precision) and a volumetric metrics. The four networks outperformed the patch-based CNN in terms of segmentation homogeneity and quality. The median 3D DSC value computed with the U-Net_AL (0.817) was significantly larger than the corresponding DSC values computed with the other networks. In addition, the U-Net_AL CNN provided the lowest mean volume error (17%) and the highest Pearson correlation coefficient (0.765) with respect to the ground truth. Of interest, the reproducibility computed from using U-Net_AL was larger than the reproducibility of the manual segmentation. U-net convolutional neural network with additional attention layers provides the best wrist cartilage segmentation performance. In order to be used in clinical conditions, the trained network can be fine-tuned on a dataset representing a group of specific patients. The error of cartilage volume measurement should be assessed independently using a non-MRI method.
abstract_zh: 软骨损失的检测对于骨关节炎和类风湿性关节炎的诊断至关重要。迄今为止，已经报道了大量用于大关节磁共振图像软骨评估的自动分割工具。与膝盖或臀部相比，腕部软骨具有更复杂的结构，因此为大关节开发的自动工具预计无法用于腕部软骨分割。在这方面，全自动腕部软骨分割方法将引起临床高度关注。我们评估了 U-Net 架构的四种优化变体的性能，其中截断了深度并添加了注意力层 (U-Net_AL)。相应的结果与我们之前设计的基于补丁的卷积神经网络（CNN）的结果进行了比较。使用多种形态学（2D DSC、3D DSC、精度）和体积指标，在与手动分割的比较分析的基础上评估分割质量。这四个网络在分割均匀性和质量方面优于基于补丁的 CNN。使用 U-Net_AL 计算的中位 3D DSC 值 (0.817) 明显大于使用其他网络计算的相应 DSC 值。此外，U-Net_AL CNN 相对于真实情况提供了最低的平均体积误差（17%）和最高的皮尔逊相关系数（0.765）。有趣的是，使用 U-Net_AL 计算的再现性大于手动分割的再现性。具有附加关注层的 U-net 卷积神经网络提供了最佳的腕部软骨分割性能。为了在临床条件下使用，训练后的网络可以在代表一组特定患者的数据集上进行微调。应使用非 MRI 方法独立评估软骨体积测量的误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的全自动手腕软骨体积量化方法，用于磁共振成像（MRI）中的软骨分割。
AI.motivation: 手腕软骨结构复杂，现有针对膝关节或髋关节的自动分割工具无法有效应用于手腕软骨，因此需要开发专门的分割方法以提高临床诊断效率。
AI.method: 评估了四种优化的U-Net架构变体（U-Net_AL），通过截断深度和添加注意力层，并与之前设计的基于补丁的CNN进行对比，使用形态学和体积指标评估分割质量。
AI.result: U-Net_AL在分割均匀性和质量上优于其他网络，3D DSC中位数达0.817，体积误差最低（17%），与真实值的皮尔逊相关系数最高（0.765），且其可重复性优于手动分割。
AI.conclusion: U-Net_AL在手腕软骨分割中表现最佳，临床应用前需针对特定患者数据集进行微调，并建议使用非MRI方法独立验证体积测量误差。
