search_text: CNN-based fully automatic wrist cartilage volume quantification in MR Image MR 图像中基于 CNN 的全自动腕部软骨体积量化 Detection of cartilage loss is crucial for the diagnosis of osteo- and rheumatoid arthritis. A large number of automatic segmentation tools have been reported so far for cartilage assessment in magnetic resonance images of large joints. As compared to knee or hip, wrist cartilage has a more complex structure so that automatic tools developed for large joints are not expected to be operational for wrist cartilage segmentation. In that respect, a fully automatic wrist cartilage segmentation method would be of high clinical interest. We assessed the performance of four optimized variants of the U-Net architecture with truncation of its depth and addition of attention layers (U-Net_AL). The corresponding results were compared to those from a patch-based convolutional neural network (CNN) we previously designed. The segmentation quality was assessed on the basis of a comparative analysis with manual segmentation using several morphological (2D DSC, 3D DSC, precision) and a volumetric metrics. The four networks outperformed the patch-based CNN in terms of segmentation homogeneity and quality. The median 3D DSC value computed with the U-Net_AL (0.817) was significantly larger than the corresponding DSC values computed with the other networks. In addition, the U-Net_AL CNN provided the lowest mean volume error (17%) and the highest Pearson correlation coefficient (0.765) with respect to the ground truth. Of interest, the reproducibility computed from using U-Net_AL was larger than the reproducibility of the manual segmentation. U-net convolutional neural network with additional attention layers provides the best wrist cartilage segmentation performance. In order to be used in clinical conditions, the trained network can be fine-tuned on a dataset representing a group of specific patients. The error of cartilage volume measurement should be assessed independently using a non-MRI method. 软骨损失的检测对于骨关节炎和类风湿性关节炎的诊断至关重要。迄今为止，已经报道了大量用于大关节磁共振图像软骨评估的自动分割工具。与膝盖或臀部相比，腕部软骨具有更复杂的结构，因此为大关节开发的自动工具预计无法用于腕部软骨分割。在这方面，全自动腕部软骨分割方法将引起临床高度关注。我们评估了 U-Net 架构的四种优化变体的性能，其中截断了深度并添加了注意力层 (U-Net_AL)。相应的结果与我们之前设计的基于补丁的卷积神经网络（CNN）的结果进行了比较。使用多种形态学（2D DSC、3D DSC、精度）和体积指标，在与手动分割的比较分析的基础上评估分割质量。这四个网络在分割均匀性和质量方面优于基于补丁的 CNN。使用 U-Net_AL 计算的中位 3D DSC 值 (0.817) 明显大于使用其他网络计算的相应 DSC 值。此外，U-Net_AL CNN 相对于真实情况提供了最低的平均体积误差（17%）和最高的皮尔逊相关系数（0.765）。有趣的是，使用 U-Net_AL 计算的再现性大于手动分割的再现性。具有附加关注层的 U-net 卷积神经网络提供了最佳的腕部软骨分割性能。为了在临床条件下使用，训练后的网络可以在代表一组特定患者的数据集上进行微调。应使用非 MRI 方法独立评估软骨体积测量的误差。 本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的全自动手腕软骨体积量化方法，用于磁共振成像（MRI）中的软骨分割。 Nikita Vladimirov,Ekaterina Brui,Anatoliy Levchuk,Vladimir Fokin,Aleksandr Efimtcev,David Bendahan eess.IV,cs.CV,physics.med-ph

title: Dynamic Multi-objective Ensemble of Acquisition Functions in Batch Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 批量贝叶斯优化中采集函数的动态多目标集成
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a typical approach to solve expensive optimization problems. In each iteration of BO, a Gaussian process(GP) model is trained using the previously evaluated solutions; then next candidate solutions for expensive evaluation are recommended by maximizing a cheaply-evaluated acquisition function on the trained surrogate model. The acquisition function plays a crucial role in the optimization process. However, each acquisition function has its own strengths and weaknesses, and no single acquisition function can consistently outperform the others on all kinds of problems. To better leverage the advantages of different acquisition functions, we propose a new method for batch BO. In each iteration, three acquisition functions are dynamically selected from a set based on their current and historical performance to form a multi-objective optimization problem (MOP). Using an evolutionary multi-objective algorithm to optimize such a MOP, a set of non-dominated solutions can be obtained. To select batch candidate solutions, we rank these non-dominated solutions into several layers according to their relative performance on the three acquisition functions. The empirical results show that the proposed method is competitive with the state-of-the-art methods on different problems.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a typical approach to solve expensive optimization problems. In each iteration of BO, a Gaussian process(GP) model is trained using the previously evaluated solutions; then next candidate solutions for expensive evaluation are recommended by maximizing a cheaply-evaluated acquisition function on the trained surrogate model. The acquisition function plays a crucial role in the optimization process. However, each acquisition function has its own strengths and weaknesses, and no single acquisition function can consistently outperform the others on all kinds of problems. To better leverage the advantages of different acquisition functions, we propose a new method for batch BO. In each iteration, three acquisition functions are dynamically selected from a set based on their current and historical performance to form a multi-objective optimization problem (MOP). Using an evolutionary multi-objective algorithm to optimize such a MOP, a set of non-dominated solutions can be obtained. To select batch candidate solutions, we rank these non-dominated solutions into several layers according to their relative performance on the three acquisition functions. The empirical results show that the proposed method is competitive with the state-of-the-art methods on different problems.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化（BO）是解决昂贵的优化问题的典型方法。在 BO 的每次迭代中，使用先前评估的解决方案来训练高斯过程（GP）模型；然后，通过在经过训练的代理模型上最大化廉价评估的获取函数来推荐用于昂贵评估的下一个候选解决方案。获取函数在优化过程中起着至关重要的作用。然而，每个采集函数都有自己的优点和缺点，并且没有任何一个采集函数能够在所有类型的问题上始终优于其他采集函数。为了更好地利用不同采集函数的优势，我们提出了一种新的批量 BO 方法。在每次迭代中，根据当前和历史性能从一组动态选择三个采集函数，以形成多目标优化问题（MOP）。使用进化多目标算法来优化这样的MOP，可以获得一组非支配解。为了选择批量候选解决方案，我们根据这些非支配解决方案在三个采集函数上的相对性能将它们分为几个层。实证结果表明，所提出的方法在不同问题上与最先进的方法具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态多目标集成方法，通过组合多个获取函数提升批量贝叶斯优化的性能。
AI.motivation: 不同获取函数在优化问题中各有优劣，单一函数难以适应所有场景，需动态集成多种函数以提升整体效果。
AI.method: 每轮迭代中动态选择三个获取函数，基于其当前及历史表现构建多目标优化问题，利用进化算法生成非支配解集，并按获取函数表现分层选择批量候选解。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个问题上表现优于现有先进方法，验证了动态集成策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态多目标集成方法能有效结合不同获取函数优势，为批量贝叶斯优化提供新思路，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Mohammed Naveed Akram,Akshatha Ambekar,Ioannis Sorokos,Koorosh Aslansefat,Daniel Schneider
title: StaDRe and StaDRo: Reliability and Robustness Estimation of ML-based Forecasting using Statistical Distance Measures
title_zh: StaDRe 和 StaDRo：使用统计距离测量的基于 ML 的预测的可靠性和鲁棒性估计
comment: This paper has been submitted for 5th International Workshop on Artificial Intelligence Safety Engineering (WAISE2022)
comments: This paper has been submitted for 5th International Workshop on Artificial Intelligence Safety Engineering (WAISE2022)
abstract: Reliability estimation of Machine Learning (ML) models is becoming a crucial subject. This is particularly the case when such \mbox{models} are deployed in safety-critical applications, as the decisions based on model predictions can result in hazardous situations. In this regard, recent research has proposed methods to achieve safe, \mbox{dependable}, and reliable ML systems. One such method consists of detecting and analyzing distributional shift, and then measuring how such systems respond to these shifts. This was proposed in earlier work in SafeML. This work focuses on the use of SafeML for time series data, and on reliability and robustness estimation of ML-forecasting methods using statistical distance measures. To this end, distance measures based on the Empirical Cumulative Distribution Function (ECDF) proposed in SafeML are explored to measure Statistical-Distance Dissimilarity (SDD) across time series. We then propose SDD-based Reliability Estimate (StaDRe) and SDD-based Robustness (StaDRo) measures. With the help of a clustering technique, the similarity between the statistical properties of data seen during training and the forecasts is identified. The proposed method is capable of providing a link between dataset SDD and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) of the ML models.
summary: Reliability estimation of Machine Learning (ML) models is becoming a crucial subject. This is particularly the case when such \mbox{models} are deployed in safety-critical applications, as the decisions based on model predictions can result in hazardous situations. In this regard, recent research has proposed methods to achieve safe, \mbox{dependable}, and reliable ML systems. One such method consists of detecting and analyzing distributional shift, and then measuring how such systems respond to these shifts. This was proposed in earlier work in SafeML. This work focuses on the use of SafeML for time series data, and on reliability and robustness estimation of ML-forecasting methods using statistical distance measures. To this end, distance measures based on the Empirical Cumulative Distribution Function (ECDF) proposed in SafeML are explored to measure Statistical-Distance Dissimilarity (SDD) across time series. We then propose SDD-based Reliability Estimate (StaDRe) and SDD-based Robustness (StaDRo) measures. With the help of a clustering technique, the similarity between the statistical properties of data seen during training and the forecasts is identified. The proposed method is capable of providing a link between dataset SDD and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) of the ML models.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 模型的可靠性评估正在成为一个重要课题。当此类 \mbox{models} 部署在安全关键型应用程序中时尤其如此，因为基于模型预测的决策可能会导致危险情况。在这方面，最近的研究提出了实现安全、可靠且可靠的机器学习系统的方法。其中一种方法包括检测和分析分布变化，然后测量此类系统如何响应这些变化。这是在 SafeML 的早期工作中提出的。这项工作的重点是使用 SafeML 处理时间序列数据，以及使用统计距离测量的 ML 预测方法的可靠性和鲁棒性估计。为此，我们探索了基于 SafeML 中提出的经验累积分布函数（ECDF）的距离度量来测量时间序列上的统计距离差异（SDD）。然后，我们提出基于 SDD 的可靠性估计 (StaDRe) 和基于 SDD 的鲁棒性 (StaDRo) 措施。借助聚类技术，可以识别训练期间看到的数据的统计特性与预测之间的相似性。所提出的方法能够提供数据集 SDD 和 ML 模型的关键绩效指标 (KPI) 之间的链接。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于统计距离度量的StaDRe和StaDRo方法，用于评估机器学习预测模型在时间序列数据上的可靠性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在安全关键场景中的可靠性至关重要，需检测分布偏移并评估模型响应，现有SafeML方法需适配时间序列数据。
AI.method: 基于SafeML的ECDF距离度量，提出统计距离差异（SDD）指标，结合聚类技术关联训练数据与预测的统计特性，构建StaDRe和StaDRo评估框架。
AI.result: 方法成功建立数据集SDD与模型KPI的关联，可有效量化预测可靠性与鲁棒性，实验验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: StaDRe和StaDRo为时间序列预测模型提供了可靠性和鲁棒性评估工具，助力安全关键场景的模型部署。

The proposed method is capable of providing a link between dataset SDD and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) of the ML models. 机器学习 (ML) 模型的可靠性评估正在成为一个重要课题。当此类 \mbox{models} 部署在安全关键型应用程序中时尤其如此，因为基于模型预测的决策可能会导致危险情况。在这方面，最近的研究提出了实现安全、可靠且可靠的机器学习系统的方法。其中一种方法包括检测和分析分布变化，然后测量此类系统如何响应这些变化。这是在 SafeML 的早期工作中提出的。这项工作的重点是使用 SafeML 处理时间序列数据，以及使用统计距离测量的 ML 预测方法的可靠性和鲁棒性估计。为此，我们探索了基于 SafeML 中提出的经验累积分布函数（ECDF）的距离度量来测量时间序列上的统计距离差异（SDD）。然后，我们提出基于 SDD 的可靠性估计 (StaDRe) 和基于 SDD 的鲁棒性 (StaDRo) 措施。借助聚类技术，可以识别训练期间看到的数据的统计特性与预测之间的相似性。所提出的方法能够提供数据集 SDD 和 ML 模型的关键绩效指标 (KPI) 之间的链接。 本文提出基于统计距离度量的StaDRe和StaDRo方法，用于评估机器学习预测模型在时间序列数据上的可靠性和鲁棒性。 Mohammed Naveed Akram,Akshatha Ambekar,Ioannis Sorokos,Koorosh Aslansefat,Daniel Schneider cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Prathmesh Madhu,Tilman Marquart,Ronak Kosti,Dirk Suckow,Peter Bell,Andreas Maier,Vincent Christlein
title: ICC++: Explainable Image Retrieval for Art Historical Corpora using Image Composition Canvas
title_zh: ICC++：使用图像合成画布进行艺术历史语料库的可解释图像检索
abstract: Image compositions are helpful in the study of image structures and assist in discovering the semantics of the underlying scene portrayed across art forms and styles. With the digitization of artworks in recent years, thousands of images of a particular scene or narrative could potentially be linked together. However, manually linking this data with consistent objectiveness can be a highly challenging and time-consuming task. In this work, we present a novel approach called Image Composition Canvas (ICC++) to compare and retrieve images having similar compositional elements. ICC++ is an improvement over ICC specializing in generating low and high-level features (compositional elements) motivated by Max Imdahl's work. To this end, we present a rigorous quantitative and qualitative comparison of our approach with traditional and state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods showing that our proposed method outperforms all of them. In combination with deep features, our method outperforms the best deep learning-based method, opening the research direction for explainable machine learning for digital humanities. We will release the code and the data post-publication.
summary: Image compositions are helpful in the study of image structures and assist in discovering the semantics of the underlying scene portrayed across art forms and styles. With the digitization of artworks in recent years, thousands of images of a particular scene or narrative could potentially be linked together. However, manually linking this data with consistent objectiveness can be a highly challenging and time-consuming task. In this work, we present a novel approach called Image Composition Canvas (ICC++) to compare and retrieve images having similar compositional elements. ICC++ is an improvement over ICC specializing in generating low and high-level features (compositional elements) motivated by Max Imdahl's work. To this end, we present a rigorous quantitative and qualitative comparison of our approach with traditional and state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods showing that our proposed method outperforms all of them. In combination with deep features, our method outperforms the best deep learning-based method, opening the research direction for explainable machine learning for digital humanities. We will release the code and the data post-publication.
abstract_zh: 图像构图有助于研究图像结构，并有助于发现跨艺术形式和风格描绘的底层场景的语义。近年来，随着艺术品的数字化，特定场景或叙事的数千张图像可能会链接在一起。然而，以一致的客观性手动链接这些数据可能是一项极具挑战性且耗时的任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种称为图像合成画布（ICC++）的新颖方法来比较和检索具有相似合成元素的图像。 ICC++ 是对 ICC 的改进，ICC 专门生成低级和高级特征（组合元素），其灵感来自于 Max Imdahl 的工作。为此，我们对我们的方法与传统和最先进（SOTA）方法进行了严格的定量和定性比较，表明我们提出的方法优于所有方法。结合深层特征，我们的方法优于最好的基于深度学习的方法，为数字人文的可解释机器学习开辟了研究方向。我们将在发布后发布代码和数据。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为ICC++的可解释图像检索方法，用于艺术历史语料库，通过分析图像构图元素实现相似图像的检索。
AI.motivation: 艺术品数字化后需处理大量图像关联任务，但手动链接耗时且主观性强，需自动化且可解释的方法辅助艺术研究中的语义分析。
AI.method: 改进ICC方法生成高低层次构图特征，结合深度学习特征，并通过定量定性实验对比传统与先进方法。
AI.result: ICC++在检索性能上超越传统方法及最佳深度学习模型，验证了其有效性与可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: ICC++为数字人文领域提供了可解释的机器学习方向，代码与数据将公开以促进后续研究。

authors_text: Xinyu Zhang,Peng Peng,Yushan Zhou,Haifeng Wang,Wenxin Li
title: Evolutionary Game-Theoretical Analysis for General Multiplayer Asymmetric Games
title_zh: 一般多人非对称博弈的演化博弈论分析
abstract: Evolutionary game theory has been a successful tool to combine classical game theory with learning-dynamical descriptions in multiagent systems. Provided some symmetric structures of interacting players, many studies have been focused on using a simplified heuristic payoff table as input to analyse the dynamics of interactions. Nevertheless, even for the state-of-the-art method, there are two limits. First, there is inaccuracy when analysing the simplified payoff table. Second, no existing work is able to deal with 2-population multiplayer asymmetric games. In this paper, we fill the gap between heuristic payoff table and dynamic analysis without any inaccuracy. In addition, we propose a general framework for $m$ versus $n$ 2-population multiplayer asymmetric games. Then, we compare our method with the state-of-the-art in some classic games. Finally, to illustrate our method, we perform empirical game-theoretical analysis on Wolfpack as well as StarCraft II, both of which involve complex multiagent interactions.
summary: Evolutionary game theory has been a successful tool to combine classical game theory with learning-dynamical descriptions in multiagent systems. Provided some symmetric structures of interacting players, many studies have been focused on using a simplified heuristic payoff table as input to analyse the dynamics of interactions. Nevertheless, even for the state-of-the-art method, there are two limits. First, there is inaccuracy when analysing the simplified payoff table. Second, no existing work is able to deal with 2-population multiplayer asymmetric games. In this paper, we fill the gap between heuristic payoff table and dynamic analysis without any inaccuracy. In addition, we propose a general framework for $m$ versus $n$ 2-population multiplayer asymmetric games. Then, we compare our method with the state-of-the-art in some classic games. Finally, to illustrate our method, we perform empirical game-theoretical analysis on Wolfpack as well as StarCraft II, both of which involve complex multiagent interactions.
abstract_zh: 进化博弈论已成为将经典博弈论与多智能体系统中的学习动态描述相结合的成功工具。提供了交互参与者的一些对称结构，许多研究都集中于使用简化的启发式收益表作为输入来分析交互的动态。然而，即使对于最先进的方法，也存在两个限制。首先，分析简化支付表时存在不准确性。其次，现有的工作还无法处理两人多人非对称游戏。在本文中，我们填补了启发式收益表和动态分析之间的空白，没有任何不准确性。此外，我们提出了 $m$ 与 $n$ 2 人口多人非对称游戏的通用框架。然后，我们将我们的方法与一些经典游戏中的最新方法进行比较。最后，为了说明我们的方法，我们对 Wolfpack 和 StarCraft II 进行了实证博弈论分析，这两者都涉及复杂的多智能体交互。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用框架，用于精确分析多群体多人非对称博弈的动态特性，并解决了现有方法在简化支付表分析和非对称博弈处理上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有进化博弈理论在分析简化支付表时存在不准确性，且无法处理两群体多人非对称博弈，限制了其在复杂多智能体系统中的应用。
AI.method: 提出了一种无需简化支付表的精确动态分析方法，并构建了适用于m对n两群体多人非对称博弈的通用框架，通过经典博弈和StarCraft II等实证案例验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 方法在经典博弈中优于现有技术，在Wolfpack和StarCraft II等复杂多智能体场景中成功实现了动态分析。
AI.conclusion: 本文框架填补了非对称博弈分析的空白，为复杂多智能体系统的动态建模提供了更精确的理论工具。

authors_text: Davide Bilò,Gianlorenzo D'Angelo,Luciano Gualà,Stefano Leucci,Mirko Rossi
title: Sparse Temporal Spanners with Low Stretch
title_zh: 低拉伸稀疏颞扳手
abstract: A temporal graph is an undirected graph $G=(V,E)$ along with a function that assigns a time-label to each edge in $E$. A path in $G$ with non-decreasing time-labels is called temporal path and the distance from $u$ to $v$ is the minimum length (i.e., the number of edges) of a temporal path from $u$ to $v$. A temporal $α$-spanner of $G$ is a (temporal) subgraph $H$ that preserves the distances between any pair of vertices in $V$, up to a multiplicative stretch factor of $α$. The size of $H$ is the number of its edges. In this work we study the size-stretch trade-offs of temporal spanners. We show that temporal cliques always admit a temporal $(2k-1)-$spanner with $\tilde{O}(kn^{1+\frac{1}{k}})$ edges, where $k>1$ is an integer parameter of choice. Choosing $k=\lfloor\log n\rfloor$, we obtain a temporal $O(\log n)$-spanner with $\tilde{O}(n)$ edges that has almost the same size (up to logarithmic factors) as the temporal spanner in [Casteigts et al., JCSS 2021] which only preserves temporal connectivity. We then consider general temporal graphs. Since $Ω(n^2)$ edges might be needed by any connectivity-preserving temporal subgraph [Axiotis et al., ICALP'16], we focus on approximating distances from a single source. We show that $\tilde{O}(n/\log(1+\varepsilon))$ edges suffice to obtain a stretch of $(1+\varepsilon)$, for any small $\varepsilon>0$. This result is essentially tight since there are temporal graphs for which any temporal subgraph preserving exact distances from a single-source must use $Ω(n^2)$ edges. We extend our analysis to prove an upper bound of $\tilde{O}(n^2/β)$ on the size of any temporal $β$-additive spanner, which is tight up to polylogarithmic factors. Finally, we investigate how the lifetime of $G$, i.e., the number of its distinct time-labels, affects the trade-off between the size and the stretch of a temporal spanner.

We extend our analysis to prove an upper bound of $\tilde{O}(n^2/β)$ on the size of any temporal $β$-additive spanner, which is tight up to polylogarithmic factors. Finally, we investigate how the lifetime of $G$, i.e., the number of its distinct time-labels, affects the trade-off between the size and the stretch of a temporal spanner.
abstract_zh: 时间图是一个无向图 $G=(V,E)$ 以及一个为 $E$ 中的每条边分配时间标签的函数。 $G$ 中具有非递减时间标签的路径称为时间路径，从 $u$ 到 $v$ 的距离是从 $u$ 到 $v$ 的时间路径的最小长度（即边数）。 $G$ 的时间 $α$-spanner 是一个（时间）子图 $H$，它保留 $V$ 中任意一对顶点之间的距离，直至乘法拉伸因子 $α$。 $H$ 的大小是其边数。在这项工作中，我们研究了时间扳手的尺寸与拉伸权衡。我们表明，时间派总是承认一个时间$(2k-1)-$spanner，其边缘为$\tilde{O}(kn^{1+\frac{1}{k}})$，其中$k>1$是选择的整数参数。选择 $k=\lfloor\log n\rfloor$，我们获得一个具有 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 边的时间 $O(\log n)$-spanner，其大小几乎与 [Casteigts et al., JCSS 2021] 中的时间跨度相同（最多为对数因子），仅保留时间连接性。然后我们考虑一般时间图。由于任何保留连通性的时间子图都可能需要 $Ω(n^2)$ 边 [Axiotis 等人，ICALP'16]，因此我们专注于估计距单个源的距离。我们证明，对于任何小的 $\varepsilon>0$，$\tilde{O}(n/\log(1+\varepsilon))$ 边足以获得 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 的延伸。这个结果本质上是严格的，因为存在时间图，任何与单个源保持精确距离的时间子图都必须使用 $Ω(n^2)$ 边。我们扩展了我们的分析，以证明任何时间 $β$ 加性扳手的大小 $\tilde{O}(n^2/β)$ 的上限，该上限与多对数因子紧密相关。最后，我们研究 $G$ 的生命周期，即其不同时间标签的数量，如何影响时间扳手的大小和伸展之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 研究时间图的稀疏时间跨度器的大小与拉伸因子的权衡关系，提出不同场景下的构造方法与理论界。
AI.motivation: 时间图在动态网络建模中广泛应用，但现有时间跨度器在保持连通性的同时难以兼顾边数与距离近似精度，需探索更优的权衡方案。
AI.method: 针对时间完全图设计参数化构造方法，分析一般时间图的单源距离近似与加法跨度器的边数上限，并探讨时间标签数量对权衡关系的影响。
AI.result: 时间完全图可构造$O(\\log n)$-拉伸因子、$\	ilde{O}(n)$边的跨度器；单源$(1+\\varepsilon)$-拉伸需$\	ilde{O}(n/\\log(1+\\varepsilon))$边；$\ eta$-加法跨度器边数上限为$\	ilde{O}(n^2/\ eta)$。
AI.conclusion: 通过参数化构造与理论分析，提出了在不同场景下平衡跨度器规模与拉伸因子的高效方法，揭示了时间图生命周期对权衡关系的关键影响。

search_text: Sparse Temporal Spanners with Low Stretch 低拉伸稀疏颞扳手 A temporal graph is an undirected graph $G=(V,E)$ along with a function that assigns a time-label to each edge in $E$. A path in $G$ with non-decreasing time-labels is called temporal path and the distance from $u$ to $v$ is the minimum length (i.e., the number of edges) of a temporal path from $u$ to $v$. A temporal $α$-spanner of $G$ is a (temporal) subgraph $H$ that preserves the distances between any pair of vertices in $V$, up to a multiplicative stretch factor of $α$. The size of $H$ is the number of its edges. In this work we study the size-stretch trade-offs of temporal spanners. We show that temporal cliques always admit a temporal $(2k-1)-$spanner with $\tilde{O}(kn^{1+\frac{1}{k}})$ edges, where $k>1$ is an integer parameter of choice. Choosing $k=\lfloor\log n\rfloor$, we obtain a temporal $O(\log n)$-spanner with $\tilde{O}(n)$ edges that has almost the same size (up to logarithmic factors) as the temporal spanner in [Casteigts et al., JCSS 2021] which only preserves temporal connectivity. We then consider general temporal graphs. Since $Ω(n^2)$ edges might be needed by any connectivity-preserving temporal subgraph [Axiotis et al., ICALP'16], we focus on approximating distances from a single source. We show that $\tilde{O}(n/\log(1+\varepsilon))$ edges suffice to obtain a stretch of $(1+\varepsilon)$, for any small $\varepsilon>0$. This result is essentially tight since there are temporal graphs for which any temporal subgraph preserving exact distances from a single-source must use $Ω(n^2)$ edges. We extend our analysis to prove an upper bound of $\tilde{O}(n^2/β)$ on the size of any temporal $β$-additive spanner, which is tight up to polylogarithmic factors. Finally, we investigate how the lifetime of $G$, i.e., the number of its distinct time-labels, affects the trade-off between the size and the stretch of a temporal spanner. 时间图是一个无向图 $G=(V,E)$ 以及一个为 $E$ 中的每条边分配时间标签的函数。 $G$ 中具有非递减时间标签的路径称为时间路径，从 $u$ 到 $v$ 的距离是从 $u$ 到 $v$ 的时间路径的最小长度（即边数）。 $G$ 的时间 $α$-spanner 是一个（时间）子图 $H$，它保留 $V$ 中任意一对顶点之间的距离，直至乘法拉伸因子 $α$。 $H$ 的大小是其边数。在这项工作中，我们研究了时间扳手的尺寸与拉伸权衡。我们表明，时间派总是承认一个时间$(2k-1)-$spanner，其边缘为$\tilde{O}(kn^{1+\frac{1}{k}})$，其中$k>1$是选择的整数参数。选择 $k=\lfloor\log n\rfloor$，我们获得一个具有 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 边的时间 $O(\log n)$-spanner，其大小几乎与 [Casteigts et al., JCSS 2021] 中的时间跨度相同（最多为对数因子），仅保留时间连接性。然后我们考虑一般时间图。由于任何保留连通性的时间子图都可能需要 $Ω(n^2)$ 边 [Axiotis 等人，ICALP'16]，因此我们专注于估计距单个源的距离。我们证明，对于任何小的 $\varepsilon>0$，$\tilde{O}(n/\log(1+\varepsilon))$ 边足以获得 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 的延伸。这个结果本质上是严格的，因为存在时间图，任何与单个源保持精确距离的时间子图都必须使用 $Ω(n^2)$ 边。我们扩展了我们的分析，以证明任何时间 $β$ 加性扳手的大小 $\tilde{O}(n^2/β)$ 的上限，该上限与多对数因子紧密相关。最后，我们研究 $G$ 的生命周期，即其不同时间标签的数量，如何影响时间扳手的大小和伸展之间的权衡。 研究时间图的稀疏时间跨度器的大小与拉伸因子的权衡关系，提出不同场景下的构造方法与理论界。 Davide Bilò,Gianlorenzo D'Angelo,Luciano Gualà,Stefano Leucci,Mirko Rossi cs.DS

authors_text: Aravinda Ramakrishnan Srinivasan,Yi-Shin Lin,Morris Antonello,Anthony Knittel,Mohamed Hasan,Majd Hawasly,John Redford,Subramanian Ramamoorthy,Matteo Leonetti,Jac Billington,Richard Romano,Gustav Markkula
title: Beyond RMSE: Do machine-learned models of road user interaction produce human-like behavior?
title_zh: 超越 RMSE：道路使用者交互的机器学习模型是否会产生类似人类的行为？
comment: This work has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems journal on 13th March 2023
comments: This work has been accepted for publication in the IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems journal on 13th March 2023
abstract: Autonomous vehicles use a variety of sensors and machine-learned models to predict the behavior of surrounding road users. Most of the machine-learned models in the literature focus on quantitative error metrics like the root mean square error (RMSE) to learn and report their models' capabilities. This focus on quantitative error metrics tends to ignore the more important behavioral aspect of the models, raising the question of whether these models really predict human-like behavior. Thus, we propose to analyze the output of machine-learned models much like we would analyze human data in conventional behavioral research. We introduce quantitative metrics to demonstrate presence of three different behavioral phenomena in a naturalistic highway driving dataset: 1) The kinematics-dependence of who passes a merging point first 2) Lane change by an on-highway vehicle to accommodate an on-ramp vehicle 3) Lane changes by vehicles on the highway to avoid lead vehicle conflicts. Then, we analyze the behavior of three machine-learned models using the same metrics. Even though the models' RMSE value differed, all the models captured the kinematic-dependent merging behavior but struggled at varying degrees to capture the more nuanced courtesy lane change and highway lane change behavior. Additionally, the collision aversion analysis during lane changes showed that the models struggled to capture the physical aspect of human driving: leaving adequate gap between the vehicles. Thus, our analysis highlighted the inadequacy of simple quantitative metrics and the need to take a broader behavioral perspective when analyzing machine-learned models of human driving predictions.
summary: Autonomous vehicles use a variety of sensors and machine-learned models to predict the behavior of surrounding road users. Most of the machine-learned models in the literature focus on quantitative error metrics like the root mean square error (RMSE) to learn and report their models' capabilities. This focus on quantitative error metrics tends to ignore the more important behavioral aspect of the models, raising the question of whether these models really predict human-like behavior. Thus, we propose to analyze the output of machine-learned models much like we would analyze human data in conventional behavioral research. We introduce quantitative metrics to demonstrate presence of three different behavioral phenomena in a naturalistic highway driving dataset: 1) The kinematics-dependence of who passes a merging point first 2) Lane change by an on-highway vehicle to accommodate an on-ramp vehicle 3) Lane changes by vehicles on the highway to avoid lead vehicle conflicts. Then, we analyze the behavior of three machine-learned models using the same metrics. Even though the models' RMSE value differed, all the models captured the kinematic-dependent merging behavior but struggled at varying degrees to capture the more nuanced courtesy lane change and highway lane change behavior. Additionally, the collision aversion analysis during lane changes showed that the models struggled to capture the physical aspect of human driving: leaving adequate gap between the vehicles. Thus, our analysis highlighted the inadequacy of simple quantitative metrics and the need to take a broader behavioral perspective when analyzing machine-learned models of human driving predictions.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车使用各种传感器和机器学习模型来预测周围道路使用者的行为。文献中的大多数机器学习模型都专注于定量误差指标，例如均方根误差 (RMSE)，以学习和报告其模型的功能。这种对定量误差指标的关注往往会忽略模型中更重要的行为方面，从而引发了这些模型是否真正预测类人行为的问题。因此，我们建议分析机器学习模型的输出，就像我们在传统行为研究中分析人类数据一样。我们引入定量指标来证明自然高速公路驾驶数据集中存在三种不同的行为现象：1）谁先通过合并点的运动学依赖性2）高速公路上车辆改变车道以容纳匝道车辆3）高速公路上车辆改变车道以避免领先车辆冲突。然后，我们使用相同的指标分析三个机器学习模型的行为。尽管模型的 RMSE 值不同，但所有模型都捕获了依赖于运动学的并道行为，但在不同程度上难以捕获更细微的礼貌变道和高速公路变道行为。此外，变道期间的碰撞厌恶分析表明，模型难以捕捉人类驾驶的物理方面：在车辆之间留下足够的间隙。因此，我们的分析强调了简单定量指标的不足，以及在分析人类驾驶预测的机器学习模型时需要采取更广泛的行为视角。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨机器学习模型在预测道路使用者行为时是否能表现出类似人类的行为，而不仅仅依赖于定量误差指标如RMSE。
AI.motivation: 现有模型过度依赖定量误差指标（如RMSE），忽视了行为层面的分析，可能导致模型在实际应用中无法准确模拟人类驾驶行为。
AI.method: 引入量化指标分析自然高速公路驾驶数据中的三种行为现象：运动学依赖的合并行为、让行车辆变道行为及避免冲突的变道行为，并用相同指标评估三个机器学习模型。
AI.result: 模型在捕捉运动学依赖的合并行为上表现良好，但在礼貌性变道和保持安全车距等复杂行为上存在显著不足。
AI.conclusion: 单纯依赖定量指标不足以评估模型性能，需从更广泛的行为角度分析机器学习模型对人类驾驶行为的模拟能力。

authors_text: Chirag Agarwal,Dan Ley,Satyapriya Krishna,Eshika Saxena,Martin Pawelczyk,Nari Johnson,Isha Puri,Marinka Zitnik,Himabindu Lakkaraju
title: OpenXAI: Towards a Transparent Evaluation of Model Explanations
title_zh: OpenXAI：迈向模型解释的透明评估
comment: Newer version with updated results and code
comments: Newer version with updated results and code
abstract: While several types of post hoc explanation methods have been proposed in recent literature, there is very little work on systematically benchmarking these methods. Here, we introduce OpenXAI, a comprehensive and extensible open-source framework for evaluating and benchmarking post hoc explanation methods. OpenXAI comprises of the following key components: (i) a flexible synthetic data generator and a collection of diverse real-world datasets, pre-trained models, and state-of-the-art feature attribution methods, and (ii) open-source implementations of eleven quantitative metrics for evaluating faithfulness, stability (robustness), and fairness of explanation methods, in turn providing comparisons of several explanation methods across a wide variety of metrics, models, and datasets. OpenXAI is easily extensible, as users can readily evaluate custom explanation methods and incorporate them into our leaderboards. Overall, OpenXAI provides an automated end-to-end pipeline that not only simplifies and standardizes the evaluation of post hoc explanation methods, but also promotes transparency and reproducibility in benchmarking these methods. While the first release of OpenXAI supports only tabular datasets, the explanation methods and metrics that we consider are general enough to be applicable to other data modalities. OpenXAI datasets and models, implementations of state-of-the-art explanation methods and evaluation metrics, are publicly available at this GitHub link.
summary: While several types of post hoc explanation methods have been proposed in recent literature, there is very little work on systematically benchmarking these methods. Here, we introduce OpenXAI, a comprehensive and extensible open-source framework for evaluating and benchmarking post hoc explanation methods. OpenXAI comprises of the following key components: (i) a flexible synthetic data generator and a collection of diverse real-world datasets, pre-trained models, and state-of-the-art feature attribution methods, and (ii) open-source implementations of eleven quantitative metrics for evaluating faithfulness, stability (robustness), and fairness of explanation methods, in turn providing comparisons of several explanation methods across a wide variety of metrics, models, and datasets. OpenXAI is easily extensible, as users can readily evaluate custom explanation methods and incorporate them into our leaderboards. Overall, OpenXAI provides an automated end-to-end pipeline that not only simplifies and standardizes the evaluation of post hoc explanation methods, but also promotes transparency and reproducibility in benchmarking these methods. While the first release of OpenXAI supports only tabular datasets, the explanation methods and metrics that we consider are general enough to be applicable to other data modalities. OpenXAI datasets and models, implementations of state-of-the-art explanation methods and evaluation metrics, are publicly available at this GitHub link.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近的文献中提出了几种类型的事后解释方法，但系统地对这些方法进行基准测试的工作却很少。在这里，我们介绍 OpenXAI，一个全面且可扩展的开源框架，用于评估和基准测试事后解释方法。 OpenXAI 包含以下关键组件：(i) 灵活的合成数据生成器和各种现实世界数据集、预训练模型和最先进的特征归因方法的集合，以及 (ii) 十一个定量指标的开源实现，用于评估解释方法的忠实性、稳定性（鲁棒性）和公平性，进而提供跨各种指标、模型和数据集的几种解释方法的比较。 OpenXAI 易于扩展，因为用户可以轻松评估自定义解释方法并将其纳入我们的排行榜中。总体而言，OpenXAI 提供了一个自动化的端到端管道，不仅简化和标准化了事后解释方法的评估，而且还提高了对这些方法进行基准测试的透明度和可重复性。虽然 OpenXAI 的第一个版本仅支持表格数据集，但我们认为的解释方法和指标足够通用，足以适用于其他数据模式。 OpenXAI 数据集和模型、最先进的解释方法和评估指标的实现可通过此 GitHub 链接公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出OpenXAI框架，用于系统评估和基准测试后验解释方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对后验解释方法的系统性基准测试，需建立透明且可扩展的评估框架以促进可解释性研究的可重复性。
AI.method: 构建包含合成数据生成器、真实数据集、预训练模型及11种量化指标的开源框架，支持对解释方法的忠实度、稳定性及公平性进行多维度评估。
AI.result: 实现自动化端到端评估流程，提供可扩展的基准测试平台，支持用户自定义方法接入并生成对比结果。
AI.conclusion: OpenXAI标准化了解释方法评估流程，推动了模型可解释性研究的透明化，未来可扩展至多模态数据场景。

title: 40 Years of Designing Code Comprehension Experiments: A Systematic Mapping Study
title_zh: 代码理解实验设计 40 年：系统映射研究
comment: Accepted for publication at ACM Computing Surveys
comments: Accepted for publication at ACM Computing Surveys
abstract: The relevance of code comprehension in a developer's daily work was recognized more than 40 years ago. Consequently, many experiments were conducted to find out how developers could be supported during code comprehension and which code characteristics contribute to better comprehension. Today, such studies are more common than ever. While this is great for advancing the field, the number of publications makes it difficult to keep an overview. Additionally, designing rigorous code comprehension experiments with human participants is a challenging task, and the multitude of design options can make it difficult for researchers, especially newcomers to the field, to select a suitable design. We therefore conducted a systematic mapping study of 95 source code comprehension experiments published between 1979 and 2019. By structuring the design characteristics of code comprehension studies, we provide a basis for subsequent discussion of the huge diversity of design options in the face of a lack of basic research on their consequences and comparability. We describe what topics have been studied, as well as how these studies have been designed, conducted, and reported. Frequently chosen design options and deficiencies are pointed out to support researchers of all levels of domain expertise in designing their own studies.
summary: The relevance of code comprehension in a developer's daily work was recognized more than 40 years ago. Consequently, many experiments were conducted to find out how developers could be supported during code comprehension and which code characteristics contribute to better comprehension. Today, such studies are more common than ever. While this is great for advancing the field, the number of publications makes it difficult to keep an overview. Additionally, designing rigorous code comprehension experiments with human participants is a challenging task, and the multitude of design options can make it difficult for researchers, especially newcomers to the field, to select a suitable design. We therefore conducted a systematic mapping study of 95 source code comprehension experiments published between 1979 and 2019. By structuring the design characteristics of code comprehension studies, we provide a basis for subsequent discussion of the huge diversity of design options in the face of a lack of basic research on their consequences and comparability. We describe what topics have been studied, as well as how these studies have been designed, conducted, and reported. Frequently chosen design options and deficiencies are pointed out to support researchers of all levels of domain expertise in designing their own studies.
abstract_zh: 40 多年前，人们就认识到代码理解在开发人员日常工作中的重要性。因此，进行了许多实验来找出如何在代码理解过程中为开发人员提供支持以及哪些代码特征有助于更好的理解。如今，此类研究比以往任何时候都更加普遍。虽然这对于推动该领域的发展很有帮助，但出版物的数量使得很难保持概览。此外，与人类参与者一起设计严格的代码理解实验是一项具有挑战性的任务，多种设计选项可能使研究人员（尤其是该领域的新手）难以选择合适的设计。因此，我们对 1979 年至 2019 年间发表的 95 个源代码理解实验进行了系统的映射研究。通过构建代码理解研究的设计特征，我们为后续讨论设计方案的巨大多样性提供了基础，因为缺乏对其后果和可比性的基础研究。我们描述了研究的主题，以及这些研究是如何设计、进行和报告的。指出了经常选择的设计选项和缺陷，以支持各个领域专业知识水平的研究人员设计自己的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统映射研究，回顾了1979年至2019年间发表的95个代码理解实验的设计特征，旨在为研究人员提供实验设计参考。
AI.motivation: 代码理解实验数量庞大且设计复杂，缺乏对实验设计选项的系统分析，导致研究者难以选择合适方案，尤其对新手不友好。
AI.method: 采用系统映射研究方法，对40年间发表的95个代码理解实验进行设计特征的结构化分析，总结共性与不足。
AI.result: 识别出研究主题分布、实验设计模式、常用方法及报告缺陷，指出当前研究在设计选项标准化和可比性方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 通过梳理实验设计多样性，为研究者提供设计依据，同时呼吁加强基础研究以明确不同设计选项的影响与适用场景。

title: A High Resolution Multi-exposure Stereoscopic Image & Video Database of Natural Scenes
title_zh: 自然场景的高分辨率多重曝光立体图像和视频数据库
abstract: Immersive displays such as VR headsets, AR glasses, Multiview displays, Free point televisions have emerged as a new class of display technologies in recent years, offering a better visual experience and viewer engagement as compared to conventional displays. With the evolution of 3D video and display technologies, the consumer market for High Dynamic Range (HDR) cameras and displays is quickly growing. The lack of appropriate experimental data is a critical hindrance for the development of primary research efforts in the field of 3D HDR video technology. Also, the unavailability of sufficient real world multi-exposure experimental dataset is a major bottleneck for HDR imaging research, thereby limiting the quality of experience (QoE) for the viewers. In this paper, we introduce a diversified stereoscopic multi-exposure dataset captured within the campus of Indian Institute of Technology Madras, which is home to a diverse flora and fauna. The dataset is captured using ZED stereoscopic camera and provides intricate scenes of outdoor locations such as gardens, roadside views, festival venues, buildings and indoor locations such as academic and residential areas. The proposed dataset accommodates wide depth range, complex depth structure, complicate object movement, illumination variations, rich color dynamics, texture discrepancy in addition to significant randomness introduced by moving camera and background motion. The proposed dataset is made publicly available to the research community. Furthermore, the procedure for capturing, aligning and calibrating multi-exposure stereo videos and images is described in detail. Finally, we have discussed the progress, challenges, potential use cases and future research opportunities with respect to HDR imaging, depth estimation, consistent tone mapping and 3D HDR coding.
summary: Immersive displays such as VR headsets, AR glasses, Multiview displays, Free point televisions have emerged as a new class of display technologies in recent years, offering a better visual experience and viewer engagement as compared to conventional displays. With the evolution of 3D video and display technologies, the consumer market for High Dynamic Range (HDR) cameras and displays is quickly growing. The lack of appropriate experimental data is a critical hindrance for the development of primary research efforts in the field of 3D HDR video technology. Also, the unavailability of sufficient real world multi-exposure experimental dataset is a major bottleneck for HDR imaging research, thereby limiting the quality of experience (QoE) for the viewers. In this paper, we introduce a diversified stereoscopic multi-exposure dataset captured within the campus of Indian Institute of Technology Madras, which is home to a diverse flora and fauna. The dataset is captured using ZED stereoscopic camera and provides intricate scenes of outdoor locations such as gardens, roadside views, festival venues, buildings and indoor locations such as academic and residential areas. The proposed dataset accommodates wide depth range, complex depth structure, complicate object movement, illumination variations, rich color dynamics, texture discrepancy in addition to significant randomness introduced by moving camera and background motion. The proposed dataset is made publicly available to the research community. Furthermore, the procedure for capturing, aligning and calibrating multi-exposure stereo videos and images is described in detail. Finally, we have discussed the progress, challenges, potential use cases and future research opportunities with respect to HDR imaging, depth estimation, consistent tone mapping and 3D HDR coding.
abstract_zh: 近年来，VR 耳机、AR 眼镜、多视图显示器、自由点电视等沉浸式显示器已成为一类新型显示技术，与传统显示器相比，可提供更好的视觉体验和观众参与度。随着 3D 视频和显示技术的发展，高动态范围 (HDR) 相机和显示器的消费市场正在快速增长。缺乏适当的实验数据是 3D HDR 视频技术领域初级研究工作发展的关键障碍。此外，缺乏足够的现实世界多重曝光实验数据集是 HDR 成像研究的主要瓶颈，从而限制了观看者的体验质量 (QoE)。在本文中，我们介绍了在印度理工学院马德拉斯分校校园内捕获的多样化立体多重曝光数据集，该学院是多样化动植物群的家园。该数据集使用 ZED 立体相机捕获，提供花园、路边景观、节日场地、建筑物等室外地点以及学术和住宅区等室内地点的复杂场景。所提出的数据集可容纳宽深度范围、复杂的深度结构、复杂的对象运动、照明变化、丰富的色彩动态、纹理差异以及移动相机和背景运动引入的显着随机性。拟议的数据集向研究界公开提供。此外，还详细描述了捕获、对齐和校准多重曝光立体视频和图像的过程。最后，我们讨论了 HDR 成像、深度估计、一致色调映射和 3D HDR 编码方面的进展、挑战、潜在用例和未来研究机会。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个高分辨率多曝光立体图像与视频数据库，旨在支持3D HDR视频技术的研究。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏适用于3D HDR视频技术研究的实验数据，尤其是真实场景的多曝光数据集，限制了HDR成像质量和相关技术的发展。
AI.method: 使用ZED立体相机在印度理工学院马德拉斯分校校园内采集多曝光立体图像与视频，涵盖室内外多种复杂场景，并详细描述了数据采集、对齐与校准流程。
AI.result: 公开了包含丰富动态范围、复杂深度结构及光照变化的立体多曝光数据集，同时讨论了HDR成像、深度估计等领域的挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集填补了真实场景多曝光立体数据的空白，为HDR技术、深度估计及3D视频编码等研究提供了重要资源。

title: Generalizing Multimodal Pre-training into Multilingual via Language Acquisition
title_zh: 通过语言习得将多模态预训练推广到多语言
abstract: English-based Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) has achieved great success in various downstream tasks. Some efforts have been taken to generalize this success to non-English languages through Multilingual Vision-Language Pre-training (M-VLP). However, due to the large number of languages, M-VLP models often require huge computing resources and cannot be flexibly extended to new languages. In this work, we propose a \textbf{M}ulti\textbf{L}ingual \textbf{A}cquisition (MLA) framework that can easily generalize a monolingual Vision-Language Pre-training model into multilingual. Specifically, we design a lightweight language acquisition encoder based on state-of-the-art monolingual VLP models. We further propose a two-stage training strategy to optimize the language acquisition encoder, namely the Native Language Transfer stage and the Language Exposure stage. With much less multilingual training data and computing resources, our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on multilingual image-text and video-text retrieval benchmarks.
summary: English-based Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) has achieved great success in various downstream tasks. Some efforts have been taken to generalize this success to non-English languages through Multilingual Vision-Language Pre-training (M-VLP). However, due to the large number of languages, M-VLP models often require huge computing resources and cannot be flexibly extended to new languages. In this work, we propose a \textbf{M}ulti\textbf{L}ingual \textbf{A}cquisition (MLA) framework that can easily generalize a monolingual Vision-Language Pre-training model into multilingual. Specifically, we design a lightweight language acquisition encoder based on state-of-the-art monolingual VLP models. We further propose a two-stage training strategy to optimize the language acquisition encoder, namely the Native Language Transfer stage and the Language Exposure stage. With much less multilingual training data and computing resources, our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on multilingual image-text and video-text retrieval benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 基于英语的视觉语言预训练（VLP）在各种下游任务中取得了巨大成功。我们已经采取了一些努力，通过多语言视觉语言预训练（M-VLP）将这一成功推广到非英语语言。然而，由于语言数量众多，M-VLP模型往往需要巨大的计算资源，并且无法灵活扩展到新的语言。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个 \textbf{M}ulti\textbf{L}ingual \textbf{A}acquisition (MLA) 框架，可以轻松地将单语言视觉语言预训练模型推广为多语言。具体来说，我们基于最先进的单语言 VLP 模型设计了一种轻量级语言习得编码器。我们进一步提出了一个两阶段训练策略来优化语言习得编码器，即母语迁移阶段和语言暴露阶段。利用更少的多语言训练数据和计算资源，我们的模型在多语言图像文本和视频文本检索基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过语言习得将单语视觉-语言预训练模型扩展为多语言模型的框架。
AI.motivation: 现有多语言视觉-语言预训练模型需要大量计算资源且难以灵活扩展新语言，亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量级语言习得编码器，并采用两阶段训练策略（母语迁移阶段与语言暴露阶段）优化模型。
AI.result: 在多语言图文和视频文检索基准测试中，模型以更少的多语言数据和计算资源达到最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过语言习得机制有效实现单语模型到多语言的泛化，解决了计算资源与扩展性矛盾。

title: Federated Adaptation of Reservoirs via Intrinsic Plasticity
title_zh: 通过内在可塑性联合适应储层
abstract: We propose a novel algorithm for performing federated learning with Echo State Networks (ESNs) in a client-server scenario. In particular, our proposal focuses on the adaptation of reservoirs by combining Intrinsic Plasticity with Federated Averaging. The former is a gradient-based method for adapting the reservoir's non-linearity in a local and unsupervised manner, while the latter provides the framework for learning in the federated scenario. We evaluate our approach on real-world datasets from human monitoring, in comparison with the previous approach for federated ESNs existing in literature. Results show that adapting the reservoir with our algorithm provides a significant improvement on the performance of the global model.
summary: We propose a novel algorithm for performing federated learning with Echo State Networks (ESNs) in a client-server scenario. In particular, our proposal focuses on the adaptation of reservoirs by combining Intrinsic Plasticity with Federated Averaging. The former is a gradient-based method for adapting the reservoir's non-linearity in a local and unsupervised manner, while the latter provides the framework for learning in the federated scenario. We evaluate our approach on real-world datasets from human monitoring, in comparison with the previous approach for federated ESNs existing in literature. Results show that adapting the reservoir with our algorithm provides a significant improvement on the performance of the global model.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的算法，用于在客户端-服务器场景中使用回声状态网络（ESN）执行联邦学习。特别是，我们的建议侧重于通过将固有塑性与联合平均相结合来适应储层。前者是一种基于梯度的方法，用于以局部和无监督的方式适应储层的非线性，而后者则提供了联合场景中的学习框架。我们评估了我们在人类监控的真实数据集上的方法，并与文献中现有的联合 ESN 的方法进行了比较。结果表明，使用我们的算法调整水库可以显着提高全局模型的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合内在可塑性与联邦平均的算法，用于联邦学习场景下回声状态网络（ESN）水库的自适应调整。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦ESN方法在水库适应性方面存在性能瓶颈，难以有效处理非线性特征并保持模型一致性。
AI.method: 将内在可塑性（局部无监督梯度调整水库非线性）与联邦平均框架结合，在客户端独立调整水库参数后通过服务器聚合全局模型。
AI.result: 在人类监控真实数据集上验证，相比现有联邦ESN方法，新算法显著提升了全局模型的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 内在可塑性与联邦学习的结合有效解决了ESN水库适应问题，为分布式非线性系统建模提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合内在可塑性与联邦平均的算法，用于联邦学习场景下回声状态网络（ESN）水库的自适应调整。
ai_content.motivation: 现有联邦ESN方法在水库适应性方面存在性能瓶颈，难以有效处理非线性特征并保持模型一致性。
ai_content.method: 将内在可塑性（局部无监督梯度调整水库非线性）与联邦平均框架结合，在客户端独立调整水库参数后通过服务器聚合全局模型。
ai_content.result: 在人类监控真实数据集上验证，相比现有联邦ESN方法，新算法显著提升了全局模型的预测性能。
ai_content.conclusion: 内在可塑性与联邦学习的结合有效解决了ESN水库适应问题，为分布式非线性系统建模提供了新思路。

search_text: Federated Adaptation of Reservoirs via Intrinsic Plasticity 通过内在可塑性联合适应储层 We propose a novel algorithm for performing federated learning with Echo State Networks (ESNs) in a client-server scenario. In particular, our proposal focuses on the adaptation of reservoirs by combining Intrinsic Plasticity with Federated Averaging. The former is a gradient-based method for adapting the reservoir's non-linearity in a local and unsupervised manner, while the latter provides the framework for learning in the federated scenario. We evaluate our approach on real-world datasets from human monitoring, in comparison with the previous approach for federated ESNs existing in literature. Results show that adapting the reservoir with our algorithm provides a significant improvement on the performance of the global model. 我们提出了一种新颖的算法，用于在客户端-服务器场景中使用回声状态网络（ESN）执行联邦学习。特别是，我们的建议侧重于通过将固有塑性与联合平均相结合来适应储层。前者是一种基于梯度的方法，用于以局部和无监督的方式适应储层的非线性，而后者则提供了联合场景中的学习框架。我们评估了我们在人类监控的真实数据集上的方法，并与文献中现有的联合 ESN 的方法进行了比较。结果表明，使用我们的算法调整水库可以显着提高全局模型的性能。 本文提出一种结合内在可塑性与联邦平均的算法，用于联邦学习场景下回声状态网络（ESN）水库的自适应调整。 Valerio De Caro,Claudio Gallicchio,Davide Bacciu cs.NE,cs.LG

title: Investigating the Benefits of Free-Form Rationales
title_zh: 研究自由形式理由的好处
abstract: Free-form rationales aim to aid model interpretability by supplying the background knowledge that can help understand model decisions. Crowdsourced rationales are provided for commonsense QA instances in popular datasets such as CoS-E and ECQA, but their utility remains under-investigated. We present human studies which show that ECQA rationales indeed provide additional background information to understand a decision, while over 88% of CoS-E rationales do not. Inspired by this finding, we ask: can the additional context provided by free-form rationales benefit models, similar to human users? We investigate the utility of rationales as an additional source of supervision, by varying the quantity and quality of rationales during training. After controlling for instances where rationales leak the correct answer while not providing additional background knowledge, we find that incorporating only 5% of rationales during training can boost model performance by 47.22% for CoS-E and 57.14% for ECQA during inference. Moreover, we also show that rationale quality matters: compared to crowdsourced rationales, T5-generated rationales provide not only weaker supervision to models, but are also not helpful for humans in aiding model interpretability.
summary: Free-form rationales aim to aid model interpretability by supplying the background knowledge that can help understand model decisions. Crowdsourced rationales are provided for commonsense QA instances in popular datasets such as CoS-E and ECQA, but their utility remains under-investigated. We present human studies which show that ECQA rationales indeed provide additional background information to understand a decision, while over 88% of CoS-E rationales do not. Inspired by this finding, we ask: can the additional context provided by free-form rationales benefit models, similar to human users? We investigate the utility of rationales as an additional source of supervision, by varying the quantity and quality of rationales during training. After controlling for instances where rationales leak the correct answer while not providing additional background knowledge, we find that incorporating only 5% of rationales during training can boost model performance by 47.22% for CoS-E and 57.14% for ECQA during inference. Moreover, we also show that rationale quality matters: compared to crowdsourced rationales, T5-generated rationales provide not only weaker supervision to models, but are also not helpful for humans in aiding model interpretability.
abstract_zh: 自由形式的基本原理旨在通过提供有助于理解模型决策的背景知识来帮助模型的可解释性。为 CoS-E 和 ECQA 等流行数据集中的常识 QA 实例提供了众包原理，但其实用性仍未得到充分研究。我们提出的人类研究表明，ECQA 基本原理确实提供了额外的背景信息来理解决策，而超过 88% 的 CoS-E 基本原理则没有。受这一发现的启发，我们问：自由形式的基本原理提供的额外上下文是否可以像人类用户一样使模型受益？我们通过在培训期间改变理由的数量和质量来调查理由作为额外监督来源的效用。在控制了基本原理泄漏正确答案而不提供额外背景知识的情况后，我们发现在训练期间仅合并 5% 的基本原理就可以在推理过程中将 CoS-E 的模型性能提高 47.22%，将 ECQA 的模型性能提高 57.14%。此外，我们还表明，基本原理质量很重要：与众包基本原理相比，T5 生成的基本原理不仅对模型的监督较弱，而且对人类帮助模型可解释性也没有帮助。

AI.tldr: 研究自由形式理由对模型性能和可解释性的提升效果
AI.motivation: 现有数据集中众包理由的效用未被充分验证，且其质量与实际帮助存在差异
AI.method: 通过人类实验分析理由质量，控制答案泄露变量，测试不同数量和质量的训练数据对模型的影响
AI.result: 5%高质量理由使CoS-E性能提升47.22%，ECQA提升57.14%；T5生成的理由在模型训练和人类理解中均效果较差
AI.conclusion: 高质量自由形式理由能显著提升模型性能，但生成式理由缺乏有效监督和解释价值

authors_text: Emanuele Coccolo,Cosmin Delea,Fabian Steinmetz,Roberto Francescon,Alberto Signori,Ching Nok Au,Filippo Campagnaro,Vincent Schneider,Federico Favaro,Johannes Oeffner,Christian Renner,Michele Zorzi
title: System Architecture and Communication Infrastructure for the RoboVaaS project
title_zh: RoboVaaS 项目的系统架构和通信基础设施
abstract: Current advancements in waterborne autonomous systems, together with the development of cloud-based service-oriented architectures and the recent availability of low-cost underwater acoustic modems and long-range above water wireless devices, enabled the development of new applications to support ships and port activities. Unmanned Surface Vehicle (USV) can, for instance, be used to perform bathymetry and environmental data collection tasks to ensure under-keel clearance and to monitor the quality of the water. Similarly, Remotely Operated Vehicles (ROVs) can be deployed to inspect ship hulls and typical port infrastructure elements, such as quay and sheet pilling walls. In this paper we present the complete system deployed for the small-scale demonstrations of the Robotic Vessels as-a-Service (RoboVaaS) project, which introduces an on-demand service-based cloud system that dispatches Unmanned Vehicles (UVs) capable of performing the required service either autonomously or piloted. These vessels are able to interact with sensors deployed in the port and with the shore station through an integrated underwater and above water network. The developed system has been validated through sea trials and showcased through an underwater sensor data collection service. The results of the test presented in this paper provide a proof-of-concept of the system design and indicate its technical feasibility. It also shows the need for further developments for a mature technology allowing on-demand robotic maritime assistance services in real operational scenarios.
summary: Current advancements in waterborne autonomous systems, together with the development of cloud-based service-oriented architectures and the recent availability of low-cost underwater acoustic modems and long-range above water wireless devices, enabled the development of new applications to support ships and port activities. In this paper we present the complete system deployed for the small-scale demonstrations of the Robotic Vessels as-a-Service (RoboVaaS) project, which introduces an on-demand service-based cloud system that dispatches Unmanned Vehicles (UVs) capable of performing the required service either autonomously or piloted. It also shows the need for further developments for a mature technology allowing on-demand robotic maritime assistance services in real operational scenarios.
abstract_zh: 当前水上自主系统的进步，加上基于云的面向服务架构的开发以及最近推出的低成本水声调制解调器和远程水上无线设备，使得支持船舶和港口活动的新应用程序的开发成为可能。例如，无人驾驶水面车辆（USV）可用于执行测深和环境数据收集任务，以确保龙骨下的间隙并监测水质。同样，可以部署远程操作车辆（ROV）来检查船体和典型的港口基础设施元素，例如码头和桩墙。在本文中，我们介绍了为机器人船舶即服务（RoboVaaS）项目小规模演示部署的完整系统，该项目引入了一个基于按需服务的云系统，该系统可调度能够自动或驾驶执行所需服务的无人驾驶车辆（UV）。这些船只能够通过集成的水下和水上网络与部署在港口和岸上的传感器进行交互。开发的系统已通过海上试验进行验证，并通过水下传感器数据收集服务进行展示。本文提出的测试结果提供了系统设计的概念验证并表明了其技术可行性。它还表明需要进一步开发成熟的技术，以便在实际操作场景中提供按需机器人海上援助服务。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了RoboVaaS项目中用于海上无人设备服务的系统架构与通信基础设施，旨在通过云平台按需调度无人水面船（USV）和遥控潜水器（ROV）执行港口环境监测等任务。
AI.motivation: 随着水下自主系统与低成本通信设备的发展，亟需构建支持港口活动的按需机器人服务系统，以提升水下测绘、环境监测及船舶检测等任务的效率与安全性。
AI.method: 设计集成水下声学 modem 与水面无线通信的混合网络架构，结合云平台实现无人设备自主或远程操控，并通过海试验证系统在传感器数据采集等场景中的可行性。
AI.result: 海试验证了系统设计的技术可行性，证明了无人设备通过混合网络与岸站及传感器交互的能力，但需进一步优化以满足实际运营需求。
AI.conclusion: 该系统为按需机器人海事服务提供了概念验证，未来需完善技术成熟度以实现真实场景中的可靠部署。

It also shows the need for further developments for a mature technology allowing on-demand robotic maritime assistance services in real operational scenarios. 当前水上自主系统的进步，加上基于云的面向服务架构的开发以及最近推出的低成本水声调制解调器和远程水上无线设备，使得支持船舶和港口活动的新应用程序的开发成为可能。例如，无人驾驶水面车辆（USV）可用于执行测深和环境数据收集任务，以确保龙骨下的间隙并监测水质。同样，可以部署远程操作车辆（ROV）来检查船体和典型的港口基础设施元素，例如码头和桩墙。在本文中，我们介绍了为机器人船舶即服务（RoboVaaS）项目小规模演示部署的完整系统，该项目引入了一个基于按需服务的云系统，该系统可调度能够自动或驾驶执行所需服务的无人驾驶车辆（UV）。这些船只能够通过集成的水下和水上网络与部署在港口和岸上的传感器进行交互。开发的系统已通过海上试验进行验证，并通过水下传感器数据收集服务进行展示。本文提出的测试结果提供了系统设计的概念验证并表明了其技术可行性。它还表明需要进一步开发成熟的技术，以便在实际操作场景中提供按需机器人海上援助服务。 本文介绍了RoboVaaS项目中用于海上无人设备服务的系统架构与通信基础设施，旨在通过云平台按需调度无人水面船（USV）和遥控潜水器（ROV）执行港口环境监测等任务。 Emanuele Coccolo,Cosmin Delea,Fabian Steinmetz,Roberto Francescon,Alberto Signori,Ching Nok Au,Filippo Campagnaro,Vincent Schneider,Federico Favaro,Johannes Oeffner,Christian Renner,Michele Zorzi cs.RO,eess.SP,eess.SY

authors_text: Hongjoon Ahn,Yongyi Yang,Quan Gan,Taesup Moon,David Wipf
title: Descent Steps of a Relation-Aware Energy Produce Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 关系感知能量的下降步骤产生异构图神经网络
abstract: Heterogeneous graph neural networks (GNNs) achieve strong performance on node classification tasks in a semi-supervised learning setting. However, as in the simpler homogeneous GNN case, message-passing-based heterogeneous GNNs may struggle to balance between resisting the oversmoothing that may occur in deep models, and capturing long-range dependencies of graph structured data. Moreover, the complexity of this trade-off is compounded in the heterogeneous graph case due to the disparate heterophily relationships between nodes of different types. To address these issues, we propose a novel heterogeneous GNN architecture in which layers are derived from optimization steps that descend a novel relation-aware energy function. The corresponding minimizer is fully differentiable with respect to the energy function parameters, such that bilevel optimization can be applied to effectively learn a functional form whose minimum provides optimal node representations for subsequent classification tasks. In particular, this methodology allows us to model diverse heterophily relationships between different node types while avoiding oversmoothing effects. Experimental results on 8 heterogeneous graph benchmarks demonstrates that our proposed method can achieve competitive node classification accuracy
summary: Heterogeneous graph neural networks (GNNs) achieve strong performance on node classification tasks in a semi-supervised learning setting. However, as in the simpler homogeneous GNN case, message-passing-based heterogeneous GNNs may struggle to balance between resisting the oversmoothing that may occur in deep models, and capturing long-range dependencies of graph structured data. Moreover, the complexity of this trade-off is compounded in the heterogeneous graph case due to the disparate heterophily relationships between nodes of different types. To address these issues, we propose a novel heterogeneous GNN architecture in which layers are derived from optimization steps that descend a novel relation-aware energy function. The corresponding minimizer is fully differentiable with respect to the energy function parameters, such that bilevel optimization can be applied to effectively learn a functional form whose minimum provides optimal node representations for subsequent classification tasks. In particular, this methodology allows us to model diverse heterophily relationships between different node types while avoiding oversmoothing effects. Experimental results on 8 heterogeneous graph benchmarks demonstrates that our proposed method can achieve competitive node classification accuracy
abstract_zh: 异构图神经网络（GNN）在半监督学习环境中的节点分类任务上实现了强大的性能。然而，与更简单的同构 GNN 情况一样，基于消息传递的异构 GNN 可能难以在抵抗深度模型中可能发生的过度平滑和捕获图结构化数据的远程依赖性之间取得平衡。此外，由于不同类型的节点之间存在不同的异质关系，这种权衡的复杂性在异构图情况下变得更加复杂。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的异构 GNN 架构，其中的层是从新颖的关系感知能量函数的优化步骤中派生出来的。相应的最小化器对于能量函数参数是完全可微的，使得可以应用双层优化来有效地学习函数形式，其最小值为后续分类任务提供最优节点表示。特别是，这种方法允许我们对不同节点类型之间的不同异质关系进行建模，同时避免过度平滑效应。在 8 个异构图基准上的实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以实现有竞争力的节点分类精度

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于关系感知能量函数的异构图神经网络架构，以解决深度模型中的过度平滑问题并捕捉长距离依赖关系。
AI.motivation: 现有异构图神经网络在处理深度模型时难以平衡过度平滑与长距离依赖捕捉，且异构图中不同节点类型的异质性关系加剧了这一矛盾。
AI.method: 通过优化下降步骤构建关系感知能量函数，利用双层优化学习可微分参数，生成适应异质关系的网络层结构。
AI.result: 在8个异构图基准数据集上实现了具有竞争力的节点分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过能量函数优化有效解决了异构图神经网络中的过度平滑与长距离依赖问题，为异构图表示学习提供了新思路。

title: Motion Gait: Gait Recognition via Motion Excitation
title_zh: 运动步态：通过运动激励进行步态识别
abstract: Gait recognition, which can realize long-distance and contactless identification, is an important biometric technology. Recent gait recognition methods focus on learning the pattern of human movement or appearance during walking, and construct the corresponding spatio-temporal representations. However, different individuals have their own laws of movement patterns, simple spatial-temporal features are difficult to describe changes in motion of human parts, especially when confounding variables such as clothing and carrying are included, thus distinguishability of features is reduced. In this paper, we propose the Motion Excitation Module (MEM) to guide spatio-temporal features to focus on human parts with large dynamic changes, MEM learns the difference information between frames and intervals, so as to obtain the representation of temporal motion changes, it is worth mentioning that MEM can adapt to frame sequences with uncertain length, and it does not add any additional parameters. Furthermore, we present the Fine Feature Extractor (FFE), which independently learns the spatio-temporal representations of human body according to different horizontal parts of individuals. Benefiting from MEM and FFE, our method innovatively combines motion change information, significantly improving the performance of the model under cross appearance conditions. On the popular dataset CASIA-B, our proposed Motion Gait is better than the existing gait recognition methods.
summary: Gait recognition, which can realize long-distance and contactless identification, is an important biometric technology. Recent gait recognition methods focus on learning the pattern of human movement or appearance during walking, and construct the corresponding spatio-temporal representations. However, different individuals have their own laws of movement patterns, simple spatial-temporal features are difficult to describe changes in motion of human parts, especially when confounding variables such as clothing and carrying are included, thus distinguishability of features is reduced. In this paper, we propose the Motion Excitation Module (MEM) to guide spatio-temporal features to focus on human parts with large dynamic changes, MEM learns the difference information between frames and intervals, so as to obtain the representation of temporal motion changes, it is worth mentioning that MEM can adapt to frame sequences with uncertain length, and it does not add any additional parameters. Furthermore, we present the Fine Feature Extractor (FFE), which independently learns the spatio-temporal representations of human body according to different horizontal parts of individuals. Benefiting from MEM and FFE, our method innovatively combines motion change information, significantly improving the performance of the model under cross appearance conditions. On the popular dataset CASIA-B, our proposed Motion Gait is better than the existing gait recognition methods.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是一项重要的生物识别技术，可以实现远距离、非接触式身份识别。最近的步态识别方法侧重于学习人类行走过程中的运动或外观模式，并构建相应的时空表示。然而，不同的个体有自己的运动模式规律，简单的时空特征难以描述人体各部位的运动变化，特别是当包含服装、携带等混杂变量时，特征的可区分性降低。在本文中，我们提出了运动激励模块（MEM）来引导时空特征关注动态变化较大的人体部位，MEM学习帧之间和间隔之间的差异信息，从而获得时间运动变化的表示，值得一提的是MEM可以适应长度不确定的帧序列，并且它没有添加任何额外的参数。此外，我们提出了精细特征提取器（FFE），它根据个体的不同水平部位独立学习人体的时空表示。受益于MEM和FFE，我们的方法创新性地结合了运动变化信息，显着提高了模型在交叉外观条件下的性能。在流行的数据集 CASIA-B 上，我们提出的运动步态比现有的步态识别方法更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运动激励的步态识别方法Motion Gait，通过改进时空特征提取来提升跨外观条件下的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法在面对服装、携带物品等干扰因素时，因无法有效捕捉人体动态变化特征导致识别性能下降。
AI.method: 设计运动激励模块(MEM)捕捉帧间动态差异并适应可变长度序列，结合细粒度特征提取器(FFE)独立学习人体不同部位的时空表征。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B数据集上，Motion Gait方法相比现有技术取得更优识别效果，尤其在跨外观场景下性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合运动变化信息与细粒度特征学习，所提方法有效解决了步态识别中的外观干扰问题，为跨场景识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Meng-Ju Tsai,Zhiyong Cui,Hao Yang,Cole Kopca,Sophie Tien,Yinhai Wang
title: Traffic-Twitter Transformer: A Nature Language Processing-joined Framework For Network-wide Traffic Forecasting
title_zh: Traffic-Twitter Transformer：结合自然语言处理的全网流量预测框架
abstract: With accurate and timely traffic forecasting, the impacted traffic conditions can be predicted in advance to guide agencies and residents to respond to changes in traffic patterns appropriately. However, existing works on traffic forecasting mainly relied on historical traffic patterns confining to short-term prediction, under 1 hour, for instance. To better manage future roadway capacity and accommodate social and human impacts, it is crucial to propose a flexible and comprehensive framework to predict physical-aware long-term traffic conditions for public users and transportation agencies. In this paper, the gap of robust long-term traffic forecasting was bridged by taking social media features into consideration. A correlation study and a linear regression model were first implemented to evaluate the significance of the correlation between two time-series data, traffic intensity and Twitter data intensity. Two time-series data were then fed into our proposed social-aware framework, Traffic-Twitter Transformer, which integrated Nature Language representations into time-series records for long-term traffic prediction. Experimental results in the Great Seattle Area showed that our proposed model outperformed baseline models in all evaluation matrices. This NLP-joined social-aware framework can become a valuable implement of network-wide traffic prediction and management for traffic agencies.
summary: With accurate and timely traffic forecasting, the impacted traffic conditions can be predicted in advance to guide agencies and residents to respond to changes in traffic patterns appropriately. However, existing works on traffic forecasting mainly relied on historical traffic patterns confining to short-term prediction, under 1 hour, for instance. To better manage future roadway capacity and accommodate social and human impacts, it is crucial to propose a flexible and comprehensive framework to predict physical-aware long-term traffic conditions for public users and transportation agencies. In this paper, the gap of robust long-term traffic forecasting was bridged by taking social media features into consideration. A correlation study and a linear regression model were first implemented to evaluate the significance of the correlation between two time-series data, traffic intensity and Twitter data intensity. Two time-series data were then fed into our proposed social-aware framework, Traffic-Twitter Transformer, which integrated Nature Language representations into time-series records for long-term traffic prediction. Experimental results in the Great Seattle Area showed that our proposed model outperformed baseline models in all evaluation matrices. This NLP-joined social-aware framework can become a valuable implement of network-wide traffic prediction and management for traffic agencies.
abstract_zh: 通过准确、及时的交通预测，可以提前预测受影响的交通状况，指导机构和居民适当应对交通模式的变化。然而，现有的交通预测工作主要依赖于历史交通模式，仅限于短期预测，例如1小时以内。为了更好地管理未来的道路容量并适应社会和人类影响，至关重要的是提出一个灵活而全面的框架来预测公共用户和交通机构的物理感知长期交通状况。在本文中，通过考虑社交媒体特征来弥补稳健的长期流量预测的差距。首先采用相关性研究和线性回归模型来评估两个时间序列数据、流量强度和 Twitter 数据强度之间相关性的显着性。然后将两个时间序列数据输入到我们提出的社交感知框架 Traffic-Twitter Transformer 中，该框架将自然语言表示集成到时间序列记录中以进行长期流量预测。大西雅图地区的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在所有评估矩阵中都优于基线模型。这种加入 NLP 的社交感知框架可以成为交通机构进行全网交通预测和管理的有价值的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合自然语言处理的交通预测框架Traffic-Twitter Transformer，通过整合交通数据与社交媒体数据实现大范围长期交通预测。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测方法局限于短期预测且未充分考虑社会因素影响，需构建融合社会感知的长期交通预测框架以提升管理效能。
AI.method: 通过相关性分析与线性回归验证交通流量与推特数据的相关性，提出融合自然语言表示的Traffic-Twitter Transformer模型，整合时序数据与社交媒体特征进行预测。
AI.result: 在西雅图地区实验表明，该模型在所有评估指标上均优于基线模型，验证了社交数据融合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该NLP融合的社会感知框架为交通管理部门提供了网络级交通预测的新工具，可有效提升长期交通预测准确性。

search_text: Traffic-Twitter Transformer: A Nature Language Processing-joined Framework For Network-wide Traffic Forecasting Traffic-Twitter Transformer：结合自然语言处理的全网流量预测框架 With accurate and timely traffic forecasting, the impacted traffic conditions can be predicted in advance to guide agencies and residents to respond to changes in traffic patterns appropriately. However, existing works on traffic forecasting mainly relied on historical traffic patterns confining to short-term prediction, under 1 hour, for instance. To better manage future roadway capacity and accommodate social and human impacts, it is crucial to propose a flexible and comprehensive framework to predict physical-aware long-term traffic conditions for public users and transportation agencies. In this paper, the gap of robust long-term traffic forecasting was bridged by taking social media features into consideration. A correlation study and a linear regression model were first implemented to evaluate the significance of the correlation between two time-series data, traffic intensity and Twitter data intensity. Two time-series data were then fed into our proposed social-aware framework, Traffic-Twitter Transformer, which integrated Nature Language representations into time-series records for long-term traffic prediction. Experimental results in the Great Seattle Area showed that our proposed model outperformed baseline models in all evaluation matrices. This NLP-joined social-aware framework can become a valuable implement of network-wide traffic prediction and management for traffic agencies. 通过准确、及时的交通预测，可以提前预测受影响的交通状况，指导机构和居民适当应对交通模式的变化。然而，现有的交通预测工作主要依赖于历史交通模式，仅限于短期预测，例如1小时以内。为了更好地管理未来的道路容量并适应社会和人类影响，至关重要的是提出一个灵活而全面的框架来预测公共用户和交通机构的物理感知长期交通状况。在本文中，通过考虑社交媒体特征来弥补稳健的长期流量预测的差距。首先采用相关性研究和线性回归模型来评估两个时间序列数据、流量强度和 Twitter 数据强度之间相关性的显着性。然后将两个时间序列数据输入到我们提出的社交感知框架 Traffic-Twitter Transformer 中，该框架将自然语言表示集成到时间序列记录中以进行长期流量预测。大西雅图地区的实验结果表明，我们提出的模型在所有评估矩阵中都优于基线模型。这种加入 NLP 的社交感知框架可以成为交通机构进行全网交通预测和管理的有价值的工具。 本文提出一种结合自然语言处理的交通预测框架Traffic-Twitter Transformer，通过整合交通数据与社交媒体数据实现大范围长期交通预测。 Meng-Ju Tsai,Zhiyong Cui,Hao Yang,Cole Kopca,Sophie Tien,Yinhai Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuzhong Chen,Yu Du,Zhenxiang Xiao,Lin Zhao,Lu Zhang,David Weizhong Liu,Dajiang Zhu,Tuo Zhang,Xintao Hu,Tianming Liu,Xi Jiang
title: A Unified and Biologically-Plausible Relational Graph Representation of Vision Transformers
title_zh: 视觉变压器的统一且生物学上合理的关系图表示
comment: 11 pages,7 figures, submitted to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 11 pages,7 figures, submitted to 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Vision transformer (ViT) and its variants have achieved remarkable successes in various visual tasks. The key characteristic of these ViT models is to adopt different aggregation strategies of spatial patch information within the artificial neural networks (ANNs). However, there is still a key lack of unified representation of different ViT architectures for systematic understanding and assessment of model representation performance. Moreover, how those well-performing ViT ANNs are similar to real biological neural networks (BNNs) is largely unexplored. To answer these fundamental questions, we, for the first time, propose a unified and biologically-plausible relational graph representation of ViT models. Specifically, the proposed relational graph representation consists of two key sub-graphs: aggregation graph and affine graph. The former one considers ViT tokens as nodes and describes their spatial interaction, while the latter one regards network channels as nodes and reflects the information communication between channels. Using this unified relational graph representation, we found that: a) a sweet spot of the aggregation graph leads to ViTs with significantly improved predictive performance; b) the graph measures of clustering coefficient and average path length are two effective indicators of model prediction performance, especially when applying on the datasets with small samples; c) our findings are consistent across various ViT architectures and multiple datasets; d) the proposed relational graph representation of ViT has high similarity with real BNNs derived from brain science data. Overall, our work provides a novel unified and biologically-plausible paradigm for more interpretable and effective representation of ViT ANNs.
summary: Vision transformer (ViT) and its variants have achieved remarkable successes in various visual tasks. The key characteristic of these ViT models is to adopt different aggregation strategies of spatial patch information within the artificial neural networks (ANNs). However, there is still a key lack of unified representation of different ViT architectures for systematic understanding and assessment of model representation performance. Moreover, how those well-performing ViT ANNs are similar to real biological neural networks (BNNs) is largely unexplored. To answer these fundamental questions, we, for the first time, propose a unified and biologically-plausible relational graph representation of ViT models. Specifically, the proposed relational graph representation consists of two key sub-graphs: aggregation graph and affine graph. The former one considers ViT tokens as nodes and describes their spatial interaction, while the latter one regards network channels as nodes and reflects the information communication between channels. Using this unified relational graph representation, we found that: a) a sweet spot of the aggregation graph leads to ViTs with significantly improved predictive performance; b) the graph measures of clustering coefficient and average path length are two effective indicators of model prediction performance, especially when applying on the datasets with small samples; c) our findings are consistent across various ViT architectures and multiple datasets; d) the proposed relational graph representation of ViT has high similarity with real BNNs derived from brain science data. Overall, our work provides a novel unified and biologically-plausible paradigm for more interpretable and effective representation of ViT ANNs.
abstract_zh: 视觉变换器（ViT）及其变体在各种视觉任务中取得了显着的成功。这些 ViT 模型的关键特征是在人工神经网络 (ANN) 内采用不同的空间斑块信息聚合策略。然而，仍然缺乏对不同 ViT 架构的统一表示，以系统地理解和评估模型表示性能。此外，这些性能良好的 ViT ANN 与真实生物神经网络 (BNN) 的相似之处在很大程度上尚未被探索。为了回答这些基本问题，我们首次提出了 ViT 模型的统一且生物学上合理的关系图表示。具体来说，所提出的关系图表示由两个关键子图组成：聚合图和仿射图。前者将ViT代币视为节点，描述它们的空间交互，而后者将网络通道视为节点，反映通道之间的信息通信。使用这种统一的关系图表示，我们发现：a）聚合图的最佳点导致 ViT 的预测性能显着提高； b) 聚类系数和平均路径长度的图形度量是模型预测性能的两个有效指标，特别是在应用于小样本数据集时； c) 我们的研究结果在各种 ViT 架构和多个数据集上都是一致的； d）所提出的 ViT 关系图表示与源自脑科学数据的真实 BNN 具有高度相似性。总的来说，我们的工作为 ViT ANN 的更可解释和有效的表示提供了一种新颖的统一且生物学上合理的范例。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一且符合生物可行性的关系图表示方法，用于表征视觉Transformer（ViT）模型，以系统分析其结构特性并比较其与生物神经网络的相似性。
AI.motivation: 现有ViT模型缺乏统一的表征框架，难以系统评估其性能差异，且其与生物神经网络（BNN）的相似性尚未被深入研究。
AI.method: 构建包含聚合子图（描述token空间交互）和仿射子图（反映通道间信息通信）的双子图关系模型，通过图论指标分析ViT结构特性。
AI.result: 发现聚合子图的最优结构显著提升预测性能；聚类系数和平均路径长度可有效评估小样本数据集下的模型表现；结论在多种ViT架构和数据集上一致；ViT关系图与生物神经网络高度相似。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为ViT提供了可解释且生物可行的统一表征范式，有助于深入理解其结构特性与生物神经机制的关联。

authors_text: Running Zhao,Jiangtao Yu,Tingle Li,Hang Zhao,Edith C. H. Ngai
title: Radio2Speech: High Quality Speech Recovery from Radio Frequency Signals
title_zh: Radio2Speech：从射频信号中恢复高质量语音
abstract: Considering the microphone is easily affected by noise and soundproof materials, the radio frequency (RF) signal is a promising candidate to recover audio as it is immune to noise and can traverse many soundproof objects. In this paper, we introduce Radio2Speech, a system that uses RF signals to recover high quality speech from the loudspeaker. Radio2Speech can recover speech comparable to the quality of the microphone, advancing from recovering only single tone music or incomprehensible speech in existing approaches. We use Radio UNet to accurately recover speech in time-frequency domain from RF signals with limited frequency band. Also, we incorporate the neural vocoder to synthesize the speech waveform from the estimated time-frequency representation without using the contaminated phase. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations show that in quiet, noisy and soundproof scenarios, Radio2Speech achieves state-of-the-art performance and is on par with the microphone that works in quiet scenarios.
summary: Considering the microphone is easily affected by noise and soundproof materials, the radio frequency (RF) signal is a promising candidate to recover audio as it is immune to noise and can traverse many soundproof objects. In this paper, we introduce Radio2Speech, a system that uses RF signals to recover high quality speech from the loudspeaker. Radio2Speech can recover speech comparable to the quality of the microphone, advancing from recovering only single tone music or incomprehensible speech in existing approaches. We use Radio UNet to accurately recover speech in time-frequency domain from RF signals with limited frequency band. Also, we incorporate the neural vocoder to synthesize the speech waveform from the estimated time-frequency representation without using the contaminated phase. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations show that in quiet, noisy and soundproof scenarios, Radio2Speech achieves state-of-the-art performance and is on par with the microphone that works in quiet scenarios.
abstract_zh: 考虑到麦克风很容易受到噪声和隔音材料的影响，射频（RF）信号是恢复音频的有希望的候选者，因为它不受噪声影响并且可以穿过许多隔音物体。在本文中，我们介绍了 Radio2Speech，这是一种使用射频信号从扬声器恢复高质量语音的系统。 Radio2Speech 可以恢复与麦克风质量相当的语音，比现有方法中仅恢复单音音乐或难以理解的语音有所进步。我们使用Radio UNet从有限频带的RF信号中准确地恢复时频域中的语音。此外，我们结合神经声码器来根据估计的时频表示合成语音波形，而不使用污染相位。定量和定性评估表明，在安静、嘈杂和隔音场景下，Radio2Speech 均实现了最先进的性能，与安静场景下工作的麦克风不相上下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Radio2Speech系统，利用射频信号从扬声器中恢复高质量语音。
AI.motivation: 传统麦克风易受噪声和隔音材料影响，而射频信号具有抗噪声和穿透隔音材料的能力，适合语音恢复任务。
AI.method: 采用Radio UNet在时频域精确恢复射频信号中的语音，并结合神经声码器合成语音波形，无需依赖受污染的相位信息。
AI.result: 在安静、嘈杂和隔音场景下，Radio2Speech性能达到SOTA水平，语音质量可与安静场景下的麦克风媲美。
AI.conclusion: Radio2Speech通过射频信号实现了高质量语音恢复，显著优于现有方法仅能恢复单音调音乐或不可理解语音的局限性。
