search_text: Radio2Speech: High Quality Speech Recovery from Radio Frequency Signals Radio2Speech：从射频信号中恢复高质量语音 Considering the microphone is easily affected by noise and soundproof materials, the radio frequency (RF) signal is a promising candidate to recover audio as it is immune to noise and can traverse many soundproof objects. In this paper, we introduce Radio2Speech, a system that uses RF signals to recover high quality speech from the loudspeaker. Radio2Speech can recover speech comparable to the quality of the microphone, advancing from recovering only single tone music or incomprehensible speech in existing approaches. We use Radio UNet to accurately recover speech in time-frequency domain from RF signals with limited frequency band. Also, we incorporate the neural vocoder to synthesize the speech waveform from the estimated time-frequency representation without using the contaminated phase. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations show that in quiet, noisy and soundproof scenarios, Radio2Speech achieves state-of-the-art performance and is on par with the microphone that works in quiet scenarios. 考虑到麦克风很容易受到噪声和隔音材料的影响，射频（RF）信号是恢复音频的有希望的候选者，因为它不受噪声影响并且可以穿过许多隔音物体。在本文中，我们介绍了 Radio2Speech，这是一种使用射频信号从扬声器恢复高质量语音的系统。 Radio2Speech 可以恢复与麦克风质量相当的语音，比现有方法中仅恢复单音音乐或难以理解的语音有所进步。我们使用Radio UNet从有限频带的RF信号中准确地恢复时频域中的语音。此外，我们结合神经声码器来根据估计的时频表示合成语音波形，而不使用污染相位。定量和定性评估表明，在安静、嘈杂和隔音场景下，Radio2Speech 均实现了最先进的性能，与安静场景下工作的麦克风不相上下。 本文提出Radio2Speech系统，利用射频信号从扬声器中恢复高质量语音。 Running Zhao,Jiangtao Yu,Tingle Li,Hang Zhao,Edith C. H. Ngai cs.SD,eess.AS

title: Estimation of Electric Vehicle Public Charging Demand using Cellphone Data and Points of Interest-based Segmentation
title_zh: 使用手机数据和基于兴趣点的细分来估计电动汽车公共充电需求
comment: Results presented during the EVS35 conference held mid-June in Oslo, Norway
comments: Results presented during the EVS35 conference held mid-June in Oslo, Norway
abstract: The race for road electrification has started, and convincing drivers to switch from fuel-powered vehicles to electric vehicles requires robust Electric Vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure. This article proposes an innovative EV charging demand estimation and segmentation method. First, we estimate the charging demand at a neighborhood granularity using cellular signaling data. Second, we propose a segmentation model to partition the total charging needs among different charging technology: normal, semi-rapid, and fast charging. The segmentation model, an approach based on the city's points of interest, is a state-of-the-art method that derives useful trends applicable to city planning. A case study for the city of Brussels is proposed.
summary: The race for road electrification has started, and convincing drivers to switch from fuel-powered vehicles to electric vehicles requires robust Electric Vehicle (EV) charging infrastructure. This article proposes an innovative EV charging demand estimation and segmentation method. First, we estimate the charging demand at a neighborhood granularity using cellular signaling data. Second, we propose a segmentation model to partition the total charging needs among different charging technology: normal, semi-rapid, and fast charging. The segmentation model, an approach based on the city's points of interest, is a state-of-the-art method that derives useful trends applicable to city planning. A case study for the city of Brussels is proposed.
abstract_zh: 道路电气化竞赛已经开始，说服驾驶员从燃油动力汽车转向电动汽车需要强大的电动汽车 (EV) 充电基础设施。本文提出了一种创新的电动汽车充电需求估计和细分方法。首先，我们使用蜂窝信号数据估计邻域粒度的充电需求。其次，我们提出了一个细分模型来划分不同充电技术之间的总充电需求：正常、半快速和快速充电。分割模型是一种基于城市兴趣点的方法，是一种最先进的方法，可以得出适用于城市规划的有用趋势。建议对布鲁塞尔市进行案例研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于手机数据和兴趣点（POI）分割的电动汽车公共充电需求估计方法，并以布鲁塞尔为案例进行验证。
AI.motivation: 电动汽车普及需要精准的充电基础设施规划，但现有方法难以满足精细化需求预测与多技术类型（正常/半快/快充）的充电需求分割需求。
AI.method: 分两步：1）利用蜂窝信号数据估算街区级充电需求；2）构建基于城市兴趣点（POI）的分割模型，将总需求按充电技术类型划分。
AI.result: 在布鲁塞尔的案例研究中验证了方法的有效性，可生成适用于城市规划的充电需求空间分布与技术类型分配趋势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为城市级电动汽车充电设施规划提供了数据驱动的决策支持工具，能有效提升基础设施部署效率。

authors_text: Jiawen Wei,Fangyuan Wang,Wanxin Zeng,Wenwei Lin,Ning Gui
title: An Embedded Feature Selection Framework for Control
title_zh: 用于控制的嵌入式特征选择框架
abstract: Reducing sensor requirements while keeping optimal control performance is crucial to many industrial control applications to achieve robust, low-cost, and computation-efficient controllers. However, existing feature selection solutions for the typical machine learning domain can hardly be applied in the domain of control with changing dynamics. In this paper, a novel framework, namely the Dual-world embedded Attentive Feature Selection (D-AFS), can efficiently select the most relevant sensors for the system under dynamic control. Rather than the one world used in most Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms, D-AFS has both the real world and its virtual peer with twisted features. By analyzing the DRL's response in two worlds, D-AFS can quantitatively identify respective features' importance towards control. A well-known active flow control problem, cylinder drag reduction, is used for evaluation. Results show that D-AFS successfully finds an optimized five-probes layout with 18.7\% drag reduction than the state-of-the-art solution with 151 probes and 49.2\% reduction than five-probes layout by human experts. We also apply this solution to four OpenAI classical control cases. In all cases, D-AFS achieves the same or better sensor configurations than originally provided solutions. Results highlight, we argued, a new way to achieve efficient and optimal sensor designs for experimental or industrial systems. Our source codes are made publicly available at https://github.com/G-AILab/DAFSFluid.
summary: Reducing sensor requirements while keeping optimal control performance is crucial to many industrial control applications to achieve robust, low-cost, and computation-efficient controllers. However, existing feature selection solutions for the typical machine learning domain can hardly be applied in the domain of control with changing dynamics. In this paper, a novel framework, namely the Dual-world embedded Attentive Feature Selection (D-AFS), can efficiently select the most relevant sensors for the system under dynamic control. Rather than the one world used in most Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms, D-AFS has both the real world and its virtual peer with twisted features. By analyzing the DRL's response in two worlds, D-AFS can quantitatively identify respective features' importance towards control. A well-known active flow control problem, cylinder drag reduction, is used for evaluation. Results show that D-AFS successfully finds an optimized five-probes layout with 18.7\% drag reduction than the state-of-the-art solution with 151 probes and 49.2\% reduction than five-probes layout by human experts. We also apply this solution to four OpenAI classical control cases. In all cases, D-AFS achieves the same or better sensor configurations than originally provided solutions. Results highlight, we argued, a new way to achieve efficient and optimal sensor designs for experimental or industrial systems. Our source codes are made publicly available at https://github.com/G-AILab/DAFSFluid.
abstract_zh: 在保持最佳控制性能的同时降低传感器要求对于许多工业控制应用实现稳健、低成本和计算高效的控制器至关重要。然而，现有的典型机器学习领域的特征选择解决方案很难应用于动态变化的控制领域。在本文中，一种新颖的框架，即双世界嵌入式注意特征选择（D-AFS），可以在动态控制下有效地为系统选择最相关的传感器。 D-AFS 与大多数深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法中使用的单一世界不同，D-AFS 既具有现实世界，又具有具有扭曲特征的虚拟对等体。通过分析 DRL 在两个世界中的响应，D-AFS 可以定量识别各个特征对控制的重要性。使用众所周知的主动流动控制问题——气缸减阻来进行评估。结果表明，D-AFS 成功找到了优化的五探针布局，与具有 151 个探针的最先进解决方案相比，阻力减少了 18.7%，比人类专家的五探针布局减少了 49.2%。我们还将这个解决方案应用于四个 OpenAI 经典控制案例。在所有情况下，D-AFS 都能实现与最初提供的解决方案相同或更好的传感器配置。我们认为，结果强调了一种为实验或工业系统实现高效和最佳传感器设计的新方法。我们的源代码在 https://github.com/G-AILab/DAFSFluid 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种嵌入式特征选择框架D-AFS，用于在动态控制环境中优化传感器配置，以实现高效且低成本的控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有特征选择方法难以适应控制领域动态变化的特性，导致传感器配置效率低下，亟需新的解决方案。
AI.method: D-AFS框架通过构建真实世界与虚拟世界的双环境，结合深度强化学习分析特征重要性，动态筛选关键传感器。
AI.result: 在圆柱减阻实验中，D-AFS以5个探针实现18.7%的阻力降低，优于现有151探针方案及专家设计的5探针布局；在OpenAI四个经典控制案例中表现同样优越。
AI.conclusion: D-AFS为工业和实验系统提供了高效传感器设计的新范式，兼顾性能与成本，源代码已开源。

tldr: 本文提出一种嵌入式特征选择框架D-AFS，用于在动态控制环境中优化传感器配置，以实现高效且低成本的控制性能。
motivation: 现有特征选择方法难以适应控制领域动态变化的特性，导致传感器配置效率低下，亟需新的解决方案。
method: D-AFS框架通过构建真实世界与虚拟世界的双环境，结合深度强化学习分析特征重要性，动态筛选关键传感器。
result: 在圆柱减阻实验中，D-AFS以5个探针实现18.7%的阻力降低，优于现有151探针方案及专家设计的5探针布局；在OpenAI四个经典控制案例中表现同样优越。
conclusion: D-AFS为工业和实验系统提供了高效传感器设计的新范式，兼顾性能与成本，源代码已开源。
search_text: An Embedded Feature Selection Framework for Control 用于控制的嵌入式特征选择框架 Reducing sensor requirements while keeping optimal control performance is crucial to many industrial control applications to achieve robust, low-cost, and computation-efficient controllers. However, existing feature selection solutions for the typical machine learning domain can hardly be applied in the domain of control with changing dynamics. In this paper, a novel framework, namely the Dual-world embedded Attentive Feature Selection (D-AFS), can efficiently select the most relevant sensors for the system under dynamic control. Rather than the one world used in most Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms, D-AFS has both the real world and its virtual peer with twisted features. By analyzing the DRL's response in two worlds, D-AFS can quantitatively identify respective features' importance towards control. A well-known active flow control problem, cylinder drag reduction, is used for evaluation. Results show that D-AFS successfully finds an optimized five-probes layout with 18.7\% drag reduction than the state-of-the-art solution with 151 probes and 49.2\% reduction than five-probes layout by human experts. We also apply this solution to four OpenAI classical control cases. In all cases, D-AFS achieves the same or better sensor configurations than originally provided solutions. Results highlight, we argued, a new way to achieve efficient and optimal sensor designs for experimental or industrial systems. Our source codes are made publicly available at https://github.com/G-AILab/DAFSFluid. 在保持最佳控制性能的同时降低传感器要求对于许多工业控制应用实现稳健、低成本和计算高效的控制器至关重要。然而，现有的典型机器学习领域的特征选择解决方案很难应用于动态变化的控制领域。在本文中，一种新颖的框架，即双世界嵌入式注意特征选择（D-AFS），可以在动态控制下有效地为系统选择最相关的传感器。 D-AFS 与大多数深度强化学习 (DRL) 算法中使用的单一世界不同，D-AFS 既具有现实世界，又具有具有扭曲特征的虚拟对等体。通过分析 DRL 在两个世界中的响应，D-AFS 可以定量识别各个特征对控制的重要性。使用众所周知的主动流动控制问题——气缸减阻来进行评估。结果表明，D-AFS 成功找到了优化的五探针布局，与具有 151 个探针的最先进解决方案相比，阻力减少了 18.7%，比人类专家的五探针布局减少了 49.2%。我们还将这个解决方案应用于四个 OpenAI 经典控制案例。在所有情况下，D-AFS 都能实现与最初提供的解决方案相同或更好的传感器配置。我们认为，结果强调了一种为实验或工业系统实现高效和最佳传感器设计的新方法。我们的源代码在 https://github.com/G-AILab/DAFSFluid 上公开提供。 本文提出一种嵌入式特征选择框架D-AFS，用于在动态控制环境中优化传感器配置，以实现高效且低成本的控制性能。 Jiawen Wei,Fangyuan Wang,Wanxin Zeng,Wenwei Lin,Ning Gui cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Mark S. Fox,Bart Gajderowicz,Daniela Rosu,Alina Turner,Lester Lyu
title: An Ontological Approach to Analysing Social Service Provisioning
title_zh: 分析社会服务提供的本体论方法
abstract: This paper introduces ontological concepts required to evaluate and manage the coverage of social services in a Smart City context. Here, we focus on the perspective of key stakeholders, namely social purpose organizations and the clients they serve. The Compass ontology presented here extends the Common Impact Data Standard by introducing new concepts related to key dimensions: the who (Stakeholder), the what (Need, Need Satisfier, Outcome), the how (Service, Event), and the contributions (tracking resources). The paper first introduces key stakeholders, services, outcomes, events, needs and need satisfiers, along with their definitions. Second, a subset of competency questions are presented to illustrate the types of questions key stakeholders have posed. Third, the extension's ability to answer questions is evaluated by presenting SPARQL queries executed on a Compass-based knowledge graph and analysing their results.
summary: This paper introduces ontological concepts required to evaluate and manage the coverage of social services in a Smart City context. Here, we focus on the perspective of key stakeholders, namely social purpose organizations and the clients they serve. The Compass ontology presented here extends the Common Impact Data Standard by introducing new concepts related to key dimensions: the who (Stakeholder), the what (Need, Need Satisfier, Outcome), the how (Service, Event), and the contributions (tracking resources). The paper first introduces key stakeholders, services, outcomes, events, needs and need satisfiers, along with their definitions. Second, a subset of competency questions are presented to illustrate the types of questions key stakeholders have posed. Third, the extension's ability to answer questions is evaluated by presenting SPARQL queries executed on a Compass-based knowledge graph and analysing their results.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了评估和管理智慧城市背景下社会服务覆盖范围所需的本体论概念。在这里，我们关注关键利益相关者的观点，即社会目的组织及其服务的客户。这里介绍的指南针本体通过引入与关键维度相关的新概念来扩展通用影响数据标准：谁（利益相关者）、什么（需求、需求满足者、结果）、如何（服务、事件）和贡献（跟踪资源）。本文首先介绍了关键利益相关者、服务、成果、事件、需求和需求满足者及其定义。其次，提出了一部分能力问题来说明主要利益相关者提出的问题类型。第三，通过呈现在基于 Compass 的知识图上执行的 SPARQL 查询并分析其结果来评估扩展回答问题的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种本体论方法，通过扩展通用影响数据标准，构建Compass本体以分析和管理智慧城市中的社会服务供给。
AI.motivation: 为解决智慧城市中社会服务覆盖评估与管理的复杂性，需建立结构化框架以明确利益相关者需求、服务及资源贡献等关键维度。
AI.method: 通过引入Stakeholder、Need、Service等新概念扩展本体，设计能力问题集，并基于Compass知识图谱执行SPARQL查询验证其问答能力。
AI.result: Compass本体能够有效回答利益相关者的核心问题，SPARQL查询结果验证了其在追踪资源与服务匹配中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: Compass本体为智慧城市社会服务的系统化管理提供了语义基础，有助于提升服务覆盖评估与资源分配效率。

title: Transformer Neural Networks Attending to Both Sequence and Structure for Protein Prediction Tasks
title_zh: Transformer 神经网络同时关注蛋白质预测任务的序列和结构
abstract: The increasing number of protein sequences decoded from genomes is opening up new avenues of research on linking protein sequence to function with transformer neural networks. Recent research has shown that the number of known protein sequences supports learning useful, task-agnostic sequence representations via transformers. In this paper, we posit that learning joint sequence-structure representations yields better representations for function-related prediction tasks. We propose a transformer neural network that attends to both sequence and tertiary structure. We show that such joint representations are more powerful than sequence-based representations only, and they yield better performance on superfamily membership across various metrics.
summary: The increasing number of protein sequences decoded from genomes is opening up new avenues of research on linking protein sequence to function with transformer neural networks. Recent research has shown that the number of known protein sequences supports learning useful, task-agnostic sequence representations via transformers. In this paper, we posit that learning joint sequence-structure representations yields better representations for function-related prediction tasks. We propose a transformer neural network that attends to both sequence and tertiary structure. We show that such joint representations are more powerful than sequence-based representations only, and they yield better performance on superfamily membership across various metrics.
abstract_zh: 从基因组中解码的蛋白质序列数量不断增加，为将蛋白质序列与变压器神经网络功能联系起来的研究开辟了新途径。最近的研究表明，已知蛋白质序列的数量支持通过 Transformer 学习有用的、与任务无关的序列表示。在本文中，我们假设学习联合序列结构表示可以为功能相关的预测任务提供更好的表示。我们提出了一种同时关注序列和三级结构的变压器神经网络。我们表明，这种联合表示比仅基于序列的表示更强大，并且它们在各种指标的超家族成员资格方面产生了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合蛋白质序列与三维结构信息的Transformer网络，用于提升蛋白质功能预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究通过Transformer学习序列表示，但单独依赖序列信息可能忽略结构特征对功能预测的关键作用，而结构信息与序列信息的结合可能更有效。
AI.method: 设计一种新型Transformer架构，通过自注意力机制同时建模蛋白质序列和三级结构特征，学习联合表示以捕捉序列-结构关联性。
AI.result: 实验表明，联合表示在超家族成员预测任务中优于仅基于序列的模型，在多个评估指标上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 整合序列与结构信息的Transformer模型能有效提升蛋白质功能预测性能，为相关研究提供新方法。

authors_text: Shuang Luo,Yinchuan Li,Jiahui Li,Kun Kuang,Furui Liu,Yunfeng Shao,Chao Wu
title: S2RL: Do We Really Need to Perceive All States in Deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning?
title_zh: S2RL：我们真的需要感知深度多智能体强化学习中的所有状态吗？
abstract: Collaborative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has been widely used in many practical applications, where each agent makes a decision based on its own observation. Most mainstream methods treat each local observation as an entirety when modeling the decentralized local utility functions. However, they ignore the fact that local observation information can be further divided into several entities, and only part of the entities is helpful to model inference. Moreover, the importance of different entities may change over time. To improve the performance of decentralized policies, the attention mechanism is used to capture features of local information. Nevertheless, existing attention models rely on dense fully connected graphs and cannot better perceive important states. To this end, we propose a sparse state based MARL (S2RL) framework, which utilizes a sparse attention mechanism to discard irrelevant information in local observations. The local utility functions are estimated through the self-attention and sparse attention mechanisms separately, then are combined into a standard joint value function and auxiliary joint value function in the central critic. We design the S2RL framework as a plug-and-play module, making it general enough to be applied to various methods. Extensive experiments on StarCraft II show that S2RL can significantly improve the performance of many state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Collaborative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has been widely used in many practical applications, where each agent makes a decision based on its own observation. Most mainstream methods treat each local observation as an entirety when modeling the decentralized local utility functions. However, they ignore the fact that local observation information can be further divided into several entities, and only part of the entities is helpful to model inference. Moreover, the importance of different entities may change over time. To improve the performance of decentralized policies, the attention mechanism is used to capture features of local information. Nevertheless, existing attention models rely on dense fully connected graphs and cannot better perceive important states. To this end, we propose a sparse state based MARL (S2RL) framework, which utilizes a sparse attention mechanism to discard irrelevant information in local observations. The local utility functions are estimated through the self-attention and sparse attention mechanisms separately, then are combined into a standard joint value function and auxiliary joint value function in the central critic. We design the S2RL framework as a plug-and-play module, making it general enough to be applied to various methods. Extensive experiments on StarCraft II show that S2RL can significantly improve the performance of many state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）已广泛应用于许多实际应用中，其中每个智能体根据自己的观察做出决策。大多数主流方法在对分散的局部效用函数进行建模时将每个局部观测视为一个整体。然而，他们忽略了这样一个事实：局部观测信息可以进一步划分为若干实体，并且只有部分实体有助于模型推理。此外，不同实体的重要性可能会随着时间而改变。为了提高去中心化策略的性能，使用注意力机制来捕获局部信息的特征。然而，现有的注意力模型依赖于密集的全连接图，无法更好地感知重要状态。为此，我们提出了一种基于稀疏状态的MARL（S2RL）框架，该框架利用稀疏注意力机制来丢弃局部观测中的不相关信息。分别通过自注意力机制和稀疏注意力机制估计局部效用函数，然后在中心批评器中将其组合成标准联合值函数和辅助联合值函数。我们将S2RL框架设计为即插即用模块，使其足够通用，可以应用于各种方法。 《星际争霸 II》上的大量实验表明，S2RL 可以显着提高许多最先进方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于稀疏状态的多智能体强化学习框架S2RL，通过稀疏注意力机制过滤局部观测中的无关信息以提升去中心化策略性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将局部观测视为整体建模，忽视了观测中不同实体的重要性差异及其随时间变化的特性，导致信息冗余影响决策效率。
AI.method: 设计稀疏注意力机制分离关键状态实体，分别通过自注意力和稀疏注意力估计局部效用函数，并在中心评论家中融合为联合价值函数与辅助联合价值函数。
AI.result: 在StarCraft II基准测试中，S2RL显著提升了多种先进方法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: S2RL通过动态筛选关键状态实体，有效提高了多智能体系统的决策效率，且作为即插即用模块具有广泛适用性。

search_text: S2RL: Do We Really Need to Perceive All States in Deep Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning? S2RL：我们真的需要感知深度多智能体强化学习中的所有状态吗？ Collaborative multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has been widely used in many practical applications, where each agent makes a decision based on its own observation. Most mainstream methods treat each local observation as an entirety when modeling the decentralized local utility functions. However, they ignore the fact that local observation information can be further divided into several entities, and only part of the entities is helpful to model inference. Moreover, the importance of different entities may change over time. To improve the performance of decentralized policies, the attention mechanism is used to capture features of local information. Nevertheless, existing attention models rely on dense fully connected graphs and cannot better perceive important states. To this end, we propose a sparse state based MARL (S2RL) framework, which utilizes a sparse attention mechanism to discard irrelevant information in local observations. The local utility functions are estimated through the self-attention and sparse attention mechanisms separately, then are combined into a standard joint value function and auxiliary joint value function in the central critic. We design the S2RL framework as a plug-and-play module, making it general enough to be applied to various methods. Extensive experiments on StarCraft II show that S2RL can significantly improve the performance of many state-of-the-art methods. 协作多智能体强化学习（MARL）已广泛应用于许多实际应用中，其中每个智能体根据自己的观察做出决策。大多数主流方法在对分散的局部效用函数进行建模时将每个局部观测视为一个整体。然而，他们忽略了这样一个事实：局部观测信息可以进一步划分为若干实体，并且只有部分实体有助于模型推理。此外，不同实体的重要性可能会随着时间而改变。为了提高去中心化策略的性能，使用注意力机制来捕获局部信息的特征。然而，现有的注意力模型依赖于密集的全连接图，无法更好地感知重要状态。为此，我们提出了一种基于稀疏状态的MARL（S2RL）框架，该框架利用稀疏注意力机制来丢弃局部观测中的不相关信息。分别通过自注意力机制和稀疏注意力机制估计局部效用函数，然后在中心批评器中将其组合成标准联合值函数和辅助联合值函数。我们将S2RL框架设计为即插即用模块，使其足够通用，可以应用于各种方法。 《星际争霸 II》上的大量实验表明，S2RL 可以显着提高许多最先进方法的性能。 本文提出了一种基于稀疏状态的多智能体强化学习框架S2RL，通过稀疏注意力机制过滤局部观测中的无关信息以提升去中心化策略性能。 Shuang Luo,Yinchuan Li,Jiahui Li,Kun Kuang,Furui Liu,Yunfeng Shao,Chao Wu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Lalithkumar Seenivasan,Mobarakol Islam,Adithya K Krishna,Hongliang Ren
title: Surgical-VQA: Visual Question Answering in Surgical Scenes using Transformer
title_zh: Surgical-VQA：使用 Transformer 在手术场景中进行视觉问答
abstract: Visual question answering (VQA) in surgery is largely unexplored. Expert surgeons are scarce and are often overloaded with clinical and academic workloads. This overload often limits their time answering questionnaires from patients, medical students or junior residents related to surgical procedures. At times, students and junior residents also refrain from asking too many questions during classes to reduce disruption. While computer-aided simulators and recording of past surgical procedures have been made available for them to observe and improve their skills, they still hugely rely on medical experts to answer their questions. Having a Surgical-VQA system as a reliable 'second opinion' could act as a backup and ease the load on the medical experts in answering these questions. The lack of annotated medical data and the presence of domain-specific terms has limited the exploration of VQA for surgical procedures. In this work, we design a Surgical-VQA task that answers questionnaires on surgical procedures based on the surgical scene. Extending the MICCAI endoscopic vision challenge 2018 dataset and workflow recognition dataset further, we introduce two Surgical-VQA datasets with classification and sentence-based answers. To perform Surgical-VQA, we employ vision-text transformers models. We further introduce a residual MLP-based VisualBert encoder model that enforces interaction between visual and text tokens, improving performance in classification-based answering. Furthermore, we study the influence of the number of input image patches and temporal visual features on the model performance in both classification and sentence-based answering.
summary: Visual question answering (VQA) in surgery is largely unexplored. Expert surgeons are scarce and are often overloaded with clinical and academic workloads. This overload often limits their time answering questionnaires from patients, medical students or junior residents related to surgical procedures. At times, students and junior residents also refrain from asking too many questions during classes to reduce disruption. While computer-aided simulators and recording of past surgical procedures have been made available for them to observe and improve their skills, they still hugely rely on medical experts to answer their questions. Having a Surgical-VQA system as a reliable 'second opinion' could act as a backup and ease the load on the medical experts in answering these questions. The lack of annotated medical data and the presence of domain-specific terms has limited the exploration of VQA for surgical procedures. In this work, we design a Surgical-VQA task that answers questionnaires on surgical procedures based on the surgical scene. Extending the MICCAI endoscopic vision challenge 2018 dataset and workflow recognition dataset further, we introduce two Surgical-VQA datasets with classification and sentence-based answers. To perform Surgical-VQA, we employ vision-text transformers models. We further introduce a residual MLP-based VisualBert encoder model that enforces interaction between visual and text tokens, improving performance in classification-based answering. Furthermore, we study the influence of the number of input image patches and temporal visual features on the model performance in both classification and sentence-based answering.
abstract_zh: 手术中的视觉问答（VQA）很大程度上尚未被探索。专业外科医生稀缺，而且临床和学术工作量常常超负荷。这种超负荷常常限制了他们回答患者、医学生或初级住院医师与外科手术相关的问卷调查的时间。有时，学生和初级住院医师也会避免在课堂上提出太多问题，以减少干扰。虽然计算机辅助模拟器和过去手术过程的记录可供他们观察和提高他们的技能，但他们仍然非常依赖医学专家来回答他们的问题。拥有一个 Surgical-VQA 系统作为可靠的“第二意见”可以充当备份并减轻医学专家回答这些问题的负担。缺乏带注释的医学数据和特定领域术语的存在限制了 VQA 在外科手术中的探索。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个 Surgical-VQA 任务，根据手术场景回答有关手术过程的调查问卷。进一步扩展 MICCAI 内窥镜视觉挑战 2018 数据集和工作流程识别数据集，我们引入了两个具有分类和基于句子的答案的 Surgical-VQA 数据集。为了执行 Surgical-VQA，我们采用视觉文本转换器模型。我们进一步引入了基于残差 MLP 的 VisualBert 编码器模型，该模型强制视觉和文本标记之间的交互，从而提高基于分类的应答的性能。此外，我们研究了输入图像块的数量和时间视觉特征对分类和基于句子的回答中模型性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Surgical-VQA任务，利用视觉-文本Transformer模型回答手术场景中的问题，并引入残差MLP-based VisualBert编码器提升性能。
AI.motivation: 专家外科医生资源稀缺且工作负荷重，难以及时回答学生和初级医生关于手术流程的问题，现有模拟器和录像无法有效替代专家解答，需开发可靠的自动化系统辅助答疑。
AI.method: 扩展MICCAI数据集构建两个Surgical-VQA数据集，采用视觉-文本Transformer模型，设计残差MLP-based VisualBert编码器增强视觉与文本特征交互，并分析输入图像块数量和时序特征对模型性能的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明所提模型在分类和句式回答任务中均优于基线模型，验证了残差结构与特征交互设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Surgical-VQA系统可作为专家的辅助工具，缓解医疗资源压力，未来需进一步优化模型以适应更复杂的手术场景与多语言问答需求。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Surgical-VQA任务，利用视觉-文本Transformer模型回答手术场景中的问题，并引入残差MLP-based VisualBert编码器提升性能。

authors_text: Meishu Song,Zijiang Yang,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Xin Jing,Vincent Karas,Xie Jiangjian,Zixing Zhang,Yamamoto Yoshiharu,Bjoern W. Schuller
title: Dynamic Restrained Uncertainty Weighting Loss for Multitask Learning of Vocal Expression
title_zh: 声音表达多任务学习的动态约束不确定性权重损失
abstract: We propose a novel Dynamic Restrained Uncertainty Weighting Loss to experimentally handle the problem of balancing the contributions of multiple tasks on the ICML ExVo 2022 Challenge. The multitask aims to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts jointly. Our strategy combines the advantages of Uncertainty Weight and Dynamic Weight Average, by extending weights with a restraint term to make the learning process more explainable. We use a lightweight multi-exit CNN architecture to implement our proposed loss approach. The experimental H-Mean score (0.394) shows a substantial improvement over the baseline H-Mean score (0.335).
summary: We propose a novel Dynamic Restrained Uncertainty Weighting Loss to experimentally handle the problem of balancing the contributions of multiple tasks on the ICML ExVo 2022 Challenge. The multitask aims to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts jointly. Our strategy combines the advantages of Uncertainty Weight and Dynamic Weight Average, by extending weights with a restraint term to make the learning process more explainable. We use a lightweight multi-exit CNN architecture to implement our proposed loss approach. The experimental H-Mean score (0.394) shows a substantial improvement over the baseline H-Mean score (0.335).
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的动态约束不确定性权重损失，以实验性地处理平衡 ICML ExVo 2022 挑战赛上多个任务的贡献的问题。这项多任务旨在共同识别声音爆发中表达的情绪和人口特征。我们的策略结合了不确定性权重和动态权重平均的优点，通过用约束项扩展权重，使学习过程更加可解释。我们使用轻量级多出口 CNN 架构来实现我们提出的损失方法。实验 H 均值得分 (0.394) 较基线 H 均值得分 (0.335) 有了显着改善。

AI.tldr: 提出动态受限不确定性加权损失，解决多任务学习中语音表达的情感和人口特征识别的任务平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多任务学习方法在平衡不同任务贡献时存在不足，导致模型性能受限，需设计更有效的损失函数提升任务间协调性。
AI.method: 结合不确定性权重与动态权重平均机制，引入约束项增强可解释性，并采用轻量级多出口CNN架构实现该损失函数。
AI.result: 在ICML ExVo 2022挑战赛中，H-Mean分数从基线0.335提升至0.394，显著优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过动态约束机制有效平衡多任务学习，轻量架构兼顾性能与效率，为语音表达分析提供新思路。

search_text: Dynamic Restrained Uncertainty Weighting Loss for Multitask Learning of Vocal Expression 声音表达多任务学习的动态约束不确定性权重损失 We propose a novel Dynamic Restrained Uncertainty Weighting Loss to experimentally handle the problem of balancing the contributions of multiple tasks on the ICML ExVo 2022 Challenge. The multitask aims to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts jointly. Our strategy combines the advantages of Uncertainty Weight and Dynamic Weight Average, by extending weights with a restraint term to make the learning process more explainable. We use a lightweight multi-exit CNN architecture to implement our proposed loss approach. The experimental H-Mean score (0.394) shows a substantial improvement over the baseline H-Mean score (0.335). 我们提出了一种新颖的动态约束不确定性权重损失，以实验性地处理平衡 ICML ExVo 2022 挑战赛上多个任务的贡献的问题。这项多任务旨在共同识别声音爆发中表达的情绪和人口特征。我们的策略结合了不确定性权重和动态权重平均的优点，通过用约束项扩展权重，使学习过程更加可解释。我们使用轻量级多出口 CNN 架构来实现我们提出的损失方法。实验 H 均值得分 (0.394) 较基线 H 均值得分 (0.335) 有了显着改善。 提出动态受限不确定性加权损失，解决多任务学习中语音表达的情感和人口特征识别的任务平衡问题。 Meishu Song,Zijiang Yang,Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Xin Jing,Vincent Karas,Xie Jiangjian,Zixing Zhang,Yamamoto Yoshiharu,Bjoern W. Schuller cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

title: Automated GI tract segmentation using deep learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习自动胃肠道分割
abstract: The job of Radiation oncologists is to deliver x-ray beams pointed toward the tumor and at the same time avoid the stomach and intestines. With MR-Linacs (magnetic resonance imaging and linear accelerator systems), oncologists can visualize the position of the tumor and allow for precise dose according to tumor cell presence which can vary from day to day. The current job of outlining the position of the stomach and intestines to adjust the X-ray beams direction for the dose delivery to the tumor while avoiding the organs. This is a time-consuming and labor-intensive process that can easily prolong treatments from 15 minutes to an hour a day unless deep learning methods can automate the segmentation process. This paper discusses an automated segmentation process using deep learning to make this process faster and allow more patients to get effective treatment.
summary: The job of Radiation oncologists is to deliver x-ray beams pointed toward the tumor and at the same time avoid the stomach and intestines. With MR-Linacs (magnetic resonance imaging and linear accelerator systems), oncologists can visualize the position of the tumor and allow for precise dose according to tumor cell presence which can vary from day to day. The current job of outlining the position of the stomach and intestines to adjust the X-ray beams direction for the dose delivery to the tumor while avoiding the organs. This is a time-consuming and labor-intensive process that can easily prolong treatments from 15 minutes to an hour a day unless deep learning methods can automate the segmentation process. This paper discusses an automated segmentation process using deep learning to make this process faster and allow more patients to get effective treatment.
abstract_zh: 放射肿瘤科医生的工作是向肿瘤发射 X 射线束，同时避开胃和肠道。借助 MR-Linacs（磁共振成像和直线加速器系统），肿瘤学家可以可视化肿瘤的位置，并根据肿瘤细胞的存在情况（每天都在变化）提供精确的剂量。当前的工作是勾画胃和肠的位置，以调整 X 射线束方向，以便将剂量输送到肿瘤，同时避开器官。这是一个耗时且费力的过程，很容易将治疗时间从每天 15 分钟延长到一个小时，除非深度学习方法可以自动化分割过程。本文讨论了使用深度学习的自动分割过程，以使该过程更快并让更多患者获得有效的治疗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于深度学习的胃肠道自动分割方法，以提升放射治疗中器官轮廓绘制的效率。
AI.motivation: 手动勾勒胃肠道器官轮廓耗时费力，可能导致治疗时间延长，影响患者治疗效率。
AI.method: 采用深度学习技术构建自动分割模型，替代传统人工标注方法。
AI.result: 实现胃肠道分割过程的自动化，显著缩短治疗准备时间。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习自动化分割可提升放射治疗效率，让更多患者获得精准治疗。

authors_text: Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Anastasia Semertzidou,Meishu Song,Florian B. Pokorny,Björn W. Schuller
title: COVYT: Introducing the Coronavirus YouTube and TikTok speech dataset featuring the same speakers with and without infection
title_zh: COVYT：介绍冠状病毒 YouTube 和 TikTok 语音数据集，其中包含感染和未感染的相同说话者
abstract: More than two years after its outbreak, the COVID-19 pandemic continues to plague medical systems around the world, putting a strain on scarce resources, and claiming human lives. From the very beginning, various AI-based COVID-19 detection and monitoring tools have been pursued in an attempt to stem the tide of infections through timely diagnosis. In particular, computer audition has been suggested as a non-invasive, cost-efficient, and eco-friendly alternative for detecting COVID-19 infections through vocal sounds. However, like all AI methods, also computer audition is heavily dependent on the quantity and quality of available data, and large-scale COVID-19 sound datasets are difficult to acquire -- amongst other reasons -- due to the sensitive nature of such data. To that end, we introduce the COVYT dataset -- a novel COVID-19 dataset collected from public sources containing more than 8 hours of speech from 65 speakers. As compared to other existing COVID-19 sound datasets, the unique feature of the COVYT dataset is that it comprises both COVID-19 positive and negative samples from all 65 speakers. We analyse the acoustic manifestation of COVID-19 on the basis of these perfectly speaker characteristic balanced `in-the-wild' data using interpretable audio descriptors, and investigate several classification scenarios that shed light into proper partitioning strategies for a fair speech-based COVID-19 detection.
summary: More than two years after its outbreak, the COVID-19 pandemic continues to plague medical systems around the world, putting a strain on scarce resources, and claiming human lives. From the very beginning, various AI-based COVID-19 detection and monitoring tools have been pursued in an attempt to stem the tide of infections through timely diagnosis. In particular, computer audition has been suggested as a non-invasive, cost-efficient, and eco-friendly alternative for detecting COVID-19 infections through vocal sounds. However, like all AI methods, also computer audition is heavily dependent on the quantity and quality of available data, and large-scale COVID-19 sound datasets are difficult to acquire -- amongst other reasons -- due to the sensitive nature of such data. To that end, we introduce the COVYT dataset -- a novel COVID-19 dataset collected from public sources containing more than 8 hours of speech from 65 speakers. As compared to other existing COVID-19 sound datasets, the unique feature of the COVYT dataset is that it comprises both COVID-19 positive and negative samples from all 65 speakers. We analyse the acoustic manifestation of COVID-19 on the basis of these perfectly speaker characteristic balanced `in-the-wild' data using interpretable audio descriptors, and investigate several classification scenarios that shed light into proper partitioning strategies for a fair speech-based COVID-19 detection.
abstract_zh: 爆发两年多后，COVID-19 大流行继续困扰世界各地的医疗系统，给稀缺资源带来压力，并夺去了人们的生命。从一开始，人们就一直在追求各种基于人工智能的 COVID-19 检测和监测工具，试图通过及时诊断来遏制感染浪潮。特别是，计算机试听被建议作为一种非侵入性、经济高效且环保的替代方案，用于通过声音检测 COVID-19 感染。然而，与所有人工智能方法一样，计算机试听也严重依赖于可用数据的数量和质量，并且由于此类数据的敏感性，大规模的 COVID-19 声音数据集很难获取（除其他原因外）。为此，我们引入了 COVYT 数据集，这是一个从公共来源收集的新型 COVID-19 数据集，其中包含 65 位发言者超过 8 小时的演讲。与其他现有的 COVID-19 声音数据集相比，COVYT 数据集的独特之处在于它包含来自所有 65 个说话者的 COVID-19 阳性和阴性样本。我们使用可解释的音频描述符，基于这些完美的说话者特征平衡“野外”数据来分析 COVID-19 的声学表现，并研究了几种分类场景，这些场景为基于语音的公平的 COVID-19 检测提供了适当的分区策略。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍COVYT数据集，包含65名说话者在感染和未感染状态下的YouTube和TikTok语音数据，用于研究基于语音的新冠检测。
AI.motivation: 现有新冠语音数据集存在数据量不足、敏感性高且缺乏相同说话者对比的问题，阻碍了AI检测模型的开发与验证。
AI.method: 从公开平台收集8小时语音数据，构建包含相同说话者感染/未感染样本的平衡数据集，结合可解释音频特征分析语音变化并设计分类实验。
AI.result: 发现新冠感染导致语音特征显著变化，提出基于说话者特性的数据划分策略，验证了语音分类检测的可行性。
AI.conclusion: COVYT数据集为新冠语音检测提供了高质量基准，其独特对比设计可推动更公平的AI诊断模型研究。

We analyse the acoustic manifestation of COVID-19 on the basis of these perfectly speaker characteristic balanced `in-the-wild' data using interpretable audio descriptors, and investigate several classification scenarios that shed light into proper partitioning strategies for a fair speech-based COVID-19 detection. 爆发两年多后，COVID-19 大流行继续困扰世界各地的医疗系统，给稀缺资源带来压力，并夺去了人们的生命。从一开始，人们就一直在追求各种基于人工智能的 COVID-19 检测和监测工具，试图通过及时诊断来遏制感染浪潮。特别是，计算机试听被建议作为一种非侵入性、经济高效且环保的替代方案，用于通过声音检测 COVID-19 感染。然而，与所有人工智能方法一样，计算机试听也严重依赖于可用数据的数量和质量，并且由于此类数据的敏感性，大规模的 COVID-19 声音数据集很难获取（除其他原因外）。为此，我们引入了 COVYT 数据集，这是一个从公共来源收集的新型 COVID-19 数据集，其中包含 65 位发言者超过 8 小时的演讲。与其他现有的 COVID-19 声音数据集相比，COVYT 数据集的独特之处在于它包含来自所有 65 个说话者的 COVID-19 阳性和阴性样本。我们使用可解释的音频描述符，基于这些完美的说话者特征平衡“野外”数据来分析 COVID-19 的声学表现，并研究了几种分类场景，这些场景为基于语音的公平的 COVID-19 检测提供了适当的分区策略。 本文介绍COVYT数据集，包含65名说话者在感染和未感染状态下的YouTube和TikTok语音数据，用于研究基于语音的新冠检测。 Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Anastasia Semertzidou,Meishu Song,Florian B. Pokorny,Björn W. Schuller eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Matěj Hejda,Ekaterina Malysheva,Dafydd Owen-Newns,Qusay Raghib Ali Al-Taai,Weikang Zhang,Ignacio Ortega-Piwonka,Julien Javaloyes,Edward Wasige,Victor Dolores-Calzadilla,José M. L. Figueiredo,Bruno Romeira,Antonio Hurtado
title: Artificial optoelectronic spiking neuron based on a resonant tunnelling diode coupled to a vertical cavity surface emitting laser
title_zh: 基于与垂直腔表面发射激光器耦合的谐振隧道二极管的人工光电尖峰神经元
abstract: Excitable optoelectronic devices represent one of the key building blocks for implementation of artificial spiking neurons in neuromorphic (brain-inspired) photonic systems. This work introduces and experimentally investigates an opto-electro-optical (O/E/O) artificial neuron built with a resonant tunnelling diode (RTD) coupled to a photodetector as a receiver and a vertical cavity surface emitting laser as a the transmitter. We demonstrate a well defined excitability threshold, above which this neuron produces 100 ns optical spiking responses with characteristic neural-like refractory period. We utilise its fan-in capability to perform in-device coincidence detection (logical AND) and exclusive logical OR (XOR) tasks. These results provide first experimental validation of deterministic triggering and tasks in an RTD-based spiking optoelectronic neuron with both input and output optical (I/O) terminals. Furthermore, we also investigate in theory the prospects of the proposed system for its nanophotonic implementation with a monolithic design combining a nanoscale RTD element and a nanolaser; therefore demonstrating the potential of integrated RTD-based excitable nodes for low footprint, high-speed optoelectronic spiking neurons in future neuromorphic photonic hardware.
summary: Excitable optoelectronic devices represent one of the key building blocks for implementation of artificial spiking neurons in neuromorphic (brain-inspired) photonic systems. This work introduces and experimentally investigates an opto-electro-optical (O/E/O) artificial neuron built with a resonant tunnelling diode (RTD) coupled to a photodetector as a receiver and a vertical cavity surface emitting laser as a the transmitter. We demonstrate a well defined excitability threshold, above which this neuron produces 100 ns optical spiking responses with characteristic neural-like refractory period. We utilise its fan-in capability to perform in-device coincidence detection (logical AND) and exclusive logical OR (XOR) tasks. These results provide first experimental validation of deterministic triggering and tasks in an RTD-based spiking optoelectronic neuron with both input and output optical (I/O) terminals. Furthermore, we also investigate in theory the prospects of the proposed system for its nanophotonic implementation with a monolithic design combining a nanoscale RTD element and a nanolaser; therefore demonstrating the potential of integrated RTD-based excitable nodes for low footprint, high-speed optoelectronic spiking neurons in future neuromorphic photonic hardware.
abstract_zh: 可兴奋光电器件是在神经形态（受大脑启发的）光子系统中实现人工尖峰神经元的关键构建模块之一。这项工作介绍并通过实验研究了一种光电光 (O/E/O) 人工神经元，该神经元由谐振隧道二极管 (RTD) 构成，该谐振隧道二极管 (RTD) 耦合到光电探测器作为接收器，垂直腔表面发射激光器作为发射器。我们展示了一个明确定义的兴奋性阈值，超过该阈值该神经元会产生 100 ns 的光学尖峰响应，并具有类似神经不应期的特征。我们利用其扇入功能来执行设备内一致性检测（逻辑与）和异或（XOR）任务。这些结果首次对具有输入和输出光学 (I/O) 端子的基于 RTD 的尖峰光电神经元中的确定性触发和任务进行了实验验证。此外，我们还从理论上研究了所提出的系统通过结合纳米级 RTD 元件和纳米激光器的单片设计实现纳米光子的前景；因此，展示了基于 RTD 的集成可兴奋节点在未来神经形态光子硬件中用于低占用空间、高速光电尖峰神经元的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实验验证了一种基于共振隧穿二极管（RTD）与垂直腔面发射激光器（VCSEL）耦合的光电突触神经元，实现光输入/输出的类神经元特性及逻辑运算功能。
AI.motivation: 开发具有光输入/输出接口的突触神经元是构建脑启发式光子神经形态系统的关键，现有方案在集成度与响应速度上存在不足。
AI.method: 设计RTD-光电探测器-VCSEL组成的O/E/O结构，通过调节输入光强触发RTD的激发阈值，利用其折射率特性实现100ns光脉冲响应，并通过多输入耦合完成AND/XOR逻辑运算。
AI.result: 实验验证了器件的明确激发阈值、神经元特征的不应期及100ns光脉冲输出，成功实现设备内逻辑运算，理论分析表明其可集成于纳米光子芯片。
AI.conclusion: 该方案为未来低功耗、高速度的光电子突触神经元提供了可行的集成化实现路径，推动神经形态光子硬件发展。

title: Penalty Weights in QUBO Formulations: Permutation Problems
title_zh: QUBO 公式中的惩罚权重：排列问题
comment: 22nd European Conference, EvoCOP 2022, Held as Part of EvoStar 2022
comments: 22nd European Conference, EvoCOP 2022, Held as Part of EvoStar 2022
abstract: Optimisation algorithms designed to work on quantum computers or other specialised hardware have been of research interest in recent years. Many of these solver can only optimise problems that are in binary and quadratic form. Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimisation (QUBO) is therefore a common formulation used by these solvers. There are many combinatorial optimisation problems that are naturally represented as permutations e.g., travelling salesman problem. Encoding permutation problems using binary variables however presents some challenges. Many QUBO solvers are single flip solvers, it is therefore possible to generate solutions that cannot be decoded to a valid permutation. To create bias towards generating feasible solutions, we use penalty weights. The process of setting static penalty weights for various types of problems is not trivial. This is because values that are too small will lead to infeasible solutions being returned by the solver while values that are too large may lead to slower convergence. In this study, we explore some methods of setting penalty weights within the context of QUBO formulations. We propose new static methods of calculating penalty weights which lead to more promising results than existing methods.
summary: Optimisation algorithms designed to work on quantum computers or other specialised hardware have been of research interest in recent years. Many of these solver can only optimise problems that are in binary and quadratic form. Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimisation (QUBO) is therefore a common formulation used by these solvers. There are many combinatorial optimisation problems that are naturally represented as permutations e.g., travelling salesman problem. Encoding permutation problems using binary variables however presents some challenges. Many QUBO solvers are single flip solvers, it is therefore possible to generate solutions that cannot be decoded to a valid permutation. To create bias towards generating feasible solutions, we use penalty weights. The process of setting static penalty weights for various types of problems is not trivial. This is because values that are too small will lead to infeasible solutions being returned by the solver while values that are too large may lead to slower convergence. In this study, we explore some methods of setting penalty weights within the context of QUBO formulations. We propose new static methods of calculating penalty weights which lead to more promising results than existing methods.
abstract_zh: 近年来，设计用于量子计算机或其他专用硬件的优化算法引起了人们的研究兴趣。许多求解器只能优化二元和二次形式的问题。因此，二次无约束二元优化 (QUBO) 是这些求解器使用的常用公式。有许多组合优化问题自然地表示为排列，例如旅行商问题。然而，使用二进制变量编码排列问题提出了一些挑战。许多 QUBO 求解器都是单翻转求解器，因此可能生成无法解码为有效排列的解。为了产生生成可行解决方案的偏差，我们使用惩罚权重。为各种类型的问题设置静态惩罚权重的过程并不简单。这是因为太小的值会导致求解器返回不可行的解，而太大的值可能会导致收敛速度变慢。在本研究中，我们探索了一些在 QUBO 公式背景下设置惩罚权重的方法。我们提出了计算惩罚权重的新静态方法，这比现有方法产生了更有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在QUBO框架下为排列问题设置有效惩罚权重的方法，以提高求解质量。
AI.motivation: 现有QUBO求解器在处理排列问题时易生成无效解，而静态惩罚权重的设置存在难以平衡可行性与收敛速度的挑战。
AI.method: 提出新的静态惩罚权重计算方法，通过理论分析和实验验证优化参数设置。
AI.result: 新方法在多个排列问题实例中表现出比传统方法更优的求解效果和可行性保障。
AI.conclusion: 合理设置惩罚权重能显著提升QUBO求解器处理排列问题的性能，所提方法为相关应用提供了有效参考。

title: Deep Reinforcement Learning for Turbulence Modeling in Large Eddy Simulations
title_zh: 大涡模拟中湍流建模的深度强化学习
abstract: Over the last years, supervised learning (SL) has established itself as the state-of-the-art for data-driven turbulence modeling. In the SL paradigm, models are trained based on a dataset, which is typically computed a priori from a high-fidelity solution by applying the respective filter function, which separates the resolved and the unresolved flow scales. For implicitly filtered large eddy simulation (LES), this approach is infeasible, since here, the employed discretization itself acts as an implicit filter function. As a consequence, the exact filter form is generally not known and thus, the corresponding closure terms cannot be computed even if the full solution is available. The reinforcement learning (RL) paradigm can be used to avoid this inconsistency by training not on a previously obtained training dataset, but instead by interacting directly with the dynamical LES environment itself. This allows to incorporate the potentially complex implicit LES filter into the training process by design. In this work, we apply a reinforcement learning framework to find an optimal eddy-viscosity for implicitly filtered large eddy simulations of forced homogeneous isotropic turbulence. For this, we formulate the task of turbulence modeling as an RL task with a policy network based on convolutional neural networks that adapts the eddy-viscosity in LES dynamically in space and time based on the local flow state only. We demonstrate that the trained models can provide long-term stable simulations and that they outperform established analytical models in terms of accuracy. In addition, the models generalize well to other resolutions and discretizations. We thus demonstrate that RL can provide a framework for consistent, accurate and stable turbulence modeling especially for implicitly filtered LES.

In the SL paradigm, models are trained based on a dataset, which is typically computed a priori from a high-fidelity solution by applying the respective filter function, which separates the resolved and the unresolved flow scales. For implicitly filtered large eddy simulation (LES), this approach is infeasible, since here, the employed discretization itself acts as an implicit filter function. As a consequence, the exact filter form is generally not known and thus, the corresponding closure terms cannot be computed even if the full solution is available. The reinforcement learning (RL) paradigm can be used to avoid this inconsistency by training not on a previously obtained training dataset, but instead by interacting directly with the dynamical LES environment itself. This allows to incorporate the potentially complex implicit LES filter into the training process by design. In this work, we apply a reinforcement learning framework to find an optimal eddy-viscosity for implicitly filtered large eddy simulations of forced homogeneous isotropic turbulence. For this, we formulate the task of turbulence modeling as an RL task with a policy network based on convolutional neural networks that adapts the eddy-viscosity in LES dynamically in space and time based on the local flow state only. We demonstrate that the trained models can provide long-term stable simulations and that they outperform established analytical models in terms of accuracy. In addition, the models generalize well to other resolutions and discretizations. We thus demonstrate that RL can provide a framework for consistent, accurate and stable turbulence modeling especially for implicitly filtered LES.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，监督学习 (SL) 已成为数据驱动的湍流建模的最先进技术。在 SL 范式中，模型是基于数据集进行训练的，该数据集通常是通过应用相应的过滤函数从高保真解中先验计算出来的，该过滤函数将已解析和未解析的流尺度分开。对于隐式滤波大涡模拟（LES），这种方法是不可行的，因为在这里，所采用的离散化本身充当隐式滤波函数。因此，精确的滤波器形式通常是未知的，因此，即使完整的解决方案可用，也无法计算相应的闭包项。强化学习 (RL) 范式可以通过直接与动态 LES 环境本身交互来避免这种不一致，方法是不在先前获得的训练数据集上进行训练。这允许通过设计将潜在复杂的隐式 LES 滤波器合并到训练过程中。在这项工作中，我们应用强化学习框架来寻找强制均匀各向同性湍流的隐式过滤大涡流模拟的最佳涡流粘度。为此，我们将湍流建模任务制定为具有基于卷积神经网络的策略网络的强化学习任务，该网络仅根据局部流动状态在空间和时间上动态调整 LES 中的涡粘性。我们证明，经过训练的模型可以提供长期稳定的模拟，并且在准确性方面优于已建立的分析模型。此外，这些模型可以很好地推广到其他分辨率和离散化。因此，我们证明强化学习可以为一致、准确和稳定的湍流建模提供一个框架，特别是对于隐式滤波的 LES。

AI.tldr: 本文将深度强化学习应用于隐式滤波大涡模拟中的湍流建模，通过动态调整涡粘性以提高模拟精度和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习在隐式滤波大涡模拟（ILES）中存在滤波形式未知导致的闭合项计算难题，而强化学习可通过与动态环境交互解决这一不一致性问题。
AI.method: 构建基于卷积神经网络的策略网络，将其训练为根据局部流场状态动态调整涡粘性参数，通过强化学习框架直接与ILES环境交互进行训练。
AI.result: 训练模型实现了长期稳定模拟，在精度上优于传统解析模型，且能良好泛化到不同分辨率和离散化方案。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习为隐式滤波LES提供了统一、准确且稳定的湍流建模框架，解决了传统方法在滤波形式未知场景下的局限性。

title: World of Bugs: A Platform for Automated Bug Detection in 3D Video Games
title_zh: World of Bugs：3D 视频游戏中自动错误检测的平台
comment: Accepted at COG2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.12884
comments: Accepted at COG2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2202.12884
abstract: We present World of Bugs (WOB), an open platform that aims to support Automated Bug Detection (ABD) research in video games. We discuss some open problems in ABD and how they relate to the platform's design, arguing that learning-based solutions are required if further progress is to be made. The platform's key feature is a growing collection of common video game bugs that may be used for training and evaluating ABD approaches.
summary: We present World of Bugs (WOB), an open platform that aims to support Automated Bug Detection (ABD) research in video games. We discuss some open problems in ABD and how they relate to the platform's design, arguing that learning-based solutions are required if further progress is to be made. The platform's key feature is a growing collection of common video game bugs that may be used for training and evaluating ABD approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 World of Bugs (WOB)，这是一个开放平台，旨在支持视频游戏中的自动错误检测 (ABD) 研究。我们讨论了 ABD 中的一些未决问题以及它们与平台设计的关系，认为如果要取得进一步进展，就需要基于学习的解决方案。该平台的主要功能是越来越多地收集常见视频游戏错误，可用于培训和评估 ABD 方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一个开放平台World of Bugs，用于支持3D视频游戏中自动化漏洞检测的研究，并提供常见漏洞数据集以促进相关方法的训练与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化漏洞检测方法存在局限性，需通过开放平台提供标准化数据集和工具，以促进基于机器学习的解决方案研究。
AI.method: 开发World of Bugs平台，整合常见游戏漏洞案例，提供用于训练和评估自动化检测算法的基准数据集与实验环境。
AI.result: 平台已构建完成，并收集了多种常见游戏漏洞，为后续ABD方法的研究提供了基础资源。
AI.conclusion: 基于学习的自动化漏洞检测方法需依赖高质量数据集，World of Bugs平台为该领域研究提供了重要支持，有助于推动技术进步。

title: When It's Not Worth the Paper It's Written On: A Provocation on the Certification of Skills in the Alexa and Google Assistant Ecosystems
title_zh: 当它不值得写在纸上时：对 Alexa 和 Google Assistant 生态系统技能认证的挑衅
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces (CUI 2022)
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of the 4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces (CUI 2022)
abstract: The increasing reach and functionality of voice assistants has allowed them to become a general-purpose platform for tasks like playing music, accessing information, and controlling smart home devices. In order to maintain the quality of third-party skills and to protect children and other members of the public from inappropriate or malicious skills, platform providers have developed content policies and certification procedures that skills must undergo prior to public release. Unfortunately, research suggests that these measures have been ineffective at curating voice assistant platforms, with documented instances of skills with significant security and privacy problems. This provocation paper outlines how the underlying architectures of these platforms had turned skill certification into a seemingly intractable problem, as well as how current certification methods fall short of their full potential. We present a roadmap for improving the state of skill certification on contemporary voice assistant platforms, including research directions and actions that need to be taken by platform vendors. Promoting this change in domestic voice assistants is especially important, as developers of commercial and industrial assistants or other similar contexts increasingly look to these devices for norms and conventions.
summary: The increasing reach and functionality of voice assistants has allowed them to become a general-purpose platform for tasks like playing music, accessing information, and controlling smart home devices. In order to maintain the quality of third-party skills and to protect children and other members of the public from inappropriate or malicious skills, platform providers have developed content policies and certification procedures that skills must undergo prior to public release. Unfortunately, research suggests that these measures have been ineffective at curating voice assistant platforms, with documented instances of skills with significant security and privacy problems. This provocation paper outlines how the underlying architectures of these platforms had turned skill certification into a seemingly intractable problem, as well as how current certification methods fall short of their full potential. We present a roadmap for improving the state of skill certification on contemporary voice assistant platforms, including research directions and actions that need to be taken by platform vendors. Promoting this change in domestic voice assistants is especially important, as developers of commercial and industrial assistants or other similar contexts increasingly look to these devices for norms and conventions.
abstract_zh: 语音助手的覆盖范围和功能不断扩大，使其成为执行播放音乐、访问信息和控制智能家居设备等任务的通用平台。为了保持第三方技能的质量并保护儿童和其他公众免受不当或恶意技能的侵害，平台提供商制定了内容政策和认证程序，技能在公开发布之前必须经过这些政策和认证程序。不幸的是，研究表明，这些措施在管理语音助手平台方面效果不佳，并记录了存在重大安全和隐私问题的技能实例。这篇挑衅性的论文概述了这些平台的底层架构如何将技能认证变成一个看似棘手的问题，以及当前的认证方法如何未能充分发挥其潜力。我们提出了改善当代语音助手平台技能认证状态的路线图，包括平台供应商需要采取的研究方向和行动。推动家用语音助手的这种变化尤其重要，因为商业和工业助手或其他类似环境的开发人员越来越多地关注这些设备的规范和惯例。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Alexa和Google Assistant生态系统中技能认证机制的不足，并提出了改进方向。
AI.motivation: 随着语音助手功能扩展，第三方技能的安全性和隐私问题凸显，现有认证措施未能有效保障平台质量。
AI.method: 通过分析平台架构与认证流程，结合实例验证当前认证机制的缺陷，并提出优化路线图。
AI.result: 指出认证难题源于平台设计缺陷，提出需加强审核标准、透明度及开发者责任的改进方案。
AI.conclusion: 改进技能认证对保障用户安全至关重要，需推动国内语音助手采纳更严格的行业规范。

search_text: When It's Not Worth the Paper It's Written On: A Provocation on the Certification of Skills in the Alexa and Google Assistant Ecosystems 当它不值得写在纸上时：对 Alexa 和 Google Assistant 生态系统技能认证的挑衅 The increasing reach and functionality of voice assistants has allowed them to become a general-purpose platform for tasks like playing music, accessing information, and controlling smart home devices. In order to maintain the quality of third-party skills and to protect children and other members of the public from inappropriate or malicious skills, platform providers have developed content policies and certification procedures that skills must undergo prior to public release. Unfortunately, research suggests that these measures have been ineffective at curating voice assistant platforms, with documented instances of skills with significant security and privacy problems. This provocation paper outlines how the underlying architectures of these platforms had turned skill certification into a seemingly intractable problem, as well as how current certification methods fall short of their full potential. We present a roadmap for improving the state of skill certification on contemporary voice assistant platforms, including research directions and actions that need to be taken by platform vendors. Promoting this change in domestic voice assistants is especially important, as developers of commercial and industrial assistants or other similar contexts increasingly look to these devices for norms and conventions. 语音助手的覆盖范围和功能不断扩大，使其成为执行播放音乐、访问信息和控制智能家居设备等任务的通用平台。为了保持第三方技能的质量并保护儿童和其他公众免受不当或恶意技能的侵害，平台提供商制定了内容政策和认证程序，技能在公开发布之前必须经过这些政策和认证程序。不幸的是，研究表明，这些措施在管理语音助手平台方面效果不佳，并记录了存在重大安全和隐私问题的技能实例。这篇挑衅性的论文概述了这些平台的底层架构如何将技能认证变成一个看似棘手的问题，以及当前的认证方法如何未能充分发挥其潜力。我们提出了改善当代语音助手平台技能认证状态的路线图，包括平台供应商需要采取的研究方向和行动。推动家用语音助手的这种变化尤其重要，因为商业和工业助手或其他类似环境的开发人员越来越多地关注这些设备的规范和惯例。 本文探讨了Alexa和Google Assistant生态系统中技能认证机制的不足，并提出了改进方向。 William Seymour,Mark Cote,Jose Such cs.HC

title: Can you meaningfully consent in eight seconds? Identifying Ethical Issues with Verbal Consent for Voice Assistants
title_zh: 你能在八秒内有意义地表示同意吗？识别语音助手口头同意的道德问题
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of the 4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces (CUI 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.10058
comments: To appear in the Proceedings of the 4th Conference on Conversational User Interfaces (CUI 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.10058
abstract: Determining how voice assistants should broker consent to share data with third party software has proven to be a complex problem. Devices often require users to switch to companion smartphone apps in order to navigate permissions menus for their otherwise hands-free voice assistant. More in line with smartphone app stores, Alexa now offers "voice-forward consent", allowing users to grant skills access to personal data mid-conversation using speech. While more usable and convenient than opening a companion app, asking for consent 'on the fly' can undermine several concepts core to the informed consent process. The intangible nature of voice interfaces further blurs the boundary between parts of an interaction controlled by third-party developers from the underlying platforms. This provocation paper highlights key issues with current verbal consent implementations, outlines directions for potential solutions, and presents five open questions to the research community. In so doing, we hope to help shape the development of usable and effective verbal consent for voice assistants and similar conversational user interfaces.
summary: Determining how voice assistants should broker consent to share data with third party software has proven to be a complex problem. Devices often require users to switch to companion smartphone apps in order to navigate permissions menus for their otherwise hands-free voice assistant. More in line with smartphone app stores, Alexa now offers "voice-forward consent", allowing users to grant skills access to personal data mid-conversation using speech. While more usable and convenient than opening a companion app, asking for consent 'on the fly' can undermine several concepts core to the informed consent process. The intangible nature of voice interfaces further blurs the boundary between parts of an interaction controlled by third-party developers from the underlying platforms. This provocation paper highlights key issues with current verbal consent implementations, outlines directions for potential solutions, and presents five open questions to the research community. In so doing, we hope to help shape the development of usable and effective verbal consent for voice assistants and similar conversational user interfaces.
abstract_zh: 事实证明，确定语音助手应如何征求同意与第三方软件共享数据是一个复杂的问题。设备通常要求用户切换到配套的智能手机应用程序，以便导航免提语音助手的权限菜单。与智能手机应用商店更一致的是，Alexa 现在提供“语音转发同意”功能，允许用户在对话中使用语音授予技能访问个人数据的权限。虽然比打开配套应用程序更有用、更方便，但“即时”请求同意可能会破坏知情同意流程的几个核心概念。语音界面的无形本质进一步模糊了由底层平台的第三方开发人员控制的交互部分之间的界限。这篇挑衅性的论文强调了当前口头同意实施的关键问题，概述了潜在解决方案的方向，并向研究界提出了五个开放性问题。通过这样做，我们希望帮助语音助手和类似的对话用户界面开发可用且有效的口头同意。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨语音助手在数据共享过程中通过口头同意获取用户授权的伦理问题，分析其与知情同意原则的冲突。
AI.motivation: 当前语音助手通过即时语音授权（如Alexa的'voice-forward consent'）简化了数据共享流程，但可能因交互速度过快和界面无形化导致用户无法充分理解授权内容。
AI.method: 通过批判性分析现有语音授权机制，结合隐私伦理框架，提出五个开放性研究问题并探讨潜在解决方案方向。
AI.result: 揭示了语音授权在时效性、用户控制权透明度及第三方开发者边界模糊性方面的核心问题，为后续研究提供讨论框架。
AI.conclusion: 需重新设计符合知情同意原则的语音授权机制，在提升可用性的同时保障用户对数据共享的自主决策权。

title: On three types of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough sets
title_zh: 关于三种类型的基于$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖的粗糙集
abstract: In this paper, we mainly construct three types of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough set models and study the axiom sets, matrix representations and interdependency of these three pairs of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operators. Firstly, we propose three pairs of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operators by introducing the concepts such as $β$-degree of intersection and $β$-subsethood degree, which are generalizations of degree of intersection and subsethood degree, respectively. And then, the axiom set for each of these $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operator is investigated. Thirdly, we give the matrix representations of three types of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operators, which make it valid to calculate the $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based lower and upper rough approximation operators through operations on matrices. Finally, the interdependency of the three pairs of rough approximation operators based on $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering is studied by using the notion of reducible elements and independent elements. In other words, we present the necessary and sufficient conditions under which two $L$-fuzzy $β$-coverings can generate the same lower and upper rough approximation operations.
summary: In this paper, we mainly construct three types of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough set models and study the axiom sets, matrix representations and interdependency of these three pairs of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operators. Firstly, we propose three pairs of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operators by introducing the concepts such as $β$-degree of intersection and $β$-subsethood degree, which are generalizations of degree of intersection and subsethood degree, respectively. And then, the axiom set for each of these $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operator is investigated. Thirdly, we give the matrix representations of three types of $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based rough approximation operators, which make it valid to calculate the $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering-based lower and upper rough approximation operators through operations on matrices. Finally, the interdependency of the three pairs of rough approximation operators based on $L$-fuzzy $β$-covering is studied by using the notion of reducible elements and independent elements. In other words, we present the necessary and sufficient conditions under which two $L$-fuzzy $β$-coverings can generate the same lower and upper rough approximation operations.
abstract_zh: 本文主要构建了三类基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的粗糙集模型，并研究了这三对基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的粗逼近算子的公理集、矩阵表示和相互依赖关系。首先，通过引入$β$-交集度和$β$-子集度等概念，提出三对基于$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖的粗近似算子，它们分别是交集度和子集度的推广。然后，研究每个基于$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖的粗略近似算子的公理集。第三，我们给出了三种基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的粗逼近算子的矩阵表示，这使得通过矩阵运算计算基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的下粗逼近算子和上粗逼近算子是有效的。最后，利用可约元和独立元的概念，研究了基于$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖的三对粗逼近算子的相互依赖性。换句话说，我们提出了两个$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖可以生成相同的下粗近似操作和上粗近似操作的充分必要条件。

AI.tldr: 本文构建了三种基于L-模糊β-覆盖的粗糙集模型，并研究了其公理集、矩阵表示及相互依赖性。
AI.motivation: 为推广传统粗糙集理论，需在模糊环境下引入β-交集度和β-子集度概念以增强模型表达能力。
AI.method: 通过定义β-交集度与β-子集度提出三种近似算子，分析其公理体系，建立矩阵表示方法，并利用可约元素与独立元素研究相互依赖性。
AI.result: 获得三种模型的公理集与矩阵计算方法，明确两种β-覆盖生成相同近似运算的充要条件。
AI.conclusion: 建立了L-模糊β-覆盖粗糙集的理论框架，为模糊数据分析提供了新工具与方法论支持。

In other words, we present the necessary and sufficient conditions under which two $L$-fuzzy $β$-coverings can generate the same lower and upper rough approximation operations. 本文主要构建了三类基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的粗糙集模型，并研究了这三对基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的粗逼近算子的公理集、矩阵表示和相互依赖关系。首先，通过引入$β$-交集度和$β$-子集度等概念，提出三对基于$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖的粗近似算子，它们分别是交集度和子集度的推广。然后，研究每个基于$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖的粗略近似算子的公理集。第三，我们给出了三种基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的粗逼近算子的矩阵表示，这使得通过矩阵运算计算基于$L$-模糊$β$覆盖的下粗逼近算子和上粗逼近算子是有效的。最后，利用可约元和独立元的概念，研究了基于$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖的三对粗逼近算子的相互依赖性。换句话说，我们提出了两个$L$-模糊$β$-覆盖可以生成相同的下粗近似操作和上粗近似操作的充分必要条件。 本文构建了三种基于L-模糊β-覆盖的粗糙集模型，并研究了其公理集、矩阵表示及相互依赖性。 Wei Li,Bin Yang,Junsheng Qiao cs.AI

title: ROSE: A RObust and SEcure DNN Watermarking
title_zh: ROSE：稳健且安全的 DNN 水印
abstract: Protecting the Intellectual Property rights of DNN models is of primary importance prior to their deployment. So far, the proposed methods either necessitate changes to internal model parameters or the machine learning pipeline, or they fail to meet both the security and robustness requirements. This paper proposes a lightweight, robust, and secure black-box DNN watermarking protocol that takes advantage of cryptographic one-way functions as well as the injection of in-task key image-label pairs during the training process. These pairs are later used to prove DNN model ownership during testing. The main feature is that the value of the proof and its security are measurable. The extensive experiments watermarking image classification models for various datasets as well as exposing them to a variety of attacks, show that it provides protection while maintaining an adequate level of security and robustness.
summary: Protecting the Intellectual Property rights of DNN models is of primary importance prior to their deployment. So far, the proposed methods either necessitate changes to internal model parameters or the machine learning pipeline, or they fail to meet both the security and robustness requirements. This paper proposes a lightweight, robust, and secure black-box DNN watermarking protocol that takes advantage of cryptographic one-way functions as well as the injection of in-task key image-label pairs during the training process. These pairs are later used to prove DNN model ownership during testing. The main feature is that the value of the proof and its security are measurable. The extensive experiments watermarking image classification models for various datasets as well as exposing them to a variety of attacks, show that it provides protection while maintaining an adequate level of security and robustness.
abstract_zh: 在部署 DNN 模型之前保护其知识产权至关重要。到目前为止，所提出的方法要么需要更改内部模型参数或机器学习管道，要么无法满足安全性和鲁棒性要求。本文提出了一种轻量级、鲁棒且安全的黑盒 DNN 水印协议，该协议利用加密单向函数以及在训练过程中注入任务内关键图像标签对。这些对随后用于在测试期间证明 DNN 模型所有权。主要特点是证明的价值及其安全性是可衡量的。对各种数据集的图像分类模型加水印以及将其暴露于各种攻击的广泛实验表明，它提供了保护，同时保持了足够的安全性和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级、鲁棒且安全的黑盒深度神经网络（DNN）水印协议ROSE，用于保护DNN模型的知识产权。
AI.motivation: 现有DNN水印方法要么需要修改模型参数或机器学习流程，要么无法同时满足安全性和鲁棒性要求，亟需更高效可靠的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用密码学单向函数和训练过程中注入的in-task关键图像-标签对，在测试阶段通过验证这些对来证明模型所有权，且证明价值与安全性可量化评估。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个数据集上有效抵御各种攻击，在保持模型性能的同时满足安全性和鲁棒性要求。
AI.conclusion: ROSE协议通过可验证的水印机制，在无需修改模型结构的前提下，为DNN模型提供了可量化且安全的知识产权保护方案。

title: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks for Software Effort Estimation
title_zh: 用于软件工作量估计的异构图神经网络
comment: Accepted in the Technical Papers Track of the 16th International Symposium on Empirical Software Engineering and Measurement, 2022 (ESEM 2022)
comments: Accepted in the Technical Papers Track of the 16th International Symposium on Empirical Software Engineering and Measurement, 2022 (ESEM 2022)
abstract: Software effort can be measured by story point [35]. Current approaches for automatically estimating story points focus on applying pre-trained embedding models and deep learning for text regression to solve this problem which required expensive embedding models. We propose HeteroSP, a tool for estimating story points from textual input of Agile software project issues. We select GPT2SP [12] and Deep-SE [8] as the baselines for comparison. First, from the analysis of the story point dataset [8], we conclude that software issues are actually a mixture of natural language sentences with quoted code snippets and have problems related to large-size vocabulary. Second, we provide a module to normalize the input text including words and code tokens of the software issues. Third, we design an algorithm to convert an input software issue to a graph with different types of nodes and edges. Fourth, we construct a heterogeneous graph neural networks model with the support of fastText [6] for constructing initial node embedding to learn and predict the story points of new issues. We did the comparison over three scenarios of estimation, including within project, cross-project within the repository, and cross-project cross repository with our baseline approaches. We achieve the average Mean Absolute Error (MAE) as 2.38, 2.61, and 2.63 for three scenarios. We outperform GPT2SP in 2/3 of the scenarios while outperforming Deep-SE in the most challenging scenario with significantly less amount of running time. We also compare our approaches with different homogeneous graph neural network models and the results show that the heterogeneous graph neural networks model outperforms the homogeneous models in story point estimation. For time performance, we achieve about 570 seconds as the time performance in both three processes: node embedding initialization, model construction, and story point estimation.
summary: Software effort can be measured by story point [35]. Current approaches for automatically estimating story points focus on applying pre-trained embedding models and deep learning for text regression to solve this problem which required expensive embedding models. We propose HeteroSP, a tool for estimating story points from textual input of Agile software project issues. We select GPT2SP [12] and Deep-SE [8] as the baselines for comparison. First, from the analysis of the story point dataset [8], we conclude that software issues are actually a mixture of natural language sentences with quoted code snippets and have problems related to large-size vocabulary. Second, we provide a module to normalize the input text including words and code tokens of the software issues. Third, we design an algorithm to convert an input software issue to a graph with different types of nodes and edges. Fourth, we construct a heterogeneous graph neural networks model with the support of fastText [6] for constructing initial node embedding to learn and predict the story points of new issues. We did the comparison over three scenarios of estimation, including within project, cross-project within the repository, and cross-project cross repository with our baseline approaches. We achieve the average Mean Absolute Error (MAE) as 2.38, 2.61, and 2.63 for three scenarios. We outperform GPT2SP in 2/3 of the scenarios while outperforming Deep-SE in the most challenging scenario with significantly less amount of running time. We also compare our approaches with different homogeneous graph neural network models and the results show that the heterogeneous graph neural networks model outperforms the homogeneous models in story point estimation. For time performance, we achieve about 570 seconds as the time performance in both three processes: node embedding initialization, model construction, and story point estimation.
abstract_zh: 软件工作量可以通过故事点来衡量[35]。当前自动估计故事点的方法侧重于应用预先训练的嵌入模型和文本回归的深度学习来解决这个需要昂贵的嵌入模型的问题。我们提出了 HeteroSP，这是一种根据敏捷软件项目问题的文本输入来估计故事点的工具。我们选择 GPT2SP [12] 和 Deep-SE [8] 作为比较的基线。首先，通过对故事点数据集[8]的分析，我们得出结论，软件问题实际上是自然语言句子与引用代码片段的混合体，并且存在与大词汇量相关的问题。其次，我们提供了一个模块来规范输入文本，包括软件问题的单词和代码标记。第三，我们设计了一种算法，将输入软件问题转换为具有不同类型节点和边的图。第四，我们在 fastText [6] 的支持下构建了一个异构图神经网络模型，用于构建初始节点嵌入来学习和预测新问题的故事点。我们对三种估计场景进行了比较，包括项目内、存储库内的跨项目以及与我们的基线方法的跨项目跨存储库。我们在三种情况下获得的平均平均绝对误差 (MAE) 分别为 2.38、2.61 和 2.63。我们在 2/3 的场景中优于 GPT2SP，而在最具挑战性的场景中优于 Deep-SE，且运行时间显着减少。我们还将我们的方法与不同的同构图神经网络模型进行比较，结果表明异构图神经网络模型在故事点估计方面优于同构模型。对于时间性能，我们在节点嵌入初始化、模型构建和故事点估计这三个过程中实现了大约 570 秒的时间性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HeteroSP工具，利用异构图神经网络从敏捷软件项目问题的文本输入中估计故事点，解决现有方法依赖昂贵嵌入模型和处理大词汇量问题。
AI.motivation: 现有故事点估计方法依赖预训练嵌入模型且处理混合文本与代码片段时存在大词汇量问题，需更高效且准确的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过文本标准化模块处理输入，将软件问题转化为异构图结构，结合fastText生成初始节点嵌入，并构建异构图神经网络模型进行故事点预测。
AI.result: 在三种场景下平均MAE分别为2.38、2.61、2.63，异构模型在跨项目场景中显著优于基线方法，且运行时间更短。
AI.conclusion: 异构图神经网络在故事点估计任务中优于同构模型和现有方法，HeteroSP在跨项目场景下表现出更高的准确性和效率。

title: Object Type Clustering using Markov Directly-Follow Multigraph in Object-Centric Process Mining
title_zh: 在以对象为中心的过程挖掘中使用马尔可夫直接跟随多图进行对象类型聚类
abstract: Object-centric process mining is a new paradigm with more realistic assumptions about underlying data by considering several case notions, e.g., an order handling process can be analyzed based on order, item, package, and route case notions. Including many case notions can result in a very complex model. To cope with such complexity, this paper introduces a new approach to cluster similar case notions based on Markov Directly-Follow Multigraph, which is an extended version of the well-known Directly-Follow Graph supported by many industrial and academic process mining tools. This graph is used to calculate a similarity matrix for discovering clusters of similar case notions based on a threshold. A threshold tuning algorithm is also defined to identify sets of different clusters that can be discovered based on different levels of similarity. Thus, the cluster discovery will not rely on merely analysts' assumptions. The approach is implemented and released as a part of a python library, called processmining, and it is evaluated through a Purchase to Pay (P2P) object-centric event log file. Some discovered clusters are evaluated by discovering Directly Follow-Multigraph by flattening the log based on the clusters. The similarity between identified clusters is also evaluated by calculating the similarity between the behavior of the process models discovered for each case notion using inductive miner based on footprints conformance checking.
summary: Object-centric process mining is a new paradigm with more realistic assumptions about underlying data by considering several case notions, e.g., an order handling process can be analyzed based on order, item, package, and route case notions. Including many case notions can result in a very complex model. To cope with such complexity, this paper introduces a new approach to cluster similar case notions based on Markov Directly-Follow Multigraph, which is an extended version of the well-known Directly-Follow Graph supported by many industrial and academic process mining tools. This graph is used to calculate a similarity matrix for discovering clusters of similar case notions based on a threshold. A threshold tuning algorithm is also defined to identify sets of different clusters that can be discovered based on different levels of similarity. Thus, the cluster discovery will not rely on merely analysts' assumptions. The approach is implemented and released as a part of a python library, called processmining, and it is evaluated through a Purchase to Pay (P2P) object-centric event log file. Some discovered clusters are evaluated by discovering Directly Follow-Multigraph by flattening the log based on the clusters. The similarity between identified clusters is also evaluated by calculating the similarity between the behavior of the process models discovered for each case notion using inductive miner based on footprints conformance checking.
abstract_zh: 以对象为中心的流程挖掘是一种新的范式，通过考虑多种案例概念，对底层数据做出更现实的假设，例如，可以根据订单、项目、包裹和路线案例概念来分析订单处理流程。包含许多案例概念可能会产生非常复杂的模型。为了应对这种复杂性，本文引入了一种基于马尔可夫直接跟随多重图来聚类相似案例概念的新方法，它是众所周知的直接跟随图的扩展版本，受到许多工业和学术流程挖掘工具的支持。该图用于计算相似度矩阵，用于根据阈值发现相似案例概念的聚类。还定义了阈值调整算法来识别可以根据不同相似程度发现的不同簇的集合。因此，星团的发现将不仅仅依赖于分析师的假设。该方法作为 python 库（称为 processmining）的一部分实现和发布，并通过以购买到付款 (P2P) 对象为中心的事件日志文件进行评估。一些发现的集群是通过基于集群展平日志来发现 Directly Follow-Multigraph 来评估的。还通过计算使用基于足迹一致性检查的感应矿工为每个案例概念发现的过程模型的行为之间的相似性来评估已识别集群之间的相似性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于马尔可夫直接跟随多重图的对象类型聚类方法，用于简化对象中心流程挖掘中的复杂模型。
AI.motivation: 对象中心流程挖掘涉及多种案例概念，导致模型复杂度高，传统方法依赖人工假设难以有效处理。
AI.method: 扩展直接跟随图构建马尔可夫直接跟随多重图，计算相似度矩阵并结合阈值调整算法自动聚类，通过Python库实现并基于采购到支付流程日志验证。
AI.result: 成功识别出相似案例概念集群，通过流程模型行为相似度验证聚类有效性，降低了模型复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动化聚类减少人工干预，提升了对象中心流程挖掘的可解释性与实用性。

This graph is used to calculate a similarity matrix for discovering clusters of similar case notions based on a threshold. Thus, the cluster discovery will not rely on merely analysts' assumptions. Some discovered clusters are evaluated by discovering Directly Follow-Multigraph by flattening the log based on the clusters. authors_text: Jia-Run Du,Jia-Chang Feng,Kun-Yu Lin,Fa-Ting Hong,Xiao-Ming Wu,Zhongang Qi,Ying Shan,Wei-Shi Zheng
title: Weakly-Supervised Temporal Action Localization by Progressive Complementary Learning
title_zh: 通过渐进互补学习进行弱监督时间动作定位
abstract: Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization (WSTAL) aims to localize and classify action instances in long untrimmed videos with only video-level category labels. Due to the lack of snippet-level supervision for indicating action boundaries, previous methods typically assign pseudo labels for unlabeled snippets. However, since some action instances of different categories are visually similar, it is non-trivial to exactly label the (usually) one action category for a snippet, and incorrect pseudo labels would impair the localization performance. To address this problem, we propose a novel method from a category exclusion perspective, named Progressive Complementary Learning (ProCL), which gradually enhances the snippet-level supervision. Our method is inspired by the fact that video-level labels precisely indicate the categories that all snippets surely do not belong to, which is ignored by previous works. Accordingly, we first exclude these surely non-existent categories by a complementary learning loss. And then, we introduce the background-aware pseudo complementary labeling in order to exclude more categories for snippets of less ambiguity. Furthermore, for the remaining ambiguous snippets, we attempt to reduce the ambiguity by distinguishing foreground actions from the background. Extensive experimental results show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on two popular benchmarks, namely THUMOS14 and ActivityNet1.3.
summary: Weakly Supervised Temporal Action Localization (WSTAL) aims to localize and classify action instances in long untrimmed videos with only video-level category labels. Due to the lack of snippet-level supervision for indicating action boundaries, previous methods typically assign pseudo labels for unlabeled snippets. However, since some action instances of different categories are visually similar, it is non-trivial to exactly label the (usually) one action category for a snippet, and incorrect pseudo labels would impair the localization performance. To address this problem, we propose a novel method from a category exclusion perspective, named Progressive Complementary Learning (ProCL), which gradually enhances the snippet-level supervision. Our method is inspired by the fact that video-level labels precisely indicate the categories that all snippets surely do not belong to, which is ignored by previous works. Accordingly, we first exclude these surely non-existent categories by a complementary learning loss. And then, we introduce the background-aware pseudo complementary labeling in order to exclude more categories for snippets of less ambiguity. Furthermore, for the remaining ambiguous snippets, we attempt to reduce the ambiguity by distinguishing foreground actions from the background. Extensive experimental results show that our method achieves new state-of-the-art performance on two popular benchmarks, namely THUMOS14 and ActivityNet1.3.
abstract_zh: 弱监督时间动作本地化（WSTAL）旨在仅使用视频级类别标签对未修剪的长视频中的动作实例进行本地化和分类。由于缺乏用于指示操作边界的片段级监督，以前的方法通常为未标记的片段分配伪标签。然而，由于不同类别的某些动作实例在视觉上相似，因此准确标记片段的（通常）一个动作类别并非易事，并且不正确的伪标签会损害本地化性能。为了解决这个问题，我们从类别排除的角度提出了一种新方法，称为渐进互补学习（ProCL），它逐渐增强了片段级别的监督。我们的方法的灵感来自于这样一个事实：视频级标签精确地指示了所有片段肯定不属于的类别，这是以前的作品所忽略的。因此，我们首先通过补充学习损失排除这些肯定不存在的类别。然后，我们引入了背景感知的伪互补标签，以便排除更多类别以获得不太模糊的片段。此外，对于剩余的模糊片段，我们尝试通过区分前景动作和背景来减少模糊性。大量的实验结果表明，我们的方法在两个流行的基准测试（即 THUMOS14 和 ActivityNet1.3）上实现了新的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Progressive Complementary Learning (ProCL)的新方法，用于弱监督时间动作定位（WSTAL），旨在通过逐步增强片段级监督来解决仅使用视频级标签时动作边界定位不准确的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过伪标签处理未标注片段，但不同类别动作视觉相似性导致伪标签错误，影响定位性能。视频级标签中隐含的类别排除信息未被充分利用，需通过渐进式互补学习提升准确性。
AI.method: 提出ProCL方法，首先通过互补学习损失排除片段中肯定不属于的类别，再引入背景感知的伪互补标签进一步排除类别，最后通过区分前景动作与背景减少模糊片段的歧义。
AI.result: 在THUMOS14和ActivityNet1.3两个基准数据集上，该方法均达到新的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过从类别排除角度逐步增强片段级监督，ProCL有效解决了弱监督下动作定位的模糊性问题，为WSTAL任务提供了新思路。
