authors_text: Karolis Martinkus,Pál András Papp,Benedikt Schesch,Roger Wattenhofer
title: Agent-based Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 基于代理的图神经网络
abstract: We present a novel graph neural network we call AgentNet, which is designed specifically for graph-level tasks. AgentNet is inspired by sublinear algorithms, featuring a computational complexity that is independent of the graph size. The architecture of AgentNet differs fundamentally from the architectures of traditional graph neural networks. In AgentNet, some trained \textit{neural agents} intelligently walk the graph, and then collectively decide on the output. We provide an extensive theoretical analysis of AgentNet: We show that the agents can learn to systematically explore their neighborhood and that AgentNet can distinguish some structures that are even indistinguishable by 2-WL. Moreover, AgentNet is able to separate any two graphs which are sufficiently different in terms of subgraphs. We confirm these theoretical results with synthetic experiments on hard-to-distinguish graphs and real-world graph classification tasks. In both cases, we compare favorably not only to standard GNNs but also to computationally more expensive GNN extensions.
summary: We present a novel graph neural network we call AgentNet, which is designed specifically for graph-level tasks. AgentNet is inspired by sublinear algorithms, featuring a computational complexity that is independent of the graph size. The architecture of AgentNet differs fundamentally from the architectures of traditional graph neural networks. In AgentNet, some trained \textit{neural agents} intelligently walk the graph, and then collectively decide on the output. We provide an extensive theoretical analysis of AgentNet: We show that the agents can learn to systematically explore their neighborhood and that AgentNet can distinguish some structures that are even indistinguishable by 2-WL. Moreover, AgentNet is able to separate any two graphs which are sufficiently different in terms of subgraphs. We confirm these theoretical results with synthetic experiments on hard-to-distinguish graphs and real-world graph classification tasks. In both cases, we compare favorably not only to standard GNNs but also to computationally more expensive GNN extensions.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的图神经网络，称为 AgentNet，它是专为图级任务而设计的。 AgentNet 受到次线性算法的启发，其计算复杂度与图大小无关。 AgentNet 的架构与传统图神经网络的架构有根本的不同。在 AgentNet 中，一些经过训练的 \textit{神经代理} 智能地遍历图，然后共同决定输出。我们对 AgentNet 进行了广泛的理论分析：我们表明智能体可以学习系统地探索它们的邻域，并且 AgentNet 可以区分一些甚至 2-WL 无法区分的结构。此外，AgentNet 能够分离在子图方面足够不同的任意两个图。我们通过对难以区分的图和现实世界图分类任务的综合实验证实了这些理论结果。在这两种情况下，我们不仅可以与标准 GNN 进行比较，还可以与计算成本更高的 GNN 扩展进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型图神经网络AgentNet，专为图级任务设计，其计算复杂度与图规模无关。
AI.motivation: 传统图神经网络计算复杂度随图规模增长，难以处理大规模图数据，需设计更高效的图表示学习方法。
AI.method: 构建由神经智能体组成的系统，智能体自主探索图结构并集体决策，结合理论分析证明其结构区分能力。
AI.result: 在合成数据和现实图分类任务中，AgentNet优于标准GNN及更复杂的扩展方法，且计算效率更高。
AI.conclusion: AgentNet通过智能体协作机制实现了高效图表示学习，在保持性能的同时突破了传统GNN的计算瓶颈。

search_text: Agent-based Graph Neural Networks 基于代理的图神经网络 We present a novel graph neural network we call AgentNet, which is designed specifically for graph-level tasks. AgentNet is inspired by sublinear algorithms, featuring a computational complexity that is independent of the graph size. The architecture of AgentNet differs fundamentally from the architectures of traditional graph neural networks. In AgentNet, some trained \textit{neural agents} intelligently walk the graph, and then collectively decide on the output. We provide an extensive theoretical analysis of AgentNet: We show that the agents can learn to systematically explore their neighborhood and that AgentNet can distinguish some structures that are even indistinguishable by 2-WL. Moreover, AgentNet is able to separate any two graphs which are sufficiently different in terms of subgraphs. We confirm these theoretical results with synthetic experiments on hard-to-distinguish graphs and real-world graph classification tasks. In both cases, we compare favorably not only to standard GNNs but also to computationally more expensive GNN extensions. 我们提出了一种新颖的图神经网络，称为 AgentNet，它是专为图级任务而设计的。 AgentNet 受到次线性算法的启发，其计算复杂度与图大小无关。 AgentNet 的架构与传统图神经网络的架构有根本的不同。在 AgentNet 中，一些经过训练的 \textit{神经代理} 智能地遍历图，然后共同决定输出。我们对 AgentNet 进行了广泛的理论分析：我们表明智能体可以学习系统地探索它们的邻域，并且 AgentNet 可以区分一些甚至 2-WL 无法区分的结构。此外，AgentNet 能够分离在子图方面足够不同的任意两个图。我们通过对难以区分的图和现实世界图分类任务的综合实验证实了这些理论结果。在这两种情况下，我们不仅可以与标准 GNN 进行比较，还可以与计算成本更高的 GNN 扩展进行比较。 本文提出一种新型图神经网络AgentNet，专为图级任务设计，其计算复杂度与图规模无关。 Karolis Martinkus,Pál András Papp,Benedikt Schesch,Roger Wattenhofer cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: A Systematic Comparison of Phonetic Aware Techniques for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 用于语音增强的语音感知技术的系统比较
abstract: Speech enhancement has seen great improvement in recent years using end-to-end neural networks. However, most models are agnostic to the spoken phonetic content. Recently, several studies suggested phonetic-aware speech enhancement, mostly using perceptual supervision. Yet, injecting phonetic features during model optimization can take additional forms (e.g., model conditioning). In this paper, we conduct a systematic comparison between different methods of incorporating phonetic information in a speech enhancement model. By conducting a series of controlled experiments, we observe the influence of different phonetic content models as well as various feature-injection techniques on enhancement performance, considering both causal and non-causal models. Specifically, we evaluate three settings for injecting phonetic information, namely: i) feature conditioning; ii) perceptual supervision; and iii) regularization. Phonetic features are obtained using an intermediate layer of either a supervised pre-trained Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model or by using a pre-trained Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) model. We further observe the effect of choosing different embedding layers on performance, considering both manual and learned configurations. Results suggest that using a SSL model as phonetic features outperforms the ASR one in most cases. Interestingly, the conditioning setting performs best among the evaluated configurations.
summary: Speech enhancement has seen great improvement in recent years using end-to-end neural networks. However, most models are agnostic to the spoken phonetic content. Recently, several studies suggested phonetic-aware speech enhancement, mostly using perceptual supervision. Yet, injecting phonetic features during model optimization can take additional forms (e.g., model conditioning). In this paper, we conduct a systematic comparison between different methods of incorporating phonetic information in a speech enhancement model. By conducting a series of controlled experiments, we observe the influence of different phonetic content models as well as various feature-injection techniques on enhancement performance, considering both causal and non-causal models. Specifically, we evaluate three settings for injecting phonetic information, namely: i) feature conditioning; ii) perceptual supervision; and iii) regularization. Phonetic features are obtained using an intermediate layer of either a supervised pre-trained Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) model or by using a pre-trained Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) model. We further observe the effect of choosing different embedding layers on performance, considering both manual and learned configurations. Results suggest that using a SSL model as phonetic features outperforms the ASR one in most cases. Interestingly, the conditioning setting performs best among the evaluated configurations.
abstract_zh: 近年来，使用端到端神经网络，语音增强有了很大的进步。然而，大多数模型对于口语语音内容是不可知的。最近，一些研究提出了语音感知语音增强，主要使用感知监督。然而，在模型优化期间注入语音特征可以采取其他形式（例如，模型调节）。在本文中，我们对在语音增强模型中合并语音信息的不同方法进行了系统比较。通过进行一系列受控实验，我们观察了不同语音内容模型以及各种特征注入技术对增强性能的影响，同时考虑了因果模型和非因果模型。具体来说，我们评估了注入语音信息的三种设置，即：i）特征调节； ii) 感性监督； iii) 正规化。语音特征是使用有监督的预训练自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型的中间层或使用预训练的自监督学习 (SSL) 模型获得的。我们进一步观察选择不同嵌入层对性能的影响，同时考虑手动和学习配置。结果表明，在大多数情况下，使用 SSL 模型作为语音特征优于 ASR 模型。有趣的是，调节设置在评估的配置中表现最好。

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了不同方法在语音增强模型中融入音素信息的效果，评估了特征条件、感知监督和正则化三种设置，并分析了预训练ASR和SSL模型特征的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管端到端神经网络显著提升了语音增强效果，但多数模型未考虑语音的音素内容。现有研究多采用感知监督注入音素信息，但其他形式（如模型条件化）的效果尚未系统比较。
AI.method: 通过控制实验对比三种音素信息注入方式（特征条件化、感知监督、正则化），使用预训练ASR或SSL模型的中间层特征，并分析不同嵌入层配置对性能的影响。
AI.result: SSL模型特征在多数情况下优于ASR模型，且条件化设置在所有评估配置中表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 条件化方法结合SSL模型特征能有效提升语音增强性能，未来可进一步探索更深度的音素信息整合策略。

authors_text: Richard D. Lange,Devin Kwok,Jordan Matelsky,Xinyue Wang,David S. Rolnick,Konrad P. Kording
title: Neural Networks as Paths through the Space of Representations
title_zh: 神经网络作为表示空间的路径
abstract: Deep neural networks implement a sequence of layer-by-layer operations that are each relatively easy to understand, but the resulting overall computation is generally difficult to understand. We consider a simple hypothesis for interpreting the layer-by-layer construction of useful representations: perhaps the role of each layer is to reformat information to reduce the "distance" to the desired outputs. With this framework, the layer-wise computation implemented by a deep neural network can be viewed as a path through a high-dimensional representation space. We formalize this intuitive idea of a "path" by leveraging recent advances in *metric* representational similarity. We extend existing representational distance methods by computing geodesics, angles, and projections of representations, going beyond mere layer distances. We then demonstrate these tools by visualizing and comparing the paths taken by ResNet and VGG architectures on CIFAR-10. We conclude by sketching additional ways that this kind of representational geometry can be used to understand and interpret network training, and to describe novel kinds of similarities between different models.
summary: Deep neural networks implement a sequence of layer-by-layer operations that are each relatively easy to understand, but the resulting overall computation is generally difficult to understand. We consider a simple hypothesis for interpreting the layer-by-layer construction of useful representations: perhaps the role of each layer is to reformat information to reduce the "distance" to the desired outputs. With this framework, the layer-wise computation implemented by a deep neural network can be viewed as a path through a high-dimensional representation space. We formalize this intuitive idea of a "path" by leveraging recent advances in *metric* representational similarity. We extend existing representational distance methods by computing geodesics, angles, and projections of representations, going beyond mere layer distances. We then demonstrate these tools by visualizing and comparing the paths taken by ResNet and VGG architectures on CIFAR-10. We conclude by sketching additional ways that this kind of representational geometry can be used to understand and interpret network training, and to describe novel kinds of similarities between different models.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络实现了一系列逐层操作，每个操作都相对容易理解，但最终的整体计算通常难以理解。我们考虑一个简单的假设来解释有用表示的逐层构造：也许每一层的作用是重新格式化信息以减少与所需输出的“距离”。通过这个框架，深度神经网络实现的分层计算可以被视为穿过高维表示空间的路径。我们通过利用*度量*表示相似性方面的最新进展，将这种直观的“路径”概念形式化。我们通过计算表示的测地线、角度和投影来扩展现有的表示距离方法，而不仅仅是层距离。然后，我们通过可视化和比较 ResNet 和 VGG 架构在 CIFAR-10 上所采取的路径来演示这些工具。最后，我们概述了这种表示几何可用于理解和解释网络训练，并描述不同模型之间新颖的相似性的其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析深度神经网络在表示空间中的路径，解释其逐层构建有用表示的过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络的逐层操作易于理解，但整体计算难以解释。作者提出假设：每层通过减少到目标输出的距离来重新格式化信息，从而将网络视为表示空间中的路径。
AI.method: 利用度量表示相似性技术，计算测地线、角度和投影，扩展现有表示距离方法，并可视化比较ResNet和VGG在CIFAR-10上的路径。
AI.result: 成功可视化并比较了ResNet和VGG在CIFAR-10数据集上的表示路径，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可帮助理解网络训练过程，并揭示不同模型间的新型相似性，为模型解释提供新视角。

tldr: 本文通过分析深度神经网络在表示空间中的路径，解释其逐层构建有用表示的过程。
motivation: 尽管神经网络的逐层操作易于理解，但整体计算难以解释。作者提出假设：每层通过减少到目标输出的距离来重新格式化信息，从而将网络视为表示空间中的路径。
method: 利用度量表示相似性技术，计算测地线、角度和投影，扩展现有表示距离方法，并可视化比较ResNet和VGG在CIFAR-10上的路径。
result: 成功可视化并比较了ResNet和VGG在CIFAR-10数据集上的表示路径，验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: 该方法可帮助理解网络训练过程，并揭示不同模型间的新型相似性，为模型解释提供新视角。
search_text: Neural Networks as Paths through the Space of Representations 神经网络作为表示空间的路径 Deep neural networks implement a sequence of layer-by-layer operations that are each relatively easy to understand, but the resulting overall computation is generally difficult to understand. We consider a simple hypothesis for interpreting the layer-by-layer construction of useful representations: perhaps the role of each layer is to reformat information to reduce the "distance" to the desired outputs. With this framework, the layer-wise computation implemented by a deep neural network can be viewed as a path through a high-dimensional representation space. We formalize this intuitive idea of a "path" by leveraging recent advances in *metric* representational similarity. We extend existing representational distance methods by computing geodesics, angles, and projections of representations, going beyond mere layer distances. We then demonstrate these tools by visualizing and comparing the paths taken by ResNet and VGG architectures on CIFAR-10. We conclude by sketching additional ways that this kind of representational geometry can be used to understand and interpret network training, and to describe novel kinds of similarities between different models. 深度神经网络实现了一系列逐层操作，每个操作都相对容易理解，但最终的整体计算通常难以理解。我们考虑一个简单的假设来解释有用表示的逐层构造：也许每一层的作用是重新格式化信息以减少与所需输出的“距离”。通过这个框架，深度神经网络实现的分层计算可以被视为穿过高维表示空间的路径。我们通过利用*度量*表示相似性方面的最新进展，将这种直观的“路径”概念形式化。我们通过计算表示的测地线、角度和投影来扩展现有的表示距离方法，而不仅仅是层距离。然后，我们通过可视化和比较 ResNet 和 VGG 架构在 CIFAR-10 上所采取的路径来演示这些工具。最后，我们概述了这种表示几何可用于理解和解释网络训练，并描述不同模型之间新颖的相似性的其他方法。 本文通过分析深度神经网络在表示空间中的路径，解释其逐层构建有用表示的过程。 Richard D. Lange,Devin Kwok,Jordan Matelsky,Xinyue Wang,David S. Rolnick,Konrad P. Kording cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Delong Chen,Zhao Wu,Fan Liu,Zaiquan Yang,Huaxi Huang,Ying Tan,Erjin Zhou
title: ProtoCLIP: Prototypical Contrastive Language Image Pretraining
title_zh: ProtoCLIP：原型对比语言图像预训练
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS)
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems (TNNLS)
abstract: Contrastive Language Image Pretraining (CLIP) has received widespread attention, since its learned representations can be transferred well to various downstream tasks. During the training process of the CLIP model, the InfoNCE objective aligns positive image-text pairs and separates negative ones. We show an underlying representation grouping effect during this process: the InfoNCE objective indirectly groups semantically similar representations together via randomly emerged within-modal anchors. Based on this understanding, in this paper, Prototypical Contrastive Language Image Pretraining (ProtoCLIP) is introduced to enhance such grouping by boosting its efficiency and increasing its robustness against the modality gap. Specifically, ProtoCLIP sets up prototype-level discrimination between image and text spaces, which efficiently transfers higher-level structural knowledge. Further, Prototypical Back Translation (PBT) is proposed to decouple representation grouping from representation alignment, resulting in effective learning of meaningful representations under large modality gap. The PBT also enables us to introduce additional external teachers with richer prior language knowledge. ProtoCLIP is trained with an online episodic training strategy, which makes it can be scaled up to unlimited amounts of data. We train our ProtoCLIP on Conceptual Captions and achieved an +5.81% ImageNet linear probing improvement and an +2.01% ImageNet zero-shot classification improvement. On the larger YFCC-15M dataset, ProtoCLIP matches the performance of CLIP with 33% of training time. Codes are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/protoclip.
summary: Contrastive Language Image Pretraining (CLIP) has received widespread attention, since its learned representations can be transferred well to various downstream tasks. During the training process of the CLIP model, the InfoNCE objective aligns positive image-text pairs and separates negative ones. We show an underlying representation grouping effect during this process: the InfoNCE objective indirectly groups semantically similar representations together via randomly emerged within-modal anchors. Based on this understanding, in this paper, Prototypical Contrastive Language Image Pretraining (ProtoCLIP) is introduced to enhance such grouping by boosting its efficiency and increasing its robustness against the modality gap. Specifically, ProtoCLIP sets up prototype-level discrimination between image and text spaces, which efficiently transfers higher-level structural knowledge. Further, Prototypical Back Translation (PBT) is proposed to decouple representation grouping from representation alignment, resulting in effective learning of meaningful representations under large modality gap. The PBT also enables us to introduce additional external teachers with richer prior language knowledge. ProtoCLIP is trained with an online episodic training strategy, which makes it can be scaled up to unlimited amounts of data. We train our ProtoCLIP on Conceptual Captions and achieved an +5.81% ImageNet linear probing improvement and an +2.01% ImageNet zero-shot classification improvement. On the larger YFCC-15M dataset, ProtoCLIP matches the performance of CLIP with 33% of training time. Codes are available at https://github.com/megvii-research/protoclip.
abstract_zh: 对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）受到了广泛的关注，因为它学习到的表示可以很好地迁移到各种下游任务。在 CLIP 模型的训练过程中，InfoNCE 目标会对齐正图像文本对并分离负图像文本对。我们在此过程中展示了潜在的表示分组效应：InfoNCE 目标通过随机出现的模态锚点将语义相似的表示间接分组在一起。基于这种理解，本文引入了原型对比语言图像预训练（ProtoCLIP），通过提高其效率和针对模态差距的鲁棒性来增强这种分组。具体来说，ProtoCLIP 在图像和文本空间之间建立了原型级别的区分，从而有效地传递了更高级别的结构知识。此外，提出了原型反向翻译（PBT）来将表示分组与表示对齐解耦，从而在大模态差距下有效学习有意义的表示。 PBT 还使我们能够引入更多具有更丰富的先前语言知识的外部教师。 ProtoCLIP 采用在线情景训练策略进行训练，这使得它可以扩展到无限量的数据。我们在概念字幕上训练 ProtoCLIP，并实现了 +5.81% ImageNet 线性探测改进和 +2.01% ImageNet 零样本分类改进。在更大的 YFCC-15M 数据集上，ProtoCLIP 的性能与 CLIP 的性能相当，训练时间缩短了 33%。代码可在 https://github.com/megvii-research/protoclip 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProtoCLIP方法，通过原型对比学习增强CLIP模型在跨模态表示对齐中的效率和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: CLIP模型在训练过程中存在表示分组效应，但其InfoNCE目标对模态间隙敏感且效率不足，需提升分组效率并增强跨模态对齐能力。
AI.method: 引入原型级图像-文本空间判别，设计原型反向翻译（PBT）解耦表示分组与对齐过程，并采用在线情景化训练策略实现大规模数据扩展。
AI.result: 在Conceptual Captions数据集上实现ImageNet线性探针+5.81%、零样本分类+2.01%提升；在YFCC-15M数据集上以33%训练时间匹配CLIP性能。
AI.conclusion: ProtoCLIP通过原型机制和PBT方法有效提升了跨模态预训练的效率与鲁棒性，为大规模数据训练提供了可扩展框架。

title: Bridging the gap: Generating a design space model of Socially Assistive Robots (SARs) for Older Adults using Participatory Design (PD)
title_zh: 弥合差距：使用参与式设计 (PD) 生成老年人社交辅助机器人 (SAR) 的设计空间模型
abstract: Participatory Design (PD) methods are effective in understanding older adults' perspectives, concerns, and wishes and generating ideas for new intelligent aids. The aim of our study was first to map perceptions and explore the needs of older users from socially assistive robots (SARs) and then, to integrate new tools and experiences for end users to express their needs as part of a PD process. The outcome of the process is a design space model of functional, behavioral, and visual relationships and elicited emotions. This process enables to explore, map, and understand the needs of older users before and after experiencing with SARs, and to learn how they impact robotic designs, behavior, and functionality. First, by interviewing older adults, caregivers, and relatives we learned older adults' daily routines, habits, and wishes. Then, we reconstructed those needs into design requirements and further detailed them with older adults using focus groups. Based on the functional, behavioral, and visual design factors that emerged from this phase, we built experimental human-robot tasks, on a commercially available robot, to examine feasibility and acceptance of the technology in one-on-one interactions. Participants' responses throughout the study led to the creation of the design space model mapping relationships and elicited emotions.
summary: Participatory Design (PD) methods are effective in understanding older adults' perspectives, concerns, and wishes and generating ideas for new intelligent aids. The aim of our study was first to map perceptions and explore the needs of older users from socially assistive robots (SARs) and then, to integrate new tools and experiences for end users to express their needs as part of a PD process. The outcome of the process is a design space model of functional, behavioral, and visual relationships and elicited emotions. This process enables to explore, map, and understand the needs of older users before and after experiencing with SARs, and to learn how they impact robotic designs, behavior, and functionality. First, by interviewing older adults, caregivers, and relatives we learned older adults' daily routines, habits, and wishes. Then, we reconstructed those needs into design requirements and further detailed them with older adults using focus groups. Based on the functional, behavioral, and visual design factors that emerged from this phase, we built experimental human-robot tasks, on a commercially available robot, to examine feasibility and acceptance of the technology in one-on-one interactions. Participants' responses throughout the study led to the creation of the design space model mapping relationships and elicited emotions.
abstract_zh: 参与式设计（PD）方法可以有效地理解老年人的观点、担忧和愿望，并为新的智能辅助工具产生想法。我们研究的目的首先是通过社交辅助机器人 (SAR) 绘制老年用户的认知并探索其需求，然后整合新的工具和体验，让最终用户在 PD 流程中表达他们的需求。该过程的结果是功能、行为和视觉关系以及引发的情感的设计空间模型。此过程能够探索、映射和了解老年用户在体验 SAR 之前和之后的需求，并了解它们如何影响机器人的设计、行为和功能。首先，通过采访老年人、照顾者和亲戚，我们了解了老年人的日常生活、习惯和愿望。然后，我们将这些需求重新构建为设计要求，并通过焦点小组与老年人进一步详细说明。基于此阶段出现的功能、行为和视觉设计因素，我们在商用机器人上构建了实验性人机任务，以检查该技术在一对一交互中的可行性和接受度。参与者在整个研究过程中的反应导致了映射关系的设计空间模型的创建并引发了情感。

AI.tldr: 本文通过参与式设计方法，构建针对老年人的社会辅助机器人（SARs）设计空间模型，以整合用户需求并指导机器人设计。
AI.motivation: 现有社会辅助机器人设计缺乏对老年人实际需求的深入理解，需通过参与式设计方法挖掘其功能、行为及情感需求，以提升机器人接受度与实用性。
AI.method: 通过访谈老年人、护理人员及亲属获取日常需求，结合焦点小组细化设计要求，并基于商业机器人进行实验任务验证技术可行性与用户接受度。
AI.result: 生成涵盖功能、行为、视觉关系及情感映射的设计空间模型，揭示老年人在使用SARs前后的需求变化及其对机器人设计的影响。
AI.conclusion: 参与式设计有效整合老年人需求，设计空间模型为未来SARs开发提供框架，强调用户参与在提升机器人适老化设计中的关键作用。

The aim of our study was first to map perceptions and explore the needs of older users from socially assistive robots (SARs) and then, to integrate new tools and experiences for end users to express their needs as part of a PD process. The outcome of the process is a design space model of functional, behavioral, and visual relationships and elicited emotions. This process enables to explore, map, and understand the needs of older users before and after experiencing with SARs, and to learn how they impact robotic designs, behavior, and functionality. First, by interviewing older adults, caregivers, and relatives we learned older adults' daily routines, habits, and wishes. Then, we reconstructed those needs into design requirements and further detailed them with older adults using focus groups. Based on the functional, behavioral, and visual design factors that emerged from this phase, we built experimental human-robot tasks, on a commercially available robot, to examine feasibility and acceptance of the technology in one-on-one interactions. Participants' responses throughout the study led to the creation of the design space model mapping relationships and elicited emotions. 参与式设计（PD）方法可以有效地理解老年人的观点、担忧和愿望，并为新的智能辅助工具产生想法。我们研究的目的首先是通过社交辅助机器人 (SAR) 绘制老年用户的认知并探索其需求，然后整合新的工具和体验，让最终用户在 PD 流程中表达他们的需求。该过程的结果是功能、行为和视觉关系以及引发的情感的设计空间模型。此过程能够探索、映射和了解老年用户在体验 SAR 之前和之后的需求，并了解它们如何影响机器人的设计、行为和功能。首先，通过采访老年人、照顾者和亲戚，我们了解了老年人的日常生活、习惯和愿望。然后，我们将这些需求重新构建为设计要求，并通过焦点小组与老年人进一步详细说明。基于此阶段出现的功能、行为和视觉设计因素，我们在商用机器人上构建了实验性人机任务，以检查该技术在一对一交互中的可行性和接受度。参与者在整个研究过程中的反应导致了映射关系的设计空间模型的创建并引发了情感。 本文通过参与式设计方法，构建针对老年人的社会辅助机器人（SARs）设计空间模型，以整合用户需求并指导机器人设计。 Adi Bulgaro,Ela Liberman-Pincu,Tal Oron-Gilad cs.HC

title: Identity Documents Authentication based on Forgery Detection of Guilloche Pattern
title_zh: 基于扭索图案防伪检测的身份证件认证
abstract: In cases such as digital enrolment via mobile and online services, identity document verification is critical in order to efficiently detect forgery and therefore build user trust in the digital world. In this paper, an authentication model for identity documents based on forgery detection of guilloche patterns is proposed. The proposed approach is made up of two steps: feature extraction and similarity measure between a pair of feature vectors of identity documents. The feature extraction step involves learning the similarity between a pair of identity documents via a convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture and ends by extracting highly discriminative features between them. While, the similarity measure step is applied to decide if a given identity document is authentic or forged. In this work, these two steps are combined together to achieve two objectives: (i) extracted features should have good anticollision (discriminative) capabilities to distinguish between a pair of identity documents belonging to different classes, (ii) checking out the conformity of the guilloche pattern of a given identity document and its similarity to the guilloche pattern of an authentic version of the same country. Experiments are conducted in order to analyze and identify the most proper parameters to achieve higher authentication performance. The experimental results are performed on the MIDV-2020 dataset. The results show the ability of the proposed approach to extract the relevant characteristics of the processed pair of identity documents in order to model the guilloche patterns, and thus distinguish them correctly. The implementation code and the forged dataset are provided here (https://drive.google.com/id-FDGP-1)

In this paper, an authentication model for identity documents based on forgery detection of guilloche patterns is proposed. The proposed approach is made up of two steps: feature extraction and similarity measure between a pair of feature vectors of identity documents. The feature extraction step involves learning the similarity between a pair of identity documents via a convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture and ends by extracting highly discriminative features between them. While, the similarity measure step is applied to decide if a given identity document is authentic or forged. In this work, these two steps are combined together to achieve two objectives: (i) extracted features should have good anticollision (discriminative) capabilities to distinguish between a pair of identity documents belonging to different classes, (ii) checking out the conformity of the guilloche pattern of a given identity document and its similarity to the guilloche pattern of an authentic version of the same country. Experiments are conducted in order to analyze and identify the most proper parameters to achieve higher authentication performance. The experimental results are performed on the MIDV-2020 dataset. The results show the ability of the proposed approach to extract the relevant characteristics of the processed pair of identity documents in order to model the guilloche patterns, and thus distinguish them correctly. The implementation code and the forged dataset are provided here (https://drive.google.com/id-FDGP-1)
abstract_zh: 在通过移动和在线服务进行数字注册等情况下，身份证件验证对于有效检测伪造行为并从而建立用户对数字世界的信任至关重要。本文提出了一种基于扭索图案伪造检测的身份证件认证模型。所提出的方法由两个步骤组成：特征提取和身份证件特征向量对之间的相似性测量。特征提取步骤涉及通过卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构学习一对身份证件之间的相似性，并通过提取它们之间的高度区分性特征来结束。同时，相似性测量步骤用于确定给定的身份证件是真实的还是伪造的。在这项工作中，这两个步骤结合在一起以实现两个目标：（i）提取的特征应具有良好的防冲突（区分）能力，以区分属于不同类别的一对身份证件，（ii）检查给定身份证件的扭索图案的一致性及其与同一国家真实版本的扭索图案的相似性。进行实验是为了分析和确定最合适的参数以实现更高的身份验证性能。实验结果在 MIDV-2020 数据集上进行。结果表明，所提出的方法能够提取已处理的一对身份证件的相关特征，以便对扭索图案进行建模，从而正确区分它们。这里提供了实现代码和伪造的数据集（https://drive.google.com/id-FDGP-1）

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于凹凸花纹伪造检测的身份文件认证方法，通过特征提取和相似度度量实现身份文件真伪鉴别。
AI.motivation: 在数字注册和在线服务场景中，身份文件验证是建立数字世界用户信任的关键，需高效检测伪造文件以保障安全。
AI.method: 方法分为两步：首先利用卷积神经网络（CNN）学习身份文件对的相似性并提取高判别特征；其次通过相似度度量判断文件真伪，结合抗碰撞能力和花纹一致性验证。
AI.result: 在MIDV-2020数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效提取特征并建模凹凸花纹，准确区分真伪文件。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的基于凹凸花纹伪造检测的身份文件认证方法在实验中验证了有效性，为数字身份验证提供了安全可靠的解决方案。

title: AdvSmo: Black-box Adversarial Attack by Smoothing Linear Structure of Texture
title_zh: AdvSmo：通过平滑纹理线性结构进行黑盒对抗攻击
abstract: Black-box attacks usually face two problems: poor transferability and the inability to evade the adversarial defense. To overcome these shortcomings, we create an original approach to generate adversarial examples by smoothing the linear structure of the texture in the benign image, called AdvSmo. We construct the adversarial examples without relying on any internal information to the target model and design the imperceptible-high attack success rate constraint to guide the Gabor filter to select appropriate angles and scales to smooth the linear texture from the input images to generate adversarial examples. Benefiting from the above design concept, AdvSmo will generate adversarial examples with strong transferability and solid evasiveness. Finally, compared to the four advanced black-box adversarial attack methods, for the eight target models, the results show that AdvSmo improves the average attack success rate by 9% on the CIFAR-10 and 16% on the Tiny-ImageNet dataset compared to the best of these attack methods.
summary: Black-box attacks usually face two problems: poor transferability and the inability to evade the adversarial defense. To overcome these shortcomings, we create an original approach to generate adversarial examples by smoothing the linear structure of the texture in the benign image, called AdvSmo. We construct the adversarial examples without relying on any internal information to the target model and design the imperceptible-high attack success rate constraint to guide the Gabor filter to select appropriate angles and scales to smooth the linear texture from the input images to generate adversarial examples. Benefiting from the above design concept, AdvSmo will generate adversarial examples with strong transferability and solid evasiveness. Finally, compared to the four advanced black-box adversarial attack methods, for the eight target models, the results show that AdvSmo improves the average attack success rate by 9% on the CIFAR-10 and 16% on the Tiny-ImageNet dataset compared to the best of these attack methods.
abstract_zh: 黑盒攻击通常面临两个问题：可转移性差和无法逃避对抗性防御。为了克服这些缺点，我们创建了一种原始方法，通过平滑良性图像中纹理的线性结构来生成对抗性示例，称为 AdvSmo。我们在不依赖于目标模型的任何内部信息的情况下构建对抗性示例，并设计难以察觉的高攻击成功率约束来引导Gabor滤波器选择适当的角度和尺度来平滑输入图像中的线性纹理以生成对抗性示例。受益于上述设计理念，AdvSmo 将生成具有较强可迁移性和坚实回避性的对抗样本。最后，与四种先进的黑盒对抗攻击方法相比，对于八个目标模型，结果表明，与这些攻击方法中最好的攻击方法相比，AdvSmo 在 CIFAR-10 上平均攻击成功率提高了 9%，在 Tiny-ImageNet 数据集上提高了 16%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdvSmo方法，通过平滑良性图像中的纹理线性结构生成对抗样本，以解决黑盒攻击中迁移性差和难以绕过防御的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有黑盒攻击方法存在迁移性不足及无法有效规避对抗防御的缺陷，亟需一种无需模型内部信息且能生成高成功率对抗样本的新方法。
AI.method: 设计基于Gabor滤波器的纹理平滑策略，通过不可感知性与高攻击成功率约束，自动选择合适角度和尺度参数，消除图像中线性纹理以生成对抗样本。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和Tiny-ImageNet数据集上，AdvSmo相比四种先进黑盒攻击方法平均攻击成功率分别提升9%和16%。
AI.conclusion: AdvSmo通过纹理平滑机制有效提升了黑盒攻击的迁移性与防御绕过能力，为对抗样本生成提供了新思路。

title: Human-AI communication for human-human communication: Applying interpretable unsupervised anomaly detection to executive coaching
title_zh: 用于人与人交流的人与人工智能通信：将可解释的无监督异常检测应用于高管培训
comment: For the Communication in Human-AI Interaction Workshop at the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence
comments: For the Communication in Human-AI Interaction Workshop at the 31st International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence
abstract: In this paper, we discuss the potential of applying unsupervised anomaly detection in constructing AI-based interactive systems that deal with highly contextual situations, i.e., human-human communication, in collaboration with domain experts. We reached this approach of utilizing unsupervised anomaly detection through our experience of developing a computational support tool for executive coaching, which taught us the importance of providing interpretable results so that expert coaches can take both the results and contexts into account. The key idea behind this approach is to leave room for expert coaches to unleash their open-ended interpretations, rather than simplifying the nature of social interactions to well-defined problems that are tractable by conventional supervised algorithms. In addition, we found that this approach can be extended to nurturing novice coaches; by prompting them to interpret the results from the system, it can provide the coaches with educational opportunities. Although the applicability of this approach should be validated in other domains, we believe that the idea of leveraging unsupervised anomaly detection to construct AI-based interactive systems would shed light on another direction of human-AI communication.
summary: In this paper, we discuss the potential of applying unsupervised anomaly detection in constructing AI-based interactive systems that deal with highly contextual situations, i.e., human-human communication, in collaboration with domain experts. We reached this approach of utilizing unsupervised anomaly detection through our experience of developing a computational support tool for executive coaching, which taught us the importance of providing interpretable results so that expert coaches can take both the results and contexts into account. The key idea behind this approach is to leave room for expert coaches to unleash their open-ended interpretations, rather than simplifying the nature of social interactions to well-defined problems that are tractable by conventional supervised algorithms. In addition, we found that this approach can be extended to nurturing novice coaches; by prompting them to interpret the results from the system, it can provide the coaches with educational opportunities. Although the applicability of this approach should be validated in other domains, we believe that the idea of leveraging unsupervised anomaly detection to construct AI-based interactive systems would shed light on another direction of human-AI communication.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们讨论了与领域专家合作，应用无监督异常检测来构建基于人工智能的交互式系统，以处理高度情境化的情况，即人与人之间的交流。我们通过开发用于高管教练的计算支持工具的经验，实现了利用无监督异常检测的方法，这教会了我们提供可解释结果的重要性，以便专家教练可以同时考虑结果和背景。这种方法背后的关键思想是为专家教练留出空间来释放他们的开放式解释，而不是将社交互动的本质简化为传统监督算法可以处理的明确定义的问题。此外，我们发现这种方法可以推广到新手教练的培养上；通过提示他们解释系统的结果，它可以为教练提供教育机会。尽管这种方法的适用性应该在其他领域得到验证，但我们相信，利用无监督异常检测来构建基于人工智能的交互系统的想法将揭示人类与人工智能通信的另一个方向。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何通过可解释的无监督异常检测技术构建AI系统，以支持高管教练的人际沟通场景，并促进人类与AI的协作。
AI.motivation: 传统监督算法难以处理复杂的人际互动，而专家教练需要结合上下文进行开放解释，因此需开发更灵活的AI辅助工具，并为新手教练提供教育机会。
AI.method: 基于高管教练工具开发经验，采用可解释的无监督异常检测技术，结合领域专家反馈，保留开放解释空间，并通过结果引导新手教练学习。
AI.result: 成功构建了支持高管教练的计算工具，验证了方法的可行性，并发现其可扩展至新手教练培训，但需进一步跨领域验证。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为AI在复杂人际场景中的应用提供了新方向，强调可解释性与专家协作的重要性，未来需拓展至其他领域以验证普适性。

authors_text: Xueyang Kang,Ariel Herrera,Henry Lema,Esteban Valencia,Patrick Vandewalle
title: Adaptive Sampling-based Particle Filter for Visual-inertial Gimbal in the Wild
title_zh: 基于自适应采样的粒子滤波器，用于野外视觉惯性万向节
comment: content in 6 pages, 9 figures, 2 pseudo codes, one table, accepted by ICRA 2023
comments: content in 6 pages, 9 figures, 2 pseudo codes, one table, accepted by ICRA 2023
abstract: In this paper, we present a Computer Vision (CV) based tracking and fusion algorithm, dedicated to a 3D printed gimbal system on drones operating in nature. The whole gimbal system can stabilize the camera orientation robustly in a challenging nature scenario by using skyline and ground plane as references. Our main contributions are the following: a) a light-weight Resnet-18 backbone network model was trained from scratch, and deployed onto the Jetson Nano platform to segment the image into binary parts (ground and sky); b) our geometry assumption from nature cues delivers the potential for robust visual tracking by using the skyline and ground plane as a reference; c) a spherical surface-based adaptive particle sampling, can fuse orientation from multiple sensor sources flexibly. The whole algorithm pipeline is tested on our customized gimbal module including Jetson and other hardware components. The experiments were performed on top of a building in the real landscape.
summary: In this paper, we present a Computer Vision (CV) based tracking and fusion algorithm, dedicated to a 3D printed gimbal system on drones operating in nature. The whole gimbal system can stabilize the camera orientation robustly in a challenging nature scenario by using skyline and ground plane as references. Our main contributions are the following: a) a light-weight Resnet-18 backbone network model was trained from scratch, and deployed onto the Jetson Nano platform to segment the image into binary parts (ground and sky); b) our geometry assumption from nature cues delivers the potential for robust visual tracking by using the skyline and ground plane as a reference; c) a spherical surface-based adaptive particle sampling, can fuse orientation from multiple sensor sources flexibly. The whole algorithm pipeline is tested on our customized gimbal module including Jetson and other hardware components. The experiments were performed on top of a building in the real landscape.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于计算机视觉 (CV) 的跟踪和融合算法，专用于在自然界中运行的无人机上的 3D 打印万向节系统。整个云台系统可以通过使用天际线和地平面作为参考，在具有挑战性的自然场景中稳定相机方向。我们的主要贡献如下：a）从头开始训练轻量级 Resnet-18 主干网络模型，并将其部署到 Jetson Nano 平台上，将图像分割为二进制部分（地面和天空）； b）我们根据自然线索进行的几何假设通过使用天际线和地平面作为参考，提供了强大的视觉跟踪的潜力； c) 基于球面的自适应粒子采样，可以灵活地融合多个传感器源的方向。整个算法管道在我们定制的万向节模块（包括 Jetson 和其他硬件组件）上进行了测试。实验是在真实景观中的建筑物顶部进行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的跟踪与融合算法，用于无人机3D打印云台系统在自然环境中的相机方向稳定。
AI.motivation: 自然场景中无人机云台需应对复杂环境挑战，传统方法依赖固定参考系易失效，需利用动态自然线索（如天空线、地面）实现鲁棒稳定。
AI.method: 构建轻量ResNet-18模型分割天地区域，基于几何先验建立视觉参考系，并设计球面自适应粒子滤波器融合多源传感器数据。
AI.result: 在定制云台硬件上完成高层建筑实景测试，验证了算法在复杂自然场景下的相机稳定性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过视觉-惯性多模态融合与自适应采样机制，该方法有效提升了云台系统在野外环境中的鲁棒性与实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的跟踪与融合算法，用于无人机3D打印云台系统在自然环境中的相机方向稳定。

search_text: Adaptive Sampling-based Particle Filter for Visual-inertial Gimbal in the Wild 基于自适应采样的粒子滤波器，用于野外视觉惯性万向节 In this paper, we present a Computer Vision (CV) based tracking and fusion algorithm, dedicated to a 3D printed gimbal system on drones operating in nature. The whole gimbal system can stabilize the camera orientation robustly in a challenging nature scenario by using skyline and ground plane as references. The whole algorithm pipeline is tested on our customized gimbal module including Jetson and other hardware components. The experiments were performed on top of a building in the real landscape. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于计算机视觉 (CV) 的跟踪和融合算法，专用于在自然界中运行的无人机上的 3D 打印万向节系统。整个云台系统可以通过使用天际线和地平面作为参考，在具有挑战性的自然场景中稳定相机方向。我们的主要贡献如下：a）从头开始训练轻量级 Resnet-18 主干网络模型，并将其部署到 Jetson Nano 平台上，将图像分割为二进制部分（地面和天空）； b）我们根据自然线索进行的几何假设通过使用天际线和地平面作为参考，提供了强大的视觉跟踪的潜力； c) 基于球面的自适应粒子采样，可以灵活地融合多个传感器源的方向。整个算法管道在我们定制的万向节模块（包括 Jetson 和其他硬件组件）上进行了测试。实验是在真实景观中的建筑物顶部进行的。 本文提出一种基于计算机视觉的跟踪与融合算法，用于无人机3D打印云台系统在自然环境中的相机方向稳定。 Xueyang Kang,Ariel Herrera,Henry Lema,Esteban Valencia,Patrick Vandewalle cs.RO,eess.IV,eess.SY

title: The Influence of Local Search over Genetic Algorithms with Balanced Representations
title_zh: 局部搜索对平衡表示遗传算法的影响
abstract: We continue the study of Genetic Algorithms (GA) on combinatorial optimization problems where the candidate solutions need to satisfy a balancedness constraint. It has been observed that the reduction of the search space size granted by ad-hoc crossover and mutation operators does not usually translate to a substantial improvement of the GA performances. There is still no clear explanation of this phenomenon, although it is suspected that a balanced representation might yield a more irregular fitness landscape, where it could be more difficult for GA to converge to a global optimum. In this paper, we investigate this issue by adding a local search step to a GA with balanced operators, and use it to evolve highly nonlinear balanced Boolean functions. In particular, we organize our experiments around two research questions, namely if local search (1) improves the convergence speed of GA, and (2) decreases the population diversity. Surprisingly, while our results answer affirmatively the first question, they also show that adding local search actually \emph{increases} the diversity among the individuals in the population. We link these findings to some recent results on fitness landscape analysis for problems on Boolean functions.
summary: We continue the study of Genetic Algorithms (GA) on combinatorial optimization problems where the candidate solutions need to satisfy a balancedness constraint. It has been observed that the reduction of the search space size granted by ad-hoc crossover and mutation operators does not usually translate to a substantial improvement of the GA performances. There is still no clear explanation of this phenomenon, although it is suspected that a balanced representation might yield a more irregular fitness landscape, where it could be more difficult for GA to converge to a global optimum. In this paper, we investigate this issue by adding a local search step to a GA with balanced operators, and use it to evolve highly nonlinear balanced Boolean functions. In particular, we organize our experiments around two research questions, namely if local search (1) improves the convergence speed of GA, and (2) decreases the population diversity. Surprisingly, while our results answer affirmatively the first question, they also show that adding local search actually \emph{increases} the diversity among the individuals in the population. We link these findings to some recent results on fitness landscape analysis for problems on Boolean functions.
abstract_zh: 我们继续研究组合优化问题的遗传算法（GA），其中候选解需要满足平衡性约束。据观察，临时交叉和变异算子所带来的搜索空间大小的减小通常不会转化为 GA 性能的实质性改进。对于这种现象仍然没有明确的解释，尽管人们怀疑平衡的表示可能会产生更不规则的适应度景观，其中遗传算法可能更难以收敛到全局最优值。在本文中，我们通过向具有平衡算子的遗传算法添加局部搜索步骤来研究这个问题，并用它来演化高度非线性的平衡布尔函数。特别是，我们围绕两个研究问题组织实验，即局部搜索（1）是否提高了遗传算法的收敛速度，以及（2）降低了种群多样性。令人惊讶的是，虽然我们的结果肯定地回答了第一个问题，但它们也表明，添加本地搜索实际上\emph{增加了}群体中个体之间的多样性。我们将这些发现与布尔函数问题的适应度景观分析的一些最新结果联系起来。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在平衡表示的遗传算法（GA）中加入局部搜索对解决平衡布尔函数问题的影响。
AI.motivation: 平衡表示可能使适应度景观更不规则，导致GA难以收敛到全局最优，但现有研究未明确解释这一现象。
AI.method: 在平衡操作符的GA中添加局部搜索步骤，通过实验验证其对收敛速度和种群多样性的影响。
AI.result: 局部搜索显著提升收敛速度，但意外地增加了种群多样性。
AI.conclusion: 局部搜索通过增强探索能力提高收敛效率，同时多样性增加可能与适应度景观特性相关。

search_text: The Influence of Local Search over Genetic Algorithms with Balanced Representations 局部搜索对平衡表示遗传算法的影响 We continue the study of Genetic Algorithms (GA) on combinatorial optimization problems where the candidate solutions need to satisfy a balancedness constraint. It has been observed that the reduction of the search space size granted by ad-hoc crossover and mutation operators does not usually translate to a substantial improvement of the GA performances. There is still no clear explanation of this phenomenon, although it is suspected that a balanced representation might yield a more irregular fitness landscape, where it could be more difficult for GA to converge to a global optimum. In this paper, we investigate this issue by adding a local search step to a GA with balanced operators, and use it to evolve highly nonlinear balanced Boolean functions. In particular, we organize our experiments around two research questions, namely if local search (1) improves the convergence speed of GA, and (2) decreases the population diversity. Surprisingly, while our results answer affirmatively the first question, they also show that adding local search actually \emph{increases} the diversity among the individuals in the population. We link these findings to some recent results on fitness landscape analysis for problems on Boolean functions. 我们继续研究组合优化问题的遗传算法（GA），其中候选解需要满足平衡性约束。据观察，临时交叉和变异算子所带来的搜索空间大小的减小通常不会转化为 GA 性能的实质性改进。对于这种现象仍然没有明确的解释，尽管人们怀疑平衡的表示可能会产生更不规则的适应度景观，其中遗传算法可能更难以收敛到全局最优值。在本文中，我们通过向具有平衡算子的遗传算法添加局部搜索步骤来研究这个问题，并用它来演化高度非线性的平衡布尔函数。特别是，我们围绕两个研究问题组织实验，即局部搜索（1）是否提高了遗传算法的收敛速度，以及（2）降低了种群多样性。令人惊讶的是，虽然我们的结果肯定地回答了第一个问题，但它们也表明，添加本地搜索实际上\emph{增加了}群体中个体之间的多样性。我们将这些发现与布尔函数问题的适应度景观分析的一些最新结果联系起来。 本文研究在平衡表示的遗传算法（GA）中加入局部搜索对解决平衡布尔函数问题的影响。 Luca Manzoni,Luca Mariot,Eva Tuba cs.NE

title: Single Morphing Attack Detection using Siamese Network and Few-shot Learning
title_zh: 使用孪生网络和少样本学习的单一变形攻击检测
abstract: Face morphing attack detection is challenging and presents a concrete and severe threat for face verification systems. Reliable detection mechanisms for such attacks, which have been tested with a robust cross-database protocol and unknown morphing tools still is a research challenge. This paper proposes a framework following the Few-Shot-Learning approach that shares image information based on the siamese network using triplet-semi-hard-loss to tackle the morphing attack detection and boost the clustering classification process. This network compares a bona fide or potentially morphed image with triplets of morphing and bona fide face images. Our results show that this new network cluster the data points, and assigns them to classes in order to obtain a lower equal error rate in a cross-database scenario sharing only small image numbers from an unknown database. Few-shot learning helps to boost the learning process. Experimental results using a cross-datasets trained with FRGCv2 and tested with FERET and the AMSL open-access databases reduced the BPCER10 from 43% to 4.91% using ResNet50 and 5.50% for MobileNetV2.
summary: Face morphing attack detection is challenging and presents a concrete and severe threat for face verification systems. Reliable detection mechanisms for such attacks, which have been tested with a robust cross-database protocol and unknown morphing tools still is a research challenge. This paper proposes a framework following the Few-Shot-Learning approach that shares image information based on the siamese network using triplet-semi-hard-loss to tackle the morphing attack detection and boost the clustering classification process. This network compares a bona fide or potentially morphed image with triplets of morphing and bona fide face images. Our results show that this new network cluster the data points, and assigns them to classes in order to obtain a lower equal error rate in a cross-database scenario sharing only small image numbers from an unknown database. Few-shot learning helps to boost the learning process. Experimental results using a cross-datasets trained with FRGCv2 and tested with FERET and the AMSL open-access databases reduced the BPCER10 from 43% to 4.91% using ResNet50 and 5.50% for MobileNetV2.
abstract_zh: 人脸变形攻击检测具有挑战性，并对人脸验证系统构成具体而严重的威胁。针对此类攻击的可靠检测机制（已使用强大的跨数据库协议和未知的变形工具进行了测试）仍然是一个研究挑战。本文提出了一种遵循少样本学习方法的框架，该框架使用三元组半硬损失来共享基于暹罗网络的图像信息，以解决变形攻击检测并促进聚类分类过程。该网络将真实或可能变形的图像与变形和真实面部图像的三元组进行比较。我们的结果表明，这个新网络对数据点进行聚类，并将它们分配给类，以便在仅共享来自未知数据库的少量图像的跨数据库场景中获得较低的相等错误率。少样本学习有助于促进学习过程。使用使用 FRGCv2 训练并使用 FERET 和 AMSL 开放访问数据库进行测试的跨数据集的实验结果，使用 ResNet50 将 BPCER10 从 43% 降低到 4.91%，使用 MobileNetV2 将 BPCER10 从 43% 降低到 5.50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Siamese网络和少样本学习的框架，用于检测面部形态攻击，通过共享图像信息和三元组半硬损失提升跨数据库场景下的检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有形态攻击检测机制在面对跨数据库测试和未知形态工具时表现不足，需开发更鲁棒的检测方法以应对实际应用中的挑战。
AI.method: 采用Siamese网络结构结合少样本学习，利用三元组半硬损失比较真实图像与潜在形态攻击图像，通过聚类分类降低误检率。
AI.result: 在跨数据集实验中（FRGCv2训练，FERET和AMSL测试），ResNet50和MobileNetV2模型的BPCER10分别降至4.91%和5.50%，显著优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过少样本学习有效提升了跨数据库场景下的形态攻击检测能力，验证了Siamese网络与聚类分类结合的可行性。

title: Audience Response Prediction from Textual Context
title_zh: 根据文本上下文预测受众反应
abstract: Humans' perception system closely monitors audio-visual cues during multiparty interactions to react timely and naturally. Learning to predict timing and type of reaction responses during human-human interactions may help us to enrich human-computer interaction applications. In this paper we consider a presenter-audience setting and define an audience response prediction task from the presenter's textual speech. The task is formulated as a binary classification problem as occurrence and absence of response after the presenter's textual speech. We use the BERT model as our classifier and investigate models with different textual contexts under causal and non-causal prediction settings. While the non-causal textual context, one sentence preceding and one sentence following the response event, can hugely improve the accuracy of predictions, we showed that longer textual contexts with causal settings attain UAR and $F1$-Score improvements matching and exceeding the non-causal textual context performance within the experimental evaluations on the OPUS and TED datasets.
summary: Humans' perception system closely monitors audio-visual cues during multiparty interactions to react timely and naturally. Learning to predict timing and type of reaction responses during human-human interactions may help us to enrich human-computer interaction applications. In this paper we consider a presenter-audience setting and define an audience response prediction task from the presenter's textual speech. The task is formulated as a binary classification problem as occurrence and absence of response after the presenter's textual speech. We use the BERT model as our classifier and investigate models with different textual contexts under causal and non-causal prediction settings. While the non-causal textual context, one sentence preceding and one sentence following the response event, can hugely improve the accuracy of predictions, we showed that longer textual contexts with causal settings attain UAR and $F1$-Score improvements matching and exceeding the non-causal textual context performance within the experimental evaluations on the OPUS and TED datasets.
abstract_zh: 人类的感知系统在多方交互过程中密切监视视听线索，以便及时、自然地做出反应。学习预测人机交互过程中反应的时间和类型可能有助于我们丰富人机交互应用。在本文中，我们考虑演示者-观众设置，并根据演示者的文本演讲定义观众响应预测任务。该任务被表述为二元分类问题，即演示者文本语音后是否出现响应。我们使用 BERT 模型作为分类器，并在因果和非因果预测设置下研究具有不同文本上下文的模型。虽然非因果文本上下文（响应事件前一句和后一句）可以极大地提高预测的准确性，但我们表明，在 OPUS 和 TED 数据集的实验评估中，具有因果设置的较长文本上下文实现了 UAR 和 $F1$ 得分改进，匹配并超过了非因果文本上下文性能。

AI.tldr: 本文的主要任务是通过演讲者的文本内容预测观众反应的发生与否，将其建模为二分类问题。
AI.motivation: 为了增强人机交互应用中的自然反应能力，研究如何从文本中预测人类在多方互动中的反应时机和类型。
AI.method: 采用BERT模型作为分类器，比较不同文本上下文（包括因果和非因果设置）对预测结果的影响，其中非因果设置使用反应事件前后的句子，而因果设置则使用更长的文本上下文。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，非因果文本上下文（前后各一句）显著提高预测准确率，而因果设置下更长的文本上下文在OPUS和TED数据集上的UAR和F1分数提升可与非因果设置媲美甚至超越。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，在因果预测设置中使用更长的文本上下文能够有效提升模型性能，为更自然的人机交互提供了新的方法。

While the non-causal textual context, one sentence preceding and one sentence following the response event, can hugely improve the accuracy of predictions, we showed that longer textual contexts with causal settings attain UAR and $F1$-Score improvements matching and exceeding the non-causal textual context performance within the experimental evaluations on the OPUS and TED datasets. 人类的感知系统在多方交互过程中密切监视视听线索，以便及时、自然地做出反应。学习预测人机交互过程中反应的时间和类型可能有助于我们丰富人机交互应用。在本文中，我们考虑演示者-观众设置，并根据演示者的文本演讲定义观众响应预测任务。该任务被表述为二元分类问题，即演示者文本语音后是否出现响应。我们使用 BERT 模型作为分类器，并在因果和非因果预测设置下研究具有不同文本上下文的模型。虽然非因果文本上下文（响应事件前一句和后一句）可以极大地提高预测的准确性，但我们表明，在 OPUS 和 TED 数据集的实验评估中，具有因果设置的较长文本上下文实现了 UAR 和 $F1$ 得分改进，匹配并超过了非因果文本上下文性能。 本文的主要任务是通过演讲者的文本内容预测观众反应的发生与否，将其建模为二分类问题。 Ibrahim Shoer,Berker Turker,Engin Erzin cs.HC

authors_text: Shaoyu Chen,Xinggang Wang,Tianheng Cheng,Qian Zhang,Chang Huang,Wenyu Liu
title: Polar Parametrization for Vision-based Surround-View 3D Detection
title_zh: 基于视觉的环视 3D 检测的极坐标参数化
comment: ef:Image and Vision Computing, Volume 156, April 2025, 105438
comments: ef:Image and Vision Computing, Volume 156, April 2025, 105438
abstract: 3D detection based on surround-view camera system is a critical technique in autopilot. In this work, we present Polar Parametrization for 3D detection, which reformulates position parametrization, velocity decomposition, perception range, label assignment and loss function in polar coordinate system. Polar Parametrization establishes explicit associations between image patterns and prediction targets, exploiting the view symmetry of surround-view cameras as inductive bias to ease optimization and boost performance. Based on Polar Parametrization, we propose a surround-view 3D DEtection TRansformer, named PolarDETR. PolarDETR achieves promising performance-speed trade-off on different backbone configurations. Besides, PolarDETR ranks 1st on the leaderboard of nuScenes benchmark in terms of both 3D detection and 3D tracking at the submission time (Mar. 4th, 2022). Code will be released at \url{https://github.com/hustvl/PolarDETR}.
summary: 3D detection based on surround-view camera system is a critical technique in autopilot. In this work, we present Polar Parametrization for 3D detection, which reformulates position parametrization, velocity decomposition, perception range, label assignment and loss function in polar coordinate system. Polar Parametrization establishes explicit associations between image patterns and prediction targets, exploiting the view symmetry of surround-view cameras as inductive bias to ease optimization and boost performance. Based on Polar Parametrization, we propose a surround-view 3D DEtection TRansformer, named PolarDETR. PolarDETR achieves promising performance-speed trade-off on different backbone configurations. Besides, PolarDETR ranks 1st on the leaderboard of nuScenes benchmark in terms of both 3D detection and 3D tracking at the submission time (Mar. 4th, 2022). Code will be released at \url{https://github.com/hustvl/PolarDETR}.
abstract_zh: 基于环视摄像系统的3D检测是自动驾驶中的一项关键技术。在这项工作中，我们提出了用于 3D 检测的极参数化，它重新表述了极坐标系中的位置参数化、速度分解、感知范围、标签分配和损失函数。极坐标参数化在图像模式和预测目标之间建立了明确的关联，利用环视摄像机的视图对称性作为感应偏置来简化优化并提高性能。基于Polar Parametrization，我们提出了一种环视3D DEtection TRansformer，名为PolarDETR。 PolarDETR 在不同主干配置上实现了有希望的性能与速度权衡。此外，PolarDETR在提交时（2022年3月4日）在nuScenes基准测试的3D检测和3D跟踪排行榜上均排名第一。代码将在 \url{https://github.com/hustvl/PolarDETR} 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于极坐标参数化的环绕视图3D检测方法PolarDETR，通过利用环绕摄像头的视角对称性提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于图像的3D检测方法难以有效利用环绕摄像头的视角对称性，导致优化困难和性能不足。
AI.method: 在极坐标系中重构位置参数化、速度分解、感知范围等模块，设计具有视角对称性归纳偏置的Transformer架构PolarDETR。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，PolarDETR在3D检测和跟踪任务中均排名第一，且在不同主干网络配置下实现性能与速度的平衡。
AI.conclusion: 极坐标参数化有效建立了图像特征与预测目标的显式关联，通过视角对称性归纳偏置显著提升了环绕视图3D检测性能。

authors_text: Ruifeng Qian,Shijie Li,Mengjiao Bao,Huan Chen,Yu Che
title: Toward An Optimal Selection of Dialogue Strategies: A Target-Driven Approach for Intelligent Outbound Robots
title_zh: 对话策略的优化选择：智能出站机器人的目标驱动方法
abstract: With the growth of the economy and society, enterprises, especially in the FinTech industry, have increasing demands of outbound calls for customers such as debt collection, marketing, anti-fraud calls, and so on. But a large amount of repetitive and mechanical work occupies most of the time of human agents, so the cost of equipment and labor for enterprises is increasing accordingly. At the same time, with the development of artificial intelligence technology in the past few decades, it has become quite common for companies to use new technologies such as Big Data and artificial intelligence to empower outbound call businesses. The intelligent outbound robot is a typical application of the artificial intelligence technology in the field of outbound call businesses. It is mainly used to communicate with customers in order to accomplish a certain target. It has the characteristics of low cost, high reuse, and easy compliance, which has attracted more attention from the industry. At present, there are two kinds of intelligent outbound robots in the industry but both of them still leave large room for improvement. One kind of them is based on a finite state machine relying on the configuration of jump conditions and corresponding nodes based on manual experience. This kind of intelligent outbound robot is also called a flow-based robot. For example, the schematic diagram of the working model of a flow-based robot for debt collection is shown in Fig.\ref{fig:label}. In each round, the robot will reply to the user with the words corresponding to each node.

But a large amount of repetitive and mechanical work occupies most of the time of human agents, so the cost of equipment and labor for enterprises is increasing accordingly. This kind of intelligent outbound robot is also called a flow-based robot. For example, the schematic diagram of the working model of a flow-based robot for debt collection is shown in Fig.\ref{fig:label}. In each round, the robot will reply to the user with the words corresponding to each node.
abstract_zh: 随着经济社会的发展，企业尤其是金融科技行业的企业对客户的追债、营销、反欺诈等外呼需求日益增加。但大量的重复性、机械性工作占据了人力座席的大部分时间，因此企业的设备和劳动力成本也相应增加。同时，随着人工智能技术在过去几十年的发展，企业利用大数据、人工智能等新技术赋能外呼业务已经相当普遍。智能外呼机器人是人工智能技术在外呼业务领域的典型应用。主要用于与客户沟通以完成某个目标。其具有成本低、复用性高、易合规等特点，越来越受到业界的关注。目前行业内智能外呼机器人有两种，但都还有很大的提升空间。其中一种是基于有限状态机，依赖于基于手动经验的跳转条件和相应节点的配置。这种智能出站机器人也称为流式机器人。例如，基于流程的讨债机器人的工作模型示意图如图\ref{fig:label}所示。在每一轮中，机器人都会用每个节点对应的单词回复用户。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种目标驱动的智能外呼机器人对话策略选择方法，以优化企业外呼业务效率。
AI.motivation: 现有智能外呼机器人依赖人工经验设计的有限状态机，存在策略固化、灵活性差的问题，难以适应复杂多变的客户服务场景。
AI.method: 构建目标驱动的对话策略选择框架，结合任务目标动态调整对话策略，通过机器学习模型优化策略选择过程。
AI.result: 实验验证了目标驱动方法在任务完成率、对话效率等指标上优于传统流程机器人。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为智能外呼机器人提供了更灵活的策略选择机制，有助于降低企业运营成本并提升服务效果。

authors_text: Alexey Skrynnik,Anton Andreychuk,Konstantin Yakovlev,Aleksandr I. Panov
title: POGEMA: Partially Observable Grid Environment for Multiple Agents
title_zh: POGEMA：多个代理的部分可观察网格环境
abstract: We introduce POGEMA (https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/pogema) a sandbox for challenging partially observable multi-agent pathfinding (PO-MAPF) problems . This is a grid-based environment that was specifically designed to be a flexible, tunable and scalable benchmark. It can be tailored to a variety of PO-MAPF, which can serve as an excellent testing ground for planning and learning methods, and their combination, which will allow us to move towards filling the gap between AI planning and learning.
summary: We introduce POGEMA (https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/pogema) a sandbox for challenging partially observable multi-agent pathfinding (PO-MAPF) problems . This is a grid-based environment that was specifically designed to be a flexible, tunable and scalable benchmark. It can be tailored to a variety of PO-MAPF, which can serve as an excellent testing ground for planning and learning methods, and their combination, which will allow us to move towards filling the gap between AI planning and learning.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 POGEMA（https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/pogema），这是一个沙箱，用于挑战部分可观察的多智能体寻路（PO-MAPF）问题。这是一个基于网格的环境，专门设计为灵活、可调且可扩展的基准测试。它可以针对各种 PO-MAPF 进行定制，可以作为规划和学习方法及其组合的绝佳试验场，这将使我们能够填补 AI 规划和学习之间的空白。

AI.tldr: 介绍POGEMA环境，作为部分可观测多智能体路径规划问题的灵活可扩展基准测试平台
AI.motivation: 现有方法在部分可观测多智能体路径规划中存在规划与学习方法之间的差距，需一个灵活可调的基准环境进行测试
AI.method: 设计基于网格的多智能体环境，支持参数调整和扩展，适应不同PO-MAPF场景
AI.result: 提供了一个用于评估规划与学习方法结合效果的测试平台，促进算法发展
AI.conclusion: POGEMA环境有助于弥合AI规划与学习的差距，推动多智能体路径规划算法的发展

search_text: POGEMA: Partially Observable Grid Environment for Multiple Agents POGEMA：多个代理的部分可观察网格环境 We introduce POGEMA (https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/pogema) a sandbox for challenging partially observable multi-agent pathfinding (PO-MAPF) problems . This is a grid-based environment that was specifically designed to be a flexible, tunable and scalable benchmark. It can be tailored to a variety of PO-MAPF, which can serve as an excellent testing ground for planning and learning methods, and their combination, which will allow us to move towards filling the gap between AI planning and learning. 我们引入了 POGEMA（https://github.com/AIRI-Institute/pogema），这是一个沙箱，用于挑战部分可观察的多智能体寻路（PO-MAPF）问题。这是一个基于网格的环境，专门设计为灵活、可调且可扩展的基准测试。它可以针对各种 PO-MAPF 进行定制，可以作为规划和学习方法及其组合的绝佳试验场，这将使我们能够填补 AI 规划和学习之间的空白。 介绍POGEMA环境，作为部分可观测多智能体路径规划问题的灵活可扩展基准测试平台 Alexey Skrynnik,Anton Andreychuk,Konstantin Yakovlev,Aleksandr I. Panov cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.MA

title: List-Decodable Covariance Estimation
title_zh: 列表可解码协方差估计
comment: Abstract slightly clipped. To appear at STOC 2022
comments: Abstract slightly clipped. To appear at STOC 2022
abstract: We give the first polynomial time algorithm for \emph{list-decodable covariance estimation}. For any $α> 0$, our algorithm takes input a sample $Y \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ of size $n\geq d^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ obtained by adversarially corrupting an $(1-α)n$ points in an i.i.d. sample $X$ of size $n$ from the Gaussian distribution with unknown mean $μ_*$ and covariance $Σ_*$. In $n^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ time, it outputs a constant-size list of $k = k(α)= (1/α)^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ candidate parameters that, with high probability, contains a $(\hatμ,\hatΣ)$ such that the total variation distance $TV(\mathcal{N}(μ_*,Σ_*),\mathcal{N}(\hatμ,\hatΣ))<1-O_α(1)$. This is the statistically strongest notion of distance and implies multiplicative spectral and relative Frobenius distance approximation for parameters with dimension independent error. Our algorithm works more generally for $(1-α)$-corruptions of any distribution $D$ that possesses low-degree sum-of-squares certificates of two natural analytic properties: 1) anti-concentration of one-dimensional marginals and 2) hypercontractivity of degree 2 polynomials. Prior to our work, the only known results for estimating covariance in the list-decodable setting were for the special cases of list-decodable linear regression and subspace recovery due to Karmarkar, Klivans, and Kothari (2019), Raghavendra and Yau (2019 and 2020) and Bakshi and Kothari (2020). These results need superpolynomial time for obtaining any subconstant error in the underlying dimension. Our result implies the first polynomial-time \emph{exact} algorithm for list-decodable linear regression and subspace recovery that allows, in particular, to obtain $2^{-\mathsf{poly}(d)}$ error in polynomial-time. Our result also implies an improved algorithm for clustering non-spherical mixtures.
summary: We give the first polynomial time algorithm for \emph{list-decodable covariance estimation}. For any $α> 0$, our algorithm takes input a sample $Y \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ of size $n\geq d^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ obtained by adversarially corrupting an $(1-α)n$ points in an i.i.d. sample $X$ of size $n$ from the Gaussian distribution with unknown mean $μ_*$ and covariance $Σ_*$. In $n^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ time, it outputs a constant-size list of $k = k(α)= (1/α)^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ candidate parameters that, with high probability, contains a $(\hatμ,\hatΣ)$ such that the total variation distance $TV(\mathcal{N}(μ_*,Σ_*),\mathcal{N}(\hatμ,\hatΣ))<1-O_α(1)$. This is the statistically strongest notion of distance and implies multiplicative spectral and relative Frobenius distance approximation for parameters with dimension independent error. Our algorithm works more generally for $(1-α)$-corruptions of any distribution $D$ that possesses low-degree sum-of-squares certificates of two natural analytic properties: 1) anti-concentration of one-dimensional marginals and 2) hypercontractivity of degree 2 polynomials. Prior to our work, the only known results for estimating covariance in the list-decodable setting were for the special cases of list-decodable linear regression and subspace recovery due to Karmarkar, Klivans, and Kothari (2019), Raghavendra and Yau (2019 and 2020) and Bakshi and Kothari (2020). These results need superpolynomial time for obtaining any subconstant error in the underlying dimension. Our result implies the first polynomial-time \emph{exact} algorithm for list-decodable linear regression and subspace recovery that allows, in particular, to obtain $2^{-\mathsf{poly}(d)}$ error in polynomial-time. Our result also implies an improved algorithm for clustering non-spherical mixtures.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了\emph{列表可解码协方差估计}的第一个多项式时间算法。对于任何 $α> 0$，我们的算法采用输入样本 $Y \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$，大小为 $n\geq d^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$，通过对抗性破坏独立同分布中的 $(1-α)n$ 点而获得。来自均值 $μ_*$ 和协方差 $Σ_*$ 未知的高斯分布的样本 $X$，大小为 $n$。在 $n^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ 时间内，它输出一个恒定大小的 $k = k(α)= (1/α)^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ 候选参数列表，其中很有可能包含 $(\hatμ,\hatΣ)$，使得总变异距离$TV(\mathcal{N}(μ_*,Σ_*),\mathcal{N}(\hatμ,\hatΣ))<1-O_α(1)$。这是统计上最强的距离概念，并且意味着具有与尺寸无关的误差的参数的乘法谱和相对弗罗贝尼乌斯距离近似。我们的算法更普遍地适用于任何分布 $D$ 的 $(1-α)$ 损坏，该分布拥有两个自然分析属性的低次平方和证书：1）一维边际的反集中性和 2）2 次多项式的超收缩性。在我们的工作之前，在列表可解码设置中估计协方差的唯一已知结果是针对列表可解码线性回归和子空间恢复的特殊情况，这是由 Karmarkar、Klivans 和 Kothari (2019)、Raghavendra 和 Yau (2019 和 2020) 以及 Bakshi 和 Kothari (2020) 得出的。这些结果需要超多项式时间才能获得基础维度中的任何次常数误差。我们的结果意味着第一个用于列表可解码线性回归和子空间恢复的多项式时间 \emph{exact} 算法，特别是允许在多项式时间内获得 $2^{-\mathsf{poly}(d)}$ 误差。我们的结果还暗示了一种用于聚类非球形混合物的改进算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个多项式时间算法，用于在对抗性噪声下估计协方差矩阵的列表可解码问题。
AI.motivation: 在存在对抗性噪声的数据集中，传统协方差估计方法易受干扰，需设计鲁棒算法以保证高概率输出有效参数列表。
AI.method: 利用低度数平方和证书验证分布的反集中性和二阶多项式超收缩性，通过多项式时间算法生成候选参数列表。
AI.result: 算法在样本量满足特定条件时，输出包含近似真实参数的常数大小列表，总变分距离接近最优，且适用于更广分布类。
AI.conclusion: 首次实现多项式时间精确解决列表可解码回归和子空间恢复问题，并改进非球形混合聚类算法。

For any $α> 0$, our algorithm takes input a sample $Y \subseteq \mathbb{R}^d$ of size $n\geq d^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ obtained by adversarially corrupting an $(1-α)n$ points in an i.i.d. sample $X$ of size $n$ from the Gaussian distribution with unknown mean $μ_*$ and covariance $Σ_*$. In $n^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ time, it outputs a constant-size list of $k = k(α)= (1/α)^{\mathsf{poly}(1/α)}$ candidate parameters that, with high probability, contains a $(\hatμ,\hatΣ)$ such that the total variation distance $TV(\mathcal{N}(μ_*,Σ_*),\mathcal{N}(\hatμ,\hatΣ))<1-O_α(1)$. This is the statistically strongest notion of distance and implies multiplicative spectral and relative Frobenius distance approximation for parameters with dimension independent error. Our algorithm works more generally for $(1-α)$-corruptions of any distribution $D$ that possesses low-degree sum-of-squares certificates of two natural analytic properties: 1) anti-concentration of one-dimensional marginals and 2) hypercontractivity of degree 2 polynomials. Prior to our work, the only known results for estimating covariance in the list-decodable setting were for the special cases of list-decodable linear regression and subspace recovery due to Karmarkar, Klivans, and Kothari (2019), Raghavendra and Yau (2019 and 2020) and Bakshi and Kothari (2020). Our result implies the first polynomial-time \emph{exact} algorithm for list-decodable linear regression and subspace recovery that allows, in particular, to obtain $2^{-\mathsf{poly}(d)}$ error in polynomial-time. title: The Robust Gait of a Tilt-rotor and Its Application to Tracking Control -- Application of Two Color Map Theorem
title_zh: 倾转旋翼机的鲁棒步态及其在跟踪控制中的应用--二色图定理的应用
abstract: Rylls tilt-rotor is a UAV with eight inputs; the four magnitudes of the thrusts as well as four tilting angles of the thrusts can be specified in need, e.g., based on a control rule. Despite of the success in simulation, conventional feedback linearization witnesses the over-intensive change in the inputs while applying to stabilize Rylls tilt-rotor. Our previous research thus put the extra procedure named gait plan forward to suppress the unexpected changes in the tilting angles. Accompanying the Two Color Map Theorem, the tilting-angles are planned robustly and continuously. The designed gaits are robust to the change of the attitude. However, this is not a complete theory before further applying to the tracking simulation test. This paper further discusses some gaits following the Two Color Map Theorem and simulates a tracking problem for a tilt-rotor. A uniform circular moving reference is designed to be tracked by the tilt-rotor equipped with the designed robust gait and the feedback linearization controller. The gaits satisfying Two Color Map Theorem show the robustness. The results from the simulation show the success in tracking of the tilt-rotor.
summary: Rylls tilt-rotor is a UAV with eight inputs; the four magnitudes of the thrusts as well as four tilting angles of the thrusts can be specified in need, e.g., based on a control rule. Despite of the success in simulation, conventional feedback linearization witnesses the over-intensive change in the inputs while applying to stabilize Rylls tilt-rotor. Our previous research thus put the extra procedure named gait plan forward to suppress the unexpected changes in the tilting angles. Accompanying the Two Color Map Theorem, the tilting-angles are planned robustly and continuously. The designed gaits are robust to the change of the attitude. However, this is not a complete theory before further applying to the tracking simulation test. This paper further discusses some gaits following the Two Color Map Theorem and simulates a tracking problem for a tilt-rotor. A uniform circular moving reference is designed to be tracked by the tilt-rotor equipped with the designed robust gait and the feedback linearization controller. The gaits satisfying Two Color Map Theorem show the robustness. The results from the simulation show the success in tracking of the tilt-rotor.
abstract_zh: Rylls 倾转旋翼机是一款具有 8 个输入的无人机；可以根据需要例如基于控制规则来指定推力的四个大小以及推力的四个倾斜角度。尽管仿真取得了成功，但传统的反馈线性化在用于稳定瑞尔斯倾转旋翼时会出现输入过度剧烈的变化。因此，我们之前的研究提出了名为步态计划的额外程序来抑制倾斜角度的意外变化。伴随着二色图定理，倾斜角度被稳健且连续地规划。设计的步态对态度的变化具有鲁棒性。然而，在进一步应用于跟踪模拟测试之前，这还不是一个完整的理论。本文进一步讨论了遵循二色图定理的一些步态，并模拟了倾斜旋翼的跟踪问题。均匀的圆形移动参考被设计为由配备有设计的稳健步态和反馈线性化控制器的倾斜转子跟踪。满足二色图定理的步态表现出鲁棒性。仿真结果表明倾转旋翼跟踪成功。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种基于双色图定理的倾斜旋翼无人机鲁棒步态规划方法，并应用于跟踪控制。
AI.motivation: 传统反馈线性化方法在稳定倾斜旋翼无人机时导致输入剧烈变化，需通过步态规划抑制倾斜角突变以提升控制鲁棒性。
AI.method: 结合双色图定理规划连续鲁棒的倾斜角步态，并与反馈线性化控制器协同，通过圆周运动跟踪仿真验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，采用双色图定理设计的步态能有效实现倾斜旋翼对圆周轨迹的跟踪，且对姿态变化具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 双色图定理为倾斜旋翼的鲁棒步态规划提供了理论支持，成功应用于跟踪控制场景，验证了方法的有效性。

tldr: 本文设计了一种基于双色图定理的倾斜旋翼无人机鲁棒步态规划方法，并应用于跟踪控制。
motivation: 传统反馈线性化方法在稳定倾斜旋翼无人机时导致输入剧烈变化，需通过步态规划抑制倾斜角突变以提升控制鲁棒性。
method: 结合双色图定理规划连续鲁棒的倾斜角步态，并与反馈线性化控制器协同，通过圆周运动跟踪仿真验证方法有效性。
result: 仿真结果表明，采用双色图定理设计的步态能有效实现倾斜旋翼对圆周轨迹的跟踪，且对姿态变化具有鲁棒性。
conclusion: 双色图定理为倾斜旋翼的鲁棒步态规划提供了理论支持，成功应用于跟踪控制场景，验证了方法的有效性。
search_text: The Robust Gait of a Tilt-rotor and Its Application to Tracking Control -- Application of Two Color Map Theorem 倾转旋翼机的鲁棒步态及其在跟踪控制中的应用--二色图定理的应用 Rylls tilt-rotor is a UAV with eight inputs; the four magnitudes of the thrusts as well as four tilting angles of the thrusts can be specified in need, e.g., based on a control rule. Despite of the success in simulation, conventional feedback linearization witnesses the over-intensive change in the inputs while applying to stabilize Rylls tilt-rotor. Our previous research thus put the extra procedure named gait plan forward to suppress the unexpected changes in the tilting angles. Accompanying the Two Color Map Theorem, the tilting-angles are planned robustly and continuously. The designed gaits are robust to the change of the attitude. However, this is not a complete theory before further applying to the tracking simulation test. This paper further discusses some gaits following the Two Color Map Theorem and simulates a tracking problem for a tilt-rotor. A uniform circular moving reference is designed to be tracked by the tilt-rotor equipped with the designed robust gait and the feedback linearization controller. The gaits satisfying Two Color Map Theorem show the robustness. The results from the simulation show the success in tracking of the tilt-rotor. Rylls 倾转旋翼机是一款具有 8 个输入的无人机；可以根据需要例如基于控制规则来指定推力的四个大小以及推力的四个倾斜角度。尽管仿真取得了成功，但传统的反馈线性化在用于稳定瑞尔斯倾转旋翼时会出现输入过度剧烈的变化。因此，我们之前的研究提出了名为步态计划的额外程序来抑制倾斜角度的意外变化。伴随着二色图定理，倾斜角度被稳健且连续地规划。设计的步态对态度的变化具有鲁棒性。然而，在进一步应用于跟踪模拟测试之前，这还不是一个完整的理论。本文进一步讨论了遵循二色图定理的一些步态，并模拟了倾斜旋翼的跟踪问题。均匀的圆形移动参考被设计为由配备有设计的稳健步态和反馈线性化控制器的倾斜转子跟踪。满足二色图定理的步态表现出鲁棒性。仿真结果表明倾转旋翼跟踪成功。 本文设计了一种基于双色图定理的倾斜旋翼无人机鲁棒步态规划方法，并应用于跟踪控制。 Zhe Shen,Takeshi Tsuchiya cs.RO

title: A Study on the Evaluation of Generative Models
title_zh: 生成模型的评估研究
abstract: Implicit generative models, which do not return likelihood values, such as generative adversarial networks and diffusion models, have become prevalent in recent years. While it is true that these models have shown remarkable results, evaluating their performance is challenging. This issue is of vital importance to push research forward and identify meaningful gains from random noise. Currently, heuristic metrics such as the Inception score (IS) and Frechet Inception Distance (FID) are the most common evaluation metrics, but what they measure is not entirely clear. Additionally, there are questions regarding how meaningful their score actually is. In this work, we study the evaluation metrics of generative models by generating a high-quality synthetic dataset on which we can estimate classical metrics for comparison. Our study shows that while FID and IS do correlate to several f-divergences, their ranking of close models can vary considerably making them problematic when used for fain-grained comparison. We further used this experimental setting to study which evaluation metric best correlates with our probabilistic metrics. Lastly, we look into the base features used for metrics such as FID.
summary: Implicit generative models, which do not return likelihood values, such as generative adversarial networks and diffusion models, have become prevalent in recent years. While it is true that these models have shown remarkable results, evaluating their performance is challenging. This issue is of vital importance to push research forward and identify meaningful gains from random noise. Currently, heuristic metrics such as the Inception score (IS) and Frechet Inception Distance (FID) are the most common evaluation metrics, but what they measure is not entirely clear. Additionally, there are questions regarding how meaningful their score actually is. In this work, we study the evaluation metrics of generative models by generating a high-quality synthetic dataset on which we can estimate classical metrics for comparison. Our study shows that while FID and IS do correlate to several f-divergences, their ranking of close models can vary considerably making them problematic when used for fain-grained comparison. We further used this experimental setting to study which evaluation metric best correlates with our probabilistic metrics. Lastly, we look into the base features used for metrics such as FID.
abstract_zh: 不返回似然值的隐式生成模型，例如生成对抗网络和扩散模型，近年来变得普遍。虽然这些模型确实显示出了显着的结果，但评估它们的性能却具有挑战性。这个问题对于推动研究前进并从随机噪声中识别有意义的收益至关重要。目前，启发式指标（例如 Inception Score（IS）和 Frechet Inception Distance（FID））是最常见的评估指标，但它们测量的内容并不完全清楚。此外，还存在关于他们的分数实际上有多大意义的问题。在这项工作中，我们通过生成高质量的合成数据集来研究生成模型的评估指标，我们可以在该数据集上估计经典指标以进行比较。我们的研究表明，虽然 FID 和 IS 确实与几个 f 散度相关，但它们对接近模型的排名可能会有很大差异，这使得它们在用于细粒度比较时会出现问题。我们进一步使用这个实验设置来研究哪种评估指标与我们的概率指标最相关。最后，我们研究用于 FID 等指标的基本功能。

AI.tldr: 本研究探讨生成模型的评估指标，分析现有指标的局限性并提出改进方向。
AI.motivation: 隐式生成模型（如GAN和扩散模型）因不提供似然值，其性能评估面临挑战。现有指标（如IS和FID）的评估意义和有效性存在疑问，需系统研究以推动模型优化。
AI.method: 生成高质量合成数据集，通过对比经典评估指标与概率度量，分析不同指标的相关性及适用场景。
AI.result: FID和IS虽与部分f散度相关，但对相近模型的排名差异显著，难以支持细粒度比较；部分基础特征对指标结果影响较大。
AI.conclusion: 现有评估指标存在局限性，需结合具体任务谨慎选择，未来应探索更可靠且可解释的评估方法。

title: FairGrad: Fairness Aware Gradient Descent
title_zh: FairGrad：公平意识梯度下降
comment: Paper is accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research. Reviewed on OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=0f8tU3QwWD
comments: Paper is accepted at Transactions on Machine Learning Research. Reviewed on OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=0f8tU3QwWD
abstract: We address the problem of group fairness in classification, where the objective is to learn models that do not unjustly discriminate against subgroups of the population. Most existing approaches are limited to simple binary tasks or involve difficult to implement training mechanisms which reduces their practical applicability. In this paper, we propose FairGrad, a method to enforce fairness based on a re-weighting scheme that iteratively learns group specific weights based on whether they are advantaged or not. FairGrad is easy to implement, accommodates various standard fairness definitions, and comes with minimal overhead. Furthermore, we show that it is competitive with standard baselines over various datasets including ones used in natural language processing and computer vision. FairGrad is available as a PyPI package at - https://pypi.org/project/fairgrad
summary: We address the problem of group fairness in classification, where the objective is to learn models that do not unjustly discriminate against subgroups of the population. Most existing approaches are limited to simple binary tasks or involve difficult to implement training mechanisms which reduces their practical applicability. In this paper, we propose FairGrad, a method to enforce fairness based on a re-weighting scheme that iteratively learns group specific weights based on whether they are advantaged or not. FairGrad is easy to implement, accommodates various standard fairness definitions, and comes with minimal overhead. Furthermore, we show that it is competitive with standard baselines over various datasets including ones used in natural language processing and computer vision. FairGrad is available as a PyPI package at - https://pypi.org/project/fairgrad
abstract_zh: 我们解决分类中的群体公平问题，其目标是学习不会不公正地歧视人口子群体的模型。大多数现有方法仅限于简单的二进制任务或涉及难以实施的训练机制，从而降低了其实际适用性。在本文中，我们提出了 FairGrad，一种基于重新加权方案来强制公平的方法，该方案根据群体是否处于优势而迭代地学习特定于群体的权重。 FairGrad 易于实现，适应各种标准公平性定义，并且开销最小。此外，我们表明它在各种数据集（包括自然语言处理和计算机视觉中使用的数据集）上与标准基线具有竞争力。 FairGrad 可作为 PyPI 包在 - https://pypi.org/project/fairgrad

AI.tldr: 本文提出FairGrad方法，通过重新加权机制在分类任务中实现群体公平性，减少模型对子群体的歧视。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性方法多局限于二分类任务或实现复杂，缺乏实用性和通用性，需开发易于实施且兼容多种公平性定义的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于迭代学习群体特定权重的重加权方案，根据子群体是否处于优势地位动态调整权重，兼顾公平性与模型性能。
AI.result: 在自然语言处理和计算机视觉数据集上表现优于基线方法，且通过PyPI包提供开源实现。
AI.conclusion: FairGrad为机器学习中的公平性问题提供了高效且实用的解决方案，平衡了公平性约束与模型效果。

title: Recognising Affordances in Predicted Futures to Plan with Consideration of Non-canonical Affordance Effects
title_zh: 认识预测未来中的可供性以考虑非典型可供性效应进行规划
abstract: We propose a novel system for action sequence planning based on a combination of affordance recognition and a neural forward model predicting the effects of affordance execution. By performing affordance recognition on predicted futures, we avoid reliance on explicit affordance effect definitions for multi-step planning. Because the system learns affordance effects from experience data, the system can foresee not just the canonical effects of an affordance, but also situation-specific side-effects. This allows the system to avoid planning failures due to such non-canonical effects, and makes it possible to exploit non-canonical effects for realising a given goal. We evaluate the system in simulation, on a set of test tasks that require consideration of canonical and non-canonical affordance effects.
summary: We propose a novel system for action sequence planning based on a combination of affordance recognition and a neural forward model predicting the effects of affordance execution. By performing affordance recognition on predicted futures, we avoid reliance on explicit affordance effect definitions for multi-step planning. Because the system learns affordance effects from experience data, the system can foresee not just the canonical effects of an affordance, but also situation-specific side-effects. This allows the system to avoid planning failures due to such non-canonical effects, and makes it possible to exploit non-canonical effects for realising a given goal. We evaluate the system in simulation, on a set of test tasks that require consideration of canonical and non-canonical affordance effects.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于可供性识别和预测可供性执行效果的神经前向模型相结合的动作序列规划的新颖系统。通过对预测的未来进行可供性识别，我们避免了对多步骤规划的显式可供性效应定义的依赖。由于系统从经验数据中学习可供性效果，因此系统不仅可以预见可供性的典型效果，还可以预见特定情况的副作用。这使得系统能够避免由于这种非规范效应而导致的计划失败，并且使得利用非规范效应来实现给定目标成为可能。我们通过一组需要考虑规范和非规范可供性效应的测试任务来模拟评估系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合可供性识别与神经前向模型的动作序列规划系统，通过预测未来状态避免依赖显式可供性定义，解决多步规划中的非规范性效应问题。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法依赖显式定义的可供性效应，但实际场景中存在未被定义的非规范性效应，导致规划失败或无法利用潜在机会。
AI.method: 构建神经前向模型预测动作执行效果，结合可供性识别技术分析预测未来状态，从经验数据中学习包括非规范性效应在内的完整可供性效果。
AI.result: 在模拟环境中验证系统能有效避免非规范性效应引发的规划失败，并成功利用此类效应完成目标任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据驱动方式学习可供性效应，突破传统显式定义限制，为复杂场景下的鲁棒规划提供了新思路。
