search_text: Recognising Affordances in Predicted Futures to Plan with Consideration of Non-canonical Affordance Effects 认识预测未来中的可供性以考虑非典型可供性效应进行规划 We propose a novel system for action sequence planning based on a combination of affordance recognition and a neural forward model predicting the effects of affordance execution. By performing affordance recognition on predicted futures, we avoid reliance on explicit affordance effect definitions for multi-step planning. Because the system learns affordance effects from experience data, the system can foresee not just the canonical effects of an affordance, but also situation-specific side-effects. This allows the system to avoid planning failures due to such non-canonical effects, and makes it possible to exploit non-canonical effects for realising a given goal. We evaluate the system in simulation, on a set of test tasks that require consideration of canonical and non-canonical affordance effects. 我们提出了一种基于可供性识别和预测可供性执行效果的神经前向模型相结合的动作序列规划的新颖系统。通过对预测的未来进行可供性识别，我们避免了对多步骤规划的显式可供性效应定义的依赖。由于系统从经验数据中学习可供性效果，因此系统不仅可以预见可供性的典型效果，还可以预见特定情况的副作用。这使得系统能够避免由于这种非规范效应而导致的计划失败，并且使得利用非规范效应来实现给定目标成为可能。我们通过一组需要考虑规范和非规范可供性效应的测试任务来模拟评估系统。 本文提出一种结合可供性识别与神经前向模型的动作序列规划系统，通过预测未来状态避免依赖显式可供性定义，解决多步规划中的非规范性效应问题。 Solvi Arnold,Mami Kuroishi,Tadashi Adachi,Kimitoshi Yamazaki cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Lukas Timpl,Rahim Entezari,Hanie Sedghi,Behnam Neyshabur,Olga Saukh
title: Understanding the effect of sparsity on neural networks robustness
title_zh: 了解稀疏性对神经网络鲁棒性的影响
abstract: This paper examines the impact of static sparsity on the robustness of a trained network to weight perturbations, data corruption, and adversarial examples. We show that, up to a certain sparsity achieved by increasing network width and depth while keeping the network capacity fixed, sparsified networks consistently match and often outperform their initially dense versions. Robustness and accuracy decline simultaneously for very high sparsity due to loose connectivity between network layers. Our findings show that a rapid robustness drop caused by network compression observed in the literature is due to a reduced network capacity rather than sparsity.
summary: This paper examines the impact of static sparsity on the robustness of a trained network to weight perturbations, data corruption, and adversarial examples. We show that, up to a certain sparsity achieved by increasing network width and depth while keeping the network capacity fixed, sparsified networks consistently match and often outperform their initially dense versions. Robustness and accuracy decline simultaneously for very high sparsity due to loose connectivity between network layers. Our findings show that a rapid robustness drop caused by network compression observed in the literature is due to a reduced network capacity rather than sparsity.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了静态稀疏性对经过训练的网络对权重扰动、数据损坏和对抗性示例的鲁棒性的影响。我们表明，通过增加网络宽度和深度同时保持网络容量固定来实现一定的稀疏性，稀疏网络始终匹配并且通常优于其最初的密集版本。由于网络层之间的连接松散，在非常高的稀疏性下，鲁棒性和准确性会同时下降。我们的研究结果表明，文献中观察到的网络压缩导致的鲁棒性快速下降是由于网络容量减少而不是稀疏性造成的。

AI.tldr: 研究稀疏性对神经网络鲁棒性的影响，分析不同稀疏程度下网络在扰动、数据损坏和对抗样本中的表现。
AI.motivation: 探讨网络压缩导致鲁棒性下降的根本原因，澄清稀疏性与鲁棒性之间的关系是否被误解。
AI.method: 通过固定网络容量并调整宽度和深度实现不同稀疏度，对比稀疏网络与密集网络在鲁棒性指标上的表现。
AI.result: 适度稀疏网络鲁棒性与准确率优于密集网络，但极高稀疏度因层间连接松散导致性能下降，鲁棒性下降主因是容量缩减而非稀疏性本身。
AI.conclusion: 网络压缩引发的鲁棒性问题源于容量损失，而非稀疏性，设计稀疏网络需平衡容量与稀疏度。

authors_text: Susanne Ohlmann-Knafo,Naglis Ramanauskas,Sebastian Huettinger,Emil Johnson Jeyakumar,Darius Barušauskas,Neringa Bielskienė,Vytautas Naujalis,Jonas Bialopetravičius,Jonas Ražanskas,Artūras Samuilis,Jūratė Dementavičienė,Dirk Pickuth
title: AI-based software for lung nodule detection in chest X-rays -- Time for a second reader approach?
title_zh: 基于人工智能的胸部 X 光肺结节检测软件——是时候采用第二个读取器方法了？
comment: This paper is in submission process to the European Radiology journal
comments: This paper is in submission process to the European Radiology journal
abstract: Objectives: To compare artificial intelligence (AI) as a second reader in detecting lung nodules on chest X-rays (CXR) versus radiologists of two binational institutions, and to evaluate AI performance when using two different modes: automated versus assisted (additional remote radiologist review). Methods: The CXR public database (n = 247) of the Japanese Society of Radiological Technology with various types and sizes of lung nodules was analyzed. Eight radiologists evaluated the CXR images with regard to the presence of lung nodules and nodule conspicuity. After radiologist review, the AI software processed and flagged the CXR with the highest probability of missed nodules. The calculated accuracy metrics were the area under the curve (AUC), sensitivity, specificity, F1 score, false negative case number (FN), and the effect of different AI modes (automated/assisted) on the accuracy of nodule detection. Results: For radiologists, the average AUC value was 0.77 $\pm$ 0.07, while the average FN was 52.63 $\pm$ 17.53 (all studies) and 32 $\pm$ 11.59 (studies containing a nodule of malignant etiology = 32% rate of missed malignant nodules). Both AI modes -- automated and assisted -- produced an average increase in sensitivity (by 14% and 12%) and of F1-score (5% and 6%) and a decrease in specificity (by 10% and 3%, respectively). Conclusions: Both AI modes flagged the pulmonary nodules missed by radiologists in a significant number of cases. AI as a second reader has a high potential to improve diagnostic accuracy and radiology workflow. AI might detect certain pulmonary nodules earlier than radiologists, with a potentially significant impact on patient outcomes.
summary: Objectives: To compare artificial intelligence (AI) as a second reader in detecting lung nodules on chest X-rays (CXR) versus radiologists of two binational institutions, and to evaluate AI performance when using two different modes: automated versus assisted (additional remote radiologist review). Methods: The CXR public database (n = 247) of the Japanese Society of Radiological Technology with various types and sizes of lung nodules was analyzed. Eight radiologists evaluated the CXR images with regard to the presence of lung nodules and nodule conspicuity. After radiologist review, the AI software processed and flagged the CXR with the highest probability of missed nodules. The calculated accuracy metrics were the area under the curve (AUC), sensitivity, specificity, F1 score, false negative case number (FN), and the effect of different AI modes (automated/assisted) on the accuracy of nodule detection. Results: For radiologists, the average AUC value was 0.77 $\pm$ 0.07, while the average FN was 52.63 $\pm$ 17.53 (all studies) and 32 $\pm$ 11.59 (studies containing a nodule of malignant etiology = 32% rate of missed malignant nodules). Both AI modes -- automated and assisted -- produced an average increase in sensitivity (by 14% and 12%) and of F1-score (5% and 6%) and a decrease in specificity (by 10% and 3%, respectively). Conclusions: Both AI modes flagged the pulmonary nodules missed by radiologists in a significant number of cases. AI as a second reader has a high potential to improve diagnostic accuracy and radiology workflow. AI might detect certain pulmonary nodules earlier than radiologists, with a potentially significant impact on patient outcomes.
abstract_zh: 目标：比较人工智能 (AI) 作为第二阅读器在胸部 X 光 (CXR) 上检测肺结节与两个两国机构的放射科医生的情况，并评估使用两种不同模式时人工智能的性能：自动模式与辅助模式（额外的远程放射科医生审查）。方法：对日本放射线技术学会的CXR公共数据库（n = 247）中各种类型和大小的肺结节进行分析。八位放射科医生评估了 CXR 图像中肺结节的存在和结节的明显程度。经过放射科医生审查后，人工智能软件处理并标记了遗漏结节概率最高的 CXR。计算的准确性指标包括曲线下面积 (AUC)、灵敏度、特异性、F1 评分、假阴性病例数 (FN) 以及不同 AI 模式（自动/辅助）对结节检测准确性的影响。结果：对于放射科医生来说，平均 AUC 值为 0.77 $\pm$ 0.07，而平均 FN 为 52.63 $\pm$ 17.53（所有研究）和 32 $\pm$ 11.59（包含恶性病因结节的研究 = 恶性结节漏诊率为 32%）。两种人工智能模式（自动和辅助）均产生了敏感性（分别提高了 14% 和 12%）和 F1 分数（5% 和 6%）的平均提高，以及特异性的降低（分别提高了 10% 和 3%）。结论：两种 AI 模式都标记了放射科医生在大量病例中遗漏的肺部结节。人工智能作为第二个阅读器在提高诊断准确性和放射学工作流程方面具有很大潜力。人工智能可能比放射科医生更早地发现某些肺部结节，这对患者的治疗结果可能产生重大影响。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了AI作为胸部X光片肺结节检测的第二读者与两位跨国机构放射科医生的效果，并评估了AI在自动模式与辅助模式下的性能。
AI.motivation: 探索AI作为第二读者在肺结节检测中的应用潜力，以提升诊断准确性并优化放射科工作流程。
AI.method: 使用日本放射技术学会公开的247例胸部X光片数据库，由8名放射科医生评估结节存在性及显眼程度，随后AI软件在两种模式下处理图像并标记可能被遗漏的结节，计算AUC、灵敏度、特异性等指标。
AI.result: 放射科医生平均AUC为0.77，漏诊率高达52.63%；AI两种模式均提升灵敏度（+14%和+12%）及F1分数（+5%和+6%），但特异性下降（-10%和-3%）。
AI.conclusion: AI作为第二读者能显著提升肺结节检测准确性，尤其在发现放射科医生遗漏的结节方面具有潜力，可能对患者预后产生积极影响。

motivation: 探索AI作为第二读者在肺结节检测中的应用潜力，以提升诊断准确性并优化放射科工作流程。
method: 使用日本放射技术学会公开的247例胸部X光片数据库，由8名放射科医生评估结节存在性及显眼程度，随后AI软件在两种模式下处理图像并标记可能被遗漏的结节，计算AUC、灵敏度、特异性等指标。
result: 放射科医生平均AUC为0.77，漏诊率高达52.63%；AI两种模式均提升灵敏度（+14%和+12%）及F1分数（+5%和+6%），但特异性下降（-10%和-3%）。
conclusion: AI作为第二读者能显著提升肺结节检测准确性，尤其在发现放射科医生遗漏的结节方面具有潜力，可能对患者预后产生积极影响。
search_text: AI-based software for lung nodule detection in chest X-rays -- Time for a second reader approach? 基于人工智能的胸部 X 光肺结节检测软件——是时候采用第二个读取器方法了？ Objectives: To compare artificial intelligence (AI) as a second reader in detecting lung nodules on chest X-rays (CXR) versus radiologists of two binational institutions, and to evaluate AI performance when using two different modes: automated versus assisted (additional remote radiologist review). Methods: The CXR public database (n = 247) of the Japanese Society of Radiological Technology with various types and sizes of lung nodules was analyzed. Eight radiologists evaluated the CXR images with regard to the presence of lung nodules and nodule conspicuity. After radiologist review, the AI software processed and flagged the CXR with the highest probability of missed nodules. The calculated accuracy metrics were the area under the curve (AUC), sensitivity, specificity, F1 score, false negative case number (FN), and the effect of different AI modes (automated/assisted) on the accuracy of nodule detection. Results: For radiologists, the average AUC value was 0.77 $\pm$ 0.07, while the average FN was 52.63 $\pm$ 17.53 (all studies) and 32 $\pm$ 11.59 (studies containing a nodule of malignant etiology = 32% rate of missed malignant nodules). Both AI modes -- automated and assisted -- produced an average increase in sensitivity (by 14% and 12%) and of F1-score (5% and 6%) and a decrease in specificity (by 10% and 3%, respectively). Conclusions: Both AI modes flagged the pulmonary nodules missed by radiologists in a significant number of cases. AI as a second reader has a high potential to improve diagnostic accuracy and radiology workflow. AI might detect certain pulmonary nodules earlier than radiologists, with a potentially significant impact on patient outcomes. 目标：比较人工智能 (AI) 作为第二阅读器在胸部 X 光 (CXR) 上检测肺结节与两个两国机构的放射科医生的情况，并评估使用两种不同模式时人工智能的性能：自动模式与辅助模式（额外的远程放射科医生审查）。方法：对日本放射线技术学会的CXR公共数据库（n = 247）中各种类型和大小的肺结节进行分析。八位放射科医生评估了 CXR 图像中肺结节的存在和结节的明显程度。经过放射科医生审查后，人工智能软件处理并标记了遗漏结节概率最高的 CXR。计算的准确性指标包括曲线下面积 (AUC)、灵敏度、特异性、F1 评分、假阴性病例数 (FN) 以及不同 AI 模式（自动/辅助）对结节检测准确性的影响。结果：对于放射科医生来说，平均 AUC 值为 0.77 $\pm$ 0.07，而平均 FN 为 52.63 $\pm$ 17.53（所有研究）和 32 $\pm$ 11.59（包含恶性病因结节的研究 = 恶性结节漏诊率为 32%）。两种人工智能模式（自动和辅助）均产生了敏感性（分别提高了 14% 和 12%）和 F1 分数（5% 和 6%）的平均提高，以及特异性的降低（分别提高了 10% 和 3%）。结论：两种 AI 模式都标记了放射科医生在大量病例中遗漏的肺部结节。人工智能作为第二个阅读器在提高诊断准确性和放射学工作流程方面具有很大潜力。人工智能可能比放射科医生更早地发现某些肺部结节，这对患者的治疗结果可能产生重大影响。 本文比较了AI作为胸部X光片肺结节检测的第二读者与两位跨国机构放射科医生的效果，并评估了AI在自动模式与辅助模式下的性能。 Susanne Ohlmann-Knafo,Naglis Ramanauskas,Sebastian Huettinger,Emil Johnson Jeyakumar,Darius Barušauskas,Neringa Bielskienė,Vytautas Naujalis,Jonas Bialopetravičius,Jonas Ražanskas,Artūras Samuilis,Jūratė Dementavičienė,Dirk Pickuth eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ishaan Bhat,Josien P. W. Pluim,Max A. Viergever,Hugo J. Kuijf
title: Influence of uncertainty estimation techniques on false-positive reduction in liver lesion detection
title_zh: 不确定性估计技术对肝脏病变检测中假阳性减少的影响
comment: Accepted for publication in the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA)
comments: Accepted for publication in the Journal of Machine Learning for Biomedical Imaging (MELBA)
abstract: Deep learning techniques show success in detecting objects in medical images, but still suffer from false-positive predictions that may hinder accurate diagnosis. The estimated uncertainty of the neural network output has been used to flag incorrect predictions. We study the role played by features computed from neural network uncertainty estimates and shape-based features computed from binary predictions in reducing false positives in liver lesion detection by developing a classification-based post-processing step for different uncertainty estimation methods. We demonstrate an improvement in the lesion detection performance of the neural network (with respect to F1-score) for all uncertainty estimation methods on two datasets, comprising abdominal MR and CT images, respectively. We show that features computed from neural network uncertainty estimates tend not to contribute much toward reducing false positives. Our results show that factors like class imbalance (true over false positive ratio) and shape-based features extracted from uncertainty maps play an important role in distinguishing false positive from true positive predictions. Our code can be found at https://github.com/ishaanb92/FPCPipeline.
summary: Deep learning techniques show success in detecting objects in medical images, but still suffer from false-positive predictions that may hinder accurate diagnosis. The estimated uncertainty of the neural network output has been used to flag incorrect predictions. We study the role played by features computed from neural network uncertainty estimates and shape-based features computed from binary predictions in reducing false positives in liver lesion detection by developing a classification-based post-processing step for different uncertainty estimation methods. We demonstrate an improvement in the lesion detection performance of the neural network (with respect to F1-score) for all uncertainty estimation methods on two datasets, comprising abdominal MR and CT images, respectively. We show that features computed from neural network uncertainty estimates tend not to contribute much toward reducing false positives. Our results show that factors like class imbalance (true over false positive ratio) and shape-based features extracted from uncertainty maps play an important role in distinguishing false positive from true positive predictions. Our code can be found at https://github.com/ishaanb92/FPCPipeline.
abstract_zh: 深度学习技术在检测医学图像中的物体方面取得了成功，但仍然存在可能妨碍准确诊断的误报预测。神经网络输出的估计不确定性已被用来标记不正确的预测。我们通过为不同的不确定性估计方法开发基于分类的后处理步骤，研究了根据神经网络不确定性估计计算出的特征和根据二进制预测计算出的基于形状的特征在减少肝脏病变检测中的误报中所起的作用。我们证明了神经网络在两个数据集（分别包括腹部 MR 和 CT 图像）上的所有不确定性估计方法的病变检测性能（相对于 F1 分数）的改进。我们表明，根据神经网络不确定性估计计算出的特征往往对减少误报贡献不大。我们的结果表明，类不平衡（真与假阳性比率）和从不确定性图中提取的基于形状的特征等因素在区分假阳性和真阳性预测方面发挥着重要作用。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/ishaanb92/FPCPipeline 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究不确定性估计技术在减少肝脏病变检测中假阳性结果的影响，通过开发基于分类的后处理步骤进行分析。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学图像检测中存在假阳性预测问题，可能影响诊断准确性，需通过不确定性估计技术优化检测结果。
AI.method: 开发基于分类的后处理方法，结合神经网络不确定性特征和形状特征，分析其在腹部MRI和CT数据集上的假阳性减少效果。
AI.result: 所有不确定性方法均提升了检测性能（F1分数），但不确定性特征贡献有限，形状特征和类别不平衡因素对区分真假阳性更关键。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性特征对减少假阳性作用不大，应重点关注形状特征和类别不平衡因素以优化肝脏病变检测。

authors_text: Xiao Feng Zhang,Chao Chen Gu,Shan Ying Zhu
title: SpA-Former: Transformer image shadow detection and removal via spatial attention
title_zh: SpA-Former：通过空间注意力检测和去除 Transformer 图像阴影
abstract: In this paper, we propose an end-to-end SpA-Former to recover a shadow-free image from a single shaded image. Unlike traditional methods that require two steps for shadow detection and then shadow removal, the SpA-Former unifies these steps into one, which is a one-stage network capable of directly learning the mapping function between shadows and no shadows, it does not require a separate shadow detection. Thus, SpA-former is adaptable to real image de-shadowing for shadows projected on different semantic regions. SpA-Former consists of transformer layer and a series of joint Fourier transform residual blocks and two-wheel joint spatial attention. The network in this paper is able to handle the task while achieving a very fast processing efficiency. Our code is relased on https://github.com/zhangbaijin/SpA-Former-shadow-removal
summary: In this paper, we propose an end-to-end SpA-Former to recover a shadow-free image from a single shaded image. Unlike traditional methods that require two steps for shadow detection and then shadow removal, the SpA-Former unifies these steps into one, which is a one-stage network capable of directly learning the mapping function between shadows and no shadows, it does not require a separate shadow detection. Thus, SpA-former is adaptable to real image de-shadowing for shadows projected on different semantic regions. SpA-Former consists of transformer layer and a series of joint Fourier transform residual blocks and two-wheel joint spatial attention. The network in this paper is able to handle the task while achieving a very fast processing efficiency. Our code is relased on https://github.com/zhangbaijin/SpA-Former-shadow-removal
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端的 SpA-Former，用于从单个着色图像中恢复无阴影图像。与传统方法需要两步进行阴影检测然后去除阴影不同，SpA-Former将这些步骤合二为一，是一种能够直接学习阴影和无阴影之间映射函数的一级网络，不需要单独的阴影检测。因此，SpA-former 适用于投影在不同语义区域上的阴影的真实图像去阴影。 SpA-Former由变压器层和一系列联合傅里叶变换残差块和两轮联合空间注意力组成。本文的网络能够处理该任务，同时实现非常快的处理效率。我们的代码发布在https://github.com/zhangbaijin/SpA-Former-shadow-removal

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的SpA-Former网络，通过空间注意力机制实现单张阴影图像的阴影检测与去除一体化处理。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需分两步完成阴影检测与去除，流程繁琐且适应性差，本文旨在通过单阶段网络直接学习阴影与无阴影的映射关系，提升处理效率与实用性。
AI.method: 结合Transformer层、联合傅里叶变换残差块及双轮联合空间注意力机制，构建端到端网络，无需单独阴影检测步骤。
AI.result: 实现高效阴影去除，处理速度显著提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SpA-Former通过一体化设计创新性地解决了阴影去除问题，在保持高效性的同时适应不同语义区域的阴影投影。

SpA-Former consists of transformer layer and a series of joint Fourier transform residual blocks and two-wheel joint spatial attention. The network in this paper is able to handle the task while achieving a very fast processing efficiency. Our code is relased on https://github.com/zhangbaijin/SpA-Former-shadow-removal 在本文中，我们提出了一种端到端的 SpA-Former，用于从单个着色图像中恢复无阴影图像。与传统方法需要两步进行阴影检测然后去除阴影不同，SpA-Former将这些步骤合二为一，是一种能够直接学习阴影和无阴影之间映射函数的一级网络，不需要单独的阴影检测。因此，SpA-former 适用于投影在不同语义区域上的阴影的真实图像去阴影。 SpA-Former由变压器层和一系列联合傅里叶变换残差块和两轮联合空间注意力组成。本文的网络能够处理该任务，同时实现非常快的处理效率。我们的代码发布在https://github.com/zhangbaijin/SpA-Former-shadow-removal 本文提出一种端到端的SpA-Former网络，通过空间注意力机制实现单张阴影图像的阴影检测与去除一体化处理。 Xiao Feng Zhang,Chao Chen Gu,Shan Ying Zhu cs.CV,cs.LG

title: UniUD-FBK-UB-UniBZ Submission to the EPIC-Kitchens-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge 2022
title_zh: UniUD-FBK-UB-UniBZ 提交给 2022 年 EPIC-Kitchens-100 多实例检索挑战赛
comment: Ranked joint 1st place in the Multi-Instance Action Retrieval Challenge organized at EPIC@CVPR2022
comments: Ranked joint 1st place in the Multi-Instance Action Retrieval Challenge organized at EPIC@CVPR2022
abstract: This report presents the technical details of our submission to the EPIC-Kitchens-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge 2022. To participate in the challenge, we designed an ensemble consisting of different models trained with two recently developed relevance-augmented versions of the widely used triplet loss. Our submission, visible on the public leaderboard, obtains an average score of 61.02% nDCG and 49.77% mAP.
summary: This report presents the technical details of our submission to the EPIC-Kitchens-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge 2022. To participate in the challenge, we designed an ensemble consisting of different models trained with two recently developed relevance-augmented versions of the widely used triplet loss. Our submission, visible on the public leaderboard, obtains an average score of 61.02% nDCG and 49.77% mAP.
abstract_zh: 本报告介绍了我们向 2022 年 EPIC-Kitchens-100 多实例检索挑战赛提交的技术细节。为了参加该挑战赛，我们设计了一个由不同模型组成的集合，并使用两个最近开发的广泛使用的三元组损失的相关性增强版本进行训练。我们提交的内容在公共排行榜上可见，平均得分为 61.02% nDCG 和 49.77% mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了参与EPIC-Kitchens-100多实例检索挑战赛的提交方案，提出基于改进三元组损失的集成模型方法。
AI.motivation: 为提升多实例检索任务的性能，针对传统三元组损失在复杂场景下的局限性进行改进。
AI.method: 设计集成模型组合，采用两种改进的三元组损失函数进行模型训练。
AI.result: 在公开排行榜取得61.02%nDCG和49.77%mAP的平均成绩。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的三元组损失方法有效提升了多实例检索任务的性能。

title: S2TNet: Spatio-Temporal Transformer Networks for Trajectory Prediction in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: S2TNet：用于自动驾驶轨迹预测的时空变换器网络
abstract: To safely and rationally participate in dense and heterogeneous traffic, autonomous vehicles require to sufficiently analyze the motion patterns of surrounding traffic-agents and accurately predict their future trajectories. This is challenging because the trajectories of traffic-agents are not only influenced by the traffic-agents themselves but also by spatial interaction with each other. Previous methods usually rely on the sequential step-by-step processing of Long Short-Term Memory networks (LSTMs) and merely extract the interactions between spatial neighbors for single type traffic-agents. We propose the Spatio-Temporal Transformer Networks (S2TNet), which models the spatio-temporal interactions by spatio-temporal Transformer and deals with the temporel sequences by temporal Transformer. We input additional category, shape and heading information into our networks to handle the heterogeneity of traffic-agents. The proposed methods outperforms state-of-the-art methods on ApolloScape Trajectory dataset by more than 7\% on both the weighted sum of Average and Final Displacement Error. Our code is available at https://github.com/chenghuang66/s2tnet.
summary: To safely and rationally participate in dense and heterogeneous traffic, autonomous vehicles require to sufficiently analyze the motion patterns of surrounding traffic-agents and accurately predict their future trajectories. This is challenging because the trajectories of traffic-agents are not only influenced by the traffic-agents themselves but also by spatial interaction with each other. Previous methods usually rely on the sequential step-by-step processing of Long Short-Term Memory networks (LSTMs) and merely extract the interactions between spatial neighbors for single type traffic-agents. We propose the Spatio-Temporal Transformer Networks (S2TNet), which models the spatio-temporal interactions by spatio-temporal Transformer and deals with the temporel sequences by temporal Transformer. We input additional category, shape and heading information into our networks to handle the heterogeneity of traffic-agents. The proposed methods outperforms state-of-the-art methods on ApolloScape Trajectory dataset by more than 7\% on both the weighted sum of Average and Final Displacement Error. Our code is available at https://github.com/chenghuang66/s2tnet.
abstract_zh: 为了安全、合理地参与密集且异构的交通，自动驾驶车辆需要充分分析周围交通主体的运动模式并准确预测其未来轨迹。这是具有挑战性的，因为交通代理的轨迹不仅受到交通代理本身的影响，而且还受到彼此之间的空间相互作用的影响。以前的方法通常依赖于长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的顺序逐步处理，并且仅提取单一类型流量代理的空间邻居之间的交互。我们提出了时空变换网络（S2TNet），它通过时空变换器对时空交互进行建模，并通过时间变换器处理时间序列。我们将额外的类别、形状和方向信息输入到我们的网络中，以处理流量代理的异质性。所提出的方法在平均位移误差和最终位移误差的加权和上均优于 ApolloScape Trajectory 数据集上最先进的方法 7% 以上。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/ Chenghuang66/s2tnet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S2TNet，一种基于时空Transformer网络的轨迹预测方法，用于自动驾驶中对周围交通参与者未来轨迹的准确预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖LSTM逐步处理序列，仅提取单一类型交通参与者的空间邻近交互，难以充分建模复杂时空关系及异构交通参与者间的多维交互。
AI.method: 设计时空Transformer网络，通过时空Transformer建模交互关系，使用时间Transformer处理时序数据，并引入类别、形状和航向信息以处理交通参与者异构性。
AI.result: 在ApolloScape数据集上，S2TNet在加权平均位移误差和最终位移误差指标上超越现有方法7%以上。
AI.conclusion: S2TNet通过建模时空交互和异构性信息显著提升了轨迹预测性能，代码已开源。

title: A Study on Modularity Density Maximization: Column Generation Acceleration and Computational Complexity Analysis
title_zh: 模块化密度最大化研究：列生成加速和计算复杂度分析
abstract: Community detection is a fundamental network-analysis primitive with a variety of applications in diverse domains. Although the modularity introduced by Newman and Girvan (2004) has widely been used as a quality function for community detection, it has some drawbacks. The modularity density introduced by Li et al. (2008) is known to be an effective alternative to the modularity, which mitigates one of the drawbacks called the resolution limit. A large body of work has been devoted to designing exact and heuristic methods for modularity density maximization, without any computational complexity analysis. In this study, we investigate modularity density maximization from both algorithmic and computational complexity aspects. Specifically, we first accelerate column generation for the modularity density maximization problem. To this end, we point out that the auxiliary problem appearing in column generation can be viewed as a dense subgraph discovery problem. Then we employ a well-known strategy for dense subgraph discovery, called the greedy peeling, for approximately solving the auxiliary problem. Moreover, we reformulate the auxiliary problem to a sequence of $0$--$1$ linear programming problems, enabling us to compute its optimal value more efficiently and to get more diverse columns. Computational experiments using a variety of real-world networks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm. Finally, we show the NP-hardness of a slight variant of the modularity density maximization problem, where the output partition has to have two or more clusters, as well as showing the NP-hardness of the auxiliary problem.
summary: Community detection is a fundamental network-analysis primitive with a variety of applications in diverse domains. Although the modularity introduced by Newman and Girvan (2004) has widely been used as a quality function for community detection, it has some drawbacks. The modularity density introduced by Li et al. (2008) is known to be an effective alternative to the modularity, which mitigates one of the drawbacks called the resolution limit. A large body of work has been devoted to designing exact and heuristic methods for modularity density maximization, without any computational complexity analysis. In this study, we investigate modularity density maximization from both algorithmic and computational complexity aspects. Specifically, we first accelerate column generation for the modularity density maximization problem. To this end, we point out that the auxiliary problem appearing in column generation can be viewed as a dense subgraph discovery problem. Then we employ a well-known strategy for dense subgraph discovery, called the greedy peeling, for approximately solving the auxiliary problem. Moreover, we reformulate the auxiliary problem to a sequence of $0$--$1$ linear programming problems, enabling us to compute its optimal value more efficiently and to get more diverse columns. Computational experiments using a variety of real-world networks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm. Finally, we show the NP-hardness of a slight variant of the modularity density maximization problem, where the output partition has to have two or more clusters, as well as showing the NP-hardness of the auxiliary problem.
abstract_zh: 社区检测是一种基本的网络分析原语，在不同领域具有多种应用。尽管 Newman 和 Girvan (2004) 引入的模块化已被广泛用作社区检测的质量函数，但它有一些缺点。 Li 等人提出的模块化密度。 （2008）被认为是模块化的有效替代方案，它减轻了称为分辨率限制的缺点之一。大量的工作致力于设计精确的启发式方法来实现模块化密度最大化，而没有任何计算复杂性分析。在本研究中，我们从算法和计算复杂性方面研究了模块化密度最大化。具体来说，我们首先加速模块化密度最大化问题的列生成。为此，我们指出列生成中出现的辅助问题可以看作是密集子图发现问题。然后，我们采用一种众所周知的密集子图发现策略，称为贪婪剥离，来近似解决辅助问题。此外，我们将辅助问题重新表述为一系列 $0$--$1$ 线性规划问题，使我们能够更有效地计算其最优值并获得更多样的列。使用各种现实世界网络的计算实验证明了我们提出的算法的有效性。最后，我们展示了模块化密度最大化问题的一个轻微变体的 NP 难度，其中输出分区必须具有两个或更多簇，并展示了辅助问题的 NP 难度。

AI.tldr: 本文研究模块密度最大化问题，通过加速列生成算法和计算复杂性分析，提出了一种高效的社区检测方法。
AI.motivation: 模块度（modularity）存在分辨率限制等缺陷，模块密度（modularity density）虽能缓解该问题，但现有研究缺乏对其最大化问题的计算复杂性分析和高效算法。
AI.method: 将列生成中的辅助问题转化为稠密子图发现，采用贪心剥离策略近似求解，并将其重构为0-1线性规划问题以提升效率；通过实验验证算法有效性，并证明模块密度最大化问题的变体为NP难。
AI.result: 提出的算法在多个真实网络中表现优异，且证明了模块密度最大化问题（要求至少两个簇）及其辅助问题均为NP难。
AI.conclusion: 本文在算法设计和理论分析两方面推进了模块密度最大化研究，为社区检测提供了更高效的方法论和复杂性边界认知。

tldr: 本文研究模块密度最大化问题，通过加速列生成算法和计算复杂性分析，提出了一种高效的社区检测方法。
motivation: 模块度（modularity）存在分辨率限制等缺陷，模块密度（modularity density）虽能缓解该问题，但现有研究缺乏对其最大化问题的计算复杂性分析和高效算法。

conclusion: 本文在算法设计和理论分析两方面推进了模块密度最大化研究，为社区检测提供了更高效的方法论和复杂性边界认知。
search_text: A Study on Modularity Density Maximization: Column Generation Acceleration and Computational Complexity Analysis 模块化密度最大化研究：列生成加速和计算复杂度分析 Community detection is a fundamental network-analysis primitive with a variety of applications in diverse domains. Although the modularity introduced by Newman and Girvan (2004) has widely been used as a quality function for community detection, it has some drawbacks. The modularity density introduced by Li et al. (2008) is known to be an effective alternative to the modularity, which mitigates one of the drawbacks called the resolution limit. A large body of work has been devoted to designing exact and heuristic methods for modularity density maximization, without any computational complexity analysis. In this study, we investigate modularity density maximization from both algorithmic and computational complexity aspects. Specifically, we first accelerate column generation for the modularity density maximization problem. To this end, we point out that the auxiliary problem appearing in column generation can be viewed as a dense subgraph discovery problem. Then we employ a well-known strategy for dense subgraph discovery, called the greedy peeling, for approximately solving the auxiliary problem. Moreover, we reformulate the auxiliary problem to a sequence of $0$--$1$ linear programming problems, enabling us to compute its optimal value more efficiently and to get more diverse columns. Computational experiments using a variety of real-world networks demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm. Finally, we show the NP-hardness of a slight variant of the modularity density maximization problem, where the output partition has to have two or more clusters, as well as showing the NP-hardness of the auxiliary problem. 社区检测是一种基本的网络分析原语，在不同领域具有多种应用。尽管 Newman 和 Girvan (2004) 引入的模块化已被广泛用作社区检测的质量函数，但它有一些缺点。 Li 等人提出的模块化密度。 （2008）被认为是模块化的有效替代方案，它减轻了称为分辨率限制的缺点之一。大量的工作致力于设计精确的启发式方法来实现模块化密度最大化，而没有任何计算复杂性分析。在本研究中，我们从算法和计算复杂性方面研究了模块化密度最大化。具体来说，我们首先加速模块化密度最大化问题的列生成。为此，我们指出列生成中出现的辅助问题可以看作是密集子图发现问题。然后，我们采用一种众所周知的密集子图发现策略，称为贪婪剥离，来近似解决辅助问题。此外，我们将辅助问题重新表述为一系列 $0$--$1$ 线性规划问题，使我们能够更有效地计算其最优值并获得更多样的列。使用各种现实世界网络的计算实验证明了我们提出的算法的有效性。最后，我们展示了模块化密度最大化问题的一个轻微变体的 NP 难度，其中输出分区必须具有两个或更多簇，并展示了辅助问题的 NP 难度。 本文研究模块密度最大化问题，通过加速列生成算法和计算复杂性分析，提出了一种高效的社区检测方法。 Issey Sukeda,Atsushi Miyauchi,Akiko Takeda cs.SI,cs.DM,cs.DS

authors_text: Atahan Ozer,Kadir Burak Buldu,Abdullah Akgül,Gozde Unal
title: How to Combine Variational Bayesian Networks in Federated Learning
title_zh: 如何在联邦学习中结合变分贝叶斯网络
abstract: Federated Learning enables multiple data centers to train a central model collaboratively without exposing any confidential data. Even though deterministic models are capable of performing high prediction accuracy, their lack of calibration and capability to quantify uncertainty is problematic for safety-critical applications. Different from deterministic models, probabilistic models such as Bayesian neural networks are relatively well-calibrated and able to quantify uncertainty alongside their competitive prediction accuracy. Both of the approaches appear in the federated learning framework; however, the aggregation scheme of deterministic models cannot be directly applied to probabilistic models since weights correspond to distributions instead of point estimates. In this work, we study the effects of various aggregation schemes for variational Bayesian neural networks. With empirical results on three image classification datasets, we observe that the degree of spread for an aggregated distribution is a significant factor in the learning process. Hence, we present an investigation on the question of how to combine variational Bayesian networks in federated learning, while providing benchmarks for different aggregation settings.
summary: Federated Learning enables multiple data centers to train a central model collaboratively without exposing any confidential data. Even though deterministic models are capable of performing high prediction accuracy, their lack of calibration and capability to quantify uncertainty is problematic for safety-critical applications. Different from deterministic models, probabilistic models such as Bayesian neural networks are relatively well-calibrated and able to quantify uncertainty alongside their competitive prediction accuracy. Both of the approaches appear in the federated learning framework; however, the aggregation scheme of deterministic models cannot be directly applied to probabilistic models since weights correspond to distributions instead of point estimates. In this work, we study the effects of various aggregation schemes for variational Bayesian neural networks. With empirical results on three image classification datasets, we observe that the degree of spread for an aggregated distribution is a significant factor in the learning process. Hence, we present an investigation on the question of how to combine variational Bayesian networks in federated learning, while providing benchmarks for different aggregation settings.
abstract_zh: 联合学习使多个数据中心能够协作训练中央模型，而不会暴露任何机密数据。尽管确定性模型能够执行高预测精度，但它们缺乏校准和量化不确定性的能力对于安全关键型应用来说是个问题。与确定性模型不同，贝叶斯神经网络等概率模型经过相对良好的校准，能够量化不确定性以及具有竞争力的预测准确性。这两种方法都出现在联邦学习框架中；然而，确定性模型的聚合方案不能直接应用于概率模型，因为权重对应于分布而不是点估计。在这项工作中，我们研究了变分贝叶斯神经网络的各种聚合方案的影响。通过三个图像分类数据集的实证结果，我们观察到聚合分布的传播程度是学习过程中的一个重要因素。因此，我们对如何在联邦学习中结合变分贝叶斯网络的问题进行了调查，同时为不同的聚合设置提供了基准。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何在联邦学习框架中结合变分贝叶斯神经网络，探讨不同聚合策略对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 确定性模型虽预测准确但缺乏不确定性量化能力，而贝叶斯神经网络虽能量化不确定性但其权重为分布而非点估计，传统聚合方法无法直接应用。
AI.method: 通过实证分析三种图像分类数据集，研究不同聚合方案对变分贝叶斯网络分布扩散程度的影响，并建立基准对比。
AI.result: 发现聚合分布的扩散程度是学习过程中的关键因素，不同聚合策略的性能差异显著。
AI.conclusion: 提出了结合变分贝叶斯网络的联邦学习方法论，并为不同聚合设置提供了基准，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Yiwei Ding,Wenjin Deng,Yinglin Zheng,Pengfei Liu,Meihong Wang,Xuan Cheng,Jianmin Bao,Dong Chen,Ming Zeng
title: I^2R-Net: Intra- and Inter-Human Relation Network for Multi-Person Pose Estimation
title_zh: I^2R-Net：用于多人姿势估计的人内和人际关系网络
abstract: In this paper, we present the Intra- and Inter-Human Relation Networks (I^2R-Net) for Multi-Person Pose Estimation. It involves two basic modules. First, the Intra-Human Relation Module operates on a single person and aims to capture Intra-Human dependencies. Second, the Inter-Human Relation Module considers the relation between multiple instances and focuses on capturing Inter-Human interactions. The Inter-Human Relation Module can be designed very lightweight by reducing the resolution of feature map, yet learn useful relation information to significantly boost the performance of the Intra-Human Relation Module. Even without bells and whistles, our method can compete or outperform current competition winners. We conduct extensive experiments on COCO, CrowdPose, and OCHuman datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed model surpasses all the state-of-the-art methods. Concretely, the proposed method achieves 77.4% AP on CrowPose dataset and 67.8% AP on OCHuman dataset respectively, outperforming existing methods by a large margin. Additionally, the ablation study and visualization analysis also prove the effectiveness of our model.
summary: In this paper, we present the Intra- and Inter-Human Relation Networks (I^2R-Net) for Multi-Person Pose Estimation. It involves two basic modules. First, the Intra-Human Relation Module operates on a single person and aims to capture Intra-Human dependencies. Second, the Inter-Human Relation Module considers the relation between multiple instances and focuses on capturing Inter-Human interactions. The Inter-Human Relation Module can be designed very lightweight by reducing the resolution of feature map, yet learn useful relation information to significantly boost the performance of the Intra-Human Relation Module. Even without bells and whistles, our method can compete or outperform current competition winners. We conduct extensive experiments on COCO, CrowdPose, and OCHuman datasets. The results demonstrate that the proposed model surpasses all the state-of-the-art methods. Concretely, the proposed method achieves 77.4% AP on CrowPose dataset and 67.8% AP on OCHuman dataset respectively, outperforming existing methods by a large margin. Additionally, the ablation study and visualization analysis also prove the effectiveness of our model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了用于多人姿势估计的人内和人际关系网络（I^2R-Net）。它涉及两个基本模块。首先，人际关系模块对单个人进行操作，旨在捕获人际依赖性。其次，人际关系模块考虑多个实例之间的关系，重点捕获人际交互。通过降低特征图的分辨率，可以将人际关系模块设计得非常轻量，但仍可以学习有用的关系信息，从而显着提高人际关系模块的性能。即使没有花哨的东西，我们的方法也可以与当前的竞赛获胜者竞争或超越。我们在 COCO、CrowdPose 和 OCHuman 数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，所提出的模型超越了所有最先进的方法。具体而言，该方法在 CrowPose 数据集上的 AP 成绩为 77.4%，在 OCHuman 数据集上的 AP 成绩为 67.8%，大幅优于现有方法。此外，消融研究和可视化分析也证明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出I²R-Net，通过设计内人和人际关系模块，解决多人姿态估计问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多人姿态估计中难以同时有效捕捉个体内部依赖关系和人与人之间的交互信息，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 提出包含内人关系模块（处理单人内部依赖）和人际关系模块（通过降低特征图分辨率轻量化设计，学习多人交互信息）的双模块网络架构。
AI.result: 在CrowdPose和OCHuman数据集上分别达到77.4%和67.8%的AP值，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型通过联合建模个体与群体关系，在多人姿态估计任务中取得当前最优性能。

title: Exploring user needs in relation to algorithmically constructed classifications of publications
title_zh: 探索与算法构建的出版物分类相关的用户需求
abstract: Algorithmic classification of research publications has been created to study different aspects of research. Such classifications can be used to support information needs in universities for decision making. However, the classifications have foremost been evaluated quantitatively regarding their content, but not qualitatively regarding their feasibility in a specific context. The aim of this study was to explore and evaluate the usefulness of such classifications to users in the context of exploring an emerging research area. I conducted four interviews with managers of a project aimed to support research and application of artificial intelligence at the Swedish medical university Karolinska Institutet. The interviews focused on the information need of the managers. To support the project, a classification was created by clustering of publications in a citation network. A cluster map based on this classification was provided to the project leader and one interview focused on the use of the classification in the project in relation to the stated information needs. The interviews showed that the aim of the project was to improve competence, enhance communication between researchers and develop support structures. Getting an overview of artificial intelligence at the university and information about who is doing what was important to fulfill this aim. The cluster map was used to support activities conducted by the project leader, such as interviews and information gathering. It was also used to get overview and display of AI research at KI. Interpretation was found to be challenging in some cases. The interactivity of the map facilitated interpretation. This study was small in scope, but it provides one piece of knowledge about the information needs related to algorithmic classifications.

Such classifications can be used to support information needs in universities for decision making. However, the classifications have foremost been evaluated quantitatively regarding their content, but not qualitatively regarding their feasibility in a specific context. The aim of this study was to explore and evaluate the usefulness of such classifications to users in the context of exploring an emerging research area. I conducted four interviews with managers of a project aimed to support research and application of artificial intelligence at the Swedish medical university Karolinska Institutet. The interviews focused on the information need of the managers. To support the project, a classification was created by clustering of publications in a citation network. A cluster map based on this classification was provided to the project leader and one interview focused on the use of the classification in the project in relation to the stated information needs. The interviews showed that the aim of the project was to improve competence, enhance communication between researchers and develop support structures. Getting an overview of artificial intelligence at the university and information about who is doing what was important to fulfill this aim. The cluster map was used to support activities conducted by the project leader, such as interviews and information gathering. It was also used to get overview and display of AI research at KI. Interpretation was found to be challenging in some cases. The interactivity of the map facilitated interpretation. This study was small in scope, but it provides one piece of knowledge about the information needs related to algorithmic classifications.
abstract_zh: 研究出版物的算法分类是为了研究研究的不同方面而创建的。这种分类可用于支持大学决策的信息需求。然而，这些分类首先是对其内容进行了定量评估，而不是对其在特定背景下的可行性进行了定性评估。本研究的目的是在探索新兴研究领域的背景下探索和评估此类分类对用户的有用性。我对瑞典医科大学卡罗林斯卡学院一个旨在支持人工智能研究和应用的项目的管理人员进行了四次采访。访谈的重点是管理者的信息需求。为了支持该项目，通过对引文网络中的出版物进行聚类来创建分类。向项目负责人提供了基于此分类的聚类图，并且一次访谈重点关注了项目中与所述信息需求相关的分类的使用。访谈表明，该项目的目的是提高能力、加强研究人员之间的沟通并发展支持结构。了解大学中的人工智能概况以及有关谁在做什么对于实现这一目标非常重要的信息。聚类地图用于支持项目负责人进行的活动，例如访谈和信息收集。它还用于获取 KI 人工智能研究的概览和展示。在某些情况下，解释被发现具有挑战性。地图的交互性促进了解释。这项研究的范围很小，但它提供了有关算法分类相关信息需求的一个知识。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了算法生成的出版物分类在支持大学研究决策中的实用性，特别是在新兴研究领域中的应用。
AI.motivation: 尽管算法分类已通过定量方法评估，但缺乏对其在特定情境中可行性的定性研究，因此需探索用户需求以评估其实际效用。
AI.method: 通过对瑞典卡罗林斯卡医学院项目管理者的四次访谈，结合基于引用网络聚类生成的分类图谱，分析其在项目中的使用情况与用户需求。
AI.result: 分类图谱帮助项目负责人进行信息整合与沟通，但部分解读存在困难，交互功能提升了可操作性。
AI.conclusion: 该小型研究揭示了算法分类在满足用户信息需求中的潜力，强调了用户情境与交互设计的重要性。

title: Optical Flow Regularization of Implicit Neural Representations for Video Frame Interpolation
title_zh: 视频帧插值隐式神经表示的光流正则化
abstract: Recent works have shown the ability of Implicit Neural Representations (INR) to carry meaningful representations of signal derivatives. In this work, we leverage this property to perform Video Frame Interpolation (VFI) by explicitly constraining the derivatives of the INR to satisfy the optical flow constraint equation. We achieve state of the art VFI on limited motion ranges using only a target video and its optical flow, without learning the interpolation operator from additional training data. We further show that constraining the INR derivatives not only allows to better interpolate intermediate frames but also improves the ability of narrow networks to fit the observed frames, which suggests potential applications to video compression and INR optimization.
summary: Recent works have shown the ability of Implicit Neural Representations (INR) to carry meaningful representations of signal derivatives. In this work, we leverage this property to perform Video Frame Interpolation (VFI) by explicitly constraining the derivatives of the INR to satisfy the optical flow constraint equation. We achieve state of the art VFI on limited motion ranges using only a target video and its optical flow, without learning the interpolation operator from additional training data. We further show that constraining the INR derivatives not only allows to better interpolate intermediate frames but also improves the ability of narrow networks to fit the observed frames, which suggests potential applications to video compression and INR optimization.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，隐式神经表征（INR）能够承载信号导数的有意义的表征。在这项工作中，我们利用此属性通过显式约束 INR 的导数以满足光流约束方程来执行视频帧插值 (VFI)。我们仅使用目标视频及其光流在有限的运动范围内实现最先进的 VFI，而无需从额外的训练数据中学习插值运算符。我们进一步表明，约束 INR 导数不仅可以更好地插值中间帧，还可以提高窄网络拟合观察到的帧的能力，这表明了视频压缩和 INR 优化的潜在应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光流正则化的隐式神经表示方法，用于视频帧插值，通过约束INR导数满足光流方程，在有限运动范围内实现先进插值效果。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽表明隐式神经表示（INR）能表征信号导数，但如何利用该特性实现无需额外训练数据的视频帧插值仍需探索。
AI.method: 通过显式约束隐式神经表示（INR）的导数满足光流约束方程，仅利用目标视频及其光流信息，无需额外训练数据进行视频帧插值。
AI.result: 在有限运动范围内，该方法在无需额外训练数据的情况下实现了最先进的视频帧插值效果，并提升了窄网络拟合观测帧的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过约束INR导数有效提升了视频帧插值性能，展示了其在视频压缩和INR优化中的潜在应用价值。

We further show that constraining the INR derivatives not only allows to better interpolate intermediate frames but also improves the ability of narrow networks to fit the observed frames, which suggests potential applications to video compression and INR optimization. 最近的研究表明，隐式神经表征（INR）能够承载信号导数的有意义的表征。在这项工作中，我们利用此属性通过显式约束 INR 的导数以满足光流约束方程来执行视频帧插值 (VFI)。我们仅使用目标视频及其光流在有限的运动范围内实现最先进的 VFI，而无需从额外的训练数据中学习插值运算符。我们进一步表明，约束 INR 导数不仅可以更好地插值中间帧，还可以提高窄网络拟合观察到的帧的能力，这表明了视频压缩和 INR 优化的潜在应用。 本文提出了一种基于光流正则化的隐式神经表示方法，用于视频帧插值，通过约束INR导数满足光流方程，在有限运动范围内实现先进插值效果。 Weihao Zhuang,Tristan Hascoet,Ryoichi Takashima,Tetsuya Takiguchi cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Stefano Esposito,Daniele Baieri,Stefan Zellmann,André Hinkenjann,Emanuele Rodolà
title: KiloNeuS: A Versatile Neural Implicit Surface Representation for Real-Time Rendering
title_zh: KiloNeuS：用于实时渲染的多功能神经隐式表面表示
abstract: NeRF-based techniques fit wide and deep multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) to a continuous radiance field that can be rendered from any unseen viewpoint. However, the lack of surface and normals definition and high rendering times limit their usage in typical computer graphics applications. Such limitations have recently been overcome separately, but solving them together remains an open problem. We present KiloNeuS, a neural representation reconstructing an implicit surface represented as a signed distance function (SDF) from multi-view images and enabling real-time rendering by partitioning the space into thousands of tiny MLPs fast to inference. As we learn the implicit surface locally using independent models, resulting in a globally coherent geometry is non-trivial and needs to be addressed during training. We evaluate rendering performance on a GPU-accelerated ray-caster with in-shader neural network inference, resulting in an average of 46 FPS at high resolution, proving a satisfying tradeoff between storage costs and rendering quality. In fact, our evaluation for rendering quality and surface recovery shows that KiloNeuS outperforms its single-MLP counterpart. Finally, to exhibit the versatility of KiloNeuS, we integrate it into an interactive path-tracer taking full advantage of its surface normals. We consider our work a crucial first step toward real-time rendering of implicit neural representations under global illumination.
summary: NeRF-based techniques fit wide and deep multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) to a continuous radiance field that can be rendered from any unseen viewpoint. However, the lack of surface and normals definition and high rendering times limit their usage in typical computer graphics applications. Such limitations have recently been overcome separately, but solving them together remains an open problem. We present KiloNeuS, a neural representation reconstructing an implicit surface represented as a signed distance function (SDF) from multi-view images and enabling real-time rendering by partitioning the space into thousands of tiny MLPs fast to inference. As we learn the implicit surface locally using independent models, resulting in a globally coherent geometry is non-trivial and needs to be addressed during training. We evaluate rendering performance on a GPU-accelerated ray-caster with in-shader neural network inference, resulting in an average of 46 FPS at high resolution, proving a satisfying tradeoff between storage costs and rendering quality. In fact, our evaluation for rendering quality and surface recovery shows that KiloNeuS outperforms its single-MLP counterpart. Finally, to exhibit the versatility of KiloNeuS, we integrate it into an interactive path-tracer taking full advantage of its surface normals. We consider our work a crucial first step toward real-time rendering of implicit neural representations under global illumination.
abstract_zh: 基于 NeRF 的技术将宽而深的多层感知器 (MLP) 适合连续的辐射场，可以从任何看不见的视点进行渲染。然而，缺乏表面和法线定义以及较长的渲染时间限制了它们在典型计算机图形应用中的使用。这些限制最近已被单独克服，但共同解决它们仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了 KiloNeuS，一种神经表示，它可以从多视图图像中重建表示为带符号距离函数 (SDF) 的隐式表面，并通过将空间划分为数千个微小的 MLP 来快速进行推理，从而实现实时渲染。当我们使用独立模型在本地学习隐式表面时，产生全局一致的几何形状是很重要的，需要在训练期间解决。我们使用着色器内神经网络推理来评估 GPU 加速的光线投射器上的渲染性能，在高分辨率下获得平均 46 FPS，证明了存储成本和渲染质量之间的令人满意的权衡。事实上，我们对渲染质量和表面恢复的评估表明 KiloNeuS 的性能优于其单 MLP 同类产品。最后，为了展示 KiloNeuS 的多功能性，我们将其集成到交互式路径跟踪器中，充分利用其表面法线。我们认为我们的工作是在全局照明下实时渲染隐式神经表示的关键的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KiloNeuS，一种基于神经网络的隐式表面表示方法，实现实时渲染。
AI.motivation: 基于NeRF的技术因缺乏表面和法线定义及高渲染延迟，难以满足实时图形应用需求。
AI.method: 通过将空间划分为数千个微型MLP，局部学习隐式表面（SDF），结合GPU加速的光线追踪实现快速推理。
AI.result: 在高分辨率下达到46 FPS，渲染质量优于单MLP方法，并成功集成到路径追踪器中。
AI.conclusion: KiloNeuS为全局光照下的神经隐式表示实时渲染提供了关键解决方案。

search_text: KiloNeuS: A Versatile Neural Implicit Surface Representation for Real-Time Rendering KiloNeuS：用于实时渲染的多功能神经隐式表面表示 NeRF-based techniques fit wide and deep multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs) to a continuous radiance field that can be rendered from any unseen viewpoint. However, the lack of surface and normals definition and high rendering times limit their usage in typical computer graphics applications. Such limitations have recently been overcome separately, but solving them together remains an open problem. We present KiloNeuS, a neural representation reconstructing an implicit surface represented as a signed distance function (SDF) from multi-view images and enabling real-time rendering by partitioning the space into thousands of tiny MLPs fast to inference. As we learn the implicit surface locally using independent models, resulting in a globally coherent geometry is non-trivial and needs to be addressed during training. We evaluate rendering performance on a GPU-accelerated ray-caster with in-shader neural network inference, resulting in an average of 46 FPS at high resolution, proving a satisfying tradeoff between storage costs and rendering quality. In fact, our evaluation for rendering quality and surface recovery shows that KiloNeuS outperforms its single-MLP counterpart. Finally, to exhibit the versatility of KiloNeuS, we integrate it into an interactive path-tracer taking full advantage of its surface normals. We consider our work a crucial first step toward real-time rendering of implicit neural representations under global illumination. 基于 NeRF 的技术将宽而深的多层感知器 (MLP) 适合连续的辐射场，可以从任何看不见的视点进行渲染。然而，缺乏表面和法线定义以及较长的渲染时间限制了它们在典型计算机图形应用中的使用。这些限制最近已被单独克服，但共同解决它们仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们提出了 KiloNeuS，一种神经表示，它可以从多视图图像中重建表示为带符号距离函数 (SDF) 的隐式表面，并通过将空间划分为数千个微小的 MLP 来快速进行推理，从而实现实时渲染。当我们使用独立模型在本地学习隐式表面时，产生全局一致的几何形状是很重要的，需要在训练期间解决。我们使用着色器内神经网络推理来评估 GPU 加速的光线投射器上的渲染性能，在高分辨率下获得平均 46 FPS，证明了存储成本和渲染质量之间的令人满意的权衡。事实上，我们对渲染质量和表面恢复的评估表明 KiloNeuS 的性能优于其单 MLP 同类产品。最后，为了展示 KiloNeuS 的多功能性，我们将其集成到交互式路径跟踪器中，充分利用其表面法线。我们认为我们的工作是在全局照明下实时渲染隐式神经表示的关键的第一步。 本文提出KiloNeuS，一种基于神经网络的隐式表面表示方法，实现实时渲染。 Stefano Esposito,Daniele Baieri,Stefan Zellmann,André Hinkenjann,Emanuele Rodolà cs.CV,cs.GR,cs.LG

authors_text: Chuyang Zhao,Haobo Chen,Wenyuan Zhang,Junru Chen,Sipeng Zhang,Yadong Li,Boxun Li
title: Symmetric Network with Spatial Relationship Modeling for Natural Language-based Vehicle Retrieval
title_zh: 基于自然语言的车辆检索的具有空间关系建模的对称网络
abstract: Natural language (NL) based vehicle retrieval aims to search specific vehicle given text description. Different from the image-based vehicle retrieval, NL-based vehicle retrieval requires considering not only vehicle appearance, but also surrounding environment and temporal relations. In this paper, we propose a Symmetric Network with Spatial Relationship Modeling (SSM) method for NL-based vehicle retrieval. Specifically, we design a symmetric network to learn the unified cross-modal representations between text descriptions and vehicle images, where vehicle appearance details and vehicle trajectory global information are preserved. Besides, to make better use of location information, we propose a spatial relationship modeling methods to take surrounding environment and mutual relationship between vehicles into consideration. The qualitative and quantitative experiments verify the effectiveness of the proposed method. We achieve 43.92% MRR accuracy on the test set of the 6th AI City Challenge on natural language-based vehicle retrieval track, yielding the 1st place among all valid submissions on the public leaderboard. The code is available at https://github.com/hbchen121/AICITY2022_Track2_SSM.
summary: Natural language (NL) based vehicle retrieval aims to search specific vehicle given text description. Different from the image-based vehicle retrieval, NL-based vehicle retrieval requires considering not only vehicle appearance, but also surrounding environment and temporal relations. In this paper, we propose a Symmetric Network with Spatial Relationship Modeling (SSM) method for NL-based vehicle retrieval. Specifically, we design a symmetric network to learn the unified cross-modal representations between text descriptions and vehicle images, where vehicle appearance details and vehicle trajectory global information are preserved. Besides, to make better use of location information, we propose a spatial relationship modeling methods to take surrounding environment and mutual relationship between vehicles into consideration. The qualitative and quantitative experiments verify the effectiveness of the proposed method. We achieve 43.92% MRR accuracy on the test set of the 6th AI City Challenge on natural language-based vehicle retrieval track, yielding the 1st place among all valid submissions on the public leaderboard. The code is available at https://github.com/hbchen121/AICITY2022_Track2_SSM.
abstract_zh: 基于自然语言（NL）的车辆检索旨在搜索给定文本描述的特定车辆。与基于图像的车辆检索不同，基于NL的车辆检索不仅需要考虑车辆外观，还需要考虑周围环境和时间关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于空间关系建模（SSM）的对称网络方法，用于基于 NL 的车辆检索。具体来说，我们设计了一个对称网络来学习文本描述和车辆图像之间的统一跨模态表示，其中保留了车辆外观细节和车辆轨迹全局信息。此外，为了更好地利用位置信息，我们提出了一种考虑周围环境和车辆之间相互关系的空间关系建模方法。定性和定量实验验证了该方法的有效性。我们在第六届人工智能城市挑战赛基于自然语言的车辆检索赛道的测试集上实现了 43.92% 的 MRR 准确率，在公共排行榜上的所有有效提交中获得第一名。该代码可从 https://github.com/hbchen121/AICITY2022_Track2_SSM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对称网络与空间关系建模的方法，用于自然语言描述的车辆检索任务，需同时考虑车辆外观、环境及时间关系。
AI.motivation: 与基于图像的车辆检索不同，自然语言描述的车辆检索需综合车辆外观、周围环境及时间关系，现有方法难以有效建模这些多模态信息与空间关系。
AI.method: 设计对称网络学习文本与图像的统一跨模态表示，保留车辆细节与轨迹信息；提出空间关系建模方法，整合环境信息与车辆间交互关系。
AI.result: 在AI City Challenge 2022自然语言车辆检索赛道测试集上达到43.92%的MRR准确率，位列公共排行榜首位。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨模态表征学习与空间关系建模的结合，有效提升了自然语言描述车辆检索的性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Philip Chikontwe,Soo Jeong Nam,Heounjeong Go,Meejeong Kim,Hyun Jung Sung,Sang Hyun Park
title: Feature Re-calibration based Multiple Instance Learning for Whole Slide Image Classification
title_zh: 基于特征重新校准的全幻灯片图像分类的多实例学习
abstract: Whole slide image (WSI) classification is a fundamental task for the diagnosis and treatment of diseases; but, curation of accurate labels is time-consuming and limits the application of fully-supervised methods. To address this, multiple instance learning (MIL) is a popular method that poses classification as a weakly supervised learning task with slide-level labels only. While current MIL methods apply variants of the attention mechanism to re-weight instance features with stronger models, scant attention is paid to the properties of the data distribution. In this work, we propose to re-calibrate the distribution of a WSI bag (instances) by using the statistics of the max-instance (critical) feature. We assume that in binary MIL, positive bags have larger feature magnitudes than negatives, thus we can enforce the model to maximize the discrepancy between bags with a metric feature loss that models positive bags as out-of-distribution. To achieve this, unlike existing MIL methods that use single-batch training modes, we propose balanced-batch sampling to effectively use the feature loss i.e., (+/-) bags simultaneously. Further, we employ a position encoding module (PEM) to model spatial/morphological information, and perform pooling by multi-head self-attention (PSMA) with a Transformer encoder. Experimental results on existing benchmark datasets show our approach is effective and improves over state-of-the-art MIL methods.
summary: Whole slide image (WSI) classification is a fundamental task for the diagnosis and treatment of diseases; but, curation of accurate labels is time-consuming and limits the application of fully-supervised methods. To address this, multiple instance learning (MIL) is a popular method that poses classification as a weakly supervised learning task with slide-level labels only. While current MIL methods apply variants of the attention mechanism to re-weight instance features with stronger models, scant attention is paid to the properties of the data distribution. In this work, we propose to re-calibrate the distribution of a WSI bag (instances) by using the statistics of the max-instance (critical) feature. We assume that in binary MIL, positive bags have larger feature magnitudes than negatives, thus we can enforce the model to maximize the discrepancy between bags with a metric feature loss that models positive bags as out-of-distribution. To achieve this, unlike existing MIL methods that use single-batch training modes, we propose balanced-batch sampling to effectively use the feature loss i.e., (+/-) bags simultaneously. Further, we employ a position encoding module (PEM) to model spatial/morphological information, and perform pooling by multi-head self-attention (PSMA) with a Transformer encoder. Experimental results on existing benchmark datasets show our approach is effective and improves over state-of-the-art MIL methods.
abstract_zh: 全幻灯片图像（WSI）分类是疾病诊断和治疗的一项基本任务；但是，准确标签的管理非常耗时，并且限制了完全监督方法的应用。为了解决这个问题，多实例学习（MIL）是一种流行的方法，它将分类作为仅具有幻灯片级别标签的弱监督学习任务。虽然当前的 MIL 方法应用注意力机制的变体来使用更强的模型重新加权实例特征，但很少关注数据分布的属性。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用最大实例（关键）特征的统计数据来重新校准 WSI 包（实例）的分布。我们假设在二元 MIL 中，正袋具有比负袋更大的特征量级，因此我们可以强制模型最大化袋之间的差异，并通过度量特征损失将正袋建模为分布外。为了实现这一目标，与使用单批次训练模式的现有 MIL 方法不同，我们提出平衡批次采样以有效地使用特征损失，即同时使用 (+/-) 袋。此外，我们采用位置编码模块（PEM）来建模空间/形态信息，并使用 Transformer 编码器通过多头自注意力（PSMA）进行池化。现有基准数据集的实验结果表明我们的方法是有效的，并且比最先进的 MIL 方法有所改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征重校准的多重实例学习方法，用于解决全切片图像分类中标签获取困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多重实例学习方法过度依赖注意力机制，忽视了数据分布特性，导致分类效果受限。
AI.method: 通过最大实例特征统计量重校准特征分布，结合平衡批次采样、位置编码模块和Transformer编码器的多头自注意力池化。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上优于现有最先进方法，验证了特征分布建模与平衡训练策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据分布特性建模和新型训练策略，显著提升了弱监督下全切片图像分类的性能。

We assume that in binary MIL, positive bags have larger feature magnitudes than negatives, thus we can enforce the model to maximize the discrepancy between bags with a metric feature loss that models positive bags as out-of-distribution. To achieve this, unlike existing MIL methods that use single-batch training modes, we propose balanced-batch sampling to effectively use the feature loss i.e., (+/-) bags simultaneously. Further, we employ a position encoding module (PEM) to model spatial/morphological information, and perform pooling by multi-head self-attention (PSMA) with a Transformer encoder. Experimental results on existing benchmark datasets show our approach is effective and improves over state-of-the-art MIL methods. 全幻灯片图像（WSI）分类是疾病诊断和治疗的一项基本任务；但是，准确标签的管理非常耗时，并且限制了完全监督方法的应用。为了解决这个问题，多实例学习（MIL）是一种流行的方法，它将分类作为仅具有幻灯片级别标签的弱监督学习任务。虽然当前的 MIL 方法应用注意力机制的变体来使用更强的模型重新加权实例特征，但很少关注数据分布的属性。在这项工作中，我们建议通过使用最大实例（关键）特征的统计数据来重新校准 WSI 包（实例）的分布。我们假设在二元 MIL 中，正袋具有比负袋更大的特征量级，因此我们可以强制模型最大化袋之间的差异，并通过度量特征损失将正袋建模为分布外。为了实现这一目标，与使用单批次训练模式的现有 MIL 方法不同，我们提出平衡批次采样以有效地使用特征损失，即同时使用 (+/-) 袋。此外，我们采用位置编码模块（PEM）来建模空间/形态信息，并使用 Transformer 编码器通过多头自注意力（PSMA）进行池化。现有基准数据集的实验结果表明我们的方法是有效的，并且比最先进的 MIL 方法有所改进。 本文提出一种基于特征重校准的多重实例学习方法，用于解决全切片图像分类中标签获取困难的问题。 Philip Chikontwe,Soo Jeong Nam,Heounjeong Go,Meejeong Kim,Hyun Jung Sung,Sang Hyun Park cs.CV

authors_text: Tsung-Ming Tai,Oswald Lanz,Giuseppe Fiameni,Yi-Kwan Wong,Sze-Sen Poon,Cheng-Kuang Lee,Ka-Chun Cheung,Simon See
title: NVIDIA-UNIBZ Submission for EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Action Anticipation Challenge 2022
title_zh: NVIDIA-UNIBZ 提交 2022 年 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 行动预期挑战赛
abstract: In this report, we describe the technical details of our submission for the EPIC-Kitchen-100 action anticipation challenge. Our modelings, the higher-order recurrent space-time transformer and the message-passing neural network with edge learning, are both recurrent-based architectures which observe only 2.5 seconds inference context to form the action anticipation prediction. By averaging the prediction scores from a set of models compiled with our proposed training pipeline, we achieved strong performance on the test set, which is 19.61% overall mean top-5 recall, recorded as second place on the public leaderboard.
summary: In this report, we describe the technical details of our submission for the EPIC-Kitchen-100 action anticipation challenge. Our modelings, the higher-order recurrent space-time transformer and the message-passing neural network with edge learning, are both recurrent-based architectures which observe only 2.5 seconds inference context to form the action anticipation prediction. By averaging the prediction scores from a set of models compiled with our proposed training pipeline, we achieved strong performance on the test set, which is 19.61% overall mean top-5 recall, recorded as second place on the public leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们描述了 EPIC-Kitchen-100 行动预期挑战提交的技术细节。我们的模型、高阶循环时空变换器和具有边缘学习的消息传递神经网络都是基于循环的架构，它们仅观察 2.5 秒的推理上下文来形成动作预期预测。通过对使用我们提出的训练管道编译的一组模型的预测分数进行平均，我们在测试集上取得了出色的性能，前 5 名的整体平均召回率为 19.61%，在公共排行榜上排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了NVIDIA-UNIBZ团队在EPIC-KITCHENS-100动作预判挑战赛中的技术方案，提出两种基于循环结构的模型用于视频动作预测任务。
AI.motivation: 动作预判在视频理解领域具有重要应用价值，但现有方法在短时上下文建模和跨模态特征交互方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 设计了高阶循环时空变换器和边学习消息传递网络两种循环架构，仅使用2.5秒视频片段进行动作预测，并通过多模型预测结果平均提升性能。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到19.61%的总体平均top-5召回率，位列公开排行榜第二名。
AI.conclusion: 基于循环结构的模型有效捕捉了视频时序特征，多模型集成策略显著提升了动作预判性能。

title: UniCon+: ICTCAS-UCAS Submission to the AVA-ActiveSpeaker Task at ActivityNet Challenge 2022
title_zh: UniCon+：ICTCAS-UCAS 在 2022 年 ActivityNet 挑战赛上提交 AVA-ActiveSpeaker 任务
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures; technical report for AVA Challenge (see https://research.google.com/ava/challenge.html) at the International Challenge on Activity Recognition (ActivityNet), CVPR 2022
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures; technical report for AVA Challenge (see https://research.google.com/ava/challenge.html) at the International Challenge on Activity Recognition (ActivityNet), CVPR 2022
abstract: This report presents a brief description of our winning solution to the AVA Active Speaker Detection (ASD) task at ActivityNet Challenge 2022. Our underlying model UniCon+ continues to build on our previous work, the Unified Context Network (UniCon) and Extended UniCon which are designed for robust scene-level ASD. We augment the architecture with a simple GRU-based module that allows information of recurring identities to flow across scenes through read and update operations. We report a best result of 94.47% mAP on the AVA-ActiveSpeaker test set, which continues to rank first on this year's challenge leaderboard and significantly pushes the state-of-the-art.
summary: This report presents a brief description of our winning solution to the AVA Active Speaker Detection (ASD) task at ActivityNet Challenge 2022. Our underlying model UniCon+ continues to build on our previous work, the Unified Context Network (UniCon) and Extended UniCon which are designed for robust scene-level ASD. We augment the architecture with a simple GRU-based module that allows information of recurring identities to flow across scenes through read and update operations. We report a best result of 94.47% mAP on the AVA-ActiveSpeaker test set, which continues to rank first on this year's challenge leaderboard and significantly pushes the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 本报告简要介绍了我们在 2022 年 ActivityNet Challenge 中 AVA 主动说话人检测 (ASD) 任务的获胜解决方案。我们的底层模型 UniCon+ 继续建立在我们之前的工作基础上，即统一上下文网络 (UniCon) 和扩展 UniCon，它们专为强大的场景级 ASD 而设计。我们使用一个简单的基于 GRU 的模块来增强该架构，该模块允许重复身份的信息通过读取和更新操作跨场景流动。我们在 AVA-ActiveSpeaker 测试集上报告了 94.47% mAP 的最佳结果，该结果在今年的挑战排行榜上继续排名第一，并显着推动了最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在ActivityNet挑战赛2022的AVA主动说话者检测任务中获得冠军的解决方案UniCon+。
AI.motivation: 为提升场景级主动说话者检测的鲁棒性，通过跨场景传递重复身份信息以增强模型性能。
AI.method: 在原有UniCon模型基础上，增加基于GRU的模块，通过读取和更新操作实现跨场景的身份信息流动。
AI.result: 在AVA-ActiveSpeaker测试集上达到94.47%的mAP，位列当年挑战赛榜首。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著推动了主动说话者检测任务的最先进水平。

title: Play It Cool: Dynamic Shifting Prevents Thermal Throttling
title_zh: 冷静一点：动态换档可防止热节流
abstract: Machine learning (ML) has entered the mobile era where an enormous number of ML models are deployed on edge devices. However, running common ML models on edge devices continuously may generate excessive heat from the computation, forcing the device to "slow down" to prevent overheating, a phenomenon called thermal throttling. This paper studies the impact of thermal throttling on mobile phones: when it occurs, the CPU clock frequency is reduced, and the model inference latency may increase dramatically. This unpleasant inconsistent behavior has a substantial negative effect on user experience, but it has been overlooked for a long time. To counter thermal throttling, we propose to utilize dynamic networks with shared weights and dynamically shift between large and small ML models seamlessly according to their thermal profile, i.e., shifting to a small model when the system is about to throttle. With the proposed dynamic shifting, the application runs consistently without experiencing CPU clock frequency degradation and latency increase. In addition, we also study the resulting accuracy when dynamic shifting is deployed and show that our approach provides a reasonable trade-off between model latency and model accuracy.
summary: Machine learning (ML) has entered the mobile era where an enormous number of ML models are deployed on edge devices. However, running common ML models on edge devices continuously may generate excessive heat from the computation, forcing the device to "slow down" to prevent overheating, a phenomenon called thermal throttling. This paper studies the impact of thermal throttling on mobile phones: when it occurs, the CPU clock frequency is reduced, and the model inference latency may increase dramatically. This unpleasant inconsistent behavior has a substantial negative effect on user experience, but it has been overlooked for a long time. To counter thermal throttling, we propose to utilize dynamic networks with shared weights and dynamically shift between large and small ML models seamlessly according to their thermal profile, i.e., shifting to a small model when the system is about to throttle. With the proposed dynamic shifting, the application runs consistently without experiencing CPU clock frequency degradation and latency increase. In addition, we also study the resulting accuracy when dynamic shifting is deployed and show that our approach provides a reasonable trade-off between model latency and model accuracy.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 已进入移动时代，大量 ML 模型部署在边缘设备上。然而，在边缘设备上连续运行常见的机器学习模型可能会因计算而产生过多的热量，迫使设备“放慢速度”以防止过热，这种现象称为热节流。本文研究了热节流对手机的影响：当它发生时，CPU 时钟频率降低，模型推理延迟可能急剧增加。这种令人不愉快的不一致行为对用户体验产生了实质性的负面影响，但长期以来却被忽视了。为了应对热节流，我们建议利用具有共享权重的动态网络，并根据其热分布在大型和小型 ML 模型之间无缝动态切换，即当系统即将节流时切换到小型模型。通过建议的动态移位，应用程序可以一致地运行，而不会出现 CPU 时钟频率下降和延迟增加的情况。此外，我们还研究了部署动态移位时所产生的准确性，并表明我们的方法在模型延迟和模型准确性之间提供了合理的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过动态切换大小模型来防止移动设备上的热节流问题，确保模型推理延迟的稳定性。
AI.motivation: 移动设备持续运行机器学习模型会导致过热并触发热节流，从而降低CPU频率和增加延迟，严重影响用户体验但长期被忽视。
AI.method: 利用共享权重的动态网络，根据设备温度动态切换大模型和小模型，在即将发生热节流时无缝切换至小模型。
AI.result: 动态切换方法有效避免了CPU频率下降和延迟激增，同时保持了模型精度的合理平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态模型切换成功缓解了热节流对移动设备的影响，为边缘设备上的持续ML推理提供了可行解决方案。

method: 利用共享权重的动态网络，根据设备温度动态切换大模型和小模型，在即将发生热节流时无缝切换至小模型。
result: 动态切换方法有效避免了CPU频率下降和延迟激增，同时保持了模型精度的合理平衡。
conclusion: 该方法通过动态模型切换成功缓解了热节流对移动设备的影响，为边缘设备上的持续ML推理提供了可行解决方案。
search_text: Play It Cool: Dynamic Shifting Prevents Thermal Throttling 冷静一点：动态换档可防止热节流 Machine learning (ML) has entered the mobile era where an enormous number of ML models are deployed on edge devices. However, running common ML models on edge devices continuously may generate excessive heat from the computation, forcing the device to "slow down" to prevent overheating, a phenomenon called thermal throttling. This paper studies the impact of thermal throttling on mobile phones: when it occurs, the CPU clock frequency is reduced, and the model inference latency may increase dramatically. This unpleasant inconsistent behavior has a substantial negative effect on user experience, but it has been overlooked for a long time. To counter thermal throttling, we propose to utilize dynamic networks with shared weights and dynamically shift between large and small ML models seamlessly according to their thermal profile, i.e., shifting to a small model when the system is about to throttle. With the proposed dynamic shifting, the application runs consistently without experiencing CPU clock frequency degradation and latency increase. In addition, we also study the resulting accuracy when dynamic shifting is deployed and show that our approach provides a reasonable trade-off between model latency and model accuracy. 机器学习 (ML) 已进入移动时代，大量 ML 模型部署在边缘设备上。然而，在边缘设备上连续运行常见的机器学习模型可能会因计算而产生过多的热量，迫使设备“放慢速度”以防止过热，这种现象称为热节流。本文研究了热节流对手机的影响：当它发生时，CPU 时钟频率降低，模型推理延迟可能急剧增加。这种令人不愉快的不一致行为对用户体验产生了实质性的负面影响，但长期以来却被忽视了。为了应对热节流，我们建议利用具有共享权重的动态网络，并根据其热分布在大型和小型 ML 模型之间无缝动态切换，即当系统即将节流时切换到小型模型。通过建议的动态移位，应用程序可以一致地运行，而不会出现 CPU 时钟频率下降和延迟增加的情况。此外，我们还研究了部署动态移位时所产生的准确性，并表明我们的方法在模型延迟和模型准确性之间提供了合理的权衡。 本文提出通过动态切换大小模型来防止移动设备上的热节流问题，确保模型推理延迟的稳定性。 Yang Zhou,Feng Liang,Ting-wu Chin,Diana Marculescu cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Q. Vera Liao,Yunfeng Zhang,Ronny Luss,Finale Doshi-Velez,Amit Dhurandhar
title: Connecting Algorithmic Research and Usage Contexts: A Perspective of Contextualized Evaluation for Explainable AI
title_zh: 连接算法研究和使用情境：可解释人工智能的情境化评估视角
abstract: Recent years have seen a surge of interest in the field of explainable AI (XAI), with a plethora of algorithms proposed in the literature. However, a lack of consensus on how to evaluate XAI hinders the advancement of the field. We highlight that XAI is not a monolithic set of technologies -- researchers and practitioners have begun to leverage XAI algorithms to build XAI systems that serve different usage contexts, such as model debugging and decision-support. Algorithmic research of XAI, however, often does not account for these diverse downstream usage contexts, resulting in limited effectiveness or even unintended consequences for actual users, as well as difficulties for practitioners to make technical choices. We argue that one way to close the gap is to develop evaluation methods that account for different user requirements in these usage contexts. Towards this goal, we introduce a perspective of contextualized XAI evaluation by considering the relative importance of XAI evaluation criteria for prototypical usage contexts of XAI. To explore the context dependency of XAI evaluation criteria, we conduct two survey studies, one with XAI topical experts and another with crowd workers. Our results urge for responsible AI research with usage-informed evaluation practices, and provide a nuanced understanding of user requirements for XAI in different usage contexts.
summary: Recent years have seen a surge of interest in the field of explainable AI (XAI), with a plethora of algorithms proposed in the literature. However, a lack of consensus on how to evaluate XAI hinders the advancement of the field. We highlight that XAI is not a monolithic set of technologies -- researchers and practitioners have begun to leverage XAI algorithms to build XAI systems that serve different usage contexts, such as model debugging and decision-support. Algorithmic research of XAI, however, often does not account for these diverse downstream usage contexts, resulting in limited effectiveness or even unintended consequences for actual users, as well as difficulties for practitioners to make technical choices. We argue that one way to close the gap is to develop evaluation methods that account for different user requirements in these usage contexts. Towards this goal, we introduce a perspective of contextualized XAI evaluation by considering the relative importance of XAI evaluation criteria for prototypical usage contexts of XAI. To explore the context dependency of XAI evaluation criteria, we conduct two survey studies, one with XAI topical experts and another with crowd workers. Our results urge for responsible AI research with usage-informed evaluation practices, and provide a nuanced understanding of user requirements for XAI in different usage contexts.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人们对可解释人工智能（XAI）领域的兴趣激增，文献中提出了大量算法。然而，对于如何评估 XAI 缺乏共识阻碍了该领域的进步。我们强调，XAI 并不是一组单一的技术——研究人员和从业者已经开始利用 XAI 算法来构建服务于不同使用环境的 XAI 系统，例如模型调试和决策支持。然而，XAI的算法研究往往没有考虑到这些不同的下游使用环境，导致效果有限，甚至给实际用户带来意想不到的后果，也给从业者带来技术选择的困难。我们认为，缩小差距的一种方法是开发考虑这些使用环境中不同用户需求的评估方法。为了实现这一目标，我们通过考虑 XAI 评估标准对于 XAI 原型使用​​上下文的相对重要性，引入了上下文化 XAI 评估的视角。为了探索 XAI 评估标准的上下文依赖性，我们进行了两项调查研究，一项与 XAI 主题专家合作，另一项与众包工作者合作。我们的结果敦促通过基于使用情况的评估实践进行负责任的人工智能研究，并提供对不同使用环境中 XAI 的用户需求的细致入微的理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于使用场景的可解释AI（XAI）评估方法，旨在弥合算法研究与实际应用之间的差距。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI算法研究缺乏对多样化使用场景（如模型调试、决策支持）的考量，导致实际效果有限或产生意外后果，需建立符合场景需求的评估体系。
AI.method: 通过两项调查研究（面向XAI专家和众包工作者），分析典型XAI使用场景下评估标准的相对重要性，探索评估标准与场景的依赖关系。
AI.result: 结果显示XAI评估标准因场景而异，现有评估方法难以满足实际需求，需采用场景驱动的评估实践以提升XAI系统的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 应推动以使用场景为导向的负责任AI研究，通过上下文感知的评估方法深化对用户需求的理解，优化XAI系统设计。

authors_text: Ming Li,Jie Wu,Jinhang Cai,Jie Qin,Yuxi Ren,Xuefeng Xiao,Min Zheng,Rui Wang,Xin Pan
title: Parallel Pre-trained Transformers (PPT) for Synthetic Data-based Instance Segmentation
title_zh: 用于基于合成数据的实例分割的并行预训练 Transformer (PPT)
comment: The solution of 1st Place in AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge on CVPR 2022 workshop. Website: https://accessibility-cv.github.io/
comments: The solution of 1st Place in AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge on CVPR 2022 workshop. Website: https://accessibility-cv.github.io/
abstract: Recently, Synthetic data-based Instance Segmentation has become an exceedingly favorable optimization paradigm since it leverages simulation rendering and physics to generate high-quality image-annotation pairs. In this paper, we propose a Parallel Pre-trained Transformers (PPT) framework to accomplish the synthetic data-based Instance Segmentation task. Specifically, we leverage the off-the-shelf pre-trained vision Transformers to alleviate the gap between natural and synthetic data, which helps to provide good generalization in the downstream synthetic data scene with few samples. Swin-B-based CBNet V2, SwinL-based CBNet V2 and Swin-L-based Uniformer are employed for parallel feature learning, and the results of these three models are fused by pixel-level Non-maximum Suppression (NMS) algorithm to obtain more robust results. The experimental results reveal that PPT ranks first in the CVPR2022 AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge, with a 65.155% mAP.
summary: Recently, Synthetic data-based Instance Segmentation has become an exceedingly favorable optimization paradigm since it leverages simulation rendering and physics to generate high-quality image-annotation pairs. In this paper, we propose a Parallel Pre-trained Transformers (PPT) framework to accomplish the synthetic data-based Instance Segmentation task. Specifically, we leverage the off-the-shelf pre-trained vision Transformers to alleviate the gap between natural and synthetic data, which helps to provide good generalization in the downstream synthetic data scene with few samples. Swin-B-based CBNet V2, SwinL-based CBNet V2 and Swin-L-based Uniformer are employed for parallel feature learning, and the results of these three models are fused by pixel-level Non-maximum Suppression (NMS) algorithm to obtain more robust results. The experimental results reveal that PPT ranks first in the CVPR2022 AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge, with a 65.155% mAP.
abstract_zh: 最近，基于合成数据的实例分割已成为一种非常受欢迎的优化范例，因为它利用模拟渲染和物理来生成高质量的图像注释对。在本文中，我们提出了一个并行预训练变压器（PPT）框架来完成基于合成数据的实例分割任务。具体来说，我们利用现成的预训练视觉 Transformer 来缩小自然数据和合成数据之间的差距，这有助于在样本较少的下游合成数据场景中提供良好的泛化能力。采用基于Swin-B的CBNet V2、基于SwinL的CBNet V2和基于Swin-L的Uniformer进行并行特征学习，并通过像素级非极大值抑制（NMS）算法融合这三个模型的结果以获得更鲁棒的结果。实验结果显示，PPT 在 CVPR2022 AVA Accessibility Vision and Autonomy Challenge 中排名第一，mAP 为 65.155%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合成数据的实例分割框架PPT，通过并行预训练Transformer模型提升分割效果。
AI.motivation: 合成数据生成高质量图像-标注对，但自然与合成数据间的差异导致模型泛化能力不足，需减少样本量依赖。
AI.method: 采用Swin-B/Swin-L预训练模型（CBNet V2、Uniformer）并行提取特征，通过像素级非极大值抑制（NMS）融合多模型结果。
AI.result: PPT在CVPR2022 AVA挑战赛中排名第一，mAP达到65.155%。
AI.conclusion: 并行预训练Transformer有效缓解合成数据与自然数据的差异，以少量样本实现高精度实例分割。

authors_text: Nayeong Kim,Sehyun Hwang,Sungsoo Ahn,Jaesik Park,Suha Kwak
title: Learning Debiased Classifier with Biased Committee
title_zh: 通过有偏见的委员会学习有偏见的分类器
comment: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), New Orleans, 2022
comments: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), New Orleans, 2022
abstract: Neural networks are prone to be biased towards spurious correlations between classes and latent attributes exhibited in a major portion of training data, which ruins their generalization capability. We propose a new method for training debiased classifiers with no spurious attribute label. The key idea is to employ a committee of classifiers as an auxiliary module that identifies bias-conflicting data, i.e., data without spurious correlation, and assigns large weights to them when training the main classifier. The committee is learned as a bootstrapped ensemble so that a majority of its classifiers are biased as well as being diverse, and intentionally fail to predict classes of bias-conflicting data accordingly. The consensus within the committee on prediction difficulty thus provides a reliable cue for identifying and weighting bias-conflicting data. Moreover, the committee is also trained with knowledge transferred from the main classifier so that it gradually becomes debiased along with the main classifier and emphasizes more difficult data as training progresses. On five real-world datasets, our method outperforms prior arts using no spurious attribute label like ours and even surpasses those relying on bias labels occasionally.
summary: Neural networks are prone to be biased towards spurious correlations between classes and latent attributes exhibited in a major portion of training data, which ruins their generalization capability. We propose a new method for training debiased classifiers with no spurious attribute label. The key idea is to employ a committee of classifiers as an auxiliary module that identifies bias-conflicting data, i.e., data without spurious correlation, and assigns large weights to them when training the main classifier. The committee is learned as a bootstrapped ensemble so that a majority of its classifiers are biased as well as being diverse, and intentionally fail to predict classes of bias-conflicting data accordingly. The consensus within the committee on prediction difficulty thus provides a reliable cue for identifying and weighting bias-conflicting data. Moreover, the committee is also trained with knowledge transferred from the main classifier so that it gradually becomes debiased along with the main classifier and emphasizes more difficult data as training progresses. On five real-world datasets, our method outperforms prior arts using no spurious attribute label like ours and even surpasses those relying on bias labels occasionally.
abstract_zh: 神经网络很容易偏向类之间的虚假相关性和训练数据主要部分中表现出的潜在属性，这会破坏它们的泛化能力。我们提出了一种新方法来训练没有虚假属性标签的去偏分类器。关键思想是采用分类器委员会作为辅助模块，识别偏差冲突数据，即没有虚假相关性的数据，并在训练主分类器时为其分配较大的权重。该委员会被学习为一个自举的集合，因此它的大多数分类器都存在偏见并且是多样化的，并且故意未能相应地预测偏见冲突数据的类别。因此，委员会内部对预测难度的共识为识别和权衡偏见冲突数据提供了可靠的线索。此外，委员会还接受从主分类器转移的知识的训练，因此随着训练的进行，它会随着主分类器逐渐变得去偏，并强调更困难的数据。在五个真实世界的数据集上，我们的方法优于不使用像我们这样的虚假属性标签的现有技术，甚至偶尔超越那些依赖偏差标签的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需使用虚假属性标签的去偏分类器训练方法，通过构建一个由多个分类器组成的委员会来识别并加权处理存在偏见冲突的数据。
AI.motivation: 神经网络容易因训练数据中类与潜在属性之间的虚假相关性而产生偏见，这会损害其泛化能力。现有方法通常依赖虚假属性标签或偏见标签，但本文旨在无需这些标签的情况下实现去偏。
AI.method: 方法核心是构建一个委员会作为辅助模块，通过集成多个具有偏见但多样化的分类器，识别出无虚假相关性的偏见冲突数据，并为其分配较大权重。委员会通过知识迁移与主分类器协同训练，逐渐去偏并强调困难样本。
AI.result: 在五个真实数据集上，该方法优于无需虚假属性标签的现有方法，甚至超越了依赖偏见标签的算法。
AI.conclusion: 通过委员会共识动态识别偏见冲突数据并调整权重，本文方法在无需虚假属性标签的情况下有效提升了分类器的去偏能力与泛化性能。
